mc: 每個動作都帶來不同的感受。這很讓人分心。

veletia: 那就讓分心轉為覺知。覺知將成為習慣。習慣將成為儀態。這就是你從布料開始，逐步構築一位女王的方式。明天，當我為你穿上高腰棉褲時，你將會理解季節的重量與血脈的溫暖。但今晚，你將穿著這條亞麻襯褲入睡。像女人一樣入睡，像女人一樣醒來，從陽光灑進你窗戶的那一刻起，像女人一樣呼吸。

她的話語帶著終結般的迴響，如同敕令。我只能點頭，即使亞麻布料隨著我身體每個細微的移動而緊貼著我，每一次心跳都在提醒她已開啟的轉變。

柔軟的亞麻布料在夜晚結束時仍緊貼著我，它的織紋溫暖、透氣，與我那天所承受的一切重量相比，顯得平淡無奇。Veletia 的手再次撫過我的臀部，然後帶著沉靜的權威退後一步。

veletia: 今晚你就穿著這些睡，Caelan。它們是基礎，是謙卑的開端。明天你可能會受到絲綢或蕾絲的誘惑，但永遠別忘記，每座宮殿都奠基於石頭之上，而每位女王都立足於她的日常衣裝。學習舒適，學習謙遜。即使是最簡單的布料，你也在蛻變。

/* 我在她房間的備用床上躺下，亞麻布料輕聲摩挲著我，不帶情慾，不帶戲劇性，僅僅是存在。提醒著我，女王之路始於最微小的織紋之中。
 */
[離開 Veletia Roswyn 夫人] |
[離開皇家衣裝綻放室]

passages.name: valetia_session_2
passages.content:
<> <> Morning light cut through the shutters, pale and cool. Veletia already had her brazier burning, its warmth filling the chamber. She studied me with sharp eyes as I entered, still sore from yesterday’s humiliating unveiling.

<>Yesterday you learned the gentleness of linen, my fledgling princess. Today you will learn the weight of warmth and coverage, for not all softness is light. Some is heavy, protective, and unyielding.<>

She let the silence linger, the fire crackling low, my own breathing louder in my ears than I wanted it to be. I stood there still in the linen briefs, shifting nervously, feeling their every seam whispering against my folds.

She reached again for the pedestal, pulling another garment from its drawer, this one heavier, denser, folded square as if it carried the weight of winter itself. When she unfurled it, I saw thick cotton, high-waisted, the cut rising to cover the belly.

<>This second lesson is the discipline of seasons. Every woman must feel the warmth of her garments guard her womb, her belly, her core. <>

<>This is the high-waisted cotton, the undergarment of winters and hard marches. There is no glamour in it only endurance, and endurance is its own form of beauty.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_2_1]] <>
passages.content_zh:
晨光蒼白而冷冽，從百葉窗縫隙切進。Veletia 已點燃她的火盆，溫暖充滿了房間。我走進去時，她以銳利的眼神審視著我，我仍因昨日那場羞辱性的袒露而隱隱作痛。

veletia: 昨天你體會了亞麻的溫柔，我初生的公主。今天你將學習溫暖與遮蔽的重量，因為並非所有的柔軟都是輕盈的。有些是沉重、具保護性且不屈不撓的。

她讓沉默持續，爐火低聲劈啪作響，我自己的呼吸聲在耳中顯得比我所願的更為響亮。我仍穿著亞麻襯褲站在那裡，不安地移動，感受著每一道縫線在我私密處的輕聲摩挲。

她再次伸手向展示台，從抽屜中取出另一件衣物，這一件更厚重、更密實，方方正正地折疊著，彷彿承載著冬日本身的重量。當她展開它時，我看見那是厚實的棉質布料，高腰設計，剪裁向上覆蓋腹部。

veletia: 這第二課是季節的紀律。每個女人都必須感受她的衣裝守護她的子宮、她的腹部、她的核心所帶來的溫暖。

veletia: 這是高腰棉褲，屬於冬季與艱苦行軍的內著。它沒有華麗，只有耐力，而耐力本身就是一種美。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_2_1
passages.content:
<> I frowned, my fingers brushing unconsciously over the waistband of the linen still hugging me.

<>It looks thick, even stiff. How could anyone feel graceful wearing that, Veletia?<>

She smiled faintly, not amused, but in that knowing way she had when she caught me missing the point.

<><>

<>Grace is not always the sway of hips or the glimmer of silk. Grace is also found in resilience the knowledge that you can walk through snow, through hunger, through the weight of duty, and still rise to face the court. This cotton is humble, yes, but when your belly is wrapped in it, you will feel protected. That is its seduction safety, warmth, and the strength of a queen who knows she cannot be shaken by cold winds.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_2_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我皺起眉頭，手指不自覺地拂過仍緊貼著我的亞麻腰帶。

mc: 它看起來很厚，甚至有點硬。穿著那種東西怎麼可能感到優雅，Veletia？

她淡淡一笑，並非覺得有趣，而是帶著那種當她發現我沒抓住重點時，了然於心的神情。

veletia: 優雅並非總是臀部的搖曳或絲綢的微光。優雅也存在於韌性之中——知曉自己能走過風雪、走過飢餓、走過職責的重擔，仍能起身面對宮廷。這棉褲確實樸實，但當你的腹部被它包裹時，你會感到被保護。這就是它的誘惑——安全、溫暖，以及一位深知自己不會被寒風動搖的女王的力量。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_2_2
passages.content:
<> She stepped forward, fingers slipping into the waistband of my linen briefs without asking, though she gave me that sharp look as if daring me to stop her. I shuddered, caught between resistance and surrender.

<>You mean for me to change again? Already? I’ve hardly grown used to these.<>

<>Every garment teaches a lesson, and you will wear them all until your body no longer stumbles between one and the next. Now remove these. Let me see you bare again, and then we sheath you in cotton. This is how queens learn layer by layer, truth by truth.<>

<><>

Her voice made the act sound ritualistic, as though undressing before her was no longer shameful but required.

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_2_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她向前一步，手指未經詢問便滑入我亞麻襯褲的腰帶內，儘管她給了我一個銳利的眼神，彷彿在挑戰我阻止她。我顫抖著，在抗拒與屈服之間動彈不得。

mc: 你是要我再次更換？現在？我幾乎還沒習慣這些。

veletia: 每件衣物都傳授一課，而你將把它們全部穿遍，直到你的身體不再在衣物之間踉蹌。現在脫下這些。讓我再次看見你赤裸的樣子，然後我們將你包裹進棉布裡。女王就是這樣學習的——一層一層，一個真相接一個真相。

她的聲音讓這舉動聽起來像一種儀式，彷彿在她面前褪去衣物不再羞恥，而是必要之舉。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_2_3
passages.content:
<> I obeyed slowly, tugging the linen down over my thighs. The air rushed cool between my legs again, my cheeks burning with the constant reminder of what I had become. Veletia plucked the briefs from my hands, folded them neatly, and set them aside as though archiving a completed lesson.

<><>

She held open the new pair, the cotton heavy in her hands, the waist rising almost to her chest when she dangled them before me.

<>Step in again. Feel how different the weight is, how it covers not only your sex but your womb, your very center. These are not made to seduce a partner; they are made to cradle you, to remind you that queenship must endure long winters and pregnancies alike.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_2_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我緩緩服從，將亞麻布料拉下至大腿。空氣再次涼颼颼地掠過我的雙腿之間，我的臉頰因不斷被提醒自己已成為什麼模樣而持續發燙。Veletia 從我手中取走那件小內褲，整齊地摺好，放到一旁，彷彿在歸檔一項已完成的課程。

她撐開那件新的內褲，棉質布料在她手中顯得厚重，當她將它懸在我面前時，褲腰幾乎升至她胸口。

veletia: 再踏進來。感受這重量有多麼不同，它如何不僅覆蓋你的私處，還覆蓋你的子宮、你的核心。這些不是為了誘惑伴侶而製；它們是為了承托你、提醒你，王權必須能承受漫長的寒冬與妊娠。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_2_4
passages.content:
<> I slid my legs through, the thick cotton cool at first, then quickly warming as it drew up along my thighs, my hips, over my belly. The waistband rose high, hugging me in ways the linen never had. I sucked in a breath as the snugness pressed into me, the fabric’s coarseness rougher than silk but strangely reassuring.

<>It feels… constricting. Like armor, but softer. Not beautiful, not elegant. Only… safe.<>

<><>

<>Yes. Exactly that. Beauty does not vanish because the cloth is plain. Beauty is in what it does to you. Every breath you take now will remind you of your belly, of the woman’s body that beats beneath the skin. The cotton embraces you, grounds you. It is the undergarment of hearth fires, of carrying life, of ruling not from a throne of gold but from a kitchen table in the dead of winter. Remember this feeling, because one day your people will need a queen who can stand in frost and still smile.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_2_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我將雙腿滑入，厚重的棉布起初冰涼，但當它沿著我的大腿、臀部、腹部向上拉起時，便迅速溫暖起來。褲腰高高升起，以亞麻布從未有過的方式緊貼著我。當這貼身的緊繃感壓向我時，我倒吸一口氣，布料的粗糙感比絲綢更甚，卻奇異地令人安心。

mc: 感覺……很束縛。像盔甲，但更柔軟。不美麗，不優雅。只是……安全。

veletia: 是的。正是如此。美麗不會因為布料樸素而消失。美麗在於它對你產生的作用。你現在每一次呼吸都會提醒你你的腹部、提醒你皮膚下搏動的女性身體。棉布擁抱著你，讓你腳踏實地。這是爐火、孕育生命、在嚴冬中於餐桌而非黃金王座上統治的內衣。記住這種感覺，因為總有一天，你的人民將需要一位能立於寒霜中仍能微笑的女王。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_2_5
passages.content:
<> She pressed her palm firmly against my lower belly, right above the waistband, her thumb brushing downward just enough that I shivered.

<>Here. Do you feel how it steadies you? How it makes you breathe deeper, how it anchors your posture? That is the cotton’s lesson. You cannot always be silk and lace. Sometimes, your people will need you to be sturdy cloth, unyielding, immovable, warm when the world is cruel.<>

Her eyes met mine in the mirror, unrelenting.

<>It feels heavier than I expected. But… reassuring. Almost as if it were holding me together.<>

<>That is why you will sleep in them tonight, instead of linen. You will learn the difference in your dreams. Tomorrow, when I strip them away, you will know the contrast of protection and exposure more keenly than words could ever teach you.<>

The cotton rose high over my belly, warmer than the linen, firmer, almost protective. I felt oddly swaddled, though not unpleasantly so. Veletia’s eyes glimmered as she drew the covers over me.

<>Tonight you will know the embrace of warmth. This is the panty of winter, the guardian against frost. Feel it press your stomach, shield your womb, remind you that even queens must be protected by something stronger than pride. Sleep with it close, and in dreams you will learn to trust comfort without shame.<>

It was hot beneath the blankets, but the weight of it steadied me. I drifted off imagining snow beyond the windows, the cotton holding me like unseen arms.

[[Leave Mistress Veletia Roswyn|dressing_bloom]] |

[[Leave Royal Dressing Bloom|castle_map_front_select]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她將手掌堅實地按在我的下腹部，就在褲腰上方，拇指向下輕撫，輕得足以讓我顫抖。

veletia: 這裡。你感覺到它如何讓你穩定嗎？如何讓你呼吸更深沉，如何固定你的姿態？那就是棉布的教誨。你不能總是絲綢與蕾絲。有時，你的人民將需要你成為堅固的布料，不屈不撓，不可動搖，在世人殘酷時給予溫暖。

她的目光在鏡中與我相遇，毫不退讓。

mc: 感覺比預期的更沉重。但是……令人安心。幾乎像是它將我支撐在一起。

veletia: 這就是為何今晚你要穿著它們入睡，而非亞麻布。你將在夢中體會差異。明天，當我將它們褪下時，你將比任何言語所能教導的更深刻地理解保護與暴露的對比。

棉布高高覆蓋我的腹部，比亞麻布更溫暖、更堅實，幾乎具有保護性。我感覺奇異地被包裹著，雖然並不令人不快。Veletia 的眼睛閃爍著光芒，她為我蓋上被褥。

veletia: 今夜你將知曉溫暖的擁抱。這是寒冬的內褲，抵禦霜凍的守護者。感受它壓著你的腹部，護衛你的子宮，提醒你即使女王也必須被比驕傲更強大的事物所保護。貼著它入睡，在夢中你將學會無愧地信任舒適。

毯子下很熱，但那重量讓我穩定下來。我飄然入夢，想像著窗外的雪，棉布像看不見的臂膀般擁抱著我。

[離開 Veletia Roswyn 夫人] |
[離開皇家更衣花廳]

passages.name: valetia_session_3
passages.content:
<> <> The day brought rain hammering against the chamber’s high windows, thunder low and constant. Veletia stood barefoot on the rugs, her hair damp, holding a folded bundle of fabric with ties dangling from it.

<>Today you will learn looseness and separation. You will discover garments that open like secrets, tied only when you command. Not every underthing is snug. Some leave you space to breathe, to sway, to tease.<>

The cotton briefs clung warm and snug against me, but Mistress Veletia wasted no time admiring her work. Already her hands returned to the pedestal, fingers searching, pulling forth something entirely different from the heavy cotton she’d pressed against my womb.

She drew out a pair of garments far looser, pale as milk, tied with long thin cords at waist and knees. They hung in her hands like sacks of air, fluttering lightly in the candle glow.

<>Now, this lesson, drawstring pantlets. They are neither as close as the linen nor as sheltering as the cotton. <>

<>Instead, they offer freedom the airy, practical comfort of split drawers, tied only when you wish them secure. They are garments of mobility, of women who must work, ride, or move swiftly without feeling bound.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_3_1]] <>
passages.content_zh:
白晝帶來雨水敲打著寢室高窗，雷聲低沉而持續。Veletia 赤腳站在地毯上，頭髮微濕，手裡拿著一疊摺好的布料，上面垂掛著繫帶。

veletia: 今天你將學習寬鬆與分離。你將發現像秘密般敞開的衣物，只在你的命令下才繫緊。並非每件內著都貼身。有些給你呼吸、搖曳、挑逗的空間。

棉質內褲溫暖而貼身地依附著我，但 Veletia 夫人並未浪費時間欣賞她的作品。她的手已回到基座，手指摸索著，拉出某種與她曾壓在我子宮上的厚重棉布完全不同的東西。

她取出一件寬鬆得多的衣物，色澤如牛奶般蒼白，在腰部和膝部繫著細長的繩帶。它們在她手中像空氣袋般懸掛著，在燭光中輕輕飄動。

veletia: 現在，這堂課，抽繩短褲。它們既不像亞麻布那樣貼身，也不像棉布那樣具有保護性。

veletia: 相反，它們提供自由——分腿襯褲的通風、實用舒適感，只在你想固定時才繫緊。這是為必須工作、騎馬或快速移動而不感到束縛的女性設計的活動衣物。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_3_1
passages.content:
<> I tilted my head, staring at the cords dangling.

<><>

<>They look far too open, Veletia. I cannot imagine how they even cover what they are meant to cover. It seems… careless.<>

Her lips curved, not in amusement, but in challenge.

<>Careless? No. They are deliberate. Pantlets are the choice of women who know when modesty is a tool, and when speed, comfort, or secrecy is more valuable. They are garments of pragmatism, and in that, they are no less erotic. A queen who rides among soldiers may wear them; a lover who wishes to give access without disrobing may wear them. They remind you that clothing is not always for defense sometimes, it is for possibility.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_3_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我偏著頭，凝視著垂掛的繫繩。

mc: 它們看起來太過開放了，Veletia。我無法想像它們究竟要如何遮蓋理應遮蓋的部位。這似乎……有些草率。

她的唇角彎起，並非出於愉悅，而是帶著挑戰的意味。

veletia: 草率？不。它們是刻意為之。開襠褲是那些懂得何時端莊是工具、何時速度、舒適或隱密更為可貴的女子的選擇。它們是實用主義的服飾，正因如此，它們絲毫不減其誘惑力。一位在士兵中騎行的女王可能會穿著它們；一位希望無需寬衣便能給予對方親近機會的情人也可能穿著它們。它們提醒你，衣物並非總是為了防護——有時，是為了創造可能。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_3_2
passages.content:
<> She reached forward and slid her fingers against the waistband of my cotton panties, tugging them down with steady purpose. I gasped softly, my skin prickling as cool air replaced the warmth. She folded them neatly, as before, setting them aside like a finished lesson.

The pantlets rustled as she shook them open, cords swinging. She knelt again before me, offering the loose, open legs for me to step into.

<><>

<>Step through slowly. Feel the air slip between your thighs as the cloth falls. These are not meant to press against you tightly. They are meant to remind you that your body is no longer shackled by the armor you once wore.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_3_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她伸出手，手指滑過我棉質內褲的腰際，以穩定的力道將它們向下拉。我輕聲倒抽一口氣，肌膚泛起一陣顫慄，溫暖被涼意取代。她像之前一樣將它們整齊摺好，放到一旁，如同完成了一項課程。

開襠褲在她手中抖開時發出窸窣聲，繫繩晃動。她再次在我面前跪下，遞出寬鬆敞開的褲腿讓我踏入。

veletia: 慢慢跨進來。感受布料垂落時，空氣滑過你雙腿之間的感覺。它們並非為了緊貼你而設計。它們旨在提醒你，你的身體不再受你曾穿著的盔甲所束縛。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_3_3
passages.content:
<> I obeyed, one foot and then the other sliding through the gaping legs of the drawers. She pulled them up gently, the fabric light and loose, billowing against my skin. They tied high at my waist with a tug of the cord, then again at each knee, creating a soft gathered silhouette.

<>It feels… strange. Almost like nothing is there at all. But the ties, they pinch in places. They dangle as if begging to be untied.<>

<><>

Her laugh was low, warm, approving.

<>That is the point. These are garments that tease. When you sit, the fabric parts softly. When you walk, you feel the caress of air. And when you tie or untie the cords, you remember that garments are not only for hiding but for revealing on your terms. Even in their practicality, pantlets whisper promise. To a farmer’s wife, they are comfort; to a courtesan, they are invitation.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_3_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我順從了，一隻腳接著另一隻腳滑進開襠褲寬敞的褲腿中。她輕輕將褲子拉起，布料輕盈而寬鬆，在我皮膚上飄拂。她用繫繩在我腰際高處打了個結，然後在每個膝蓋處又各繫一個，形成柔軟收攏的輪廓。

mc: 感覺……很奇怪。幾乎像什麼都沒穿一樣。但這些繫繩，它們在某些地方勒著。它們垂掛著，彷彿乞求著被解開。

她的笑聲低沉、溫暖，帶著讚許。

veletia: 這正是重點。這些是挑逗的服飾。當你坐下，布料會輕柔分開。當你行走，你會感受到空氣的撫觸。而當你繫上或解開繫繩時，你會記得衣物不僅僅是為了隱藏，更是為了依你的意願展露。即使在其實用性中，開襠褲也低語著承諾。對農夫的妻子而言，它們是舒適；對交際花而言，它們是邀請。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_3_4
passages.content:
<> I ran my hands down the loose folds, unsettled at how easily they opened when I shifted. I could feel the whisper of fabric against my bare slit with every slight movement.

<><>

<>But they do not protect me as the cotton did. I feel… exposed. More vulnerable than before. Almost indecent, even though I am covered.<>

<>Vulnerability is not always weakness. Sometimes it is power. When you wear these, you are saying, “I am unbound, unashamed, unafraid.” You could run across a meadow, or kneel at a throne, or open yourself to a lover all without undoing more than a knot. The pantlets teach you readiness, flexibility. They are not indecent. They are versatile. And that, too, is part of queenship to know when to be veiled, and when to be accessible.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_3_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我雙手滑過寬鬆的褶襉，對於它們在我移動時輕易敞開感到不安。每一個微小的動作，我都能感受到布料輕拂過我裸露的私處。

mc: 但它們無法像棉質內褲那樣保護我。我覺得……暴露在外。比之前更脆弱。幾乎可說是不雅，即使我確實穿著衣物。

veletia: 脆弱並不總是弱點。有時它是一種力量。當你穿著這些，你是在宣告：「我無拘無束，無羞無愧，無所畏懼。」你可以奔跑過草原，或跪於王座前，或向愛人敞開自己，而這一切只需解開一個結。開襠褲教導你準備就緒與靈活應變。它們並非不雅。它們是萬用的。而這，也是女王之道的一部分——懂得何時該遮掩，何時該開放。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_3_5
passages.content:
<> She touched the ties at my knees, tugging them just enough to tighten, then loosening again so I felt the shift of fabric brushing along my inner thighs. The sensation made me tremble, heat curling low in my belly.

<>Feel how quickly I can bind or release you. That is the lesson you must learn. Drawstring pantlets are a symbol of choice. Your body, your access, your readiness all controlled by a simple knot. Remember this well, because a queen rules not only through decree, but through choosing when to tie, and when to release.<>

<>It is both freeing and unnerving. Like standing naked beneath a cloak of air.<>

<>Good. That tension is what makes them powerful. Tonight, you will wear them after the cotton. You will compare. You will wake knowing the difference between guarded warmth and playful openness. Only then can you understand what each garment teaches you.<>

The ties tugged faintly at my hips as I lay down, the fabric splitting gently between my thighs. Every small movement made me aware of how precariously they were fastened. Veletia watched, seated by the mirror, lips curved.

<>Let the knots haunt you tonight. Toss, turn, and feel the ties strain or loosen. Every bow is a choice; every slip a lesson. By dawn, you will understand how garments can be cages or invitations and how easily either can fall away.<>

The whisper of ties against my skin kept me restless, half-dreaming of hands untying them.

[[Leave Mistress Veletia Roswyn|dressing_bloom]] |

[[Leave Royal Dressing Bloom|castle_map_front_select]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她觸碰我膝蓋上的繫繩，輕輕拉緊，然後再次放鬆，讓我感受布料沿著大腿內側移動的變化。這感覺讓我顫抖，一股熱意在腹部深處盤旋。

veletia: 感受我能多快將你束縛或釋放。這是你必須學習的一課。繫繩開襠褲是選擇的象徵。你的身體、你的開放、你的準備狀態，全由一個簡單的結所控制。好好記住這一點，因為女王不僅通過法令統治，更通過選擇何時繫緊、何時鬆開來統治。

mc: 這既讓人自由，又令人不安。就像赤裸地站在一襲空氣織成的斗篷之下。

veletia: 很好。那種張力正是它們力量的來源。今晚，你將在棉質內褲之後穿著它們。你要比較。你將在醒來時明白被守護的溫暖與遊戲般的開放之間的差異。唯有如此，你才能理解每一件衣物所教導你的東西。
當我躺下時，繫繩輕微地拉扯著我的臀部，布料在我雙腿間溫柔地分開。每一個微小的動作都讓我意識到它們的固定是多麼不穩固。Veletia 坐在鏡子旁注視著，唇角微揚。
veletia: 讓這些結今晚縈繞著你。輾轉反側，感受繫繩的緊繃或鬆弛。每一個蝴蝶結都是一個選擇；每一次滑動都是一課教導。黎明之前，你將理解衣物如何能成為牢籠或邀請，以及兩者都能多輕易地脫落。
繫繩在我皮膚上的細微摩擦讓我難以安眠，半夢半醒間彷彿有手正在解開它們。
[離開 Veletia Roswyn 夫人] |
[離開皇家更衣花廳]

passages.name: valetia_session_4
passages.content:
<> <> Frost rimed the corners of the mirror this morning, the air biting at my bare skin until Veletia pulled me nearer to the fire. She draped thick wool across her arms, its padding obvious even from afar.

<>Do you feel the bite of the cold, little queenling? Today’s garment is not for seduction but for survival. A woman’s body must be guarded even in winter, and the warmth of wool is as sacred as the heat of silk.<>



The pantlets swished softly as I shifted, air curling around my thighs, but Mistress Veletia was already reaching again for another piece from her arsenal. She pulled out something thicker, darker, its weight evident even folded. When she laid it across her arm, I saw layers of wool padded and stitched, not flimsy or free like the drawers but heavy, insulating.

<>Now, for your this lesson. These are the woolen winter panties. They do not tease with openness or whisper like linen; they enclose, protect, and command endurance. They are for long hunts in frost, for days of snowbound council, for nights when even your palace fires do not suffice. In these, your womb remains warm, your thighs shielded. In these, you endure the season without faltering.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_4_1]] <>
passages.content_zh:
今晨鏡緣凝著白霜，空氣刺痛我裸露的肌膚，直到Veletia將我拉近爐火旁。她將厚羊毛披掛在臂上，即便從遠處也能看出其填充的厚度。
veletia: "感受到寒冷的刺痛了嗎，小女王？今日的衣著不為誘惑，只為生存。女子的身體即便在冬日也需守護，而羊毛的溫暖與絲綢的熾熱同樣神聖。"

我移動時襯褲輕柔窸窣，空氣纏繞大腿，但Veletia夫人已再次伸手探向她的衣裝庫。她取出一件更厚、色澤更深沉的衣物，即便摺疊著也能看出其分量。當她將其攤在臂上時，我看見層層羊毛填充縫合，不似襯褲那般輕薄飄逸，而是厚重、隔絕的。

veletia: "現在，是你這堂課的內容。這是羊毛冬用內褲。它們不以開放挑逗，亦不如亞麻低語；它們包裹、保護，並要求耐力。這是為霜雪中的長途狩獵，為大雪封鎖的議事之日，為連宮殿爐火也不足以溫暖的夜晚而製。穿上它，你的子宮保持溫暖，你的大腿受到庇護。穿上它，你便能安然度過這季節，毫不動搖。"

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_4_1
passages.content:
<> I eyed the thick garment skeptically.

<><>



<>They look coarse, Veletia. Surely no woman would choose this bulk willingly, when silk and lace exist. Wouldn’t they feel more like a prison than an adornment?<>

Her smile was faint, sharp.

<>And yet you forget the truth of royalty. A queen must be many things silk at a feast, lace at a lover’s bed, and wool in the dead of winter. These panties may look plain, but they are stitched with survival. When frost bites at every breath and your people look to you for warmth, you must embody it. These make you sturdy, immovable. Their embrace is not seduction, but defiance. And defiance has its own dark allure.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_4_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我懷疑地審視這件厚重衣物。

mc: "它們看起來很粗糙，Veletia。既然有絲綢與蕾絲，肯定沒有女子會自願選擇這種臃腫之物。難道它們不會更像牢籠而非裝飾嗎？"

她的笑容淺淡而銳利。
veletia: "然而你忘了王室的真相。女王必須是多面的——宴會上的絲綢，情人床榻的蕾絲，以及嚴冬中的羊毛。這內褲或許看似樸素，但它們縫入了生存之道。當寒霜刺痛每次呼吸，而你的人民仰賴你給予溫暖時，你必須化身為溫暖本身。它們使你堅固，不可動搖。它們的擁抱不是誘惑，而是反抗。而反抗自有其黑暗的魅力。"

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_4_2
passages.content:
<> She crouched at my knees, her fingers deft at the knots of the pantlets. She loosened, tugged, and slid the airy garment away, leaving me bare again for the third time. Each unveiling grew no easier my cheeks flushed, my breath shallow, the candlelight like eyes. She set the pantlets aside, folded square, as if filing away another completed ritual.

She spread the woolen garment open. The inside was softer than it appeared, brushed smooth like velvet but thick, quilted to trap heat.

<><>

<>Step in. Feel the weight. They will not flutter, nor whisper. They will anchor you, remind you that there is a time when a queen must accept bulk, must sacrifice frivolity for warmth and strength. These are for ruling in snow, for walking the halls when icicles form on the rafters.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_4_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她蹲跪在我膝前，手指靈巧地解開襯褲的繫結。她鬆開、輕拉，將那輕薄的衣物褪下，使我第三次裸露。每次揭露並未變得更容易——我臉頰發燙，呼吸淺促，燭光如眾目睽睽。她將襯褲摺成方形置於一旁，彷彿歸檔另一項已完成的儀式。

她展開羊毛衣物。內裡比外表柔軟，如天鵝絨般刷順，但厚實、夾棉以鎖住熱氣。

veletia: "踏進來。感受其重量。它們不會飄動，亦不會低語。它們將錨定你，提醒你：女王有時必須接受臃腫，必須為溫暖與力量犧牲輕浮。這是為雪中統治，為冰柱懸於樑時巡行廳廊而備。"

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_4_3
passages.content:
<> I obeyed, sliding my legs into the heavy garment. The wool slid up slowly, thick fabric brushing over my calves and thighs until the waistband rose to grip firmly above my hips. They felt padded, warm almost instantly, as though lit with their own inner fire. My body adjusted to the embrace, strange and steadying.

<><>

<>It feels smothering. Too warm, too thick. I can barely move my thighs as I could with the others.<>

<>Yes. And yet imagine snow against your skin, imagine riding for hours in biting wind. These are armor of softness, insulation, endurance. They sacrifice flirtation for survival, and survival is seductive in its own way. A queen is never more powerful than when she defies winter itself and smiles. These woolen panties whisper: “I will not die, I will not falter, I will not yield.”<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_4_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我順從地將雙腿滑入這沉重衣物。羊毛緩緩上移，厚實布料拂過小腿與大腿，直到腰帶升至臀上緊緊環繞。它們感覺填充飽滿，幾乎瞬間溫暖起來，彷彿內裡自有火焰燃燒。我的身體適應了這擁抱，陌生卻令人安定。

mc: "感覺很悶。太暖、太厚了。我幾乎無法像穿其他衣物那樣自由移動雙腿。"

veletia: "是的。但想像冰雪觸及肌膚，想像在刺骨寒風中騎行數小時。這是柔軟的盔甲，隔絕、耐久。它們為生存犧牲調情，而生存本身自有其誘人之處。當女王蔑視寒冬並微笑時，正是她最強大的時刻。這羊毛內褲低語：『我不會死，不會動搖，不會屈服。』"

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_4_4
passages.content:
<> Her hands roamed slowly across the thick waistband, pressing down so that I felt how firmly they hugged my belly, how secure. She cupped the padding at my hips, making me shiver with the strength of her touch through the cloth.

<><>

<>They feel heavy… but also safe. Like being wrapped in a blanket. I cannot imagine wearing them under silks, though. They would ruin the line.<>

<>Exactly. Every garment has its place. These are not for feasts or dances. They are for nights in lonely chambers when the winds howl, when even the Queen herself shivers but must sit the throne regardless. They are not beautiful, not outwardly. But when you peel them away after enduring a day’s cold, when you finally let the warmth of your skin breathe free, the sensation is more exquisite than any jewel. That is their hidden sensuality privation first, indulgence after.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_4_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她的雙手緩緩撫過厚重腰帶，向下按壓使我感受它們如何緊擁腹部，如何穩固。她捧住我臀部的填充處，隔著布料以強勁的觸碰令我顫慄。

mc: "感覺沉重……但也安全。像被毯子包裹。不過我無法想像將它們穿在絲綢之下。它們會破壞線條。"

veletia: "正是如此。每件衣物皆有其所。這不是為宴會或舞會而製。這是為狂風呼嘯的孤寂寢宮之夜，為連女王自身也顫抖卻仍須端坐王座之時。它們不美，外表不美。但當你熬過一日嚴寒後將其褪下，當你終於讓肌膚的溫暖自由呼吸時，那感受比任何珠寶都更精妙。這便是它們隱藏的感官性——先是匱乏，後是放縱。"

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_4_5
passages.content:
<> She leaned closer, lips almost brushing my ear.

<>Tonight, after you have worn the airy pantlets and these woolen guards, you will know both extremes freedom and enclosure, exposure and insulation. A queen must carry them all, must know how each shapes her body and her poise. You will sleep sweating under their embrace, and in that sweat, you will dream of power, not weakness.<>

<>You make every garment sound like a crown, Veletia.<>

Her laugh was low, pleased.

<>That is because every one of them is. And before I am finished with you, you will wear each as if it were forged of gold and blessed by the first queens themselves.<>

By nightfall, the thick wool was nearly suffocating, hot under the blankets. I squirmed, but Veletia pulled the cover tighter, her voice stern.

<>No queen may complain of armor, nor of wool. Sleep in its weight. Sweat in it if you must. You will wake knowing that comfort is not always luxury sometimes comfort is survival. The heat that smothers you is the same heat that will keep you alive through frost and famine. Learn to endure, Caelan. Endurance is a queen’s silent crown.<>

I sweated and shifted, yet in the end sleep came, heavy and close, as though the wool and I had become one unyielding shell.

[[Leave Mistress Veletia Roswyn|dressing_bloom]] |

[[Leave Royal Dressing Bloom|castle_map_front_select]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她靠得更近，嘴唇幾乎擦過我的耳朵。

veletia: 今晚，在你穿過透氣的短襪褲和這些羊毛護具後，你將同時體驗兩種極端——自由與束縛、暴露與隔絕。一位女王必須承載這一切，必須知曉每一件衣物如何塑造她的身形與儀態。你將在它們的擁抱中汗流浹背地入睡，而在那汗水裡，你將夢見力量，而非軟弱。

mc: 你讓每一件衣物聽起來都像一頂王冠，Veletia。

她的笑聲低沉而愉悅。

veletia: 那是因為它們每一件都是。在我完成對你的教導之前，你將把每一件衣物都穿得像是由黃金鑄造、並經初代女王們祝福過那般。

夜幕降臨時，厚重的羊毛幾乎令人窒息，在毯子下悶熱難耐。我扭動身子，但Veletia把被子拉得更緊，聲音嚴厲。

veletia: 女王不可抱怨盔甲，亦不可抱怨羊毛。在它的重量中入睡。若有必要，就在其中流汗。你醒來時將明白，舒適並非總是奢侈——有時舒適即是生存。令你窒息的熱度，也正是能在嚴霜與饑荒中保住你性命的熱度。學會忍耐，Caelan。忍耐是女王無聲的王冠。

我汗流浹背、輾轉反側，但最終睡意仍沉重而緊密地降臨，彷彿羊毛與我已融為一體，化為堅不可摧的外殼。

[離開 Veletia Roswyn 夫人] |
[離開皇家更衣花廳]

passages.name: valetia_session_5
passages.content:
<> <> The morning after the wool felt suffocating, my skin still itching faintly from its coarse weave. Veletia waited this time with a lighter mood, perched on her dressing stool, holding a garment cut startlingly low at the waist.

<>Too much fabric weighs a queen down. Too little, and she risks scandal. Today you will learn balance a panty that rests low, modest but playful, a compromise between coverage and temptation.<>

The wool still clung to me, too warm, almost suffocating, when Veletia straightened and reached once more into her endless trove. What she withdrew this time seemed lighter, sleeker, cut narrower than anything before. When she held it up between her fingers, I saw it was a low-riding pair of soft woven fabric, smaller at the sides, dipping below the belly line.

<>Now, the this lesson: the hipster panty. It does not rise to guard your womb like cotton, nor drape open like pantlets, nor encase you like wool. <>

<> Instead, it rests low on your hips, modest enough to cover, but daring enough to remind you of your curves. This garment is play, subtle confidence stitched in cloth.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_5_1]] <>
passages.content_zh:
穿著羊毛入睡後的早晨，仍感覺窒息，粗糙的織紋讓我的皮膚隱隱發癢。這次Veletia以較輕鬆的心情等待著，她坐在梳妝凳上，手裡拿著一件腰線剪裁低得驚人的衣物。

veletia: 過多的布料會拖累女王。過少，則有招致醜聞之險。今天你將學習平衡——一條低腰的內褲，端莊卻又俏皮，是遮蓋與誘惑之間的妥協。

羊毛仍緊貼著我，過於溫暖、幾乎令人窒息，此時Veletia直起身，再次探入她那無盡的寶庫。這次她取出的衣物看似更輕盈、更貼身，剪裁比之前任何一件都更窄。當她用指尖將其提起時，我看清那是一條低腰的柔軟織物內褲，兩側較窄，腰線低於肚臍。

veletia: 現在，這堂課的主題：低腰內褲。它不像棉質內褲那樣高聳守護你的子宮，不像短襪褲那樣敞開垂墜，也不像羊毛那樣將你包裹。

veletia: 
相反，它低低地落在你的臀部上，端莊得足以遮蓋，卻又夠大膽，能提醒你自身的曲線。這件衣物是嬉戲，是縫入布料中的細膩自信。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_5_1
passages.content:
<> I frowned, tilting my head as I studied the smallness of the cut.

<><>

<>They look… impractical. There’s barely anything to them compared to what you’ve shown me. Wouldn’t they slide down if I moved too much?<>

Her lips curved slowly, dangerously.

<>They cling tighter than you think, stitched to embrace the slope of your hipbones. They leave your belly bare, accentuate your waist, and hint at what lies beneath without surrendering modesty. They are for a woman who knows her own shape and does not apologize for it. For a queen who wants the world to sense she is desirable, yet dignified.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_5_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我皺起眉頭，偏頭端詳著那小巧的剪裁。

mc: 它們看起來……不實用。跟你展示過的衣物相比，它們幾乎沒什麼布料。如果我動作太大，它們不會滑落嗎？

她的嘴唇緩緩彎起，帶著危險的弧度。

veletia: 它們的貼合度超乎你想像，縫製得能緊貼你髖骨的弧度。它們讓你的腹部裸露，強調你的腰線，並隱約暗示其下的風光，卻不犧牲端莊。它們是為了解自身身形、且從不為此道歉的女性而設計。是為了讓世界感知她既迷人又莊重的女王。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_5_2
passages.content:
<> She stepped to me, fingers deftly working at the waistband of the woolen winter panties. She tugged them down slowly, and the hot, padded fabric released my thighs with a sigh. I shivered, gooseflesh prickling instantly at the sudden exposure. She folded the wool neatly, set it aside, then lifted the hipsters in both hands like an offering.

<><>

<>Step in. Let the fabric kiss low across your hips. These do not command your belly; they invite your hips to speak for you. Remember, hips sway long before lips speak, and queenship is as much posture as it is proclamation.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_5_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她走向我，手指靈巧地解開羊毛冬用內褲的腰帶。她緩緩將其拉下，那悶熱的加厚布料如釋重負般離開我的大腿。我打了個冷顫，突然暴露的肌膚瞬間泛起雞皮疙瘩。她將羊毛內褲整齊摺好、放在一旁，然後雙手捧起低腰內褲，如同獻祭般。

veletia: 踏進來。讓布料輕吻你的臀部下方。它們不束縛你的腹部；它們邀請你的臀部為你發言。記住，臀部搖曳遠早於唇舌言語，而女王之道既是姿態，亦是宣言。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_5_3
passages.content:
<> I obeyed, one foot, then the other, into the narrow garment. She pulled it up with delicate precision, the soft cloth sliding easily, coming to rest snug just above my thighs, riding low beneath my navel. It clung close but not harsh, accentuating the soft swell of my hips.

<><>

<>It feels… smaller. Almost indecent. My stomach is bare, my hips feel more pronounced than they did before. I feel as though I am on display, even if no one can see me.<>

<><>

<>That is the magic of hipsters. They show you how to be aware of your lines, of how your body moves. When you walk, you will feel them tug against your hips with every step. When you sit, you will feel the waistband tug lower, reminding you that you are not a soldier anymore. You are a woman with hips made for sway and strength both.<>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_5_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我順從地將一隻腳、接著另一隻腳踏入那窄小的衣物中。她以細緻的精準度將其拉起，柔軟的布料輕易滑上，妥貼地停在大腿上方，低低地落在肚臍之下。它貼身卻不緊勒，強調了我臀部柔和的曲線。

mc: 感覺……更小了。幾乎有些不雅。我的腹部裸露，臀部感覺比之前更顯突出。我覺得自己像是在展示，即使無人能看見。

veletia: 這就是低腰內褲的魔力。它們教你意識到自己的線條，意識到身體如何移動。當你行走時，每一步都會感受到它們輕扯你的臀部。當你坐下時，你會感受到腰帶向下輕拉，提醒你：你不再是士兵了。你是一位女性，擁有兼具搖曳與力量的臀部。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_5_4
passages.content:
<> She placed her hands lightly at my waist, sliding down to trace the waistband of the panties, her thumbs brushing low enough to make me catch my breath.

<>These are not for the frost, not for battle, not for ceremony. They are for leisure, for the chambers, for moments when you want to feel your own femininity ripple beneath the fabric. They are also a lover’s delight, for they suggest curves without revealing too much. They remind the eye that there is more below always more and queens must learn to wield mystery as well as command.<>

<>They make me feel… lighter. But also bare. I don’t know if I could sit before a court wearing only these beneath my gown.<>

<>And that is why you will wear them in practice first. Tonight, after you sleep in wool, tomorrow you will wear these all morning. You will learn the difference between being covered for safety and covered for allure. Both are weapons, and you will master them equally.<>

The low cut left my belly bare to the sheets, the waistband pressing firmly at my hips. Veletia tucked me in, her hands lingering at my waistline before retreating.

<>Tonight you will dream of hips that sway. Feel the band remind you with every toss and turn that your center lies here, at the cradle of your body. Let your hips speak to you in sleep. By morning, you will rise with a new awareness of how curves move not just flesh, but perception.<>

I shifted, always conscious of the tug low on my body, of the shape I had to inhabit now.

[[Leave Mistress Veletia Roswyn|dressing_bloom]] |

[[Leave Royal Dressing Bloom|castle_map_front_select]] <>
passages.content_zh:
她將雙手輕放在我的腰際，滑下撫過內褲的腰帶邊緣，拇指低撫的觸感讓我屏住了呼吸。

veletia: 這些不是為嚴寒、不是為戰鬥、也不是為典禮準備的。它們是為閒暇、為寢室、為那些你想感受自身女性特質在布料下蕩漾的時刻而存在。它們也是取悅情人的小物，因為它們暗示了曲線卻不過度暴露。它們提醒注視者：下方總有更多、永遠更多，而女王必須學會駕馭神秘，一如掌握命令。

mc: 它們讓我感覺……更輕盈。但也更赤裸。我不確定能否只穿著這些坐在長袍下出席朝會。

veletia: 所以你得先從練習開始穿著。今晚，在你睡過羊毛衣物後，明天整個上午你都會穿著這些。你將學會「為安全而遮蓋」與「為誘惑而遮蓋」的區別。兩者皆是武器，而你將同等熟練地掌握它們。
低腰剪裁讓我的腹部裸露在床單上，腰帶緊貼著我的髖部。Veletia為我蓋好被子，雙手在我的腰際流連片刻才收回。
veletia: 今晚你將夢見搖曳的臀肢。讓腰帶在你每一次翻身時提醒你：你的重心就在此處，在你身體的搖籃中。讓你的臀在睡夢中對你低語。到了早晨，你將帶著全新的覺醒起身——明白曲線如何不僅牽動血肉，更牽動感知。
我挪動身子，始終意識到身體低處那股牽引感，以及此刻我必須接納的體態。
[離開 Veletia Roswyn 夫人] |
[離開皇家更衣花廳]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_38
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
The training yard echoed outside, steel on steel, while Veletia’s chamber smelled of polished leather and candle wax. She stood like a commander rather than a seamstress, holding what looked almost like short breeches.
<<speech "veletia">>You cannot forget your soldier’s blood, Caelan. Today’s lesson is not about frill or lace, but discipline. These garments cling steady, follow every movement, and make you remember that even queens fight.<</speech>>
The low-cut fabric of the hipsters still hugged me when Veletia turned once more to the pedestal. She rifled among folded stacks until she pulled free something altogether different again: a square of cloth cut wider, sturdier, with legs that stretched farther down the thigh. When she shook it open, I recognized the shape at once shorts, but snug and clearly designed to cling.

<<speech "veletia">>Lesson six, Caelan: boyshorts. They are not playful like hipsters, nor swaddling like wool, nor open like pantlets. They are practical, solid, yet not without charm. These are for women who train, who spar, who ride. They cradle you firm, without riding up, and they remind you that comfort itself can be seductive when worn with intent.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_39]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
訓練場的金屬撞擊聲在外迴盪，而Veletia的房間瀰漫著打磨過的皮革與蠟燭氣味。她站姿如指揮官而非裁縫師，手中拿著看似短馬褲的衣物。
veletia: 你不能忘記自己身為戰士的血脈，Caelan。今日的課程無關褶邊或蕾絲，而是關於紀律。這些衣物緊貼不移，跟隨每個動作，讓你記住即使女王也需戰鬥。
當Veletia再次轉身走向展示台時，低腰剪裁的嘻哈褲仍緊貼著我。她在層疊的布料中翻找，直到抽出一件截然不同的衣物：一塊剪裁更寬、更結實的方形布料，褲腿延伸至大腿更下方。她將其抖開時，我立刻認出那形狀——短褲，但貼身且顯然設計為緊裹款式。

veletia: 第六課，Caelan：平口褲。它們不像嘻哈褲那般俏皮，不像羊毛褲那般束縛，也不像開襠褲那般開放。它們實用、穩固，卻並非毫無魅力。這是為訓練、對練、騎馬的女性設計的。它們穩穩承托你，不會上滑，並提醒你：當懷著意圖穿著時，舒適本身便能成為誘惑。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_39
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I frowned at the shape, watching her fold the hipsters off my hips, leaving me bare yet again under the gaze of firelight and mirror. She folded them neatly, as always, then held out the boyshorts for me to step through.

<<speech "mc">>They look too plain, Veletia. Too much like something a man might wear. Why would a queen choose such a blunt cut when she could choose silks or lace?<</speech>>

Her smile was patient, sharp as ever.

<<speech "veletia">>Because a queen does not always choose garments to delight others. Sometimes she chooses for herself, for her training, for her readiness to move. Boyshorts hold you close, smooth, and steady. They do not flutter like pantlets or cling low like hipsters. They stay, they grip, they make you feel contained but not bound. And that containment is not ugly it is strength made cloth.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_40]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我皺眉看著那款式，注視她將嘻哈褲從我髖部褪下，讓我在火光與鏡子的凝視下再次赤裸。她如常整齊地摺好衣物，然後遞出平口褲讓我套入。

mc: 它們看起來太樸素了，Veletia。太像男人會穿的東西。當女王可以選擇絲綢或蕾絲時，為何要選如此直白的剪裁？

她的笑容依舊耐心而銳利。

veletia: 因為女王並非總是為取悅他人而選擇衣著。有時她為自己、為訓練、為隨時行動的準備而選擇。平口褲貼身、平滑且穩固地承托你。它們不會像開襠褲般飄動，也不會像嘻哈褲般低腰緊貼。它們保持原位、緊密貼合，讓你感到被包裹而非束縛。而這種包裹並非醜陋——它是化為布料的堅韌。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_40
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I stepped in, the fabric rising smoothly, hugging over my thighs and up across my hips, cupping me tight but not uncomfortably so. The sensation was unlike the others it was secure, reliable, firm.

<<speech "mc">>They feel almost… athletic. Like I could run, or stretch, or fight in them. They don’t shift like the pantlets or cling like the hipsters. They simply stay. I can understand their use, but where is the allure in that?<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>The allure is in the steadiness. Imagine a queen sparring with her knights, bowstring drawn, blade in hand, and beneath her armor these boyshorts grip her body, unseen but utterly dependable. There is a quiet seduction in that certainty that no matter how you lunge, bend, or twist, you are held firmly. It is not the seduction of lace. It is the seduction of strength, of knowing your body is supported in every motion.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_41]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我踏入褲中，布料順滑上提，緊裹大腿與髖部，將我穩穩包覆卻不至於不適。這種感受與其他款式不同——它安全、可靠、堅實。

mc: 感覺幾乎像……運動服。彷彿我能穿著它們奔跑、伸展或戰鬥。它們不會像開襠褲那樣移位，也不會像嘻哈褲那樣緊黏。它們就只是穩穩待著。我能理解其用途，但這其中的魅力何在？

veletia: 魅力正在於這份穩固。想像一位女王與她的騎士對練，拉弓弦、執刀劍，而在盔甲之下，這條平口褲緊貼她的身軀，無人得見卻絕對可靠。這份確信中存在一種靜默的誘惑——無論你如何突刺、彎身或扭轉，都被牢牢承托。這不是蕾絲的誘惑。這是力量的誘惑，是知曉自己的身體在每個動作中都得到支撐的誘惑。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_41
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She moved around me, her hands pressing along the fabric, smoothing it over my hips, down the outside of my thighs, then tracing deliberately along the inner seam where it cupped me snugly. My breath caught as her touch emphasized the fit.

<<speech "veletia">>These boyshorts will teach you balance. They are perfect beneath armor, yes, but also beneath robes when you must mount a horse in public without scandal. They are the garment of discipline no frill, no distraction, only purpose. And when you strip them away later, after they have hugged you all day, you will feel the ache of freedom so sweet it will make you gasp.<</speech>>

<<speech "mc">>They make me feel… less like a princess, more like a soldier. And yet… there’s a strange comfort in that. A familiarity, perhaps, with my past self.<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>Exactly. They let you bridge the man you were and the woman you are becoming. A soldier’s steadiness, a queen’s poise. They remind you that transformation does not mean abandoning discipline. It means refining it into new shapes.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_42]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她繞著我移動，雙手沿著布料按壓，將其撫平貼合我的臀部，順著大腿外側向下，然後刻意沿著緊貼我身形的內側縫線描摹。當她的觸碰強調著這份貼合時，我的呼吸為之一滯。

veletia: 這件平口褲會教你平衡。它們在盔甲下很完美，沒錯，但當你必須在公開場合騎馬而不引起醜聞時，在長袍下也同樣合適。這是紀律的服裝，沒有多餘裝飾，沒有分心之物，只有目的。而當你稍後將它們褪下時，在它們擁抱你一整天之後，你會感受到自由的酸痛，那滋味如此甜美，會讓你屏息。

mc: 它們讓我感覺……不太像公主，更像士兵。然而……其中有種奇怪的舒適感。或許，是與過去的自己有一種熟悉感。

veletia: 正是如此。它們讓你在曾經的男人和正在成為的女人之間架起橋樑。士兵的穩健，女王的儀態。它們提醒你，轉變並不意味著拋棄紀律。而是意味著將其精煉成新的形態。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_42
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
Her voice dropped lower, velvet and commanding.

<<speech "veletia">>Tomorrow you will spar in these, beneath your tunic, to feel their worth. Tonight, you will wear them until bed. Let them hold you, remind you that your body is not fragile silk alone. You are strong, and that strength is no less feminine than curves wrapped in lace. Learn to feel powerful in them, Caelan, because a queen’s body is not only for seduction it is for survival.<</speech>>

Her words struck me harder than any swordblow. The boyshorts clung close, a second skin, reminding me of her truth with every breath.
The snug shorts clung to my thighs, steady, unyielding, almost athletic. Veletia folded my hands over my stomach as she covered me.
<<speech "veletia">>Sleep in discipline, Caelan. Let these boyshorts remind you of your strength. They will hold you through the night, just as discipline will hold you through fear. Remember, a queen is not only silk and sweetness. She is steel. You will dream of training, of balance, of walking a battlefield with your body supported at every step.<</speech>>
The snugness pressed me still, not seductive, not playful just reliable. And in that reliability, I found unexpected peace.
[[End of Sixth Lesson|valetia_session_1_43]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她的聲音壓得更低，如天鵝絨般柔滑而威嚴。

veletia: 明天你將穿著這些，在你的束腰外衣下進行對練，感受它們的價值。今晚，你要穿著它們直到就寢。讓它們擁抱你，提醒你，你的身體不僅僅是脆弱的絲綢。你很強壯，而那份力量與蕾絲包裹的曲線一樣充滿女性特質。學會在它們之中感受力量，Caelan，因為女王的身體不僅僅是為了誘惑，更是為了生存。

她的話語比任何劍擊都更沉重地擊中了我。平口褲緊貼著，如同第二層皮膚，每一次呼吸都在提醒我她的真理。
緊身的短褲貼合著我的大腿，穩固、堅定，幾乎是運動員般的感覺。Veletia 將我的雙手疊放在腹部，同時為我蓋上衣物。
veletia: 在紀律中入睡吧，Caelan。讓這件平口褲提醒你的力量。它們會整夜擁抱你，就像紀律會在恐懼中支撐你一樣。記住，女王不僅僅是絲綢與甜美。她是鋼鐵。你會夢見訓練，夢見平衡，夢見每一步都得到支撐地行走在戰場上。
緊身感讓我靜止不動，不帶誘惑，不帶嬉戲，只是可靠。而在那份可靠中，我找到了意想不到的平靜。
[End of Sixth Lesson]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_43
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
The seventh day was warmer, the sun heavy through open windows. Veletia left her brazier cold, instead letting the breeze play through silks strung across her dressing pedestal. From among them she drew a pair of airy, loose shorts that swayed like petals.
<<speech "veletia">>After strength, we must return to softness. These are meant not for war nor court, but for leisure garments that float, reminding you that not all queenship is weight. Some is pleasure, light and fluttering.<</speech>>
The boyshorts hugged me still, steady and soldierlike, but Mistress Veletia was already gliding back to her pedestal. Her hands moved through stacks of folded silks and linens until she drew out something that seemed to shimmer even in the dim light. Loose, wide, almost delicate when she shook them open, the legs flared like petals, a soft silk sheen rippling between her fingers.

<<speech "veletia">>Lesson seven, Caelan: tap pants. Some call them knickers, though they are finer than the word implies. Loose, airy, cool against the skin, they are meant for summer’s breath, for nights when heat makes the body restless. They are not for combat or ceremony they are for indulgence, for feeling silk flutter around your thighs as if you were wrapped in a lover’s sigh.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_44]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
第七天更暖和了，陽光透過敞開的窗戶沉重地灑落。Veletia 讓她的火盆冷著，反而讓微風吹拂過懸掛在她更衣台座上的絲綢。她從中抽出一件輕盈、寬鬆的短褲，搖曳如花瓣。
veletia: 在力量之後，我們必須回歸柔軟。這些並非為戰爭或宮廷設計，而是為休閒時刻準備的服飾，它們飄逸，提醒你並非所有的女王職責都是沉重的。有些是愉悅，輕盈而飄動。
平口褲依然緊貼著我，穩固如士兵，但Veletia夫人已經滑步回到她的台座。她的雙手在疊好的絲綢和亞麻布堆中翻找，直到抽出一件即使在昏暗光線下也似乎閃爍微光的東西。寬鬆、寬大，當她將其抖開時幾乎顯得精緻，褲腿如花瓣般展開，柔軟的絲綢光澤在她的指間流動。

veletia: 第七課，Caelan：絲質寬鬆短褲。有些人稱之為襯褲，雖然它們比這個詞所暗示的更精緻。寬鬆、透氣、觸膚清涼，它們是為夏日的氣息而生，為那些炎熱讓身體躁動的夜晚而生。它們不是用於戰鬥或儀式，它們是用於放縱，用於感受絲綢在大腿周圍飄拂，彷彿被愛人的嘆息包裹。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_44
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I stared at them, surprised by how different they looked from the snugness of boyshorts or the bulk of wool.

<<speech "mc">>They look like… shorts made of mist. Wouldn’t they tangle, or ride up, or feel flimsy? It seems they’d do little to protect or conceal.<</speech>>

Her smile softened, eyes glittering like the silk in her hands.

<<speech "veletia">>You keep searching for protection in every garment. That is the soldier still speaking in you. Tap pants are not protection they are play. They are freedom from clinging cloth, a dance of fabric brushing your thighs, cooling you when the air itself is heavy. They are meant to celebrate movement, to remind you that your body can be airy and indulgent, not only bound or armored.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_45]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我盯著它們，驚訝於它們與貼身的平口褲或厚重的羊毛褲有多麼不同。

mc: 它們看起來像……薄霧做成的短褲。它們不會糾纏、上捲，或感覺脆弱嗎？看起來它們幾乎無法提供保護或遮掩。

她的笑容變得柔和，眼睛如手中的絲綢般閃爍。

veletia: 你一直在每件衣物中尋找保護。這是你內心士兵的聲音仍在說話。絲質寬鬆短褲不是保護，它們是嬉戲。它們是從緊身布料中解脫的自由，是布料輕拂你大腿的舞蹈，在空氣本身都顯得沉重時為你帶來涼爽。它們旨在慶祝運動，提醒你，你的身體可以是輕盈而放縱的，不僅僅是被束縛或武裝的。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_45
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She tugged at the boyshorts, sliding them down from my hips, peeling the snugness away until I stood bare again. The mirror caught the flush on my skin, and the reflection was almost unbearable in its rawness. She folded the shorts with reverence, then held out the silken tap pants, legs fluttering like banners in her hands.

<<speech "veletia">>Step into them slowly. Let the silk remind you of warmth and coolness both. These are not for hiding. They are for feeling every brush of air, every movement of thigh. Queenship is not always endurance, Caelan. Sometimes it is pleasure, leisure, and the art of being adorned for no one but yourself.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_46]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她拉下平口褲，從我的臀部將其褪下，剝離那份緊貼感，直到我再次赤裸站立。鏡子捕捉到我皮膚上的紅暈，而鏡中的影像因其赤裸幾乎令人難以承受。她恭敬地摺好短褲，然後遞出那絲質的寬鬆短褲，褲腿在她手中如旗幟般飄動。

veletia: 慢慢穿上它們。讓絲綢同時提醒你溫暖與涼爽。這些不是用來隱藏的。它們是用來感受空氣的每一次輕拂，大腿的每一次移動。女王職責並非總是忍耐，Caelan。有時它是愉悅，是閒適，是只為自己而裝扮的藝術。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_46
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I stepped through, silk slipping over my calves and thighs. She pulled them up, the waistband settling softly on my hips. The fabric did not cling it floated, swaying with every small breath. When I shifted, the loose legs fluttered, brushing against the tender skin between my thighs with maddening lightness.

<<speech "mc">>They feel… strange. Like I’m wearing nothing at all, and yet something teases me with every step. I can’t decide if it’s comfortable or distracting.<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>That is their lesson. They are garments of sensation, not restraint. They make you aware of your thighs, of how they move and part. When you walk in them, you will feel silk slide and flutter. When you sit, the fabric spills around you like water. They make you conscious of every motion, every curve. And in that awareness, you learn the power of allure born from subtlety.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_47]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我踏了進去，絲綢滑過我的小腿與大腿。她將它們拉起，腰帶輕柔地落在我的臀部。布料並不緊貼，而是飄浮著，隨著每一次細微的呼吸搖曳。當我移動時，寬鬆的褲腿飄動，以令人發狂的輕柔拂過我大腿間嬌嫩的肌膚。

mc: 感覺……很奇特。好像我什麼都沒穿，但每一步卻又有東西在撩撥我。我分不清這是舒適還是令人分心。

veletia: 這就是它們要教你的。它們是感官的衣裳，而非束縛。它們讓你意識到你的大腿，意識到它們如何移動與分開。當你穿著它們行走，你會感受到絲綢的滑動與飄拂。當你坐下，布料會如水般在你周圍傾瀉。它們讓你覺察每一個動作、每一道曲線。而在這份覺察中，你將學會源自細微之處的誘惑之力。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_47
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She circled me, fingertips grazing the silk, teasing it into sways that brushed higher, whispering against places so sensitive I gasped softly. Her eyes never left mine in the mirror.

<<speech "veletia">>These are not for the battlefield or the throne. They are for afternoons in summer gardens, for evenings when you lean at a balcony and feel night air kiss your thighs, for boudoirs where you want a lover to see silk ripple before it parts. They are garments of temptation, of leisure, of softness unapologetically embraced.<</speech>>

<<speech "mc">>They make me feel… exposed in a different way. Not vulnerable, but tempting, even to myself. Like I can’t stop noticing my own body swaying inside them.<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>Good. That is the point. If you are tempted by your own body, then imagine what others will see when you carry yourself with that awareness. These will train you not to fear your curves, but to savor them. To walk like silk itself has chosen you.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_48]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她繞著我走，指尖輕掠絲綢，逗弄它擺盪得更高，輕拂過那些如此敏感、讓我輕聲喘息的地方。鏡中，她的目光從未離開我的雙眼。

veletia: 這些不是為戰場或王座準備的。它們是為夏日午後的花園，為你倚靠陽台感受夜風親吻大腿的夜晚，為你想讓愛人看見絲綢在分開前如何漾起漣漪的閨房。它們是誘惑、閒適、毫不掩飾地擁抱柔軟的衣裳。

mc: 它們讓我感覺……以一種不同的方式暴露著。不是脆弱，而是誘人，甚至對我自己而言。好像我無法停止注意自己身體在其中搖曳的姿態。

veletia: 很好。這正是重點。如果你被自己的身體所誘惑，那麼想像一下，當你帶著這份覺察展現自己時，他人會看見什麼。這些將訓練你不再畏懼你的曲線，而是去品味它們。要像絲綢本身選擇了你那般行走。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_48
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She leaned close, breath grazing my neck as her hands smoothed the fabric down the front, lingering deliberately until my knees weakened.

<<speech "veletia">>Tonight you will wear these after the boyshorts, and you will feel the shift from containment to freedom, from discipline to indulgence. This is the rhythm of femininity, Caelan: strength one moment, silk the next. And only when you master both will you walk as queen without question.<</speech>>

I swallowed, the silk fluttering against me with every heartbeat, every breath.
The silk fluttered with every movement under the covers, brushing against me, teasing me awake even as I tried to rest. Veletia sat at the bedside, her voice soft but commanding.
<<speech "veletia">>Do not fight the flutter. Let the silk wake you, let it tease your thighs, let it remind you of your own skin. A queen must never grow numb to her own body. Even in sleep you will learn awareness. When dawn comes, you will rise knowing that sensation itself can be a teacher.<</speech>>
I drifted off to dreams full of swaying silk and phantom caresses, my thighs never left alone.
[[End of Seventh Lesson|valetia_session_1_49]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她傾身靠近，氣息拂過我的頸項，雙手將布料順著前方撫平，刻意流連，直到我的雙膝發軟。

veletia: 今晚你將在短褲之後穿上這些，你將感受到從束縛到自由、從紀律到放縱的轉變。這就是女性氣質的節奏，Caelan：一時堅韌，一時柔滑。唯有當你掌握兩者，你才能毫無疑問地以女王之姿行走。

我嚥了口口水，絲綢隨著每一次心跳、每一次呼吸在我身上飄拂。
絲綢在被子下隨著每個動作飄動，拂過我，撩撥著我，即使我試圖休息也將我喚醒。Veletia 坐在床邊，聲音輕柔卻帶著命令的語氣。
veletia: 不要抗拒那飄拂。讓絲綢喚醒你，讓它撩撥你的大腿，讓它提醒你記住自己的肌膚。女王絕不能對自己的身體變得麻木。即使在睡夢中，你也將學會覺察。當黎明到來，你將起身，知曉感覺本身就能成為導師。
我飄入充滿搖曳絲綢與幻影愛撫的夢境，我的大腿從未得到安寧。
[End of Seventh Lesson]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_49
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
By the eighth morning I was nearly used to her ritual. Nearly. She had laid out breakfast this time fruit and honey and beside it, folded silken puffed garments edged in frills. She picked them up, shaking them out until they swelled like clouds.
<<speech "veletia">>Do not scoff. Innocence is as powerful as iron. These bloomers exaggerate, they play, they tickle the eye. Today you will learn how softness, even silliness, can be sharpened into a blade of charm.<</speech>>
The airy silk still swayed against me when Mistress Veletia reached for yet another folded secret. This one she lifted with both hands, thicker than the tap pants, cut wide and voluminous. She shook them out and the fabric billowed like a cloud, edged in delicate frills that danced in the firelight.

<<speech "veletia">>Lesson eight, Caelan: silken bloomers. Baggy, yes, playful, frilled. They are garments of whimsy and comfort, yet also of flirtation. A woman who wears bloomers is not ashamed of taking space with her softness. These make your thighs swell like cushions, your hips round like ripe fruit, and their frills whisper that innocence can also be its own seduction.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_50]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
到了第八個早晨，我幾乎習慣了她的儀式。幾乎。這次她準備了早餐，水果和蜂蜜，旁邊則摺疊著絲質、蓬鬆、飾有荷葉邊的衣物。她將它們拿起，抖開，直到它們如雲朵般膨脹起來。
veletia: 別嗤之以鼻。純真與鐵甲一樣強大。這些燈籠褲誇張、嬉戲、搔癢視線。今天你將學會柔軟，甚至傻氣，如何能被磨礪成魅力的刀刃。
當 Veletia 夫人伸手去拿另一件摺疊的秘密時，那輕盈的絲綢仍在我身上搖曳。這一件她用雙手提起，比短褲更厚實，剪裁寬大而蓬鬆。她將其抖開，布料如雲朵般鼓脹，邊緣精緻的荷葉邊在火光中舞動。

veletia: 第八課，Caelan：絲質燈籠褲。寬鬆，是的，俏皮，荷葉邊。它們是奇想與舒適的衣裳，卻也是調情的衣裳。穿著燈籠褲的女人，不會羞於以她的柔軟佔據空間。它們讓你的大腿如軟墊般豐盈，臀部如熟果般圓潤，而它們的荷葉邊低語著：純真本身也可以是一種誘惑。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_50
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I studied the frills, the ridiculous puff of them, lips parting before I could stop myself.

<<speech "mc">>They look… almost childish. Like something meant to mock more than to honor. How could anyone feel regal in such a garment, Veletia?<</speech>>

Her smirk was knowing, wicked.

<<speech "veletia">>And that is the trick of them. Innocence disarms. Playfulness charms. A queen must not only know how to stand in armor and frighten her enemies she must also know how to appear soft, approachable, desirable in ways that lower guard and stir longing. Bloomers, especially of silk, remind men of laughter and girlish giggles, but on you, they will be weaponized. You will wield innocence itself as temptation.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_51]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我端詳著那些荷葉邊，它們那可笑蓬鬆的模樣，不自覺地張開了嘴。

mc: 它們看起來……幾乎像孩童穿的。像是用來嘲弄而非尊崇的東西。怎麼可能有人穿著這樣的衣服還能感覺有王者之風，Veletia？

她的微笑充滿洞悉與狡黠。

veletia: 而這就是它們的訣竅。純真使人卸下防備。嬉戲令人著迷。一位女王不僅必須知道如何身披鎧甲站立、威嚇敵人，她也必須知道如何顯得柔軟、可親、令人渴望，以那些能降低防備、激起渴求的方式。燈籠褲，尤其是絲質的，會讓男人想起笑聲與少女的咯咯輕笑，但在你身上，它們將被武器化。你將把純真本身當作誘惑來運用。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_51
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She came to me again, tugging at the fluttering tap pants until they slipped down, leaving me bare to the cool air once more. She folded the silk with care, setting it aside, and opened the bloomers wide, the frilled hems dangling like petals.

<<speech "veletia">>Step in. Feel the difference. Feel how they puff and play, how they swaddle you with softness while tickling your skin with lace. They will feel larger, but that largeness is not ungainly. It is the luxury of space, the confidence of volume, the sweetness of frills embracing flesh.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_52]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她又來到我身邊，拉著那飄動的踢踏褲直到它滑落，讓我再次裸露在涼爽的空氣中。她仔細地摺好絲綢，放在一旁，然後將燈籠褲完全展開，荷葉邊的下擺像花瓣般垂盪著。

veletia: 跨進來。感受其中的不同。感受它們如何蓬鬆飄動，如何用柔軟包裹你，同時用蕾絲搔癢你的肌膚。它們會感覺更寬大，但那種寬大並非笨拙。那是空間的奢華，體積的自信，是荷葉邊擁抱肌膚的甜蜜。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_52
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I stepped through reluctantly, the silk sliding cool over my legs before ballooning out at the thighs. She tied them at my waist, then fussed at the frilled hems where they brushed mid-thigh, making sure they puffed properly.

<<speech "mc">>They feel… strange. Like wearing pillows. So much fabric, yet it’s light. I feel hidden and displayed all at once.<</speech>>

Her eyes glinted as she smoothed the frills outward.

<<speech "veletia">>Exactly. Bloomers are paradox. They cover more, yet because of their frills and volume they draw attention. Every step you take, the silk will sway exaggeratedly. Every laugh or bow will set the frills fluttering. They make you appear soft, playful, touchable, and sometimes that softness is more dangerous than steel. You will learn how to giggle in them without surrendering control, how to flutter your hems while holding every eye in the room hostage.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_53]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我不情願地跨了進去，絲綢涼涼地滑過我的雙腿，然後在大腿處蓬鬆展開。她在我的腰間繫好，接著仔細整理刷過大腿中段的荷葉邊下擺，確保它們蓬鬆得恰到好處。

mc: 感覺……很奇怪。像穿著枕頭。這麼多布料，卻很輕盈。我覺得自己同時被隱藏又被展示。

她將荷葉邊向外撫平時，眼中閃爍著光芒。

veletia: 正是如此。燈籠褲是矛盾的。它們遮蓋得更多，但正因為其荷葉邊與蓬鬆體積，反而引人注目。你每走一步，絲綢都會誇張地搖曳。每一次笑聲或屈膝禮，都會讓荷葉邊飄動。它們讓你顯得柔軟、俏皮、可親，而有時這種柔軟比鋼鐵更危險。你將學會如何在穿著它們時咯咯輕笑而不失掌控，如何讓裙擺飄動的同時，俘獲房間裡每一道目光。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_53
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She bent and smoothed the bloomers across my hips, tugging at the waistband until it hugged more snugly. Then she ran her fingertips along the frills at my thighs, brushing them against my bare skin so that the delicate lace tickled maddeningly.

<<speech "mc">>They are too playful. Too girlish. I feel like I’m pretending at something I’m not.<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>You misunderstand, my prince-turned-princess. These are not for pretending they are for practicing duality. Innocence as mask, playfulness as trap. When you wear bloomers, you will feel silly at first, but you will learn to carry even silliness with authority. To laugh and still command. That is their power. Besides… look at your thighs in the mirror. Do they not appear rounder? Softer? More inviting?<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_54]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她彎下腰，將燈籠褲在我臀部撫平，拉了拉腰帶直到它更貼合。然後她用指尖沿著我大腿上的荷葉邊滑過，讓它們刷過我裸露的肌膚，精緻的蕾絲帶來令人發狂的搔癢感。

mc: 它們太俏皮了。太女孩子氣了。我覺得自己在假裝成不是我的樣子。

veletia: 你誤解了，我的王子變公主。這些不是用來假裝的，它們是用來練習二元性。以純真為面具，以俏皮為陷阱。當你穿著燈籠褲時，起初會感到愚蠢，但你將學會連這種愚蠢都能帶著權威感去駕馭。笑著，卻仍能發號施令。這就是它們的力量。況且……看看鏡子裡你的大腿。它們難道不是顯得更圓潤了嗎？更柔軟了嗎？更誘人了嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_54
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I glanced at the mirror, cheeks flushing. The silk did exaggerate my thighs, made them fuller, my hips curvier. The frills caught the light, fluttering with each nervous movement.

<<speech "mc">>They do make me look… softer. Rounder. Almost like the statues in the Hall of Maidens. But it feels like a costume more than clothing.<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>And every costume teaches. A queen wears crowns, robes, armor, jewels all costumes that change how the world sees her. Bloomers are a costume of softness, and one day, when you laugh in them and men’s hearts race, you will understand their power. Wear them tonight after the tap pants, and compare. The flutter of silk, the tickle of frill, the bounce of fabric each will remind you that softness itself can be a weapon, wielded sweetly.<</speech>>
The bloomers puffed and swelled even under the blankets, the frills tickling my skin. I tried to brush them down but Veletia swatted my hand away with amused severity.
<<speech "veletia">>Do not resist the play, Caelan. Sleep in them. Let their silliness remind you that softness has its place, that laughter has power. Tomorrow you will know how to wield innocence with a smirk. Tonight you will dream of petals, of clouds, of frivolity turned into strength.<</speech>>
Every time I shifted, the bloomers brushed and rustled, silly yet strangely comforting, as if they were teaching me to accept softness without shame.
[[End of Eighth Lesson|valetia_session_1_55]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我瞥向鏡子，臉頰發燙。絲綢確實誇大了我的大腿，讓它們更豐滿，我的臀部更曲線玲瓏。荷葉邊捕捉著光線，隨著我每個緊張的動作飄動。

mc: 它們確實讓我看起來……更柔軟。更圓潤。幾乎像少女大廳裡的雕像。但這感覺更像是戲服，而不是衣服。

veletia: 而每一套戲服都在教導。女王佩戴皇冠、穿著長袍、披上盔甲、配戴珠寶——全都是改變世人如何看待她的戲服。燈籠褲是柔軟的戲服，總有一天，當你穿著它們微笑而讓男人心跳加速時，你就會明白它們的力量。今晚在踢踏褲之後穿著它們，比較一下。絲綢的飄動、荷葉邊的搔癢、布料的彈性——每一樣都會提醒你，柔軟本身可以是一種武器，甜美地揮舞。
即使在毯子下，燈籠褲依然蓬鬆鼓起，荷葉邊搔癢著我的肌膚。我試圖將它們撫平，但Veletia帶著被逗樂的嚴厲拍開我的手。
veletia: 別抗拒這遊戲，Caelan。穿著它們睡。讓它們的傻氣提醒你，柔軟自有其地位，笑聲自有其力量。明天你就會知道如何帶著一抹壞笑駕馭純真。今晚你將夢見花瓣、雲朵，以及化為力量的輕浮。
每當我翻身，燈籠褲便摩擦沙沙作響，傻氣卻又奇異地令人安慰，彷彿它們在教導我接納柔軟而不帶羞恥。
[第八課結束]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_55
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
Candles lit the chamber even at dawn, their light reflecting in the long river of silk she unfurled from her hands. The attached stockings spilled to the floor, pooling like cream. Veletia looked at me with no smile, only hunger for precision.
<<speech "veletia">>This lesson is about unity panty and stocking joined as one. There will be no slips, no gaps, no separation. Today you will walk bound in elegance, every step reminding you of your own body’s performance.<</speech>>
The bloomers still puffed around my thighs, frills swaying with every nervous shift, when Mistress Veletia placed them aside and drew something different something that gleamed with intent. A pair of panties, yes, but stitched directly to long, slender stockings that pooled like rivers of silk down her arms. She let them spill forward, and the stockings caught the candlelight like molten cream.

<<speech "veletia">>Lesson nine: the stocking-attached panty. Practical and decadent, useful yet intimate. They bind bottom and legs together in one garment, leaving no gap, no interruption. These are worn beneath gowns when a woman must keep her stockings secure, or when she wishes the very act of undressing to become a ritual of revelation. They are the undergarment of lovers who linger, of queens who know even practicality can be wrapped in temptation.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_56]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
即便在黎明時分，燭火仍點亮著房間，光芒映照在她手中展開的絲綢長河上。相連的長襪如奶油般傾瀉至地板，匯聚成一池。Veletia 面無笑容地看著我，眼中只有對精準的渴望。
veletia: 這堂課的主題是連身襪褲——內褲與長襪合而為一。不允許滑落、不允許空隙、不允許分離。今日你將優雅地束縛而行，每一步都提醒著你自身軀體的表現。
當Veletia女主人將它們擱置一旁，取出另一件閃爍著意圖的物品時，燈籠褲仍在我大腿周圍蓬鬆鼓脹，褶邊隨著每次緊張的移動搖曳。是的，那是一條內褲，但直接縫合在修長的絲襪上，絲襪如絲綢河流般從她手臂垂落。她讓它們向前傾瀉，長襪捕捉燭光，宛如熔化的奶油。

veletia: 第九課：連身襪褲。實用而奢靡，有用卻私密。它們將臀部與雙腿束縛於同一件衣物中，不留空隙，毫無間斷。當女性必須確保長襪穩固，或希望脫衣行為本身成為一種揭示儀式時，便會將它們穿在禮服之下。它們屬於流連忘返的情人，屬於深知實用性亦可包裹於誘惑之中的女王。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_56
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I swallowed, staring at the long silken legs dangling from the panty.

<<speech "mc">>But why attach them? Why not wear stockings apart, tied with garters? This seems… excessive. And far too difficult to remove quickly.<</speech>>

Her lips curved into a slow, sultry smile.

<<speech "veletia">>Because difficulty is the point, Caelan. A separate stocking may slip, may need adjusting. But when bound to the panty, they become one seamless piece, hugging you from thighs to waist. You will feel their tug with every bend of the knee, every step on stone floors, every brush of fabric across your calves. They remind you of elegance not just in what is seen, but in what is felt. And when someone undresses you, every inch must be peeled away in a single, slow journey. That is power.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_57]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我吞了吞口水，盯著從內褲垂下的絲質長襪。

mc: 但為何要連在一起？為何不單獨穿長襪，用吊襪帶固定？這似乎……過度了。而且太難快速脫下。

她的唇彎成一抹緩慢而撩人的微笑。

veletia: 正因困難才是重點，Caelan。單獨的長襪可能會滑落，可能需要調整。但當它們與內褲相連，便成為一件無縫的整體，從大腿到腰際緊貼著你。你將在每次屈膝、每次踏在石地板上、每次布料輕拂小腿時，感受到它們的牽引。它們提醒你優雅不僅在於所見，更在於所感。而當有人為你寬衣時，每一寸都必須在一次緩慢的旅程中被剝離。那便是力量。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_57
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She knelt again, loosening the bloomers at my waist until they puddled around my ankles, leaving me bare once more before the mirror. My skin flushed, thighs tightening instinctively, but she only gathered the stockings-panty and held them open, waiting.

<<speech "veletia">>Step through. Slowly. Feel the silk climbing your legs, clinging as if it were woven to worship your skin. You will not mistake this for mere coverage. This is adornment, this is discipline, this is allure stitched into every step.<</speech>>

I lifted my foot hesitantly, then the other, sliding into the waiting silk.

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_58]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她再次跪下，鬆開我腰間的燈籠褲，直到它們堆積在腳踝周圍，讓我在鏡前再次赤裸。我的皮膚泛紅，大腿本能地夾緊，但她只是收起連身襪褲，將其敞開等待。

veletia: 慢慢跨進來。感受絲綢攀上你的雙腿，緊貼著，彷彿是為了膜拜你的肌膚而織。你不會誤以為這僅僅是遮蔽。這是裝飾，這是紀律，這是縫入每一步的誘惑。

我遲疑地抬起一隻腳，接著另一隻，滑入等待著的絲綢中。

passages.name: valetia_session_1_58
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
The stockings pulled high, hugging my calves, tightening against my thighs until the panty settled snugly over my hips. The sensation was unlike any garment so far every movement tugged the fabric against two places at once, reminding me constantly that I was bound in silk from waist to foot.

<<speech "mc">>They feel… restrictive, but not heavy. I can feel every brush against my legs, and every step tugs at my hips. It is… distracting. Almost teasing me with each shift.<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>Exactly. This is their lesson. Stocking-attached panties do not let you forget them. They caress you when you walk, remind you when you bend, tighten when you sit. They make your body one long line of silk and promise. Imagine striding into a hall, every step tugging you in secret ways, every glance at your gown betraying nothing, while beneath you carry this constant reminder of elegance stitched to flesh.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_59]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
長襪向上拉高，緊貼小腿，在大腿處收緊，直到內褲舒適地覆蓋我的臀部。這種感覺與至今任何衣物都不同——每個動作都會同時牽動兩處的布料，不斷提醒我從腰到腳都被絲綢束縛著。

mc: 感覺……有束縛感，但不沉重。我能感受到每次輕拂腿部的觸感，每一步都牽動著我的臀部。這……令人分心。幾乎像是在每次移動中挑逗著我。

veletia: 正是如此。這就是它們的教誨。連身襪褲不讓你忘記它們的存在。行走時它們愛撫你，彎身時它們提醒你，坐下時它們收緊。它們讓你的身體化為一道絲綢與承諾的長線。想像步入大廳，每一步都以隱密的方式牽引著你，每一道投向禮服的目光都毫無破綻，而你身下卻攜帶著這份縫合於肌膚的優雅，作為恆常的提醒。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_59
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She circled me slowly, hands brushing down my thighs, tracing the seam where the stockings met the panty. Her touch pressed the silk tighter, forcing me to feel the way it wrapped me whole.

<<speech "mc">>It feels almost too much. Like I am wrapped, bound. I cannot imagine doing anything but thinking about them when I walk.<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>Good. That is why queens wear them in courts of intrigue and dances of diplomacy. When you are bound in silk from hip to heel, you walk differently hips swaying, steps smaller, each movement conscious. You radiate poise because the garment forces you to. And that is the secret: when you wear them, you are no longer merely walking you are performing, even if no one else knows it.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_60]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她緩緩繞著我走動，雙手輕撫我的大腿，描繪長襪與內褲相接的縫線。她的觸碰將絲綢壓得更緊，迫使我感受它如何完整包裹著我。

mc: 感覺幾乎太過分了。彷彿我被包裹、束縛著。我無法想像行走時除了想著它們，還能做什麼。

veletia: 很好。這便是女王在充滿陰謀的宮廷與外交舞會中穿著它們的原因。當你從臀部到腳跟都被絲綢束縛時，你的行走方式會改變——臀部搖曳，步伐變小，每個動作都充滿意識。你散發著沉穩，因為這衣物迫使你如此。而這就是秘密：當你穿著它們時，你不再僅僅是行走——你是在表演，即使無人知曉。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_60
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She leaned close, her lips almost brushing my ear as her hands smoothed the panty flat over my mound, then slid down along my thighs, pressing silk to skin.

<<speech "veletia">>Wear these when you wish to command without speaking. Wear them when you wish every step to remind you that you are not simply clothed you are dressed to be desired, to be remembered, even when no one sees what lies beneath. And when the moment comes that someone peels them away, you will know the intoxicating power of patience. Every inch will be a ritual, every tug a prayer to your body.<</speech>>

I shivered, the tug of silk constant, each breath a reminder of my body’s new awareness.
Bound in silk from waist to toes, I felt almost restrained beneath the blankets, every shift tugging at me in two directions at once. Veletia smoothed her hand down the length of my leg, smiling faintly.
<<speech "veletia">>You will not escape their embrace tonight. Every twist will remind you that you are held, bound in silk, elegant even in sleep. Queenship is discipline, even in dreams. Tomorrow you will know how to walk in performance but tonight, you will learn how to rest in restraint.<</speech>>
It was a restless sleep, full of tugging and shifting, but I woke aware of every limb, every line of my body.
[[End of Ninth Lesson|valetia_session_1_61]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她傾身靠近，雙唇幾乎輕觸我的耳際，同時雙手將內褲撫平貼合我的私處，接著沿大腿滑下，將絲綢緊貼肌膚。

veletia: "當你希望無需言語便能發號施令時，穿上它們。當你希望每一步都提醒自己——你並非只是穿著衣物，而是為被渴望、被銘記而裝扮，即便無人得見其下風光——時，穿上它們。當有人將其褪去的那一刻，你將知曉耐心那令人沉醉的力量。每一寸肌膚的展露都將是儀式，每一次拉扯都是對你身體的祈禱。"

我顫慄著，絲綢的牽引持續不斷，每一次呼吸都提醒著我身體新生的覺知。
從腰際到腳趾都被絲綢包裹，我在毯子下幾乎感到被束縛，每一個微小的動作都同時朝兩個方向拉扯著我。Veletia 的手順著我的腿長撫下，露出淺淺的微笑。

veletia: "今夜你無法逃脫它們的擁抱。每一次翻身都會提醒你——你正被擁抱、被絲綢束縛，即便在睡夢中也依然優雅。為王之道即是紀律，即便在夢中亦然。明日你將學會如何在表演中行走，但今夜，你將學習如何在束縛中休憩。"

這是個不安穩的睡眠，充滿拉扯與輾轉，但我醒來時卻覺察到每一寸肢體、身體的每一道線條。
[第九課結束]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_61
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
By the tenth day, I thought I could no longer be surprised. I was wrong. Veletia stood with a scrap of fabric and dangling ribbons, each bow waiting to be tied. She toyed with the strings, pulling them taut until they snapped like whispers.
<<speech "veletia">>Every knot is a choice. Every bow tied is a declaration, every bow untied is surrender. Today you will learn the power of ribbons the lingerie of sovereignty itself.<</speech>>
The silk of the stocking-attached panty still clung to me like a second skin when Veletia finally eased me from them, drawing the stockings down my calves in one long, deliberate caress. She folded the garment reverently, as though sealing a spell, and placed it aside. Then she turned, and from the pedestal she retrieved a final piece for this first day’s instruction.

It was smaller again light, elegant but what caught my eye were the ribbons at each hip. She unfurled it slowly, and the laces dangled down like serpents, ready to be tied or untied with the barest tug.

<<speech "veletia">>Lesson ten: the laced-side panty. Perhaps the most symbolic of all we’ve touched tonight. This garment is the art of invitation made cloth. The body is covered, yes, but only by knots that beg to be undone. Every ribbon is a decision. Every bow tied tight is a proclamation of modesty; every bow loosened is permission. This is not just underwear it is negotiation stitched in silk.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_62]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
到了第十天，我以為自己再也不會感到驚訝。我錯了。Veletia 站著，手中拿著一片布料與垂墜的緞帶，每個蝴蝶結都等待被繫上。她把玩著絲帶，將其拉緊直至如耳語般啪地斷裂。

veletia: "每個結都是一個選擇。每個繫上的蝴蝶結都是一項宣言，每個解開的蝴蝶結都是一次投降。今日你將學習緞帶的力量——這主權本身的内衣。"

當 Veletia 終於將我從那連褲襪中解放出來時，那絲綢材質的連褲襪仍如第二層皮膚般緊貼著我。她沿著我的小腿緩緩褪下絲襪，那動作漫長而刻意，宛如愛撫。她虔敬地摺好衣物，彷彿在封存一道咒語，將其置於一旁。然後她轉身，從展示臺上取出了這第一日課程的最後一件衣物。

它更為小巧——輕盈、優雅——但吸引我目光的是兩側臀部的緞帶。她緩緩將其展開，繫帶如蛇般垂墜而下，只需最輕微的拉扯便能繫上或解開。

veletia: "第十課：繫帶側邊內褲。這或許是今晚我們所觸及的所有衣物中最具象徵意義的一件。這件衣物是『邀請的藝術』化為布料。身體確實被覆蓋，但僅憑藉著那些渴求被解開的繩結。每條緞帶都是一項決定。每個緊繫的蝴蝶結都是端莊的宣告；每個鬆開的蝴蝶結都是許可。這不僅是內衣——這是用絲綢縫製的談判。"

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_62
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
I stared at the dangling ties, heart quickening.

<<speech "mc">>It looks more like a trap than clothing. If anyone pulled those ribbons, I’d be bare in a heartbeat. How could that ever be dignified? How could a queen trust such fragility?<</speech>>

Her eyes glinted, voice silk-dark.

<<speech "veletia">>Dignity does not lie in iron clasps or heavy fabrics, Caelan. Dignity lies in control. You wear these only when you choose to. And you decide who may see the ribbons, who may tug at them, and who must keep their hands to themselves. Queenship is as much about granting favor as it is denying it. A laced-side panty is not fragility it is sovereignty. With a single knot, you command access, delay pleasure, or unleash temptation. It is elegance that speaks of power hidden in vulnerability.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_63]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
我凝視著垂墜的繫帶，心跳加速。

mc: "這看起來更像是陷阱，而非衣物。如果有人拉動那些緞帶，我瞬間就會一絲不掛。這怎麼可能顯得莊重？一位女王怎能信任如此脆弱的東西？"

她的眼眸閃爍，嗓音如暗色絲綢。

veletia: "莊重並不在於鐵扣或厚重的布料，Caelan。莊重存在於掌控之中。你只在選擇時才穿上這些。而你決定誰可以看見這些緞帶，誰可以拉扯它們，誰又必須管好自己的雙手。為王之道既在於賜予恩惠，也在於拒絕給予。繫帶側邊內褲並非脆弱——它是主權。憑藉一個簡單的繩結，你便能掌控接觸、延遲歡愉，或釋放誘惑。這是一種優雅，訴說著隱藏於脆弱之中的力量。"

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_63
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She approached me again, her hands drawing away the silk stockings from my thighs completely, leaving me bare once more. The ribbons of the new garment whispered as she held it open before me.

<<speech "veletia">>Step through, and feel how it holds you differently. Not with firm waistbands or padded bulk. Not with airy flutter. Not with second-skin silk. But with ties, fragile yet deliberate. Feel how each knot holds not just cloth to flesh, but meaning to choice.<</speech>>

I lifted my foot, then the other, into the delicate triangle of fabric. She drew it up over my thighs, the sides still open until her fingers began lacing the ribbons at my hips, pulling them snug with patient precision.

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_64]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她再次走近我，雙手將絲襪從我的大腿完全褪去，讓我再次裸露。當她在我面前展開新衣物時，其上的緞帶發出細微的窸窣聲。

veletia: "跨進來，感受它如何以不同的方式支撐你。不是靠牢固的腰帶或厚重的襯墊。不是靠輕盈的飄拂。不是靠第二層皮膚般的絲綢。而是靠繫帶——脆弱卻又刻意。感受每個繩結如何不僅將布料繫於肌膚，更將意義繫於選擇。"

我抬起一隻腳，接著另一隻，踏入那精緻的三角布料中。她將其拉上我的大腿，兩側仍敞開著，直到她的手指開始編織我臀部的緞帶，以耐心的精準將其拉緊貼合。

[繼續]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_64
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
The fabric settled against me, soft and light, but it was the sensation of the ties that caught my breath the way they cinched at each hip, delicate bows resting against my skin.

<<speech "mc">>It feels… precarious. Like I could lose them with a careless tug. I feel more exposed now than even in the pantlets. I can’t stop imagining how quickly they’d fall away if anyone wanted them gone.<</speech>>

<<speech "veletia">>And that imagination is the point. You will learn how to walk with that awareness, how to let those ribbons whisper with every step. You will learn that vulnerability displayed can become its own armor because no one dares underestimate a queen who shows what she could give, yet withholds until she decides. These panties force you to be deliberate. To tie, to untie, to hold the power in your own hands.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_65]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
布料輕柔地貼合在我身上，柔軟而輕盈，但真正讓我屏息的是繫帶的感覺——它們在每側臀部收緊，精緻的蝴蝶結輕抵著我的肌膚。

mc: 感覺……岌岌可危。彷彿只要一個不小心的拉扯，它們就會鬆脫。現在的我，甚至比只穿小襯褲時感覺更暴露。我無法停止想像，如果有人想解開它們，它們會掉落得多快。

veletia: 而那份想像正是重點。你將學會帶著這份覺知行走，學會讓每一步都伴隨著絲帶的低語。你將學會，展現脆弱本身可以成為一種盔甲，因為無人敢低估一位展示了她所能給予、卻又保留至她決定的女王。這條內褲迫使你變得慎重。去繫緊、去解開、將權力握在自己手中。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_65
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
She smoothed her palms across my hips, fingertips brushing the bows where they perched. She gave one an almost playful tug, loosening it just slightly before retying it slowly, eyes never leaving mine in the mirror.

<<speech "mc">>It feels almost… dangerous. Like every knot is a challenge. I can’t stop thinking about who would dare touch them, and how it would feel if they did.<</speech>>

Her lips curved in approval.

<<speech "veletia">>Good. That thought will live with you each time you wear them. That tension between secrecy and surrender, between holding and yielding that is the erotic language of laced panties. Wear them when you wish to keep the world guessing. Wear them when you wish to show confidence that no one but you may untie what protects you. And when at last you allow the ribbons to fall, it will feel not like surrender, but like triumph, because it was your choice.<</speech>>

[[Move Forth|valetia_session_1_66]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她的手掌撫過我的臀部，指尖輕掃過停駐的蝴蝶結。她近乎戲謔地輕拉其中一條，微微鬆開，然後緩慢地重新繫上，目光在鏡中從未離開我的雙眼。

mc: 這感覺幾乎……危險。彷彿每個結都是一個挑戰。我無法停止思考誰敢觸碰它們，以及如果他們真的碰了，會是什麼感覺。

她的唇瓣彎起，帶著讚許。

veletia: 很好。每當你穿著它們，這個念頭都會伴隨著你。那種秘密與屈服之間、緊握與退讓之間的張力，正是繫帶內褲的情色語言。當你想讓世界猜不透時，就穿著它們。當你想展現自信——除了你，無人能解開保護你的束縛——時，就穿著它們。而當你最終允許絲帶落下時，那感覺不會像是投降，而會像是勝利，因為那是你的選擇。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: valetia_session_1_66
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
Her hands lingered at my hips, tightening one knot firmly, leaving the other bow loose enough to sway with each breath.

<<speech "veletia">>Tonight, you will sleep in them last, after all the others. You will wake tangled in ribbons, hips marked with the faintest creases from ties. And when you untie them yourself in the morning, remember: every knot you loosen is a reminder that sovereignty over your own body is the most seductive crown of all.<</speech>>

I swallowed hard, every ribbon pressing into my awareness as though I had been wrapped not just in silk, but in choice itself.
The bows pressed into my hips beneath the blankets, one tight, one loose, shifting with each breath. Veletia brushed her lips close to my ear as she tucked the sheet around me.
<<speech "veletia">>Do not untie them tonight. Let the ribbons pull, let them tempt, let them remind you that every knot is a decision. You will sleep knowing that sovereignty rests at your hips, waiting on your choice. By morning you may untie them yourself, and only then will you taste the pleasure of decision made flesh.<</speech>>
I lay awake long into the night, my fingers brushing the bows, tempted to untie them, haunted by the power in waiting.
[[End of Tenth Lesson|valetia_session_1_67]]
<</nobr>>
passages.content_zh:
她的雙手流連在我的臀部，將一個結牢牢繫緊，讓另一個蝴蝶結保持鬆弛，足以隨著每次呼吸搖曳。

veletia: 今晚，在所有其他衣物之後，你將最後穿著它們入睡。你將在纏繞的絲帶中醒來，臀部會留下繫帶最細微的壓痕。而當你清晨親手解開它們時，記住：你鬆開的每一個結，都在提醒你，對自己身體的主權，是最誘人的王冠。

我艱難地嚥了嚥口水，每一條絲帶都壓入我的意識，彷彿我被包裹的不僅是絲綢，更是選擇本身。
蝴蝶結在毯子下壓著我的臀部，一緊一鬆，隨著每次呼吸移動。Veletia 為我掖好被單時，將嘴唇輕貼近我的耳畔。
veletia: 今晚別解開它們。讓絲帶拉扯，讓它們誘惑，讓它們提醒你每個結都是一個決定。你將帶著這份認知入睡：主權正安放在你的臀部，等待你的選擇。到了早晨，你可以親手解開它們，唯有那時，你才能品嚐到決定化為肉身的愉悅。
我清醒地躺了許久，手指輕撫著蝴蝶結，受誘惑想解開它們，又被等待中的力量所縈繞。
[End of Tenth Lesson]

passages.name: interact_with_veletia
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> Oh, you poor thing those sleeves are a tragedy, and that posture? Criminal. Come in, darling, I’m about to rescue your future. <>
<> Can I at least breathe while I’m being saved? <>
<> Only if you're planning to exhale confidence. Now off with the dull, on with the divine! <>
<> <> Did you bring that tunic from the battlefield or the broom closet? Because either way, it’s not meeting royalty today. <>
<> It’s comfortable. Is that such a crime? <>
<> Comfort is for bedchambers, darling. Out here, we command with fabric. <>
<> <> Today, we drape you in midnight blue. Sensual, mysterious, devastating. Like a rumor in silk. <>
<> I was aiming for ‘competent ruler,’ but sure let’s start with ‘rumor in silk.’ <>
<> Oh, but a ruler who turns heads rules twice. Trust me. <>
<> <> Lift your chin, relax your fingers, walk like the world owes you a bow. That’s how queens move. <>
<> Feels more like acting than walking. <>
<> Every great performance begins on a stage. Eventually, it becomes who you are. <>
<> <> This fabric was stitched with moonlight, darling. One twirl and you’ll outshine prophecy itself. <>
<> Do I get a sword with that or just stares? <>
<> Why not both? Slay with style, I always say. <>
<> <> Try this corset. It teaches posture, mystery, and patience all in one wicked squeeze. <>
<> I think it just taught me regret. <
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
veletia:
噢，可憐的小東西，那袖子簡直是場悲劇，那姿勢？更是罪過。進來吧，親愛的，我這就要拯救你的未來。

mc:
在我被拯救的時候，至少能呼吸吧？

veletia:
只有當你打算呼出自信時才行。現在，脫掉那身乏味，換上神聖！

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
veletia:
你那件束腰外衣是從戰場還是掃帚櫃拿來的？因為無論哪種，今天都不適合面見王室。

mc:
它很舒適。這也算犯罪嗎？

veletia:
舒適是留給寢室的，親愛的。在外面，我們用布料發號施令。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
veletia:
今天，我們為你披上午夜藍。性感、神秘、攝人心魄。就像絲綢中的傳聞。

mc:
我原本的目標是「稱職的統治者」，不過好吧，就從「絲綢中的傳聞」開始。

veletia:
噢，但能讓人回頭注視的統治者，等於統治了兩次。相信我。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
veletia:
抬起下巴，放鬆手指，走路要像全世界都欠你一個鞠躬。女王就是這樣移動的。

mc:
感覺比較像在演戲，而不是走路。

veletia:
每一場偉大的表演都始於舞台。最終，它會成為你的一部分。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
veletia:
這布料是用月光縫製的，親愛的。轉一圈，你就能讓預言本身黯然失色。

mc:
我能配把劍嗎？還是只得到注視？

veletia:
何不兩者兼得？我常說，用風格征服一切。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
veletia:
試試這件束腰。它能同時教導你姿勢、神秘感和耐心，全在一次邪惡的擠壓中。

mc:
我想它只教會了我後悔。

veletia:
痛苦是暫時的。美麗？噢，那會被銘記在畫作中。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
veletia:
完美的貼合蘊含力量。是擁抱你的絲線，而非隱藏你的盔甲。

mc:
那如果，我仍在摸索這些絲線之下真實的自我呢？

veletia:
那就讓布料告訴你。有時絲綢比靈魂更早知曉。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
veletia:
你臀部那下搖擺是無意的，對吧？很好。這表示你的身體在聽我的話。

mc:
或者是在困惑中抗議。臀部的心思很難懂。

veletia:
困惑只是轉變正在進行。你正走在正確的道路上，親愛的。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
veletia:
我昨晚夢見你穿著翡翠綠，披著叛逆，頭戴火焰之冠。真是神聖。

mc:
聽起來很戲劇化。我在夢裡活下來了嗎？

veletia:
噢，當然。不過是在讓半個宮廷為之傾倒、另一半嫉妒得燃燒之後。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
veletia:
最後一點修飾……好了。現在你不再只是一位王室成員，你是一道風景。

mc:
我不確定我還認不認識自己。

veletia:
很好。這表示我們找到了新的東西。非凡的東西。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
veletia:
親愛的，如果目光沒有像向日葵追逐陽光那樣，跟著你穿過舞廳，那我就徹底辜負你了。

mc:
我原本希望的是優雅，而不是引人注目。

veletia:
優雅是一種藝術，能吸引目光卻從不乞求。你正在學習。

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
veletia:
嗯，這絲綢像情人的承諾般貼合。告訴我，Caelan，你有足夠的勇氣穿上誘惑本身嗎？

mc:
只要它在議會會議上不會低語得太過大聲。

veletia:
噢，它會的。但這就是樂趣的一半——權力偽裝成詩歌。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
veletia:
我看到你肩膀的曲線柔和下來了……真美，像黃昏融入黑夜。

mc:
你說得好像我正在消失。

veletia:
不，親愛的。你正在變得無可避免。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
veletia:
踏步，轉身，暫停……你的臀部開始歌唱了。現在讓我們教會它們整首詠嘆調。

mc:
我發誓這些高跟鞋是種戰爭形式。

veletia:
正是如此。而你，親愛的，正在學習用沉默和緞帶來征服。

[ELSEIF _i == 14]
veletia:
噢，Caelan……穿上這件禮服，你不是走進一個房間，而是改寫它。

mc:
但我仍然覺得自己像是在玩換裝遊戲。

veletia:
那就玩得漂亮點，直到鏡子停止嘲笑，開始鼓掌。

[ELSEIF _i == 15]
veletia:
告訴我，小可愛……知道你穿上天鵝絨和珍珠會有多危險，是否讓你感到一絲興奮？

mc:
是危險還是可笑？跟你在一起，我從來不太確定。

veletia:
那你正站在完美的邊緣。現在，傾身向前吧。

[ELSEIF _i == 16]
veletia:
這裡輕柔一觸，那裡收緊一點……噢，要是外交能像束腰一樣簡單就好了。

passages.name: female_underwear_0
passages.content:
<> <>


Veletia’s atelier smelled faintly of lavender oil and warm velvet. The curtains were always half drawn, spilling pink dusk light across silk bolts and embroidery hoops, mannequins dressed in every imagined shade of femininity, lined up like ladies in waiting caught mid curtsy.

Her chambers felt like a forbidden room in a storybook a place I never imagined myself stepping foot in, and yet, here I was. My new body felt strange beneath my cloth. Not in pain, no, not even unfamiliar anymore. Just... tense. My center was soft now, foreign and damp with nervous sweat.

I walked differently, my thighs brushed in ways they never had. Everything pulled downward when I moved, reminding me I was bare underneath. Vulnerable. Changed. And she noticed, of course.

[[I am okay with wearing women cloths|female_underwear_1]] |

[[I am doing it cause I don't have any choice|female_underwear_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Veletia的工作室飄散著淡淡的薰衣草油與溫暖天鵝絨的氣味。
窗簾總是半掩著，將粉紅色的暮光灑在一匹匹絲綢與繡框上，
人體模型穿著各種想像中的女性色調服飾，排列整齊如同行屈膝禮到一半的宮廷侍女。
她的房間感覺像故事書裡的禁忌之地，一個我從未想像過自己會踏入的地方，然而，我卻在這裡。
我的新身體在布料下感覺很陌生。不是疼痛，不，甚至不再是不熟悉了。
只是……緊繃。我的中心現在柔軟了，陌生且因緊張的汗水而潮濕。
我走路的姿勢不同了，我的大腿以從未有過的方式相互摩擦。
每當我移動，一切都向下牽引，提醒我底下是赤裸的。脆弱的。改變了的。
而她當然注意到了。
[我對穿著女裝沒問題] |
[我這麼做是因為別無選擇]
