passages.name: murkkin_bandit_6
passages.content:
<> <>I’m adapting.<>
<>Adaptation is surrender by another name.<>
<>No. It’s evolution.<>
<>Well, let’s test that theory. Let’s see how evolved your new body is when it’s bleeding.<>
[[Move Forth|murkkin_bandit_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我在適應。
適應不過是投降的另一種說法。
mc: 不。這是進化。
好吧，讓我們來驗證這個理論。看看你這副新身體在流血時，進化得有多好。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_7
passages.content:
<> <>Draw your weapon.<>
<>With pleasure, lady-boy.<>
<>I’m not a boy.<>
<>Then what are you?<>
<><>I am what will kill you.<>
[[Move Forth|murkkin_bandit_8]]
passages.content_zh:
mc: 拔出你的武器。
樂意之至，小娘子。
mc: 我不是男孩。
那你是什麼？
mc: 我是即將殺死你的人。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_8
passages.content:
<> <>Nice swing! But your wrist is softer now. That potion cost you strength, didn’t it?<>
<>It gave me speed. Watch this.<>
<>Ooooh! Feisty and fast. A dangerous debutante.<>
<>You talk too much.<>
<><>And you blush too easily.<>
[[Move Forth|murkkin_bandit_9]]
passages.content_zh:
揮得好！但你的手腕現在更柔軟了。那藥水讓你失去了力量，對吧？
mc: 它給了我速度。看招。
喔唷！又潑辣又快。一位危險的初入社交界少女。
mc: 你話太多了。
而你太容易臉紅了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_9
passages.content:
<> <>Because I still have shame. You don’t.<>
<>Nope. I gave mine to the swamp.
But I take what I want.<>
<>Try. Just try.<>
<>You little witchling. You cut me!<>
[[Move Forth|murkkin_bandit_10]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 因為我還有羞恥心。你沒有。
沒錯。我把我的羞恥心丟給沼澤了。但我想要什麼就拿什麼。
mc: 試試看。儘管試試。
你這個小巫崽子。你砍到我了！
[Move Forth]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_10
passages.content:
<> <>Bleed, beast.<>
<>You’re enjoying this, aren’t you? All that fire trapped in a new soft shell. You like being underestimated.<>
<>It gives me advantage.<>
<>But you’ll never command respect. Not with those budding breasts.<>
[[Move Forth|murkkin_bandit_11]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 流血吧，畜生。
你很享受這個，對吧？所有火焰都被困在一個嶄新柔軟的外殼裡。你喜歡被低估。
mc: 這給了我優勢。
但你永遠無法贏得尊重。就憑你那對發育中的奶子可不行。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_11
passages.content:
<> <>Then I’ll command fear.<>
<>Damn you!<>
<>No. I damn you.<>
<>Wanna know a secret, pretty prince?<>
[[Move Forth|murkkin_bandit_12]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 那我就贏得恐懼。
該死的你！
mc: 不。是我要你死。
想知道一個秘密嗎，漂亮的王子？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_12
passages.content:
<> <>What?<>
<>I think… you’d make a beautiful corpse.<>
<>Try to make one, then.<>
<>Y-you…<>
[[Move Forth|murkkin_bandit_14]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 什麼？
我覺得……你會成為一具美麗的屍體。
mc: 那就試著製造一具看看啊。
你…你……
[Move Forth]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_14
passages.content:
<> <>I may be softening… but I still kill hard.<>
<>She… turned you into a weapon…<>
<>She freed me.<>
<>Let them mock my body… they won’t mock my blade.<>
<> <> <> <> <> [[Attack|MemoryGame]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我也許正在變得柔軟……但我殺起人來依然強硬。
她……把你變成了一件武器……
mc: 她解放了我。
mc: 讓他們嘲笑我的身體吧……他們不會嘲笑我的刀刃。

[Attack]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_over
passages.content:
<> <> <>Well now... that’s a cruel cut for a pretty hand.<>
<>You should have kept your mouth shut.<>
<>I didn’t think... you had it in you... not with that sway in your hips... that glow in your skin...<>
<>Your mistake was thinking I traded my strength for softness.<>
<>No… you didn’t trade it… you hid it… like a blade under lace…<>
<>You’ll never speak of lace again.<>
<>She’s turning you into something… dangerous…<>
<>She’s helping me become me.<>
<>Then you’re not a queen yet... but you'll make a lovely executioner.<>
<>Then let this be your coronation.<>
<>I may change shape… but the steel remains.<>
<>One monster down. A thousand more who think my curves make me weak.<>
<>They’ll learn the same lesson. Too late.<>
<> [[Kill Murkkin Bandit|murkkin_bandit_reward]] <> <>Well well well... The little butterfly’s wings aren’t ready yet.<>
<>I... I’m not finished…<>
<>No... but you are bleeding.
(He lifts his cleaver, mockingly slow.)"<>
<>You’ll regret this…<>
<>Oh? You planning to charm me with your pouty lips? Or maybe bat those long lashes and beg for mercy?<>
<>You… talk too much…<>
<>Better than you fight today, sweetheart. All that magic... and it still can’t stop you from tripping over your own tits
passages.content_zh:
[IF $memory_game_won]
哎呀呀……這麼漂亮的手，下手可真狠。
mc: 你早該閉上嘴的。
我沒想到……你居然有這種能耐……看你那搖曳的腰肢……那發光的肌膚……
mc: 你的錯誤在於以為我用力量換來了柔軟。
不……你沒有交換……你把它藏起來了……像蕾絲下的刀刃……
mc: 你永遠別再提起蕾絲。
她正把你變成……危險的東西……
mc: 她正在幫助我成為我自己。
那麼你還不是女王……但你會成為一位可愛的劊子手。
mc: 那就讓這成為你的加冕禮吧。
mc: 我也許會改變形體……但鋼鐵般的本質依舊。
mc: 解決了一頭怪物。還有成千上萬個以為我的曲線代表軟弱的傢伙。
mc: 他們會學到同樣的教訓。只是為時已晚。

[殺死 Murkkin 強盜]
[ELSE]
哎呀呀……小蝴蝶的翅膀還沒準備好呢。
mc: 我……我還沒結束……
是沒結束……但你在流血呢。（他舉起砍刀，動作慢得充滿嘲弄。）
mc: 你會後悔的……
哦？你打算用那噘起的嘴唇魅惑我嗎？還是眨動長睫毛，乞求憐憫？
mc: 你……話太多了……
總比你今天打架的表現好，親愛的。那麼多魔法……還是阻止不了你被自己的胸部絆倒。
mc: 下次你不會贏。
這次我贏了。這才是重點。
mc: 這還沒完！
快跑吧，公主！但記住：我看見你踉蹌了。我聞到了你的恐懼！
當你終於成為她的那一天……我會在那裡。看著。
mc: 一次失敗……並非終結。讓他們以為我軟弱吧。
mc: 下次他們永遠不會看見我來臨。
[逃跑]
[/IF]

passages.name: murkkin_bandit_reward
passages.content:
<>
✨ Spoils of Victory: Murkkin Bandit ✨
The air stills as the last breath fades from the fallen beast, leaving behind the faint scent of ancient magic and something quietly precious among the remains. In this fragile silence, a new path unfolds before you.
<> < 0.5 - Math.random())>> <> You receive the following alchemical ingredients as loot:

  • <<=_data.name>> — +<<=_amountToAdd>> <<=_data.unit>>
    • <    >
In the calm after the storm, I stand remade — a body changed, a spirit sharpened, and a future written by my own hand.
[[Back to North Forest|north_forest]] <>
passages.content_zh:

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_info
passages.content:
<>

Shadebound Changeling

<><>

Type: Magical Doppelgänger

Description: Shade - A dangerous creature born of shadow magic, the Shadebound resembles a human but with inky skin and reflective silver eyes. It mimics voices and faces, often impersonating villagers to sow chaos or lure victims.

Behavior: Disguise and deception; shape-shifting; drains magical energy.

/*

Quest Hook: Someone is impersonating the Queen’s handmaid—Caelan must determine who’s real and confront the creature.

*/

Combat Level: Challenging

Loot: Shadow essence (used in illusion magic), changeling eye, mimic’s cloak.

[[Return to the forest|north_forest]] | [[Interact with the Shadebound Changeling|shadebound_changeling]]
<>
passages.content_zh:
縛影變形怪

類型：魔法複製體

描述：
影魅——一種由暗影魔法誕生的危險生物，縛影變形怪形似人類，但皮膚如墨，雙眼呈反光的銀色。牠能模仿聲音與面容，常偽裝成村民以散播混亂或引誘受害者。

行為：偽裝與欺騙；變形；吸取魔法能量。

/* 任務線索：有人正在冒充女王的侍女——Caelan 必須找出誰是真的，並對抗這頭生物。 */

戰鬥等級：具有挑戰性

戰利品：暗影精華（用於幻象魔法）、變形怪之眼、模仿者斗篷。

[返回森林] |
[與縛影變形怪互動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling
passages.content:
<> <> <>This part of the forest is corrupted. Show yourself.<>
<>Oh, I have... I’m already inside you.<>
<>Enough riddles. Come out and face me.<>
<>Is this what you’re becoming? So soft… so pink… so ripe.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_1]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這片森林已被腐化。現身吧。
噢，我已經……我就在你裡面。
mc: 謎語夠了。出來面對我。
這就是你正在變成的模樣嗎？如此柔軟……如此粉嫩……如此成熟。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_1
passages.content:
<> <>You mock what you fear.<>
<>Oh, I love what I see. That tight little waist. Those trembling breasts under your armor. The subtle curve of your thighs. You’re a walking invitation.<>
<>I’m a blade, not a gift.<>
<>All blades have hilts. And you… you’re aching to be held.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 你嘲弄你所畏懼的東西。
噢，我愛極了我所見的。那纖細的腰身。盔甲下顫動的雙峰。大腿微妙的曲線。你簡直是個行走的邀請。
mc: 我是刀刃，不是禮物。
所有刀刃都有刀柄。而你……你正渴望被握住。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_2
passages.content:
<> <>I’m aching to end this.<>
<>But you’re torn, aren’t you? Between boy and girl. Between hard and soft. Between pride and pleasure.<>
<>I made my choice.<>
<>But your body doesn’t know what it is. I can feel the confusion in your scent. Your nipples... hard with conflict.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我渴望結束這一切。
但你很矛盾，不是嗎？在男孩與女孩之間。在剛硬與柔軟之間。在驕傲與歡愉之間。
mc: 我已做出選擇。
但你的身體不知道自己是什麼。我能從你的氣味中感受到困惑。你的乳尖……因衝突而挺立。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_3
passages.content:
<> <>You won’t touch me.<>
<>Oh, but I will. I’ll peel back your armor like wrapping on a delicate fruit.<>
<>I will kill you first.<>
<>Mmm. So spicy. I wonder how your moans sound. Do they match your new voice? Have you tried them yet? I could help.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 你碰不到我。
噢，但我會的。我會剝開你的盔甲，就像拆開精緻水果的包裝。
mc: 我會先殺了你。
嗯。真夠嗆辣。我想知道你的呻吟聽起來如何。它們和你新的嗓音相配嗎？你試過了嗎？我可以幫忙。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_4
passages.content:
<> <>You’re disgusting.<>
<>I’m truth. I show you what you crave... and what you fear.<>
<>I fear nothing.<>
<>Not even how your body aches when no one’s looking? That tug between your legs? The way your new thighs press together now when you walk?<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 你真令人作嘔。
我是真相。我向你展示你所渴望的……以及你所恐懼的。
mc: 我無所畏懼。
連你身體在無人注視時的渴望也不怕嗎？雙腿間的牽引感？你走路時，那雙新生的腿現在會互相摩擦的感覺？
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_5
passages.content:
<> <>Shut up.<>
<>Do you touch yourself at night and wonder whose fingers they are? Do you feel wrong or do you feel right?<>
<>I said shut up!<>
<>Look at me. Look what you’re becoming. Look what I could do to you. I could slide into your mind, your chest, your sweet, unfinished little folds.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 閉嘴。
你晚上觸摸自己時，是否曾疑惑那是誰的手指？你感覺不對勁，還是感覺很對？
mc: 我說閉嘴！
看著我。看看你正在變成什麼模樣。看看我能對你做什麼。我可以滑進你的腦海、你的胸膛、你那甜美、尚未成熟的小小皺褶。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_6
passages.content:
<> <>I’m warning you.<>
<>I don’t need permission.<>
<>You’ll die screaming.<>
<>I’ll make you scream first. Softly. Slowly.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我警告你。
我不需要許可。
mc: 你會慘叫著死去。
我會先讓你尖叫。輕輕地。慢慢地。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_7
passages.content:
<> <>Try it.<>
<>Gladly!<>
<>Mmm! Still got a prince’s instincts. But a princess’s pace.<>
<>I’m faster than you’ll ever be.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_8]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 試試看啊。
樂意之至！
嗯！還保留著王子的本能呢。但卻是公主的步調。
mc: 我比你快得多。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_8
passages.content:
<> <>But not stronger. I could pin you, whisper through your lips, make you feel things you haven’t yet dared to dream.<>
<>You’ll never have the chance.<>
<>I could take your transformation. Invert it. Pull your womb inside out. Replace your curves with emptiness. Or… double them.<>
<>You want what I’m becoming. You desire it.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_9]] <>
passages.content_zh:
但沒我強壯。我可以壓制你，透過你的嘴唇低語，讓你感受那些你連夢都不敢夢見的事物。
mc: 你永遠不會有機會。
我可以奪走你的轉變。逆轉它。將你的子宮內外翻轉。用空虛取代你的曲線。或者……讓它們加倍。
mc: 你想要我即將成為的樣子。你渴望它。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_9
passages.content:
<> <>Of course I do. Who wouldn’t want to wear you? All that soft magic wrapped in royal shame.<>
<>Then die wanting.<>
<>Ooh! You cut yourself! So violent, so self-hating. Just like all newborn women.<>
<>I don’t hate myself. I hate you.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_10]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我當然想。誰不想穿上你呢？所有那些柔軟的魔法，包裹著皇室的羞恥。
mc: 那就懷著渴望去死吧。
噢！你割傷自己了！如此暴力，如此自我厭惡。就像所有新生的女人一樣。
mc: 我不恨自己。我恨你。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_10
passages.content:
<> <>I could have been gentle, Caelan. I could have shown you what your body was meant to do.<>
<>My body was meant to kill monsters.<>
<>Yet it begs to be touched.<>
<>Then let me touch you with fire.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_11]] <>
passages.content_zh:
我本可以溫柔的，Caelan。我本可以告訴你，你的身體註定要做什麼。
mc: 我的身體註定要殺死怪物。
但它卻乞求被觸碰。
mc: 那就讓我用火焰觸碰你。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_11
passages.content:
<> <>No! You were mine! Half-formed! Ripe! Yours was a body I could devour and wear!<>
<>I’ll never be anyone’s but my own.<>
<>I’ll strip you of your name, your gender, your will!<>
<>You can’t even keep your shape.<>
[[Move Forth|shadebound_changeling_12]] <>
passages.content_zh:
不！你本該是我的！半成形的！成熟的！你的身體是我可以吞噬並穿戴的！
mc: 我永遠只屬於我自己，不屬於任何人。
我會剝奪你的名字、你的性別、你的意志！
mc: 你連自己的形體都維持不住。
[向前移動]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_12
passages.content:
<> <>You’ll never be complete. You’ll always be between.<>
<>I was between. Now I’m beyond.<>
<>I’m not your fantasy. I’m my own future.<>
<> <> <> <> <> [[Attack|MemoryGame]] <>
passages.content_zh:
你永遠不會完整。你永遠會處於兩者之間。
mc: 我曾處於之間。如今我已超越。
mc: 我不是你的幻想。我是我自己的未來。

[攻擊]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_over
passages.content:
<> <> <>You… you wanted it. I saw it. The longing. The heat under your armor…<>
<>You saw nothing but your own hunger.<>
<>Your body betrayed you. It begged to be claimed.<>
<>My body belongs to me not your fantasies.<>
<>But you’re so soft now. So ready…<>
<>And still strong enough to kill you.<>
<>You’ll never be complete… you’ll always be between—boy and girl, fear and desire—<>
<>Then I’ll rule between. I’ll thrive between. And you’ll rot beneath.<>
<>You… were supposed to be… mine…<>
<>I belong to no one.<>
<>They won’t define me. Not with their fantasies. Not with their fear. I define me.<>
<> [[Kill Magical Doppelgänger|shadebound_changeling_reward]] <> <>Mmm. Look at you panting, trembling, flushed. Just a few more touches of illusion and you'd offer yourself.<>
<>I'll never... let you... win.<>
<>Oh darling. I already tasted your doubt. Your blush was consent enough. That ache between your legs? That’s mine now.<>
<>Wrong!<>
<>Run, little princess! But know this your flesh remembers me. You’ll dream of me. Of what I almost did. Of what you almost wanted.<>
<>Dreams aren’t truth. And I’ll return… to end you.<>
[[Run|north_forest]] <> <>
passages.content_zh:
[IF $memory_game_won]
你……你想要它。我看到了。那份渴望。你盔甲下的熱度……
mc: 你除了自己的飢渴，什麼也沒看見。
你的身體背叛了你。它乞求被佔有。
mc: 我的身體屬於我，不屬於你的幻想。
但你現在如此柔軟。如此準備就緒……
mc: 而且依然強壯到足以殺死你。
你永遠不會完整……你永遠會處於兩者之間——男孩與女孩，恐懼與慾望——
mc: 那麼我將統治這之間。我將在這之間茁壯。而你將在之下腐朽。
你……本該是……我的……
mc: 我不屬於任何人。
mc: 他們無法定義我。用他們的幻想不能。用他們的恐懼也不能。我定義我自己。

[殺死魔法分身]
[ELSE]
嗯。看看你氣喘吁吁、顫抖、臉紅的模樣。只要再多幾下幻覺的觸碰，你就會獻上自己了。
mc: 我永遠……不會……讓你……得逞。
噢，親愛的。我已經嚐過你的動搖了。你的臉紅就是足夠的同意。你雙腿間的那份悸動？現在那是我的了。
mc: 錯了！
跑吧，小公主！但要知道，你的肉體記得我。你會夢見我。夢見我差點對你做的事。夢見你差點想要的事。
mc: 夢境不是真實。而我會回來……終結你。
[逃跑]
[/IF]

passages.name: shadebound_changeling_reward
passages.content:
<>
✨ Spoils of Victory: Shadebound Changeling ✨
The air stills as the last breath fades from the fallen beast, leaving behind the faint scent of ancient magic and something quietly precious among the remains. In this fragile silence, a new path unfolds before you.
<> < 0.5 - Math.random())>> <> You receive the following alchemical ingredients as loot:
    <> <> <> <> <> <> <>
  • <<=_data.name>> — +<<=_amountToAdd>> <<=_data.unit>>
    • <    >
In the calm after the storm, I stand remade — a body changed, a spirit sharpened, and a future written by my own hand.
[[Back to North Forest|north_forest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
✨ 勝利戰利品：影縛變形者 ✨

隨著那頭倒下的野獸吐出最後一口氣，空氣靜止下來，只留下古老魔法的微弱氣息，以及遺骸中某種靜謐珍貴之物。在這脆弱的寂靜中，一條新的道路在你面前展開。

 0.5 - Math.random())>>

你獲得以下鍊金材料作為戰利品：

    
    

    [IF $userItems[_key] is undefined]
        
    [/IF]

    

    
        
         — + 
    

在風暴過後的平靜中，我佇立於此，已然重塑——身體改變，精神銳利，未來由我親手書寫。

[返回北境森林]

passages.name: interact_with_anthos
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> A queen who does not read will be ruled by those who do. Sit. The ledger of border treaties won’t translate itself. <>
<> I was hoping for something lighter maybe myths or poetry. <>
<> Poetry will come once your enemies are dead or disarmed. Until then, we read about taxes and terrain. <>
<> <> This tome here written by a madwoman with three crowns and five assassinated husbands. Pay attention, her madness was genius. <>
<> Sounds like the kind of queen I’m supposed to become. <>
<> Perhaps. Just don’t drink the ink. She did that too. <>
<> <> A woman may sway with a smile, but true dominion rests in knowing what the ministers fear at night. Read this. Slowly. <>
<> You always make it sound like knowledge is a blade. <>
<> Wiser than steel. Sharper, too. And it never rusts. <>
<> <> The records of Queen Elyria’s reign are forbidden. Naturally, I’ve kept two copies. Do you want power, or comfort? <>
<> If I wanted comfort, I’d be in the kitchens, not here with dust and secrets. <>
<> Good. Then read her downfall. It's a mirror with teeth. <>
<> <> See this glyph? Misread it, and you grant immunity. Read it correctly, and you condemn. That is the power of clarity. <>
<> So, no pressure, then. Just one wrong syllable and someone lives or dies? <>
<> Exactly. Welcome to governance. <>
<> <> Diplomacy begins in ink. This scroll holds the alliance that saved Velmoria twice. Learn to
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
anthos:
不讀書的女王，終將被那些讀書的人所統治。坐下吧。邊境條約的總帳可不會自己翻譯。

mc:
我原本希望讀些輕鬆的——也許是神話或詩歌。

anthos:
等你的敵人都死了或解除武裝後，自然會有詩歌。在那之前，我們讀的是稅收和地形。

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
anthos:
這本大部頭——出自一位瘋女人之手，她頭戴三頂王冠，有五任丈夫遭暗殺。注意聽，她的瘋狂是種天才。

mc:
聽起來像是我應該成為的那種女王。

anthos:
或許吧。只是別喝墨水。她也幹過那種事。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
anthos:
女人可以憑微笑搖擺人心，但真正的統治權在於知曉大臣們夜裡恐懼什麼。讀這個。慢慢地。

mc:
你總是說得好像知識是把刀。

anthos:
比鋼鐵更睿智。也更鋒利。而且永不生鏽。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
anthos:
Elyria 女王統治時期的記錄是禁書。自然，我保留了兩份副本。你想要權力，還是舒適？

mc:
如果我想要舒適，我會待在廚房，而不是這裡與灰塵和秘密為伍。

anthos:
很好。那就讀讀她的垮台吧。那是一面長著利齒的鏡子。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
anthos:
看到這個符文了嗎？誤讀它，你便授予豁免權。正確解讀，你則能定罪。這就是清晰的力量。

mc:
所以，沒什麼壓力嘛。只是一個音節讀錯，就決定某人生死？

anthos:
正是如此。歡迎來到治理之道。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
anthos:
外交始於筆墨。這份捲軸記載了兩度拯救 Velmoria 的聯盟。學會書寫你自己的救贖。

mc:
或是詛咒，取決於誰來讀它。

anthos:
啊，你開始明白了。言語即是武器。現在，明智地鍛造吧。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
anthos:
你想成為女王？那就學會優雅地說謊。從閱讀這本宮廷奉承手冊開始。

mc:
奉承聽起來夠簡單的。

anthos:
粗淺的奉承一里外就能被識破。真正的奉承是用絲綢包裹真相，讓你的敵人微笑。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
anthos:
啊，年輕的王室成員又踏入我的領域了。是來尋找被禁止的真相，還是僅僅為了躲避劍術練習？

mc:
也許兩者都是。你的書架不會弄傷我的肋骨。

anthos:
目前還不會。但它們可能會粉碎你的幻覺。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
anthos:
如果你掌握了每個貴族家族的歷史，你將在他們察覺之前就統治了他們。

mc:
聽起來像是要記住一千個宿怨。

anthos:
正是如此。而知道該按下哪一個，才是關鍵所在。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
anthos:
書本不會評判你的身體，Caelan。它們只在乎內在的心智。餵養它吧。

mc:
那麼，也許書本是唯一不在乎我正變成誰——或什麼——的存在。

anthos:
啊，但書本仍將塑造你必須成為的女王。如果你允許它們的話。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
anthos:
每位女王都必須了解繼承法——如何曲解它、打破它，或確保它得以維持。

mc:
我以為當你是繼承人時，繼承很簡單。

anthos:
很簡單，直到有人質疑你的血統、你的身體，或你的統治權。為這三者做好準備。

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
anthos:
這些記錄在三姊妹戰爭後被封存。打開它們，你就會明白原因。

mc:
如果它們被封存了，你為什麼要給我看？

anthos:
因為你需要那些會嚇倒平庸之人的真相。女王不能憑藉謠言統治。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
anthos:
這裡的符文會根據讀者的意圖而改變。你看到了什麼？

mc:
它……變了。現在更柔和了。更溫和了。

anthos:
你也是。圖書館會適應真實。你也必須如此。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
anthos:
Velmoria 有十種語言在使用，其中四種是間諜使用的。至少學會六種。

mc:
包括秘密的語言嗎？

anthos:
那一種你已經在學習了。每一天，你都身披王冠的陰影。

[ELSEIF _i == 14]
anthos:
這本法典曾屬於一位通過低語統治的女王。她的筆就是她的匕首。

mc:
人們因此比懼怕刀劍更懼怕她？

anthos:
因為她能讓國王因一封信而哭泣。學會那樣書寫。

[ELSEIF _i == 15]
anthos:
你正在蛻變成某種稀有的存在，Caelan。不僅僅是統治者。是一個擁有主權的心智。

mc:
即使我不再被視為男人？

anthos:
智慧沒有性別。但它確實要求犧牲。繼續讀吧。

[ELSEIF _i == 16]
anthos:
我們腳下的檔案室收藏著被禁的咒語和理論。大部分

passages.name: interact_with_edran
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> <> Careful where you step, Your Highness... that’s Feylace bloom. One brush and your cheeks might blush for hours inside and out. <>
<> Is that a warning... or an invitation? Gods, I didn’t think flowers could flirt. <>
<> Some do. And some listen. The Moonpetals over there opened wider when you passed. They must like what you’re becoming. <>
<> <> Velmorian Honey drips slowest at dawn. The bees hum a lullaby to coax it from the combs. Only gentleness earns their gift. <>
<> Gentleness... not my strongest trait lately. But maybe I’m learning. <>
<> You are. Even the lilies bend softer when you pass. They're listening, even if you aren’t. <>
<> <> Starblossoms only open for those with dreams they haven’t spoken aloud. I see five blooming behind you. <>
<> And what would those dreams be, Edran? <>
<> If I said them aloud, they’d belong to me. And something tells me they’re far too precious for that. <>
<> <> Glowleaf burns brighter when it feels desire nearby. Yours must be leaking like sunlight through silk. <>
<> You're making it very hard to pretend I'm only here for botany. <>
<> Pretend all you want. Even the vines wrap tighter when you're flustered. <>
<> <> You brushed against the Softroot patch... your skin will feel like velvet for hours. May want to warn anyone who dares touch you. <>
<> Anyone, Edran? That a suggestion? <>
<> No, Your Highness. That was a temptation. <>
<
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
[ELSEIF _i == 1]
edran:
小心腳下，殿下……那是仙絲花。輕輕一碰，你的臉頰內外可能都會紅上好幾個小時。

mc:
這算是警告……還是邀請？天啊，我沒想到花也會調情。

edran:
有些花會。有些花還會傾聽。那邊的月瓣花在你經過時開得更盛了。它們一定很喜歡你正在變成的模樣。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
edran:
維爾摩里亞蜂蜜在黎明時滴得最慢。蜜蜂會哼唱搖籃曲，哄它從蜂巢中流出。唯有溫柔才能贏得牠們的饋贈。

mc:
溫柔……這陣子可不是我最擅長的。但或許我正在學習。

edran:
你確實是。就連你經過時，百合花彎腰的姿態都更柔和了。它們在傾聽，即使你沒有。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
edran:
星綻花只為那些懷有未曾說出口的夢想之人綻放。我看見有五朵在你身後盛開了。

mc:
那些夢想會是什麼呢，Edran？

edran:
如果我說出口，它們就屬於我了。而某種直覺告訴我，它們太過珍貴，不該如此。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
edran:
光葉在感應到附近的慾望時會燃燒得更亮。你的慾望一定像陽光穿透絲綢般洩漏出來了。

mc:
你讓我很難假裝自己只是來研究植物學的。

edran:
儘管假裝吧。就連藤蔓在你慌亂時都會纏得更緊。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
edran:
你擦過了軟根草叢……你的皮膚會有幾個小時像天鵝絨般柔滑。或許該警告任何膽敢觸碰你的人。

mc:
任何人嗎，Edran？這是個建議？

edran:
不，殿下。那是個誘惑。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
edran:
熾天使乳百合昨晚開花了。只有當附近有人同時渴望純潔與蛻變時，它們才會這樣做。

mc:
你覺得我渴望純潔？這可真好笑。

edran:
不。但花從不說謊。或許你希望被視為值得尊敬……而不僅僅是美麗。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
edran:
唇上沾一滴緋紅露，你就能嚐遍所有未曾有過的吻。這很危險，如果你感到孤獨的話。

mc:
幸好我不孤獨。只是……好奇。

edran:
那就別舔你的嘴唇。或者舔吧。但別獨自一人時這麼做。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
edran:
你碰到的藤蔓？那是藤絲蔓。它會輕輕拉伸你的四肢，足以讓你下一件禮服都嫉妒。

mc:
你總是這麼詩意嗎，還是只為那些已經改變的人保留？

edran:
我為那些正在蛻變之人綻放。而你正處於盛放之季。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
edran:
仙絲花瓣在附近有人被注視時會閃爍微光。你踏進來的那一刻，它們就亮了。

mc:
被注視……被植物？還是被其他人？

edran:
這重要嗎，Caelan？無論如何，你都令人著迷。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
edran:
緋紅根塵現在很穩定。這意味著花園處於平衡……或者說，你處於平衡。

mc:
平衡？我覺得自己像條在兩座懸崖間緊繃的繩索。

edran:
而你仍未斷裂。那不是軟弱，Caelan。那是蛻變之美。

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
edran:
你靠近的百合低語花蜜……它是為那些學習優雅之人準備的。你的步伐改變了。現在更像微風，而非雷鳴。

mc:
我沒注意到。

edran:
這正是你知道它真實存在的方式。優雅從不要求掌聲。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
edran:
你穿過了天鵝絨叢。你的大腿會柔軟好幾天。告訴我，這感覺像盔甲……還是投降？

mc:
或許兩者都是。或許我正在學習柔軟也是一種盾牌。

edran:
說得像是在合適土壤中綻放的人。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
edran:
我留了些星綻花花粉在外面，風把它們吹散了……吹向你的路徑。它從不會毫無意義地飄散。

mc:
聽起來你好像期待命運來修剪樹籬。

edran:
命運什麼也不修剪。但它確實會為勇敢者留下花粉的蹤跡。

[ELSEIF _i == 14]
edran:
月瓣花萃取液今晚達到巔峰。聞一口，身體就會忘記如何偽裝。

mc:
那如果我花了多年時間偽裝成另一個人呢？

edran:
那它嚐起來就會像自由。起初苦澀……但終究是解脫。

[ELSEIF _i == 15]
edran:
你笑的時候，光葉閃爍了。我想我從未見過它這樣。

mc:
也許它喜歡我……做自己的聲音。

edran:
那就多笑一些。傾聽的不只是植物。

[ELSEIF _i == 16]
edran:
我發現你的影子伸向了熾天使乳藤蔓。影子不會說謊，Caelan。

mc:
那我一定是想從這副身體得到更多，多到我還不敢大聲說出來。

edran:
沒關係。在你準備好之前，花園會替你訴說。

[ELSEIF _i == 17]
edran:
你

passages.name: interact_with_halda
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> Sit your royal backside down, child. You look like you haven’t eaten since the last full moon. One more skipped meal and I’ll drag you in by your ear like I did the pageboy last winter. <>
<> I wasn’t trying to skip training ran long, and I just forgot. <>
<> Training or not, no heir of Velmoria will walk around looking like a starved crow. Now, eat this stew before I feed it to the hounds and tell them you insulted their mother. <>
<> <> I see more bones than belly in that tunic. Are they putting you on a battlefield or a catwalk? Either way, you need strength in your arms and starch in your soul. <>
<> They keep saying I’m changing, but no one mentioned how much hungrier I’d feel. <>
<> Aye, that’s because real change burns fuel, darling. Now hush and try the honeyed roast. I laced it with love and just a whisper of rebellion. <>
<> <> I added extra butter to your morning rolls. Don’t you dare insult my kitchen by pretending you didn’t want them. <>
<> I was trying to be disciplined… but they do smell divine. <>
<> Discipline is for drills. Breakfast is sacred. Now bite before it bites back. <>
<> <> Come closer, Caelan. No, closer. You smell like sword oil and sorrow. You need soup. <>
<> Is soup your answer to everything? <>
<> Yes. And it’s never failed me, a single soul, or a broken bone. Now, open wide or I’ll spoon it into your princely mouth myself. <>
<> <> I noticed the new waist on your dress robes. Pretty, but thin doesn’t win wars or wear crowns without fainting. <
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
halda:
把你的皇家屁股坐下來，孩子。你看起來像是從上個滿月後就沒吃過東西。再跳過一餐，我就會像去年冬天對待那個侍童一樣，揪著你的耳朵把你拖進來。

mc:
我不是故意要跳過的……訓練拖長了，我只是忘了。

halda:
不管訓練不訓練，維爾莫里亞的繼承人可不能像隻餓昏的烏鴉一樣走來走去。現在，把這燉肉吃了，不然我就拿去餵獵犬，然後告訴牠們你侮辱了牠們的母親。

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
halda:
我看你那束腰外衣下的骨頭比肚子還多。他們是要把你送上戰場還是伸展台？不管哪個，你都需要手臂的力量和靈魂裡的韌性。

mc:
他們一直說我在改變，但沒人提到我會變得多餓。

halda:
是啊，那是因為真正的改變需要燃料，親愛的。現在別說話，嚐嚐這蜂蜜烤肉。我加了愛，還有一絲叛逆的耳語。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
halda:
我在你的晨間麵包捲裡多加了奶油。你敢假裝不想要它們來侮辱我的廚房試試看。

mc:
我只是想保持紀律……但它們聞起來確實很香。

halda:
紀律是給操練用的。早餐是神聖的。現在快咬一口，免得它反咬你。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
halda:
靠近點，Caelan。不，再近點。你聞起來有劍油和悲傷的味道。你需要喝湯。

mc:
湯是你對一切問題的解答嗎？

halda:
是的。而且它從未讓我、任何一個人、或一根斷骨失望過。現在，把嘴張開，不然我就親自把湯匙塞進你高貴的嘴裡。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
halda:
我注意到你禮服長袍的新腰身了。漂亮，但纖細贏不了戰爭，也戴不了王冠而不暈倒。

mc:
你現在是說我太嬌弱了嗎？

halda:
我是說你是一朵需要根莖而不只是花瓣的皇家玫瑰。把你的扁豆吃了，Caelan。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
halda:
你那皺眉的樣子告訴我，有人竟敢建議你跳過甜點。是那個法師還是那個蕾絲女總管？

mc:
是Veletia。她說奶油蛋糕會讓我某些部位發胖。

halda:
告訴她，女王的臀部不是偶然，而這個王國是靠糕點運轉的。再吃一份。我堅持。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
halda:
我烤了你上個月喜歡的那些蜂蜜無花果塔。我自己吃了一個，就為了確保魔力還在。

mc:
你測試食物就像個皇家試毒員。

halda:
那是因為愛可能是致命的，親愛的。而沒有什麼比被忽視的飢餓更致命了。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
halda:
你一直像隻餓狼一樣踱步。坐下。咀嚼。之後再說話。

mc:
有那麼明顯嗎？

halda:
只有對餵過這座城堡裡每一個緊張鬼的人來說才明顯。咬一口，然後呼吸。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
halda:
你經過廚房三次卻沒進來。你知道嗎，這在七個省份都算犯罪。

mc:
我不確定我餓不餓……

halda:
親愛的，飢餓並不總是在肚子裡。有時，它在靈魂裡。而燉肉對兩者都有幫助。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
halda:
沒人能像我一樣指揮廚房，孩子。但你……你是唯一一個我不用賄賂就主動提供第二份的人。

mc:
我感到榮幸……也稍微感到威脅。

halda:
很好。這樣你才知道那是真愛。現在，別逼我用湯勺來威脅你。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
halda:
你又露出那種表情了——像隻忘了怎麼飛的鵝。坐下。我有胡椒防風草派和一些意見要分享。

mc:
這是個危險的組合。我該準備聽訓還是準備盛宴？

halda:
兩者都要。如果你不把盤子清空，我就會拿著湯勺和一長串擔憂追著你跑。

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
halda:
我給你縫了這條圍裙。記住，不是用來做飯的——只是為了提醒你，你在這個廚房裡有個家。

mc:
你縫的？這……真讓人意外地感動，Halda。

halda:
別習慣。我十年才哭一次，而你離提前看到它只差兩粒麵包屑了。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
halda:
如果你繼續穿著束腰和裙子卻不吃夠，你會在半路去王座的路上暈倒。

mc:
我只是想看起來像個樣子，Halda。

halda:
那就用力量來展現，孩子。女王不會在風中搖擺——她們會讓風轉向。現在把你的烤根莖菜吃了。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
halda:
我在鍋蓋上看見你的倒影了。那新的腮紅色很適合你，但它餵不飽你的血液。

mc:
你這是在說我看起來蒼白嗎？

halda:
我是說，即使是玫瑰也需要莖幹上有肉才能綻放。給——梅子醬烤鴨。

[ELSEIF _i == 14]
halda:
你夢想著統治，卻忘了統治從早餐開始。你見過飢餓的獅子發號施令嗎？

mc:
獅子也不穿高跟鞋，Halda。

halda:
那就當第一個。只是別餓

passages.name: ask_halda_cook_something
passages.content:
<<nobr>>
<<set _dish to random(1, 5)>>

<<switch _dish>>
	<<case 1>>
		<<set _dishName to "Spiced Hare Pie">>
		<<set _haldaLine1 to "Spiced hare pie? Oho! Someone’s feeling noble or suicidal today. Did your mother put you up to this? Or did your stomach rebel on its own?">>
		<<set _haldaLine2 to "Let me tell you, lad, skinning a hare is art. Seasoning it with flame-root and crushed ruby peppers? That’s war. But I’ll win it for you.">>
		<<set _haldaLine3 to "Now be a dear and fetch me some dried sunberries and dragon salt. Unless you want your taste buds to curse your entire bloodline.">>
	<<case 2>>
		<<set _dishName to "Goldenroot Stew">>
		<<set _haldaLine1 to "Goldenroot stew? Trying to impress the court or just hoping your guts stop growling like a direwolf?">>
		<<set _haldaLine2 to "This stuff’ll melt your pride and rebuild your spine. They say it was once a king’s last meal before he surrendered to a smiling queen. Coincidence? I think not.">>
		<<set _haldaLine3 to "Toss me three knobs of thunder tuber and a splash of echo oil. And don’t sniff the root raw unless you want to dream about flying goats.">>
	<<case 3>>
		<<set _dishName to "Fireberry Glazed Duck">>
		<<set _haldaLine1 to "Fireberry duck, is it? Fancy. Regal. Dangerous. Just like you’re supposed to be, someday. But today? You look more like burnt toast with legs.">>
		<<set _haldaLine2 to "No matter. I’ll glaze that duck so perfectly your tongue will bow in gratitude. But you’re plucking the feathers. That’s the price of royalty, sweetheart.">>
		<<set _haldaLine3 to "Fetch me a handful of fireberries and a pinch of phoenix ash. Carefully. That ash sparks if you sigh too loudly near it.">>
	<<case 4>>
		<<set _dishName to "Stonebread with Honey Butter">>
		<<set _haldaLine1 to "Stonebread again? Either you’re preparing for battle or you miss chewing your feelings.">>
		<<set _haldaLine2 to "Nothing soft about this dish, boy. It’s tougher than a queen’s marriage vows and half as forgiving. But
passages.content_zh:
mc:
Halda，我今天想吃點不一樣的。你能幫我做……？

halda:

mc:
嗯，我想既然我都要被拖著進行變形訓練和禮儀練習，那至少該享受點嚐起來像叛逆滋味的東西。

halda:

mc:
你知道嗎，我開始覺得你關心食物勝過關心我的貴族未來。

halda:
更關心？小子，食物就是你的未來！你以為統治者是靠演講和王冠贏得忠誠的嗎？不！他們是用美味和宴席贏得人心的。而今天，你這位尊貴的屁股得來幫忙下廚。

mc:
好吧。你需要我做什麼？

halda:

[離開 Halda]

passages.name: interact_with_gribblek
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> Well, well, the pretty princeling returns. What is it this time? A cursed ring? A haunted hairbrush? Or perhaps you're here to ask my opinion on eyeliner that doubles as a scrying tool? <>
<> I’m here for knowledge, not fashion tips. <>
<> Tch. Same thing, really. Both are illusions meant to protect squishy egos. Now what do I get in return for enlightening your royal cluelessness? <>
<> <> You know, most people knock before barging into my tower. But not you. No, you stride in like a glitter-drenched storm and expect wisdom to spill from my fanged mouth like wine. <>
<> Because you always give it eventually. <>
<> Ugh. Flattery and accuracy. Fine. Sit. But I want double figs this time. No stems. <>
<> <> You're changing again, I see. Inside and out. You wear it like someone trying on another's skin unsure whether it fits, or if it’ll bite back. <>
<> Does it show that much? <>
<> To most? No. To me? Like a troll in a tutu. But don’t worry. Discomfort is the tax of transformation. Pay it proudly. <>
<> <> Once, long ago, a goblin king tried to become a unicorn. Horn and all. Do you know what he learned? <>
<> Let me guess he failed. <>
<> No, he succeeded. But no one believed it was real. Lesson: sometimes becoming is the easy part. Being seen is harder. <>
<> <> The palace mages think I’m mad. Maybe I am. But madness is just insight marinated too long. I see truths they’re too polished to touch. <>
<> Then tell me one of t
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
    gribblek:
哎呀呀，漂亮的小王子又回來了。這次是什麼事？一枚受詛咒的戒指？一把鬧鬼的髮梳？還是說，你是來問我對既能當眼線又能當占卜工具的化妝品有什麼看法？

mc:
我是來尋求知識的，不是時尚建議。

gribblek:
嘖。其實都一樣。兩者都是用來保護脆弱自尊的幻象。那麼，啟迪你這位一無所知的皇室成員，我能得到什麼回報？

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
gribblek:
你知道嗎，大多數人進我的塔之前都會敲門。但你就不一樣。不，你像一場灑滿亮粉的風暴般大步走進來，還指望智慧能像葡萄酒一樣從我長著尖牙的嘴裡流出來。

mc:
因為你最後總是會給的。

gribblek:
呃。奉承話還說得這麼準。好吧。坐下。但這次我要雙倍的無花果。不要梗。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
gribblek:
我看你又變了。裡裡外外都變了。你穿著這變化，就像在試穿別人的皮膚——不確定它是否合身，或者它會不會反咬你一口。

mc:
有那麼明顯嗎？

gribblek:
對大多數人來說？不。對我來說？明顯得像穿芭蕾舞裙的巨魔。但別擔心。不適是蛻變的代價。驕傲地支付它吧。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
gribblek:
很久很久以前，有個哥布林國王想變成獨角獸。連角都要。你知道他學到了什麼嗎？

mc:
讓我猜猜——他失敗了。

gribblek:
不，他成功了。但沒人相信那是真的。教訓是：有時候，成為的過程是簡單的部分。被看見，更難。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
gribblek:
宮廷法師們覺得我瘋了。也許我是瘋了。但瘋狂只是醃漬過頭的洞見。我看見那些他們過於圓滑而不敢觸碰的真相。

mc:
那就告訴我其中一個真相。

gribblek:
好吧。聽這個：王冠不怕軟弱——它怕不可預測。你，我這閃亮的小變數，才令人恐懼。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
gribblek:
你聞起來有茉莉花和自我懷疑的味道。奇怪的組合，但很適合你。

mc:
你自己也不是什麼花束啊。

gribblek:
沒錯。但我又不用試圖統治一個王國。你要。所以下次也許噴點「確定性」香水，嗯？

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
gribblek:
昨晚我看著一隻夢蛾死去。牠的翅膀閃爍著被遺忘的名字。美麗又悲傷。讓我想起了你。

mc:
這……對你來說還真是出奇地有詩意。

gribblek:
別習慣。現在把那個符文粉筆遞給我，不然我又要開始把你比作濕麵包了。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
gribblek:
啊，這不是維爾莫里亞最不無聊的貴族嗎？你今天來，不是為了禁忌知識，就是為了躲你母親。今天是哪一種？

mc:
兩者都有一點。

gribblek:
那你需要更強的隱形術……和更濃的茶。宮廷是無情的，而你還在學習怎麼玩髒的。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
gribblek:
我找到一份古老的預言，提到一位「眼中蘊含月光的變幻繼承人」。聽起來耳熟嗎，還是要我拿面鏡子來？

mc:
它還說了什麼？

gribblek:
說他/她會拯救這個王國，或者用一個吻讓它分崩離析。含糊得令人愉快。我最喜歡這種末日預言了。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
gribblek:
有人說哥布林不懂忠誠。說我們只有尖牙和惡作劇。但我不是一直待在這兒嗎？我看過你最壞的脾氣、最好的禮服、你受詛咒的指甲——而我依然留在這裡。

mc:
為什麼？

gribblek:
因為看著你改寫命運，是我三百年來最大的樂趣。現在遞個無花果給我，我們再來打破一條規則。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
gribblek:
哦，真開心，又是你。我剛開始享受我這悲慘小流放地的寂靜——你就來了，像拖著一件鑲滿珠寶的詛咒一樣拖著戲劇性事件。

mc:
如果你真的討厭我，你就不會把你最好的謎語留到我來訪時才說了。

gribblek:
討厭？噗。你就像魔法書上的黴菌——惱人、不可避免，而且莫名地令人懷念。

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
gribblek:
你有沒有試過把你的不確定性裝瓶？沒有？真可惜。我可以把它當愛情靈藥賣。「焦慮皇室精華」。保證讓人困惑又著迷。

mc:
小心點。這聽起來像叛國。

gribblek:
叛國？哈！我為更無趣的人犯過更重的罪。你嘛，至少是包在天鵝絨裡的混沌。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
gribblek:
你知道我見過多少繼承人起起落落嗎？你是第一個問我，為什麼那些古老符文在你經過時會嗡嗡作響的。

mc:
它們是帶著贊同……還是警告在嗡鳴？

gribblek:
那要看是誰在聽。魔法就像宮廷政治——一半是真相，一半是威脅，而且總在觀察。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
gribblek:

passages.name: interact_with_marda
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> You walk like a prince, but your eyes beg to be led. Curious mix. Tell me are you here to command, or to be corrected? <>
<> I'm here to understand the chain of command. <>
<> Then start by learning how satisfying it is to kneel before you demand others do. Humility first. Power later. <>
<> <> Royal blood stains just like common blood. Don’t pout I'm merely reminding you that your crown won’t shield you here. My keys open iron doors… and break egos. <>
<> I'm not afraid of a few shadows and cells. <>
<> No, princeling. You’re afraid of being seen in them. And that’s far more delicious. <>
<> <> Let me guess you want control over your body, your future, your throne. And yet... every time you speak, it sounds like you're begging to give it away. <>
<> That’s not what this is. <>
<> Of course it isn’t. But come down here often enough, and even lions start to purr for the whip. <>
<> <> There’s a certain elegance to submission, you know. Holding still when commanded, offering the throat without question. It’s not weakness. It’s clarity. <>
<> And what would I gain from that? <>
<> Relief. Purpose. And perhaps… the exquisite satisfaction of letting someone else make the world make sense. <>
<> <> I watched you in court today chin lifted, voice trembling. Regal, but cracking. You’ll either break gloriously… or learn to let someone shape you properly. <>
<> I'm not yours to shape. <>
<> Not yet. But even steel bends under
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
    marda:
你走起路來像個王子，但你的眼神卻乞求著被引導。有趣的混合體。告訴我，你是來發號施令的，還是來接受糾正的？

mc:
我來這裡是為了理解指揮鏈。

marda:
那就從學習在要求他人之前跪下是多麼令人滿足開始吧。先學會謙卑。權力稍後再說。

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
marda:
皇族的血和普通人的血一樣會弄髒。別撅嘴，我只是在提醒你，你的王冠在這裡保護不了你。我的鑰匙能打開鐵門……也能粉碎自尊。

mc:
我不怕什麼陰影和牢房。

marda:
不，小王子。你怕的是被人看見你在裡面。而那才更令人愉悅。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
marda:
讓我猜猜，你想要控制你的身體、你的未來、你的王位。然而……每次你開口，聽起來都像是在乞求放棄這一切。

mc:
不是這樣的。

marda:
當然不是。但只要你常來這裡，即使是獅子也會開始為鞭子發出呼嚕聲。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
marda:
你知道嗎，順從有種獨特的優雅。在被命令時保持靜止，毫無疑問地獻出喉嚨。這不是軟弱。這是清晰。

mc:
那我從中能得到什麼？

marda:
解脫。目標。或許……還有讓別人來理清這世界的極致滿足感。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
marda:
我今天在宮廷裡看著你，下巴抬起，聲音顫抖。高貴，但正在崩裂。你要麼會壯烈地破碎……要麼學會讓別人來適當地塑造你。

mc:
我不是讓你塑造的。

marda:
現在還不是。但即使是鋼鐵也會在烈火下彎曲。而我擁有我需要的所有時間……和熱度。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
marda:
摸摸那手銬。來吧。很冷，對吧？但也很安慰，不是嗎？就像帶有獠牙的規則。有些生物需要籠子才能知道自己的位置。

mc:
我不是什麼該被關進籠子的生物。

marda:
你一直這麼說……但每次我這樣說話時，你的呼吸都會加快。否認在絕望時嚐起來更美味。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
marda:
每個統治者都需要一個能安全崩潰的地方。地牢可以成為那樣的地方……如果你允許的話。在這裡，沒有評判。只有規則。

mc:
你以為我會那樣投降嗎？

marda:
我知道你會的。問題是，你會更享受第一次……還是第一百次。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
marda:
站直一點。說話輕一點。聽話時眼睛向下看。這些不是命令，小王子。它們是你每一次呼吸都在乞求的教訓。

mc:
我不記得我有乞求過。

marda:
沒有嗎？那就讓我來提醒你。慢慢地。堅定地。當然，會很小心。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
marda:
你走進我的領域，沒有盔甲，沒有權威，卻還期待著恭敬。真可愛。剝去你的驕傲，也許……也許……你會學到一些真實的東西。

mc:
你太享受這個了。

marda:
愉悅就是力量，親愛的。而順從？那只是偽裝的愉悅。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
marda:
跪下。

mc:
什麼？

marda:
看吧？你聽見了。你遲疑了。你感覺到了。那股拉力。別擔心。大多數人不會馬上服從。但聰明人總是會回來索取更多。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
marda:
在上面你是皇室成員，但在這裡……你只是一個等待被考驗的靈魂。剝去絲綢吧，小王子，赤裸中有真理。

mc:
我來這裡不是為了被剝去任何東西。

marda:
那你為什麼不斷回來，嗯？尋求懲罰……還是許可？

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
marda:
你的母親訓練你的心智。法師塑造你的身體。但告訴我，誰教你投降？誰向你展示如何有目的地屈服？

mc:
屈服從來不是計畫的一部分。

marda:
那是因為你從未屈服於一個確切知道該如何對待你的人。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
marda:
你的聲音在服從的邊緣顫抖。我可以推它一把——只需一個字，你就會乖乖就位。要讓我測試這個理論嗎，皇家寵物？

mc:
我不是任何人的寵物。

marda:
那就證明它。說不……並且是認真的。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
marda:
每一塊瘀傷都訴說著一個故事。有些是警告。有些，是邀請。你希望你的屬於哪一種？

mc:
你假設我會讓你在我身上留下印記。

marda:
親愛的，我不是在請求。我只是在觀察，看你還要假裝多久不渴望它。

[ELSEIF _i == 14]
marda:
王座教不會克制。鞭子可以。要我給你上一堂關於靜止的課嗎，Caelan？一堂你不會很快忘記的課？

mc:
我不需要你的管教。

marda:
噢，但你想要它。而想要……那才危險得多。

[ELSEIF _i == 15]
marda:
我看到那位貴婦碰你手臂時你畏縮的樣子。你不怕女人，是吧，小王子？還

passages.name: marda_session_1
passages.content:
<> <> <>Well, well. A lamb in the wolf’s den. <>
<>I… I was just looking for the old armory. I must’ve taken a wrong <>
<>You didn’t take a wrong turn, sweetling. You took a step into your future. That’s what this place is. A mirror. A forge. A proving ground. <>
<>Forgive me. I should go. <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_1]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 哎呀呀。狼窩裡來了隻小羊羔。

mc: 我……我只是在找舊軍械庫。我一定是走錯路了。

marda: 你沒有走錯路，小可愛。你是踏入了你的未來。這就是此地。一面鏡子。一座熔爐。一個試煉場。

mc: 恕我失禮。我該走了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_1
passages.content:
<> <>You could. Or you could stay. Speak. You’ve been so quiet all these weeks. I thought your tongue had been snipped. <>
<>At least I have a tongue. Some people just hiss like serpents. <>
<>Oho. The princeling’s teeth are sharper than I thought. <>
<>I didn’t mean <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 你可以走。或者你可以留下。說話啊。這幾週你安靜得可以。我還以為你的舌頭被剪掉了呢。

mc: 至少我還有舌頭。有些人只會像蛇一樣嘶嘶作響。

marda: 喔唷。小王子的牙齒比我想的還利。

mc: 我不是那個意思
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_2
passages.content:
<> <>Never apologize for fire. You’ll need it. But know this: when you play with flames down here, they bite back. <>
<>What… do you mean? <>
<>Sit on that bench. Now. That was a command, not a suggestion. <>
<>…Yes, Mistress. <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 永遠別為火焰道歉。你會需要它的。但要記住：當你在這下面玩火，它們是會反咬的。

mc: 你……是什麼意思？

marda: 坐到那張長凳上。現在。這是命令，不是建議。

mc: ……是，女主人。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_3
passages.content:
<> <>Mistress? That came easily. Are the potions working, or is the girl already clawing her way out? <>
<>It… it was just instinct. <>
<>Instinct reveals more truth than confession. <>
Marda walked behind me.

<>Your shoulders… still stubbornly broad. But the rest? Softening. Mmm. You’re being melted. <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 女主人？叫得挺順口嘛。是藥水生效了，還是那女孩已經在掙扎著要出來了？

mc: 這……只是本能反應。

marda: 本能比告白更能揭示真相。
Marda 走到我身後。

marda: 你的肩膀……還是固執地寬闊。但其他地方呢？正在軟化。嗯。你正在被融化。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_4
passages.content:
<> <>I didn’t come here for this. <>
<>No one comes here for this. But some leave with something they didn’t know they craved. <>
<>You’re terrifying. <>
<>Good. You’ll need to learn to kneel before things that terrify you. <>
Marda produced a silken rope.

[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我不是為這個來的。

marda: 沒人是為這個來的。但有些人離開時，會帶著他們從不知道自己渴望的東西。

mc: 你真可怕。

marda: 很好。你需要學會在令你恐懼的事物面前跪下。
Marda 拿出一條絲繩。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_5
passages.content:
<> <>Arms forward. Let’s play a game. You win? You leave. You lose? I get a confession. <>
<>…What kind of game? <>
<>Simple. Endure without pulling away. I’ll touch. You don’t flinch. Fair? <>
<>…Fair. <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 手臂向前。我們來玩個遊戲。你贏？你離開。你輸？我要一個告白。

mc: ……什麼樣的遊戲？

marda: 很簡單。忍耐，不縮手。我會觸碰。你不能退縮。公平嗎？

mc: ……公平。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_6
passages.content:
<> <>Not too tight. Just enough to remind you you’re not in control. <>
<>I can feel my heart pounding. <>
<>Good. That means you’re alive. And maybe… ready. <>
Marda lightly trailed her fingers along My collarbone.

<>This is changing. Do you feel it? Skin thinning. Feminizing. <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 不會太緊。剛好足以提醒你，你並非掌控者。

mc: 我能感覺到我的心在狂跳。

marda: 很好。這代表你還活著。而且也許……準備好了。
Marda 的手指輕輕掠過我的鎖骨。

marda: 這裡正在改變。你感覺到了嗎？皮膚變薄。變得女性化。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_7
passages.content:
<> <>Yes… I feel… different lately. <>
<>Say it. <>
<>I feel… like I’m slipping. Into her. <>
<>Her who? <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_8]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 是的……我感覺……最近不一樣了。

marda: 說出來。

mc: 我感覺……我好像正在滑落。滑進她的身體裡。

marda: 她是誰？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_8
passages.content:
<> <>Her… me. The woman I’m becoming. <>
<>There she is. <>
Marda leaned close, whispering.

<>Has anyone taught you how to use a curtsey to command a room? <>
<>No… <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_9]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 她……就是我。我正在成為的那個女人。

marda: 她出現了。
Marda 傾身靠近，低語。

marda: 有人教過你如何用屈膝禮掌控全場嗎？

mc: 沒有……
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_9
passages.content:
<> <>I’ll teach you. After you beg. <>
<>I don’t beg. <>
<>Oh, but you will. <>
Marda trailed her fingers to My lower back.

<>Do you know where shame lives? <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_10]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 我會教你。在你哀求之後。

mc: 我不哀求。

marda: 噢，但你會的。
Marda 的手指滑到我的後腰。

marda: 你知道羞恥住在哪裡嗎？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_10
passages.content:
<> <>…Where? <>
<>In secrets. But you, sweetling, are being unwrapped. <>
<>This is wrong. <>
<>No, it’s raw. And it’s real. <>
Marda gently released the rope.

[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_11]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: ……哪裡？

marda: 在秘密裡。但你，小可愛，正在被拆開。

mc: 這不對。

marda: 不，這很赤裸。而且很真實。
Marda 輕輕解開了繩子。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_11
passages.content:
<> <>You won the game. You didn’t flinch. Not once. <>
<>I… did? <>
<>You’re stronger than you think. Or perhaps weaker in delicious new ways. <>
<>Will you tell anyone about this? <>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_12]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 你贏了遊戲。你沒有退縮。一次也沒有。

mc: 我……贏了？

marda: 你比你想像的更堅強。或者，也許在某些美妙的新方面變得更脆弱了。

mc: 你會把這件事告訴別人嗎？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_1_12
passages.content:
<> <>Secrets are like chains. I know how to keep them locked tight. <>
<>…Thank you. I think. <>
<> [[Leave Dungeon Keeper|dungeon]] |

[[Leave Dungeon|castle_map_back_select]] <>
passages.content_zh:
nyssa: 秘密就像鎖鏈。我知道如何把它們牢牢鎖住。

mc: ……謝謝。我想。
[Leave Dungeon Keeper] |
[Leave Dungeon]

passages.name: marda_session_2
passages.content:
<> <> <>I came… back.<>
<>Of course you did, my little bird. Curiosity always returns to the cage, especially once it learns to like the bars.<>
<>I’m not here to… surrender.<>
<>No, no. You’re here to discover. What hurts. What excites. What leaks.<>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_1]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我……回來了。

marda: 你當然回來了，我的小鳥兒。好奇心總是會回到籠子邊，尤其是當它開始喜歡上籠欄之後。

mc: 我來這裡不是為了……投降。

marda: 不，不。你是來發現的。發現什麼會痛。什麼會興奮。什麼會滲漏。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_2_1
passages.content:
<> <>That’s not<>
<>Strip. Leave the prince at the stairs. Come forward as her. As the trembling little pet who whimpers when I breathe too close.<>
<>You… always talk like this?<>
<>No, pet. I only talk this way to those who deserve to be owned.<>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 那不是

marda: 脫掉。把王子留在樓梯上。以她的身份上前來。以那個當我靠得太近呼吸就會嗚咽的顫抖小寵物的身份。

mc: 你……總是這樣說話嗎？

marda: 不，寵物。我只對那些值得被擁有的人這樣說話。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_2_2
passages.content:
<> <>This is wrong.<>
<>No. This is ritual.<>
Marda fastened a collar around My neck and attached a short silver chain to it.

<>Tonight, you’ll learn the three poses of obedience: the kneel, the arch, and the open bloom.<>
<>That sounds like<>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這是錯的。

marda: 不。這是儀式。
Marda 在我的頸部扣上一個項圈，並繫上一條短短的銀鏈。

marda: 今晚，你將學習順從的三種姿態：跪姿、弓姿，以及綻放之姿。

mc: 聽起來像是
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_2_3
passages.content:
<> <>like the beginning of surrender.<>
<>Kneel. Back straight. Hands behind neck.<>
<>Like this…?<>
<>Mmm. That’ll do. Now say, ‘Your pet awaits its punishment, Mistress.’<>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 像是投降的開始。

marda: 跪下。背挺直。雙手放在頸後。

mc: 像這樣……？

marda: 嗯。可以。現在說：「您的寵物等待著懲罰，女主人。」
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_2_4
passages.content:
<> <>Your pet… awaits its punishment, Mistress.<>
<>Delicious. You say that better than some of the trained ones. Do you know how much power is in surrender, pet? Queens can’t beg. But princesses… can plead so prettily.<>
<>I’m not a princess yet.<>
<>No. But tonight, we’ll coax her out of you one moan at a time.<>
Marda led Me to a padded cross and bound him with soft velvet strapsankles wide, arms spread. She blindfolded him.

[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 您的寵物……等待著懲罰，女主人。

marda: 真美妙。你說得比一些受過訓練的還好。你知道投降之中蘊含多少力量嗎，寵物？女王無法乞求。但公主……可以如此美麗地懇求。

mc: 我還不是公主。

marda: 對。但今晚，我們會一次一聲呻吟地，把她從你身體裡誘導出來。
Marda 將我帶到一個鋪有軟墊的十字架前，用柔軟的天鵝絨束帶將他綁住——腳踝大開，雙臂伸展。她蒙上了他的眼睛。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: marda_session_2_5
passages.content:
<> <>Sight is for kings. Feel is for queens.<>
She ran the crop gently over his inner thighs.

<>You’re so soft now… potion working. But softness is dangerous. It attracts attention. And punishment.<>
Smack! The first stroke was firm but not cruel.

<>Say ‘thank you, Mistress.’<>
<>Th-thank you, Mistress…<>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 視覺是給國王的。觸感是給女王的。
她將短鞭輕輕滑過他的大腿內側。

marda: 你現在這麼柔軟……藥水生效了。但柔軟是危險的。它會吸引注意。還有懲罰。
啪！第一下鞭打堅定但不殘酷。

marda: 說「謝謝您，女主人。」

mc: 謝、謝謝您，女主人……

[繼續前進]

passages.name: marda_session_2_6
passages.content:
<> <>You’re learning. Shame tastes better when it’s hot and heavy.<>
A nipple clamp slid on.

<>A gift. To remind your chest it’s not a man’s anymore.<>
Marda whispered as she tightened it.

<>Pain makes you present. That’s why queens used to rule with canes.<>
Marda switched to feathers, brushing sensitive spots already stung by the crop.

<>Why does that feel… so good…<>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 你在學習了。羞恥在灼熱沉重時，滋味更佳。
一個乳夾滑了上去。

marda: 一份禮物。提醒你的胸膛，它不再是男人的了。
Marda 一邊收緊夾子，一邊低語。

marda: 痛苦讓你專注當下。這就是為什麼女王們過去用藤杖統治。
Marda 換成羽毛，輕刷那些已被短鞭刺痛過的敏感部位。

mc: 為什麼這感覺……這麼好……
[繼續前進]

passages.name: marda_session_2_7
passages.content:
<> <>Because your body’s a contradiction, darling. And contradictions moan loudest.<>
After a silence, Marda spoke again.

<>Tell me your deepest fear.<>
<>That I’ll enjoy this… more than I should.<>
<>You already do. And I won’t stop until you beg me to define you.<>
A jeweled and elegant plug was shown.

[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_8]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 因為你的身體是個矛盾體，親愛的。而矛盾體呻吟得最大聲。
一陣沉默後，Marda 再次開口。

marda: 告訴我你最深的恐懼。

mc: 害怕我會……過於享受這一切。

marda: 你已經在享受了。而我不會停止，直到你求我來定義你。
一個鑲嵌寶石、造型優雅的肛塞被展示了出來。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: marda_session_2_8
passages.content:
<> <>Fit for royalty. But it must be earned.<>
<>Earned how?<>
<>By crawling. And confessing. Your girl name.<>
<>I… I haven’t chosen yet.<>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_1_9]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 配得上王室。但它必須靠努力贏得。

mc: 怎麼贏得？

marda: 用爬行。和坦白。你的女孩名字。

mc: 我……我還沒選好。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: marda_session_2_9
passages.content:
<> <>Then tonight, I’ll give you one. ‘Caelia.’ Sweet, broken Caelia.<>
<>Caelia…<>
She marked the name onto My inner thigh with scented oil. She whispered it in one ear, then bit the other.

<>Now you wear her. Next time, you’ll be her.<>
Marda finished with a ritual of praise and restraint, leaving me bound, collared, but relaxeddrenched in endorphins and confusion.

<>Do you understand now? This is not punishment. This is permission. To become.<>
[[Move Forth|marda_session_2_10]] <>
passages.content_zh:
marda: 那麼今晚，我賜你一個。「Caelia」。甜美、破碎的 Caelia。

mc: Caelia……
她用香精油將這個名字寫在我的大腿內側。她在我一隻耳邊低語這個名字，然後咬了另一隻耳朵。

marda: 現在你穿戴著她。下次，你就會是她。
Marda 以一場讚美與束縛的儀式作結，將我綁著、套著項圈，但放鬆地浸潤在內啡肽與困惑之中。

marda: 你現在明白了嗎？這不是懲罰。這是許可。去成為。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: marda_session_2_10
passages.content:
<> <>Yes… Mistress…<>
<> [[Leave Dungeon Keeper|dungeon]] |

[[Leave Dungeon|castle_map_back_select]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 是的……女主人……

[離開地牢看守者] |
[離開地牢]

passages.name: interact_with_tomm
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> You again? Careful, Your Highness spend too much time ‘round horses and you’ll start smelling honest. <>
<> Is that a warning or an invitation? <>
<> Depends. You plannin’ to muck stalls, or just admire the view while pretendin’ you ain’t slummin’? <>
<> <> That filly over there bites diplomats, hates sugar, and kicked the High Priest last week. Frankly, I think she’s ready for court. <>
<> Sounds like she’d fit right in. <>
<> Only difference is she knows when to hold her tongue. Can’t say the same for half the nobles in velvet. <>
<> <> Yer walk’s gettin’ lighter. Either the mage is doin’ her job, or you’ve finally unclenched that royal backside. <>
<> Wouldn’t you like to know. <>
<> Oh, I don’t need to know. I just enjoy seein’ you squirm when I guess right. <>
<> <> I told Bessie here you were comin’. She asked if she should curtsy or run. I said same thing most folk feel when a royal shows up, really. <>
<> I hope she picked curtsy. <>
<> Nah. She chose to fart and wander off. Nobility meets reality, right there. <>
<> <> A crown don’t make you smart. Just shiny. Like strappin’ gold shoes on a mule and expectin’ it to win the derby. <>
<> You calling me a mule? <>
<> Not at all. Mules are useful. <>
<> <> A little bird told me you’re turnin’ into a lady. If true, might I suggest not wearin’ heels in the mud? The stable doesn’t care how dainty your ankles are. <>
<
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
    tomm:
又是你？小心點，殿下。在馬匹旁邊待太久，你會開始聞起來像個老實人。

mc:
這是警告還是邀請？

tomm:
看情況。你是打算清理馬廄，還是只想欣賞風景，假裝自己不是在貧民區閒逛？

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
tomm:
那邊那匹小母馬會咬外交官，討厭糖，上週還踢了高階祭司。老實說，我覺得她準備好進宮廷了。

mc:
聽起來她會很適應。

tomm:
唯一的區別是她知道何時該閉嘴。對那些穿著天鵝絨的半數貴族，我可不能這麼說。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
tomm:
你的腳步變輕了。要嘛是那位法師在盡責，要嘛是你終於放鬆了那高貴的臀部。

mc:
你不是很想知道嗎。

tomm:
噢，我不需要知道。我只是喜歡在我猜對時，看你坐立不安的樣子。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
tomm:
我跟這裡的貝西說你要來了。她問她該行禮還是該跑。我說——這其實是大多數人看到皇室出現時的感受。

mc:
我希望她選擇了行禮。

tomm:
不。她選擇放個屁然後走開。貴族與現實的相遇，就在這裡。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
tomm:
王冠不會讓你變聰明。只會讓你閃閃發光。就像給騾子釘上金馬蹄，還指望牠贏得賽馬。

mc:
你是在說我是騾子嗎？

tomm:
完全不是。騾子很有用。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
tomm:
有小鳥告訴我，你正在變成一位淑女。如果是真的，我建議別在泥地裡穿高跟鞋嗎？馬廄可不在乎你的腳踝有多精緻。

mc:
知道了。我該預期馬匹也會評判我的眼線嗎？

tomm:
除非它跑得比你快。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
tomm:
你們這些皇室成員就像被寵壞的種馬——高抬腿、閃亮亮，而且一聽到「不」就可能踢人。

mc:
你是想說我很危險嗎？

tomm:
不。我是說，如果有人教會你怎麼正確尥蹶子，你有可能會是。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
tomm:
我看過穿芭蕾舞裙的馬，都比貴族在宴會上優雅。至少馬不會因為湯擺放的位置而互相捅刀。

mc:
宴會是政治戰場。

tomm:
是啊。所以我才跟狗一起吃飯。背後捅刀少一點，誠實的口水多一點。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
tomm:
總有一天，殿下，你會不再擔心自己在馬鞍上看起來如何，而是開始擔心你怎麼騎馬。

mc:
你覺得我太虛榮了？

tomm:
我覺得你擦靴子的次數比磨練勇氣還多。但別擔心——兩者在泥地裡都很容易磨損。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
tomm:
貝絲是匹戰馬，但別讓這嚇到你。她只在被欺騙時才會咬人。所以……老實說，小王子——你是偷偷溜進來看風景，還是來找伴的？

mc:
也許兩者都是。

tomm:
好吧，風景有條尾巴，而同伴鬍子裡有乾草。選你的毒藥吧。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
tomm:
小心那個馬鞍，殿下。上次有個貴族試著搬它，他扭傷了自尊心，還挫傷了自我。兩者都花了幾週才痊癒。

mc:
也許我會讓別人來搬。

tomm:
是啊，讓農民流汗，王子保持漂亮——維爾莫里亞最古老的舞蹈。要我哼個調嗎？

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
tomm:
那匹小母馬在發情，而你身上有香水。在她求婚之前，你最好後退點。

mc:
說實話，我很榮幸。這比大多數貴族給我的感情還多。

tomm:
嗯，至少她很誠實。對銀褲子勳爵和他那宮廷式的嗤之以鼻，我可不能這麼說。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
tomm:
關於馬的有趣之處——牠們能聞到恐懼、傲慢和劣質古龍水。算你幸運，你只佔了其中兩樣。

mc:
我該問是哪兩樣嗎？

tomm:
不，讓它像香水店裡的鬼魂一樣纏著你吧。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
tomm:
你一直出現在這下面，人們會以為你想加入員工行列。或者更糟——想自己謀生。

mc:
我寧願清理馬廄，也不願再上一堂禮儀課。

tomm:
那恭喜你——你通過了第一項考驗。現在讓我們看看你能不能像個真正的馬伕一樣躲開糞便。

[ELSEIF _i == 14]
tomm:
你知道嗎，如果統治不順利，你的顴骨很適合當巡遊吟遊詩人。或者掃馬廄。其中一個報酬更好。

mc:
哪一個？

tomm:
掃馬廄。心碎少一點，乾草疹多一點。

[ELSEIF _i == 15]
tomm:
又回來了？你要嘛是在躲人，要嘛是愛上我了。我兩者都不推薦——結局只會是糞肥。

mc:
也許我喜歡現實的味道。

tomm:
那你很幸運，因為現實在三號廄裡堆得高高的，還冒著熱氣。

[ELSEIF _i == 16]
tomm:
這匹——小花——她是王國裡脾氣最壞的母馬。如果你們兩個吵起來，城堡會爆炸。

mc:
這是讚美還是詛咒？

tomm:

passages.name: chest_1_chest_2
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready. Let’s begin.|chest_1_chest_2_1]] |

[[I’m… here. I don’t know how I feel about this, but I’ll try.|chest_1_chest_2_1]] |

[[Don’t think for a second I like this. I’m only doing this because I have no choice.|chest_1_chest_2_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經釀好了藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。我們開始吧。] |
[我……準備好了。我不知道我對此感覺如何，但我會試試看。] |
[別以為我喜歡這樣。我這麼做只是因為別無選擇。] |

passages.name: chest_1_chest_2_1
passages.content:
<>
<> Step forward, Caelan. The first transformation is never about the body it is about your relationship with what you think it means. <>
<>…Right.<>
<> This draught won’t sculpt breasts or enchant curves. Not yet. All it will do is ask your chest to let go to ease its grip on a shape that has served you until now.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_1_chest_2_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。第一次轉變從來不是關於身體，而是關於你與你對身體意義的認知之間的關係。

mc: ……沒錯。
thalara:
這劑藥水不會塑造胸部或增添曲線。還不會。它只會要求你的胸膛放鬆，鬆開它至今為止一直維持的形態。
[繼續]

passages.name: chest_1_chest_2_2
passages.content:
<> <>So it’ll make me weaker?<>
<>No. But it will unfasten the pride your muscles have worn like armor. Not every kind of strength shows in bulk. Sometimes it shows in surrender.<>
<>You sound like a philosopher.<>
<>When you’ve brewed potions that change bones and bend voices, you learn to respect the philosophy of flesh.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_1_chest_2_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 所以它會讓我變弱？

thalara: 不會。但它會卸下你的肌肉如盔甲般穿戴的驕傲。並非所有力量都顯現於體格。有時，力量顯現於臣服。

mc: 你聽起來像個哲學家。

thalara: 當你釀造過改變骨骼、扭轉聲音的藥水後，你就學會尊重肉體的哲學了。

[繼續]

passages.name: chest_1_chest_2_3
passages.content:
<> <>This will taste like mint, metal, and maybe… regret. You may feel your chest ache for its former form. That’s normal. Muscles remember.<>
<>How fast will it work?<>
<>Gradually. Within the hour, the tautness in your chest will soften. Your posture will shift. Clothes will feel looser. And you may… feel exposed.<>
<>You mean… like I’m losing something?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_1_chest_2_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這會嚐起來像薄荷、金屬，或許…還有悔恨。你可能會感到胸口為它先前的形態而疼痛。那是正常的。肌肉有記憶。

mc: 效果多快會顯現？

thalara: 逐漸地。一小時之內，你胸口的緊繃感會軟化。你的姿勢會改變。衣服會感覺變寬鬆。而你或許會…感到暴露。

mc: 你是說…就像我正在失去什麼？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_1_chest_2_4
passages.content:
<> <>You are. But you’re not being robbed. You are offering it, in exchange for something else. That’s what every step in magic is a trade, not a theft.<>
<>…It’s cold.<>
<>Good. That means it’s working. The swelling in your chest will ease first. That defined line under your collarbone it’ll blur. Pectorals will yield to smoother flesh. Your heart will beat more openly, less behind armor.<>
<>…It feels strange already. Like I’ve been… unmade a little.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_1_chest_2_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你確實是。但你不是被掠奪。你是在獻出它，以換取別的東西。這就是魔法中每一步的本質——一場交易，而非盜竊。

mc: …好冷。

thalara: 很好。這表示它生效了。你胸口的腫脹感會先緩解。鎖骨下那條分明的線條會變得模糊。胸肌會讓位給更柔軟的肌膚。你的心跳會更開闊地搏動，不再像藏在盔甲後面。

mc: …已經感覺很奇怪了。好像我…被拆解了一小部分。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_1_chest_2_5
passages.content:
<> <>That’s not strangeness. That’s space. You’re creating room for what’s to come. It doesn’t matter yet what fills it. Only that you are willing or brave enough to allow it.<>
<>So this is just the beginning.<>
<>Every beginning pretends to be small. But this one is honest. It tells you: the prince you’ve been is making room for someone else. And neither of you are vanishing.<>
<>You may mourn. That’s allowed. But you may also wonder what else might grow here now?<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那不是奇怪。那是空間。你正在為即將到來的事物騰出空間。現在還無需在意什麼會填滿它。重要的是你願意，或有足夠的勇氣去允許它發生。

mc: 所以這只是個開始。

thalara: 每個開始都假裝自己很渺小。但這個開始很誠實。它告訴你：你一直以來扮演的王子，正在為另一個人騰出空間。而你們兩者都不會消失。

thalara: 你可以哀悼。這是被允許的。但你也可能會好奇，現在這裡還能長出什麼別的東西？
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_3
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to let go of this part of myself. It’s time.|chest_2_chest_3_1]] |

[[I… don’t know what this makes me. But I think I need to feel less like what I used to be.|chest_2_chest_3_1]] |

[[You want me to erase myself? To become nothing? Fine. Let’s see how blank I can be.|chest_2_chest_3_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎…

[我準備好放下這部分的自己了。是時候了。] |
[我…不知道這會讓我變成什麼。但我覺得我需要感覺不再像過去的自己。] |
[你想讓我抹去自己？變成空無一物？好吧。讓我們看看我能變得多空白。] |

passages.name: chest_2_chest_3_1
passages.content:
<> <>This session is quieter than the rest. Not because it is less important but because it asks for surrender, not growth.<>
<>It doesn’t look like much.<>
<>Because it’s meant to feel like less. Less sharpness. Less memory. This potion doesn’t add it subtracts.<>
<>So it’s not feminine yet. But it’s no longer masculine either.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_3_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這次的過程比之前的都要安靜。不是因為它比較不重要，而是因為它要求的是臣服，而非成長。

mc: 看起來沒什麼特別的。

thalara: 因為它的目的就是讓你感覺「更少」。更少的銳利感。更少的記憶。這藥水不是增加，而是減去。

mc: 所以它還不是女性的。但它也不再是男性的了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_3_2
passages.content:
<> <>Correct. This is the moment where your body ceases to declare your past.<>
<>And I become… what, exactly?<>
<>A silence between notes. A fresh page. Not an absence, but a readiness.<>
<>So it’s not weakness?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_3_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 沒錯。這一刻，你的身體不再宣告你的過去。

mc: 那我變成了…什麼，具體來說？

thalara: 音符之間的靜默。一張全新的紙頁。不是缺席，而是一種準備就緒的狀態。

mc: 所以這不是軟弱？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_3_3
passages.content:
<> <>Not at all. Some of the strongest enchantments begin by wiping away the previous spell. Creation starts with undoing. This is your undoing gentle and sacred.<>
<>I worked hard to look like this. My tutors praised it. My mother approved of it. My knights admired it.<>
<>And now it weighs you down.<>
<>Yes… it does. It’s armor I no longer want to wear.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_3_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 完全不是。一些最強大的魔法，都是從抹去先前的咒語開始的。創造始於解構。這就是你的解構，溫和而神聖。

mc: 我努力鍛鍊才擁有這樣的外表。我的導師稱讚它。我的母親認可它。我的騎士們欽羨它。

thalara: 而現在它成了你的負擔。

mc: 是的…確實如此。這是一副我不再想穿戴的盔甲。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_3_4
passages.content:
<> <>This potion doesn’t judge. It simply loosens what clings. Muscle will fade. Firmness will soften. When you wake tomorrow, your chest will not feel strong, or feminine. It will feel still.<>
<>I don’t know if I want to be a woman yet. But I don’t want to be just a man either.<>
<>Then this is your step. Not toward queenhood. Not away from princeliness. But toward a space where both can wait together.<>
<>…It tastes like honey and something… old.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_3_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這藥水不做評判。它只是鬆開那些緊抓不放的東西。肌肉會消退。堅實會軟化。當你明天醒來，你的胸口不會感覺強壯，也不會感覺女性化。它會感覺平靜。

mc: 我還不知道我是否想成為一個女人。但我也已經不想只做一個男人了。

thalara: 那麼這就是你的步伐。不是邁向女王之位。也不是遠離王子身份。而是邁向一個能讓兩者共同等待的空間。

mc: …嚐起來像蜂蜜，還有某種…古老的東西。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_3_5
passages.content:
<> <>It’s made from Velmorian honey. Fitting, for what you’re becoming.<>
<>It’s strange. I don’t feel like anything. Not man. Not woman. Just… me.<>
<>Exactly. This is the rarest shape of all your own.<>
<>I thought I’d feel lost without it. But instead… I feel light.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_3_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它是由維爾摩利亞蜂蜜製成的。很適合你正在成為的樣子。

mc: 很奇怪。我感覺自己什麼都不是。不是男人。不是女人。只是…我。

thalara: 正是如此。這是最稀有的形態——你自己的形態。

mc: 我以為失去它我會感到迷失。但相反地…我感到輕盈。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_3_6
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve stepped into the in-between. Some fear it. But I’ve always believed it is where real power begins.<>
<>It’s quiet here.<>
<>Yes. Let it be. Let your body listen, before it decides what song to sing next.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已踏入中間地帶。有些人害怕這裡。但我一直相信，真正的力量始於此處。

mc: 這裡很安靜。

thalara: 是的。讓它保持安靜。讓你的身體聆聽，在它決定下一首要唱什麼歌之前。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_4
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[It’s time, isn’t it? I’ve thought about this moment more than I’ll admit.|chest_3_chest_4_1]] |

[[I’m here, but I still don’t know if I should be. It’s all moving so fast.|chest_3_chest_4_1]] |

[[Let’s just get it over with. I don’t want to hear another speech about beauty or destiny.|chest_3_chest_4_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎…

[是時候了，對吧？我想像這一刻的次數，比我願意承認的還要多。] |
[我人在這裡，但我仍然不知道我是否應該在這裡。一切都進行得太快了。] |
[我們就快點完成它吧。我不想再聽任何關於美麗或命運的說教了。] |

passages.name: chest_3_chest_4_1
passages.content:
<> <>This one is gentle. It doesn’t remake you in fire. It whispers to your body. Just enough to start.<>
<>So this is it… The first real step into being someone else.<>
<>Not someone else. A version of you that’s been waiting, perhaps quietly. Buried beneath layers of role and expectation.<>
<>I’ve seen what this becomes. I’ve touched the silks meant for a chest I don’t have. And now... I drink this and I begin to grow into them?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_4_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這一劑很溫和。它不會用烈火重塑你。它會對你的身體低語。僅僅足以開始。

mc: 所以就是這個了…邁向成為另一個人的第一步。

thalara: 不是另一個人。是一個或許一直在靜靜等待的、你的某個版本。被埋藏在角色與期望的層層疊疊之下。

mc: 我見過這會變成什麼樣子。我觸摸過那些為我尚未擁有的胸口準備的絲綢。而現在…我喝下這個，就開始成長去契合它們？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_4_2
passages.content:
<> <>Not just physically. This potion is as much suggestion as it is alteration. Your body will listen. It will feel the pull.<>
<>Will I feel it?<>
<>Not pain. Just… awakening. A tingle. A heat. Like the promise of something stirring beneath the surface.<>
<>You said the changes begin subtle. What should I expect?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_4_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不僅是肉體上。這藥水既是改變，也是暗示。你的身體會聽從。它會感受到那股牽引。

mc: 我會感覺到嗎？

thalara: 不是疼痛。只是……一種甦醒。一種刺痛感。一股熱意。就像某種事物在表面之下蠢動的預兆。

mc: 你說變化會從細微處開始。我該預期什麼？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_4_3
passages.content:
<> <>Your chest will soften first. Skin will feel more sensitive touch may linger longer. Then a rounding will begin. A swell so small it will feel imaginary, until the mirror confirms it.<>
<>Imaginary breasts. That’s quite the start to my legacy as queen.<>
<>All great things begin as shadows on the skin. You’ll see.<>
<>…It’s sweet. And warm.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_4_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的胸膛會先變得柔軟。皮膚會對觸碰更敏感，感覺可能停留得更久。然後會開始變得圓潤。一種微小到彷彿是幻覺的隆起，直到鏡子證實它的存在。

mc: 幻覺般的胸部。這還真是我女王傳奇生涯的開端啊。

thalara: 所有偉大的事物都始於皮膚上的陰影。你會明白的。

mc: ……它是甜的。而且溫暖。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_4_4
passages.content:
<> <>Lilyroot and blushing orchid. Traditional herbs of femininity. They speak softly to the body.<>
<>There’s a… flutter. Not pain. More like… awareness. Like something humming just under my skin.<>
<>That’s your body listening. The first threads of change stitching themselves into you. The flattening is over. Now comes the bloom.<>
<>I thought I’d feel afraid. But this is… oddly peaceful.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_4_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 百合根與緋紅蘭。傳統的女性化藥草。它們輕聲對身體訴說。

mc: 有一種……悸動。不是疼痛。更像是……覺察。像是有東西在我皮膚下嗡嗡作響。

thalara: 那是你的身體在傾聽。變化的第一縷絲線正編織進你的身體。平坦的階段結束了。現在，綻放即將開始。

mc: 我以為我會感到害怕。但這……出奇地平靜。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_4_5
passages.content:
<> <>You are crossing no chasm today, Caelan. Only stepping onto a path. This stage is like dew on a rosebud beautiful in its restraint.<>
<>I can’t see it yet. But I feel like something’s shifted. In me. Around me.<>
<>That is not illusion. Your aura has already begun realigning. The body follows the soul. And the soul… has chosen this step.<>
<>And if I step back later?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_4_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你今天並非跨越深淵，Caelan。只是踏上了一條道路。這個階段就像玫瑰花蕾上的露珠，因其含蓄而美麗。

mc: 我還看不見。但我感覺有什麼東西改變了。在我體內。在我周圍。

thalara: 那不是幻覺。你的靈光已經開始重新對齊。身體追隨靈魂。而靈魂……已選擇了這一步。

mc: 如果我之後想退回去呢？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_4_6
passages.content:
<> <>Then we guide you in retreat. But not shamefully. A queen must know how to command herself in both advance and withdrawal.<>
<>A queen… right.<>
<>Or something new entirely. Your title may be written already, but your truth is still yours to shape.<>
<>It’s strange… I feel closer to myself. Not further.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_4_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼我們會引導你撤退。但不是以羞恥的方式。一位女王必須懂得如何在進退之間掌控自己。

mc: 女王……是啊。

thalara: 或者成為某種全新的事物。你的頭銜或許早已寫定，但你的真實樣貌仍由你自己塑造。

mc: 真奇怪……我覺得更接近自己了。而非更遠。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_4_7
passages.content:
<> <>Then the potion has done its work.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼藥水已完成了它的工作。
[我感覺到藥水在我胸中起作用了]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_5
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready. It’s time for something I can truly feel.|chest_4_chest_5_1]] |

[[I’m not sure how I’ll handle this, but… I guess there’s no turning back now.|chest_4_chest_5_1]] |

[[This doesn’t mean I’ve given up. I’m only drinking because I have to.|chest_4_chest_5_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。是時候迎接一些我真切能感受到的變化了。] |
[我不確定自己能否應付，但……我想現在已無法回頭了。] |
[這不代表我放棄了。我喝下它只是因為我必須這麼做。] |

passages.name: chest_4_chest_5_1
passages.content:
<> <>You carry more weight in your eyes than you do in your chest. For now.<>
<>That’s poetic, I suppose. Just not very comforting.<>
<>Change is rarely comfortable. But discomfort is the fire in which identity is forged.<>
<>What’s different about this one?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_5_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你眼中的重量，此刻遠超過你胸前的重量。

mc: 我想這很詩意。只是不太能安慰人。

thalara: 改變很少是舒適的。但不適正是鍛造身分的烈火。

mc: 這次有什麼不同？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_5_2
passages.content:
<> <>This is the first draught that doesn’t just nudge you it confirms you. You won’t just feel a shift inside. Your reflection will start to show it. A swell, a softness. The gentle rise of what you’ll soon learn to call your breasts.<>
<>Breasts.<>
<>It won’t be drastic. Not yet. But the tissue will gather now. When you breathe, you’ll notice the way your shirt clings differently. The way your skin reacts to touch.<>
<>So I’ll actually feel them now? I mean, physically?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_5_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這是第一劑不僅推動你、更是確認你的藥水。你不只會感覺到內在的轉變。你的倒影也將開始顯現它。一種隆起，一種柔軟。你很快就會學會稱之為「乳房」的溫柔起伏。

mc: 乳房。

thalara: 還不會太劇烈。還不會。但組織現在會開始聚集。當你呼吸時，你會注意到襯衫貼合的方式不同了。你的皮膚對觸碰的反應也會改變。

mc: 所以我現在真的能感覺到它們了？我是說，物理上？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_5_3
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. Sensation is part of the enchantment. Your nerves will rewire slowly, like vines reaching toward sunlight. By the end of today’s session, you will no longer be able to pass as flat.<>
<>How long before it becomes... obvious to others?<>
<>That depends on how close they are. A courtier’s glance won’t catch it yet. But a handmaiden lacing your tunic might pause. A lover? They would notice immediately.<>
<>I’m not sure I’m ready for people to see me differently.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_5_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。感覺是魔法的一部分。你的神經會慢慢重新連接，像藤蔓伸向陽光。到今天療程結束時，你將不再能被視為平坦。

mc: 要多久才會變得……對他人來說很明顯？

thalara: 這取決於他們與你有多親近。朝臣的一瞥還不會察覺。但為你束緊束腰外衣的侍女可能會停頓。情人？他們會立刻注意到。

mc: 我不確定自己是否準備好讓人們用不同的眼光看我。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_5_4
passages.content:
<> <>Then let them see your courage instead. There is no shame in small beginnings, Caelan. The world need not understand your shape to respect your strength.<>
<>What if this gets too real too fast?<>
<>That’s why we go step by step. No forced leaps. Only decisions. Only draughts you choose to drink.<>
<>TAnd if I change my mind?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_5_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就讓他們看見你的勇氣吧。Caelan，微小的開端並不可恥。世人無需理解你的形體，也能尊重你的力量。

mc: 如果這一切變得太真實、太快怎麼辦？

thalara: 所以我們才一步步來。沒有強迫的跳躍。只有決定。只有你選擇飲下的藥劑。

mc: 如果我改變主意呢？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_5_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then we drink from the other vial. The one that slows. That gently retreats. You are not caged in magic. You are cradled by it.<>
<>It’s… warm.<>
<>It should be. This one ignites your core. Blood will stir, tissues respond. You may feel a flutter like the anticipation before a first kiss.<>
<>…It tingles.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_5_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那我們就飲用另一瓶藥水。那瓶會減緩變化、溫柔退卻的藥水。你並非被魔法囚禁。你是被魔法呵護。

mc: 它……是溫熱的。

thalara: 理應如此。這一劑會點燃你的核心。血液將湧動，組織將回應。你可能會感到一陣悸動，如同初吻前的期待。

mc: ……它在微微刺痛。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_5_6
passages.content:
<> <>That’s them growing. Like roses beneath the soil, ready to bloom. You’ll start to feel their weight, their presence. Barely noticeable now… but they’re there.<>
<>There’s a pressure. Not pain. Just… pressure.<>
<>That’s your chest accepting the shape. The tissue rising like bread in an oven. The enchantment is gentle, but it does not lie. You are becoming.<>
<>They are there. Just… tiny. But real.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_5_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那是它們在成長。就像土壤下的玫瑰，準備綻放。你將開始感受到它們的重量、它們的存在。現在幾乎難以察覺……但它們就在那裡。

mc: 有一種壓迫感。不是疼痛。只是……壓迫感。

thalara: 那是你的胸膛正在接受新的形狀。組織像烤箱裡的麵包一樣隆起。魔法很溫和，但它不會說謊。你正在「成為」。

mc: 它們確實在那裡。只是……很小。但很真實。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_5_7
passages.content:
<> <>Real is not measured in size. Real is felt in the beat of your heart, in the way you straighten your spine now.<>
<>Do I seem straighter to you?<>
<>You seem aware. And that is far more powerful.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 真實並非以尺寸衡量。真實感存在於你的心跳中，存在於你此刻挺直背脊的方式裡。

mc: 我看起來更挺拔了嗎？

thalara: 你看起來更有自覺了。而那遠比外表更有力量。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_6
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready for this. I want to feel what it’s like to be seen as a woman.|chest_5_chest_6_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I’m ready… but I guess there’s no turning back now.|chest_5_chest_6_1]] |

[[I’ll take your potion but don’t think I’ve accepted this completely.|chest_5_chest_6_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。我想體會被視為女性的感覺。] |
[我不知道我是否準備好了……但我想現在已經無法回頭了。] |
[我會喝下你的藥水，但別以為我完全接受了這件事。] |

passages.name: chest_5_chest_6_1
passages.content:
<> <>So… this is the step that makes it real, huh?<>
<>In the eyes of others? Yes. This is the turning point. No longer just softness or suggestion. After this, your form speaks clearly.<>
<>People will notice…<>
<>They’ll glance, linger, whisper. Perhaps admire. Some may leer. But more than anything they will begin to address you with their eyes, not your name.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_6_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 所以……這就是讓一切成真的步驟，對吧？

thalara: 在他人眼中？是的。這是轉捩點。不再只是柔軟或暗示。在此之後，你的身形會清楚地訴說一切。

mc: 人們會注意到……

thalara: 他們會瞥視、駐足、低語。或許會欣賞。有些人可能會用眼神打量。但最重要的是，他們將開始用他們的眼睛來稱呼你，而不是你的名字。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_6_2
passages.content:
<> <>Sounds like a promotion I didn’t ask for.<>
<>Perhaps. Or perhaps the world is simply catching up to what your magic has already begun.<>
<>They’ve been growing steadily, but still felt small. Now you’re saying they’ll… bounce?<>
<>With weight comes presence. The potion awakens fullness flesh with a gentle pull, the kind that shifts with every motion. They will no longer hide beneath fabric. You’ll feel them as you move, sleep, breathe.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_6_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 聽起來像個我沒要求的晉升。

thalara: 或許吧。又或者，這個世界只是終於趕上了你的魔法早已開始的進程。

mc: 它們一直在穩定成長，但感覺還是很小。現在你說它們會……有彈性？

thalara: 重量帶來存在感。藥水會以一種溫和的牽引喚醒飽滿的血肉，那種會隨著每個動作而晃動的感覺。它們將不再隱藏在布料之下。你移動、睡覺、呼吸時都會感覺到它們。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_6_3
passages.content:
<> <>That sounds… intimate.<>
<>It is. Your chest will no longer be a quiet space. Each sensation your heartbeat, your breath will pass through them. And when others brush too close, their eyes will follow the shape, not the shadow.<>
<>Does it hurt? The transformation, I mean.<>
<>Not pai more like pressure. A swelling warmth. You may feel tightness across the sternum, a tug at the skin, a pull from within. By dusk, your tunics will no longer fit quite the same.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_6_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 聽起來……很私密。

thalara: 確實如此。你的胸膛將不再是一個安靜的空間。你的每一次心跳、每一次呼吸的感覺都會穿過它們。而當別人靠得太近時，他們的目光會追隨形狀，而非陰影。

mc: 會痛嗎？我是說，轉變的過程。

thalara: 不是疼痛，更像是壓迫感。一種腫脹的溫暖。你可能會感到胸骨處緊繃、皮膚被拉扯、內部有牽引感。到了黃昏，你的束腰外衣就不再合身了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_6_4
passages.content:
<> <>I wonder what it’ll be like to lie on my side after this…<>
<>Different. Softer. Heavier. You may need to relearn the comfort of pillows. But you will also gain the comfort of presence of seeing yourself become.<>
<>And once it’s done, there’s no hiding it anymore.<>
<>No. You will be read as female from the chest alone. It is a badge you wear without speaking a curve that commands attention, whether you invite it or not.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_6_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我在想這之後側躺會是什麼感覺……

thalara: 會不同。更柔軟。更沉重。你可能需要重新學習枕頭的舒適用法。但你也將獲得「存在」的舒適感——看著自己逐漸成為的模樣。

mc: 而且一旦完成，就再也無法隱藏了。

thalara: 沒錯。僅憑胸部，你就會被視為女性。這是一枚你無需言語便佩戴著的徽章，一道引人注目的曲線，無論你是否邀請這種目光。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_6_5
passages.content:
<> <>I keep thinking about what my mother will say when she sees me.<>
<>She will see her heir becoming something radiant more than a prince, more than a woman. A symbol of Velmoria’s evolution.<>
<>I’m scared.<>
<>Good. That means you understand the weight of what you carry. Fear is not weakness it is reverence. Drink it.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_6_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我一直在想，我母親看到我時會說什麼。

thalara: 她將看到她的繼承人正在變得光芒四射——不僅僅是王子，不僅僅是女人。而是維爾莫里亞演進的象徵。

mc: 我很害怕。

thalara: 很好。這意味著你理解了你所承擔之事的份量。恐懼不是軟弱，而是敬畏。喝下它吧。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_6_6
passages.content:
<> <>It’s warm… almost fizzy.<>
<>The bubbling is your body reshaping glands expanding, fat redistributing. Give it time. The weight will settle, and so will you.<>
<>Gods it’s like something’s inflating beneath my skin…<>
<>That’s fullness. That’s womanhood rising. And from this point forward, you no longer need to wonder how it feels you will live it.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_6_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它是溫的……幾乎有氣泡感。

thalara: 冒泡是你的身體正在重塑——腺體擴張，脂肪重新分佈。給它一點時間。重量會穩定下來，你也會的。

mc: 天啊，感覺好像有什麼東西在我皮膚下膨脹……

thalara: 那就是飽滿感。那就是正在升起的女性特質。從此刻起，你不再需要猜想那是什麼感覺——你將親身活在其中。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_6_7
passages.content:
<> <>It’s real now. I feel them. Full. Round. Heavy.<>
<>And beautiful. You’ve crossed the threshold, Caelan. What once whispered has now spoken aloud. This is your body telling the world who you are becoming.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 現在是真的了。我感覺到它們了。飽滿。圓潤。沉重。

thalara: 而且美麗。你已經跨越了門檻，Caelan。曾經的低語現在已大聲宣告。這就是你的身體在告訴世界，你正在成為誰。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_6_chest_7
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[If I’m meant to be a queen, I suppose I should start looking like one.|chest_6_chest_7_1]] |

[[They already feel big enough... Is this really necessary?|chest_6_chest_7_1]] |

[[More? They're already in the way! How is this helping me rule?|chest_6_chest_7_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[如果我注定要成為女王，我想我應該開始看起來像一位女王。] |
[它們已經感覺夠大了……這真的有必要嗎？] |
[還要更大？它們已經很礙事了！這對我的統治有什麼幫助？] |

passages.name: chest_6_chest_7_1
passages.content:
<> <>I think I can still button my tunic, barely… not sure for how much longer though.<>
