passages.name: chest_11_chest_12_4
passages.content:
<> <>By the stars... they're massive... my gods, they hurt. They feel... real. Like I could nurse a kingdom.<>
<>That’s the power, Caelan. You are no longer androgynous. No longer curious. You are formed. Fully. Softness and command in equal measure.<>
<>They sag so much... so heavy. But they feel like me now.<>
<>They are you. And every step from now on will remind you of that. You’ve crossed the final threshold. You’ve grown into royalty not through blade or birthright, but through becoming.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_11_chest_12_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 諸星在上……它們真是巨大……我的天，它們好痛。感覺……好真實。彷彿我能哺育一個王國。

thalara: 這就是力量，Caelan。你不再雌雄莫辨。不再只是好奇。你已成形。完完全全。柔軟與威嚴並存。

mc: 它們垂墜得這麼厲害……這麼沉重。但現在感覺它們就是我的一部分了。

thalara: 它們就是你。從今往後的每一步都會提醒你這一點。你已跨過最終的門檻。你成長為王者，並非憑藉刀劍或血統，而是透過「成為」這個過程。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_11_chest_12_5
passages.content:
<> <>So this is what it means to carry power like a woman.<>
<>This is what it means to rule as one.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 所以，這就是像女人一樣承載力量的意義。

thalara: 這就是像女人一樣統治的意義。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_12_chest_11
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I need this. I’ve gone too far. I just want to feel me again not lost under all this.|chest_12_chest_11_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I’m making a mistake, but... I feel like I’m being buried by myself.|chest_12_chest_11_1]] |

[[This isn't surrender. It's strategy. Let them stare less for now.|chest_12_chest_11_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我需要這個。我走得太遠了。我只想再次感受自己，而不是迷失在這一切之下。] |
[我不知道這是否是個錯誤，但是……我覺得自己正被自己埋葬。] |
[這不是投降。這是策略。暫時讓他們少盯著我看一點。] |

passages.name: chest_12_chest_11_1
passages.content:
<> <>Every breath pulls the fabric tighter. Every step is a bounce, a sway, a drag. He sighs. "I thought I'd feel powerful. Instead, I feel... swallowed.<>
<>It happens. When one grows beyond the world’s bounds, the world forgets how to hold them. You’ve crossed into excess, Caelan glorious excess, but excess still.<>
<>I’ve gone too far, haven’t I? I can’t dress without spilling. I can’t walk without swaying like I’m in heat. I can’t focus they jiggle every time I breathe.<>
<>You’re not wrong. These breasts are the kind sculptors struggle to carve in marble. You don’t enter a room anymore you dominate it, unintentionally.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_12_chest_11_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 每一次呼吸都讓布料繃得更緊。每一步都是彈跳、搖晃、拖曳。
他嘆了口氣。「我以為我會感到充滿力量。相反地，我覺得……被吞噬了。」

thalara: 常有的事。當一個人成長到超越世界的界限時，世界便忘了如何容納他們。你已踏入過度的領域，Caelan，輝煌的過度，但仍是過度。

mc: 我走得太遠了，對吧？我穿衣時總會溢出。我走路時無法不搖晃，像發情似的。我無法專心，每次呼吸它們都在晃動。

thalara: 你沒說錯。這對胸脯是連雕刻家都難以用大理石雕出的那種。你不再只是進入一個房間，你主宰了它，無意地。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_12_chest_11_2
passages.content:
<> <>Maybe I don’t want to dominate. Not like this. I wanted to be seen... but now I’m being stared at.<>
<>Then take this. Let your presence remain grand, womanly but not overwhelming. Let them see you again, not just... be hypnotized.<>
<>Will it hurt?<>
<>No. But you’ll feel it. A slow pull inward. Less bounce. Slight lift. Nipples will recede just a bit. The weight will ease, and so will the stares.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_12_chest_11_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 也許我不想主宰。至少不是以這種方式。我曾希望被看見……但現在我只是被盯著看。

thalara: 那就服下這個。讓你的存在依然宏偉，富有女人味但不至於壓倒一切。讓他們再次看見你，而不僅僅是……被催眠。

mc: 會痛嗎？

thalara: 不會。但你會感覺到。一種向內緩慢的牽引。彈跳減輕。微微上提。乳頭會稍微縮回一些。重量會減輕，注視的目光也會。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_12_chest_11_3
passages.content:
<> <>They called me Queen with reverence. But lately... I think they mean something else. Something heavier.<>
<>The crown must fit the head, not just the chest. Let this shape be yours, not theirs.<>
<>It tastes like quiet.<>
<>It is. Quiet. Balance. Your form will still sing but not scream.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_12_chest_11_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 他們曾懷著敬意稱我為女王。但最近……我覺得他們另有所指。某種更沉重的東西。

thalara: 王冠必須適合頭部，而不僅僅是胸部。讓這個身形屬於你，而非他們。

mc: 這味道像是……寧靜。

thalara: 是的。寧靜。平衡。你的身形仍將歌唱，但不再尖叫。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_12_chest_11_4
passages.content:
<> <>They’re pulling in... still big... still soft. But not suffocating.<>
<>Exactly. You are not erasing power you’re choosing how to wield it.<>
<>It’s strange. I feel... more myself now. Still woman. Still ruler. But less spectacle.<>
<>Then you’ve found what most rulers never do your center. And in that center, Caelan, lies the kind of power no one dares mock.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它們正在向內收縮……依然豐滿……依然柔軟。但不再令人窒息。

thalara: 正是如此。你並非抹去力量，而是在選擇如何運用它。

mc: 真奇怪。我覺得……現在更像我自己了。依然是女人。依然是統治者。但不再是奇觀。

thalara: 那麼你已找到了多數統治者從未找到的東西——你的中心。而在那個中心裡，Caelan，蘊藏著無人敢嘲弄的力量。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_11_chest_10
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I need to breathe again. Let’s bring this back a notch.|chest_11_chest_10_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I’m going backward or just catching my breath.|chest_11_chest_10_1]] |

[[This doesn’t change anything. I’m still being shaped, just slower.|chest_11_chest_10_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我需要再次呼吸。讓我們把這一切收斂一點。] |
[我不知道我是在倒退，還是只是在喘口氣。] |
[這不會改變任何事。我仍在被塑造，只是速度放慢了。] |

passages.name: chest_11_chest_10_1
passages.content:
<> <>They're... enormous. I can’t lie, Thalara sometimes I feel like I’ve become my own furniture.<>
<>Lavish furnishings are the mark of a royal court. But yes... your frame groans beneath the grandeur. That’s what today is for.<>
<>It won’t undo all of it?<>
<>No. Not even close. You’ll still turn heads in every hallway. But this will make them less... operatic.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_11_chest_10_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它們……太龐大了。我不能說謊，Thalara，有時我覺得自己變成了自己的家具。

thalara: 奢華的家具是皇室宮廷的標誌。但沒錯……你的骨架在這宏偉之下呻吟。這就是今天要做的事的目的。

mc: 它不會完全逆轉這一切吧？

thalara: 不會。遠遠不會。你依然會在每條走廊引人注目。但這會讓它們不那麼……戲劇化。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_11_chest_10_2
passages.content:
<> <>Good. Because I swear I heard a lute string snap the last time I ran across the courtyard.<>
<>Some dresses are stitched with ambition, not reinforcement. Drink, and the strain will ease. Your posture will thank you.<>
<>What if I get used to the weight? What if I end up missing it?<>
<>Then you’ll grow again. This path doesn’t vanish it simply pauses where you need it to.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_11_chest_10_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 很好。因為我發誓，上次我跑過庭院時，好像聽到魯特琴弦斷裂的聲音。

thalara: 有些禮服是用野心縫製的，而非加固材料。喝下它，壓力就會減輕。你的姿勢會感謝你的。

mc: 如果我習慣了這重量呢？如果我最後反而懷念它呢？

thalara: 那麼你會再次成長。這條路不會消失，它只是在你需要的地方暫停。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_11_chest_10_3
passages.content:
<> <>I still feel their weight... even when I’m dreaming.<>
<>That’s because your dreams no longer belong to the man you were. They belong to the woman forming beneath.<>
<>Oof... it’s cold. It’s like it’s lifting up from the inside...<>
<>That’s exactly what it does. Tissues condense. Sag reduces. Volume shrinks, just enough to be supported without surrendering softness.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_11_chest_10_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我依然能感覺到它們的重量……即使在我夢中。

thalara: 那是因為你的夢不再屬於過去的你（那個男人）。它們屬於正在形成的你（這個女人）。

mc: 噢……好冰。感覺像是從內部向上提拉……

thalara: 正是如此。組織變得緊實。下垂減少。體積縮小，剛好足以被支撐，同時不喪失柔軟。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_11_chest_10_4
passages.content:
<> <>It feels... easier. Lighter. But still there. Still... me.<>
<>Good. Because that’s all this is meant to do help you feel yourself without feeling crushed by yourself.<>
<>Is it weakness to take a step back like this?<>
<>No. It is wisdom. You are not unmaking what you’ve become. You’re pacing it. Honoring the strain it takes to bloom.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_11_chest_10_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 感覺……輕鬆多了。負擔減輕了。但它們依然存在。依然……是我的一部分。

thalara: 很好。因為這藥劑的目的正是如此——讓你能感受自我，卻又不被自我所壓垮。

mc: 像這樣退一步，算是軟弱嗎？

thalara: 不。這是智慧。你並非在抹消你已成為的樣子。你只是在調整步調。尊重綻放過程中所承受的張力。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_11_chest_10_5
passages.content:
<> <>They’re still... huge. But not... consuming.<>
<>Then the balance is struck. Still tempting. Still womanly. But no longer a burden. You’ve taken back some control.<>
<>For now. But knowing me, I’ll be back here in a week asking for the next vial up.<>
<>And I will have it waiting. But for tonight, enjoy the silence in your spine.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它們還是……很巨大。但不再……吞噬一切。

thalara: 那麼平衡便達成了。依然誘人。依然充滿女人味。但不再是負擔。你已取回了一些掌控權。

mc: 暫時是這樣。但以我對自己的了解，一週後我大概又會回來，要求下一劑更強的藥水。

thalara: 屆時我會備好它。但今晚，請享受你脊椎中的寧靜。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_10_chest_9
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Let’s revert this back. I need a break from feeling like a walking monument.|chest_10_chest_9_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I want to go smaller... but I can’t breathe in this corset anymore.|chest_10_chest_9_1]] |

[[Fine. Shrink 'em if you must. I’m sick of people staring like I’m a goddess on parade.|chest_10_chest_9_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[讓我們把它們變回去吧。我需要暫時擺脫這種像座行走紀念碑的感覺。] |
[我不確定是否想變小……但這束胸讓我快無法呼吸了。] |
[好吧。如果你非做不可，那就縮小它們吧。我受夠人們像盯著遊行女神那樣盯著我看了。] |

passages.name: chest_10_chest_9_1
passages.content:
<> <>So this actually… shrinks them? Not all the way, right? Just... enough?<>
<>Just enough. It relieves the strain eases the pull on your spine and the tightness of your clothing. But you remain unmistakably a woman, Caelan. A very full one.<>
<>Good. Because I’ve been knocking over goblets with every turn. I turned around in the library and took out a whole candleholder.<>
<>Ah yes. The notorious ‘shelf cleaving bust’ phase. Some celebrate it. Others... choose a gentler curve.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_10_chest_9_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 所以這真的……能縮小它們？不會縮到底，對吧？只是……縮到適當程度？

thalara: 恰到好處。它能減輕負擔，緩解你脊椎的拉扯感和衣物的緊繃。但你依然無疑是個女人，Caelan。一個非常豐滿的女人。

mc: 很好。因為我每次轉身都會打翻酒杯。我在圖書館一轉身，就撞倒了整座燭台。

thalara: 啊，是的。那惡名昭彰的「能劈開架子」的階段。有些人為此慶賀。另一些人……則選擇更柔和的曲線。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_10_chest_9_2
passages.content:
<> <>I didn’t mind being full, but this last level? It made everything about my chest. Every hallway echo. Every glance. Every whisper.<>
<>Your body spoke louder than your words, and not everyone knows how to listen beyond the curves. This step this soft regression can be a mercy. Or a reprieve.<>
<>Will I lose the sensitivity too?<>
<>Some. But not all. This dose leaves you luscious, not diminished. You’ll bounce less. Nipples will ache less. But you’ll still turn heads just with less weight pulling you forward.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_10_chest_9_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我並不介意豐滿，但最後這個階段？它讓我的一切都圍繞著胸部打轉。每條走廊的迴響。每個目光。每聲低語。

thalara: 你的身體比你的言語更響亮，而並非所有人都懂得如何越過曲線去傾聽。這一步——這種溫和的倒退——可以是一種仁慈。或一次喘息。

mc: 我也會失去敏感度嗎？

thalara: 會減少一些。但不會完全消失。這個劑量會讓你依然豐腴誘人，而非減損魅力。你的晃動會減少。乳頭也不會那麼容易疼痛。但你依然會引人注目，只是少了那份將你向前拉扯的重量。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_10_chest_9_3
passages.content:
<> <>So I won’t be a walking fertility statue anymore?<>
<>Not quite. But still a temple worth worshipping, I think.<>
<>Gods, woman. How do you say that with a straight face?<>
<>Because I know what transformation means not just physically, but politically, emotionally. You are learning to wield shape like a blade. But even blades need sheathes.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_10_chest_9_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 所以我不會再像座行走的豐饒雕像了？

thalara: 不完全是。但我認為，你依然是一座值得崇拜的神殿。

mc: 天啊，你這女人。你怎麼能一臉正經地說出這種話？

thalara: 因為我明白轉變的意義——不僅是身體上的，還有政治上的、情感上的。你正在學習如何將形體當作刀刃來揮舞。但即使是刀刃，也需要刀鞘。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_10_chest_9_4
passages.content:
<> <>Alright. Let’s sheath it... just a little.<>
<>Oh. That’s... lighter. Still big. Still swaying. But I’m not toppling anymore.<>
<>Yes. The fabric relaxes. Your stance stabilizes. You are still beautifully busty, Caelan but you are once more navigable.<>
<>My back thanks you. I can finally walk without feeling like I’m dragging two barrels of cream on my chest.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_10_chest_9_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 好吧。那就把它收進鞘裡……只收一點點。

mc: 噢。這感覺……輕多了。還是很大。依然搖曳生姿。但我不再搖搖欲墜了。

thalara: 是的。布料鬆弛了。你的站姿穩定了。你依然擁有美麗的豐胸，Caelan——但你再次變得行動自如了。

mc: 我的背感謝你。我終於能走路了，不用感覺自己胸前拖著兩大桶奶油。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_10_chest_9_5
passages.content:
<> <>Careful. Too many reversals and you may find your admirers disappointed.<>
<>Let them adjust. This body’s mine not theirs to ogle.<>
<>Spoken like someone learning the difference between being shaped... and taking shape.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 小心。過多的倒退可能會讓你的仰慕者們失望。

mc: 讓他們適應吧。這身體是我的，不是供他們瞪眼觀賞的。

thalara: 說得好，像個開始懂得「被塑造」與「主動塑形」之間區別的人了。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_9_chest_8
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I need a little less attention today. Just want to feel like myself again.|chest_9_chest_8_1]] |

[[I’m not sure if this is the right move… but maybe I went too far last time.|chest_9_chest_8_1]] |

[[Fine. If I’m stuck here, I’ll dial it back. I’m not a walking display.|chest_9_chest_8_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我今天需要少一點關注。只想重新感受像自己的感覺。] |
[我不確定這是否正確的決定……但或許我上次做得太過火了。] |
[好吧。既然困在這裡，我就調回來一點。我可不是個行走的展示品。] |

passages.name: chest_9_chest_8_1
passages.content:
<> <>They’ve been bouncing with everything lately. I can barely walk down the stairs without… well, everyone noticing.<>
<>That was the nature of Level Six. It was meant to be bold. Now you seek retreat.<>
<>Not a full retreat. Just… breathing room. My nipples keep brushing fabric no matter what I wear. It’s maddening.<>
<>A crown can weigh heavy. You’ve worn yours bravely, but you are not trapped by it. That is the beauty of this process you may lean forward or back, so long as you remain honest with yourself.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_9_chest_8_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它們最近做什麼都晃個不停。我幾乎無法走下樓梯而不……嗯，引起所有人注意。

thalara: 那就是第六階段的特性。它本就意在彰顯。如今你尋求收斂。

mc: 不是完全收斂。只是……一點喘息空間。不管我穿什麼，乳頭總是不停摩擦布料。這快把我逼瘋了。

thalara: 王冠可能沉重難負。你已勇敢地佩戴了你的，但你並未被它困住。這就是這個過程的美妙之處——你可以向前傾身，也可以向後退步，只要你對自己誠實。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_9_chest_8_2
passages.content:
<> <>I thought I could own it, really own that look. And for a time… I did. But then I saw the way some of the guards stared. And the stablehands. And my cousin at dinner gods, that was awkward.<>
<>The gaze of others can be as heavy as the flesh you carry. Sometimes heavier. But don’t mistake that for failure. You’re testing your form. Adjusting. Like a tailor with their final stitch.<>
<>This won’t undo everything, will it? I still want to… feel like I’ve crossed a line. Just maybe not quite so far.<>
<>No. You will remain undeniably feminine. But less extravagant. Less... monumental. Your bust will still be full, shapely merely less commanding. Your nipples, while still noticeable, will retreat from center stage.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_9_chest_8_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我以為我能駕馭它，真正擁有那種模樣。有一段時間…我確實做到了。但後來我注意到一些守衛注視的方式。還有馬伕們。還有我堂兄在晚餐時的眼神——天啊，那真是尷尬。

thalara: 他人的目光，可以和你承載的肉體一樣沉重。有時甚至更重。但別誤以為那是失敗。你正在測試自己的形態。調整。就像裁縫師縫上最後一針。

mc: 這不會讓一切化為烏有，對吧？我仍然想…感覺自己跨越了某條界線。只是或許不要跨得那麼遠。

thalara: 不會。你將依然無可否認地具有女性特質。只是不再那麼張揚。不再那麼…引人注目。你的胸脯仍將豐滿、有形，只是不再那麼具有壓迫感。你的乳頭，雖然仍會引人注意，但將從舞台中央退居幕後。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_9_chest_8_3
passages.content:
<> <>That sounds like such a strange thing to measure… nipple prominence.<>
<>In your case, it’s a very important detail. Every movement you've made since Level Six has sent ripples through your body, your court, your self-perception. This is a moment of gentle recalibration.<>
<>Do many transitioners step back like this?<>
<>The path to self is rarely a straight line. Some push forward too fast, others linger in comfort zones. You, Caelan, are walking a knife’s edge balancing destiny, identity, and legacy. Small reversals are not weakness. They’re wisdom.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_9_chest_8_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 聽起來真是個奇怪的衡量標準…乳頭的顯眼程度。

thalara: 就你的情況而言，這是一個非常重要的細節。自從第六級以來，你的每一個舉動都在你的身體、你的宮廷、你的自我認知中激起漣漪。這是一個溫和重新校準的時刻。

mc: 很多轉變者會像這樣退一步嗎？

thalara: 通往自我的道路很少是筆直的。有些人推進得太快，有些人則在舒適區中徘徊。你，Caelan，正走在刀鋒邊緣，平衡著命運、身份與傳承。小小的後退並非軟弱。那是智慧。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_9_chest_8_4
passages.content:
<> <>It’s cooler than the others. Almost refreshing...<>
<>It will ease the heat in your chest. Reduce the pull on your shoulders. You’ll still bounce, but not with such urgency. And your nipples will find quiet again.<>
<>It’s happening already. The weight’s still there, but it’s... hugging me instead of pulling me forward. It feels less like an announcement.<>
<>Exactly. You are not abandoning femininity. You are simply turning the volume down for now. And if, or when, you’re ready to rise again... the chamber will welcome you.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_9_chest_8_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它比其他的更清涼。幾乎令人舒暢…

thalara: 它會緩解你胸口的灼熱感。減輕對你肩膀的拉扯。你依然會有波動，但不會那麼急切。而你的乳頭也將重歸平靜。

mc: 已經開始了。重量還在，但它…像是在擁抱著我，而不是將我向前拉扯。感覺不再那麼像一種宣告。

thalara: 正是如此。你並非放棄女性特質。你只是暫時將音量調低。而如果，或當你準備好再次崛起時…這個房間將歡迎你。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_9_chest_8_5
passages.content:
<> <>I almost miss being flat. Almost. But this… this feels manageable. A middle path.<>
<>A queen must know when to stand tall and when to rest her crown. You’ve chosen well today, Caelan.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我幾乎要懷念平坦的時候了。幾乎。但這個…這個感覺可以應付。一條中間道路。

thalara: 一位女王必須知道何時昂首挺立，何時卸下她的冠冕。你今天做出了明智的選擇，Caelan。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_8_chest_7
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[It’s time I took a step back. I’m not ready to carry this… allure just yet.|chest_8_chest_7_1]] |

[[I don’t know if this is the right choice, but I can’t handle the weight or stares today.|chest_8_chest_7_1]] |

[[I was pushed too far. I never wanted to bounce with every step. So yes, I want less.|chest_8_chest_7_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎…

[是時候退一步了。我還沒準備好承擔這種…魅力。] |
[我不知道這是否正確的選擇，但我今天無法承受這重量或目光。] |
[我被推得太遠了。我從未希望每走一步都波濤洶湧。所以，是的，我想要少一點。] |

passages.name: chest_8_chest_7_1
passages.content:
<> <>They’ve gotten too big. I can’t even walk through the palace halls without catching looks or knocking into things.<>
<>It’s a burden, I know. One not all women choose willingly. Beauty, after all, can be as heavy as armor… and just as restrictive.<>
<>I didn’t mind the change at first. It was subtle. Curious. But now? I can’t train, I can’t sleep on my stomach, and every movement feels... exaggerated.<>
<>You’ve stepped into a form that demands attention. That pulls focus. But stepping back isn’t weakness it’s strategy. A queen knows when to advance, and when to retreat.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_8_chest_7_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它們變得太大了。我甚至無法走過宮殿走廊而不引來目光或撞到東西。

thalara: 這是種負擔，我明白。並非所有女性都自願選擇。畢竟，美麗可以像盔甲一樣沉重…也一樣束縛。

mc: 起初我並不介意這種變化。它是微妙的。令人好奇。但現在呢？我無法訓練，無法趴著睡，每一個動作都感覺…很誇張。

thalara: 你踏入了一種要求關注的形態。一種吸引目光的形態。但退後並非軟弱——那是策略。女王知道何時前進，何時後退。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_8_chest_7_2
passages.content:
<> <>Will it shrink them much?<>
<>They will lose a degree of volume. Your cleavage will soften. The deep, brazen swell will recede still feminine, still full, but not overpowering. You’ll walk with less bounce, sleep more easily, and breathe a little freer.<>
<>And my nipples? They’ve been... sensitive. Sometimes unbearably so.<>
<>That, too, will ease. The nerves won’t vanish, but they’ll settle. You may even miss the edge of it after a while. Sensation is seductive, even to the reluctant.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_8_chest_7_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它會讓它們縮小很多嗎？

thalara: 它們會減少一些體積。你的乳溝會變得柔和。那深邃、大膽的隆起將會消退——依然女性化，依然豐滿，但不再具有壓倒性。你走動時的波動會減少，更容易入睡，呼吸也會更順暢一些。

mc: 那我的乳頭呢？它們一直…很敏感。有時敏感得難以忍受。

thalara: 那也會緩解。神經不會消失，但它們會安定下來。過一陣子，你甚至可能會懷念那種刺激感。感覺是誘人的，即使對不情願的人也是如此。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_8_chest_7_3
passages.content:
<> <>It’s not that I hate it. It's just... it feels like they’re starting to define me. I can see how people are treating me differently. I didn’t realize how much power breasts had until I had them.<>
<>And now you wield the wisdom of both worlds. You’ve felt that sway, that gaze-following presence. And you can put it away when it suits you. That’s true power not just becoming something, but being able to choose what to be.<>
<>You always speak in riddles, Thalara.<>
<>I speak in truths dressed as riddles. It’s the only way your mind listens sometimes.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_8_chest_7_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 並不是我討厭它。只是…感覺它們開始定義我了。我能看出人們對待我的方式不同了。直到擁有它們，我才意識到乳房有多大的力量。

thalara: 而現在你掌握了兩個世界的智慧。你感受過那種影響力，那種目光追隨的存在感。而且你可以在合適的時候將它收起。那才是真正的力量——不僅僅是成為某種樣子，而是能夠選擇成為什麼樣子。

mc: 你說話總是像在打啞謎，Thalara。

thalara: 我說的是披著謎語外衣的真相。有時候，這是唯一能讓你聽進去的方式。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_8_chest_7_4
passages.content:
<> <>If I drink this… I’ll still be feminine. Just less... overwhelming?<>
<>Exactly. You’ll keep your shape, but it will whisper instead of shout. This isn’t regression it’s refinement.<>
<>Alright. I’m ready to breathe again.<>
<>Then let your chest lighten. Let the tension ease. The world need not always watch you sway.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_8_chest_7_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 如果我喝下這個…我仍然會是女性化的。只是不再那麼…令人難以忽視？

thalara: 正是如此。你將保持你的曲線，但它將是低語而非吶喊。這不是倒退——這是精煉。

mc: 好吧。我準備好再次暢快呼吸了。

thalara: 那麼，就讓你的胸口輕盈起來吧。讓緊繃感緩解。這個世界不必總是注視著你搖曳生姿。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_8_chest_7_5
passages.content:
<> <>It’s cold. Like mint in my lungs.<>
<>Good. That means it’s working. Your skin will tighten first. Then the tissue will soften and pull inward slightly. It won’t vanish it will compact.<>
<>They're... lighter. Still there, but they’re not demanding anymore. It’s almost a relief.<>
<>You may return to this path, forward or back. The journey is yours, Caelan. But no matter the size, remember this: your form never dictates your strength. Only your will does.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_8_chest_7_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 好冷。像薄荷在肺裡一樣。

thalara: 很好。這表示藥水生效了。你的皮膚會先緊繃。然後組織會軟化並微微向內收縮。它們不會消失，而是會變得緊實。

mc: 它們…變輕了。還在，但不再那麼有存在感了。幾乎是一種解脫。

thalara: 你可以回到這條路上，向前或向後。旅程是你自己的，Caelan。但無論尺寸如何，記住這一點：你的身形從不決定你的力量。只有你的意志可以。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_8_chest_7_6
passages.content:
<> <>Thank you... I needed that.<>
<>Come back when you’re ready for the next choice. Your body listens to your heart even when you’re unsure what it’s saying.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 謝謝…我需要這個。

thalara: 當你準備好做下一個選擇時再回來。即使你不確定自己的心在說什麼，你的身體依然會傾聽。
[我感覺到藥水在我胸中起作用]

passages.name: chest_7_chest_6
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Honestly, I could use a little relief. My tunic’s been working overtime.|chest_7_chest_6_1]] |

[[I’m not sure if this is right, but… maybe I need to slow down.|chest_7_chest_6_1]] |

[[Good. They were getting ridiculous anyway. I don’t want to bounce like that.|chest_7_chest_6_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎…

[老實說，我可以稍微解脫一下。我的束腰外衣已經超時工作了。] |
[我不確定這是否正確，但…也許我需要放慢腳步。] |
[很好。反正它們已經變得有點誇張了。我不想那樣晃動。] |

passages.name: chest_7_chest_6_1
passages.content:
<> <>I didn’t realize how much they’d changed me until I tried leaning over a table this morning. Nearly knocked over the inkwell.<>
<>It’s always the little things, isn’t it? Reaching for something, jogging up stairs, or simply breathing in a fitted tunic. Your body has shifted into something bold. This potion will quiet that boldness.<>
<>So this won’t undo it all? Just... tone it down?<>
<>Yes. This is not reversal, only reduction. Your breasts will remain full rounded and feminine but they’ll retreat from the edge of lavishness. You’ll feel lighter. Less pronounced.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_7_chest_6_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 直到今天早上我試圖俯身靠向桌子時，我才意識到它們改變了我多少。差點打翻墨水瓶。

thalara: 總是這些小事，對吧？伸手拿東西、跑上樓梯，或者只是穿著合身的束腰外衣呼吸。你的身體已經轉變為某種大膽的形態。這藥水會讓那份大膽安靜下來。

mc: 所以這不會完全逆轉？只是…讓它收斂一些？

thalara: 是的。這不是逆轉，只是縮減。你的乳房將保持豐滿圓潤且女性化，但它們會從奢華的邊緣退回來。你會感覺更輕盈。不那麼顯眼。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_7_chest_6_2
passages.content:
<> <>I didn’t expect how much attention they’d draw. It’s like walking with a sign across my chest. A big, jiggling sign.<>
<>That is often the point of Level Four. Visibility. Command. Sensuality. But you’re not wrong it’s also exhausting. Breasts at that size begin to act on their own, pulling focus wherever you go.<>
<>They’ve been sore lately too. Sensitive. Every bump, every step… I’m not used to carrying them.<>
<>And you shouldn’t rush into comfort with something that reshapes not just your body but your posture, your pace, your very movement through the world. That comfort must be earned, not forced.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_7_chest_6_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我沒料到它們會吸引這麼多注意。就像胸前掛著一個招牌走路。一個巨大、搖晃的招牌。

thalara: 這通常是第四階段的要點。可見性、掌控力、性感。但你沒錯，這也令人疲憊。那種尺寸的乳房開始自行其是，無論你走到哪裡都會吸引目光。

mc: 它們最近也很痠痛。很敏感。每一次碰撞、每一步…我還不習慣帶著它們。

thalara: 你不應該急於追求舒適，尤其是當它重塑的不僅是你的身體，還有你的姿勢、你的步調、你在世間行走的方式。那種舒適必須靠贏得，而非強求。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_7_chest_6_3
passages.content:
<> <>I thought being bold would make me feel more in control. But it’s starting to feel like they control me.<>
<>Then take back that control. This potion returns some quiet to your body. Let your chest settle into a form that supports you, not commands you.<>
<>Will people still notice?<>
<>Yes. But they’ll admire. Not stare. You’ll remain full-breasted, feminine present, but not overpowering. It’s a different kind of allure. Calmer. More composed.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_7_chest_6_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我原以為變得大膽會讓我感覺更有掌控力。但現在開始感覺像是它們在控制我。

thalara: 那就奪回那份控制權。這藥水能讓你的身體恢復一些平靜。讓你的胸部安定成一種支撐你、而非命令你的形態。

mc: 人們還會注意到嗎？

thalara: 會的。但他們會是欣賞，而非盯著看。你仍將是豐滿胸部、女性化的存在，但不會過於壓迫人。這是另一種魅力。更平靜。更沉穩。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_7_chest_6_4
passages.content:
<> <>Feels... chillier than the others.<>
<>It’s meant to calm swelling, not spark it. A binding brew, threaded with snowblossom and duskroot. You should feel the tension loosen within moments.<>
<>Oh… gods, yes. That’s better. They’re still there, but not as heavy. I can actually breathe again.<>
<>You may want to rewrap them after this. Your tunic will hang differently now less taut, more graceful.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_7_chest_6_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 感覺…比其他的更涼。

thalara: 它的目的是鎮定腫脹，而非引發它。一種束縛性的釀劑，摻入了雪綻花和暮色根。你應該很快就會感覺到緊繃感鬆弛下來。

mc: 哦…天啊，是的。這樣好多了。它們還在，但沒那麼沉重了。我真的又能呼吸了。

thalara: 之後你可能想重新包裹它們。你的束腰外衣現在會懸掛得不一樣——沒那麼緊繃，更優雅。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_7_chest_6_5
passages.content:
<> <>I thought going forward was the only path. That if I wanted to become... her, I had to accept every ounce of change.<>
<>Transformation is not a tunnel, Caelan. It’s a garden. You may step forward, pause, even walk back a path or two to breathe in a different flower. The journey remains yours.<>
<>They still feel... good. Feminine. Just more me again. I needed this, Thalara.<>
<>You are never less for slowing your pace. A queen who listens to her own needs is one who commands well. Rest here, if it suits you. Grow again when you are ready.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我原以為向前是唯一的路。以為如果我想成為…她，就必須接受每一分改變。

thalara: 轉變不是一條隧道，Caelan。它是一座花園。你可以向前走、暫停、甚至往回走一兩條小徑，去呼吸另一種花的芬芳。旅程始終是你自己的。

mc: 它們感覺還是…很好。女性化。只是更像原來的我了。我需要這個，Thalara。

thalara: 放慢腳步從不會讓你變得不夠好。一位傾聽自己需求的女王才能治理有方。如果適合你，就在此休息。當你準備好時，再次成長。

[我感覺到藥水在我胸中起作用]

passages.name: chest_6_chest_5
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ll take the potion. I’m open to seeing what happens when I go back a step.|chest_6_chest_5_1]] |

[[I guess I should do this, even if it feels strange to undo some of the change I’ve already felt.|chest_6_chest_5_1]] |

[[I’m not sure why I need to reverse it. I’ve come this far, why should I shrink back now?|chest_6_chest_5_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎…

[我會喝下藥水。我願意看看當我後退一步時會發生什麼。] |

passages.name: chest_6_chest_5_1
passages.content:
<> <>I never thought I’d want to make myself smaller… but here we are.<>
<>Not smaller, just… more balanced. The transformation doesn’t always move in one direction. Sometimes, you must adjust, reset, to allow your body the time to settle in.<>
<>So, it’s like a pause?<>
<>Exactly. A brief pause. To allow your body to adapt before continuing. You’ve felt the fullness, the weight, the shift into womanhood. This potion will reverse the most recent of those changes and bring you back to a more subtle version.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_6_chest_5_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我從沒想過我會想讓自己變小…但我們還是走到這一步了。

thalara: 不是變小，只是…更平衡。轉變並不總是朝著一個方向前進。有時，你必須調整、重置，讓你的身體有時間適應。

mc: 所以，這就像暫停一下？

thalara: 正是。一個短暫的停頓。讓你的身體在繼續前適應。你已經感受到了豐滿、重量、向女性身份的轉變。這藥水將逆轉那些變化中最新的部分，讓你回到一個更微妙的版本。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_6_chest_5_2
passages.content:
<> <>I can feel it already. My chest is tightening, pulling back. It’s like shrinking into myself again.<>
<>That’s the essence of balance. You are neither too much nor too little. It will be softer now, more akin to the delicate curves of a young woman.<>
<>I guess this feels… normal? Maybe even more comfortable. It’s not like before, when I had to get used to the fullness.<>
<>Sometimes, too much change too quickly can be overwhelming. A smaller chest may feel more natural for your current state. You’re still feminine, but the transition isn’t as stark.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_6_chest_5_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我已經能感覺到了。我的胸口正在緊縮、往內收。就像又縮回我自己體內一樣。

thalara: 這就是平衡的本質。你既不過多，也不過少。現在它會更柔軟，更接近年輕女性的纖柔曲線。

mc: 我想這感覺……很正常？甚至可能更舒服。不像之前，我得去適應那種豐滿感。

thalara: 有時，變化太多太快會讓人難以承受。對你目前的狀態而言，較小的胸部可能感覺更自然。你依然充滿女性特質，只是轉變沒那麼劇烈。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_6_chest_5_3
passages.content:
<> <>So, this isn’t a failure, right? Just a step back?<>
<>Not a failure. Just a shift, Caelan. Think of it like a sculptor refining a masterpiece. The shape evolves gradually, with each stage adding depth and understanding.<>
<>I feel less exposed now, like I can breathe easier in my own skin.<>
<>That’s the goal. Comfort is part of the process. You must come to peace with each step, even when it feels contradictory. There’s no shame in adjusting.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_6_chest_5_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 所以，這不算失敗，對吧？只是退後一步？

thalara: 不是失敗。只是一次調整，Caelan。把它想像成雕塑家在精修傑作。形態是逐漸演變的，每個階段都增添深度與理解。

mc: 我現在感覺沒那麼暴露了，好像在自己的皮膚裡能更自在地呼吸。

thalara: 這就是目標。舒適是過程的一部分。你必須與每一步和解，即使感覺矛盾。調整並不可恥。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_6_chest_5_4
passages.content:
<> <>And now I’m back to this more modest version. But I’m sure I’ll have to go back to the fuller shape soon, won’t I?<>
<>Only when you’re ready, Caelan. This is your journey, and I’m here to guide you as you choose your path. There’s no hurry. You may find this version more fitting, or you may choose to continue onward.<>
<>It’s strange. I thought I’d miss the fullness, but this feels… comfortable. Like it’s mine, for now.<>
<>Comfort is often the first sign of alignment with your true self. Embrace the changes, but don’t rush through them. Allow each stage to resonate before moving forward.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_6_chest_5_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 現在我又回到這個較為含蓄的版本了。但我確定很快又得變回更豐滿的形狀，對嗎？

thalara: 只有當你準備好的時候，Caelan。這是你的旅程，我會在你選擇道路時引導你。無需匆忙。你可能覺得這個版本更合適，也可能選擇繼續前進。

mc: 真奇怪。我以為我會懷念豐滿的感覺，但這樣……很舒服。就像此刻，這就是屬於我的樣子。

thalara: 舒適感往往是與真實自我契合的第一個徵兆。擁抱變化，但不要急於求成。讓每個階段都在你心中產生共鳴，再繼續前進。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_6_chest_5_5
passages.content:
<> <>I think I understand now. It’s not about racing to the end. It’s about feeling every change, letting each moment settle in.<>
<>Exactly. And each change, no matter how small, adds to the woman you are becoming.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我想我現在明白了。重點不在於衝向終點，而在於感受每一次變化，讓每個時刻沉澱下來。

thalara: 正是如此。每一次改變，無論多麼微小，都在塑造你即將成為的那個女人。
[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_4
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I think I need to slow things down. Just… for now.|chest_5_chest_4_1]] |

[[I’m not sure if I should. But something inside says I have to.|chest_5_chest_4_1]] |

[[This doesn’t mean I’m quitting. Just… correcting a mistake.|chest_5_chest_4_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想我需要放慢腳步。只是……暫時如此。] |
[我不確定是否應該這麼做。但我內心有個聲音說我必須這麼做。] |
[這不代表我要放棄。只是……修正一個錯誤。] |

passages.name: chest_5_chest_4_1
passages.content:
<> <>This one feels different. Colder, even before I touch it.<>
<>It’s meant to cool, to quiet. Where the other potions stir growth, this one soothes it. It reminds the body of stillness, and of neutrality.<>
<>They’ve barely started… but they’re there. I feel them when I lie down. When I move.<>
<>And now you wish to feel less. Not nothing but a gentler echo of what has begun.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_4_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這瓶感覺不一樣。更冷，甚至在我觸碰之前就感覺到了。

thalara: 它本意就是冷卻、平息。其他藥水激發成長，而這一瓶則安撫它。它提醒身體靜止與中性的狀態。

mc: 它們才剛開始發育……但確實存在。我躺下時能感覺到。移動時也能。

thalara: 而現在你希望感覺減弱一些。並非完全消失，只是讓已開始的變化留下更輕柔的迴響。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_4_2
passages.content:
<> <>It’s not that I hate them. It’s just moving faster than I thought it would.<>
<>You are allowed to pause. Even to step back. This path does not require haste it requires truth. And yours, I suspect, is still unfolding.<>
<>So if I drink this… what changes?<>
<>The mounds you feel now will ease. The tension beneath your skin the tingling warmth will ebb. You’ll remain soft, but less shaped. The curves won’t vanish, but they’ll smooth back into subtler suggestions.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_4_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 不是說我討厭它們。只是變化速度比我想像的要快。

thalara: 你可以暫停。甚至可以退後一步。這條路不需要匆忙，它需要真實。而你的真實，我猜想，仍在展開之中。

mc: 所以如果我喝下這個……會有什麼變化？

thalara: 你現在感覺到的隆起會緩和下來。皮膚下的緊繃感、刺痛的暖意會逐漸消退。你仍會保持柔軟，但形狀會減弱。曲線不會消失，但它們會平滑地退回更隱約的暗示。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_4_3
passages.content:
<> <>Will the sensitivity fade too?<>
<>A little. The nerves will dull, not die. Think of it as resting the garden rather than burning it down.<>
<>They… felt kind of nice. A part of me liked it.<>
<>Then remember that. This is not punishment. This is preservation. You are not saying no you are saying not yet.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_4_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 敏感度也會減退嗎？

thalara: 會減退一些。神經會變得遲鈍，而非死去。把它想成是讓花園休養生息，而非一把火燒光。

mc: 它們……感覺其實不錯。有一部分的我喜歡那種感覺。

thalara: 那就記住這一點。這不是懲罰。這是保存。你並非在說「不」，你是在說「還不是時候」。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_4_4
passages.content:
<> <>What if I regret stepping back?<>
<>Then we brew again. No gate is closed to you. We are sculptors, Caelan. We press clay forward, backward, sideward. We are not demolishing stone.<>
<>And this won’t erase me?<>
<>Never. No magic I offer can do that. It will only quiet the voice of change until you are ready to listen again.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_4_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 如果我後悔退後一步怎麼辦？

thalara: 那我們就再次調製藥水。沒有哪扇門對你關閉。我們是雕塑家，Caelan。我們將黏土向前推、向後拉、向側邊移。我們不是在鑿毀石頭。

mc: 這不會抹去「我」吧？

thalara: 永遠不會。我提供的任何魔法都做不到那種事。它只會讓變化的聲音安靜下來，直到你準備好再次傾聽。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_4_5
passages.content:
<> <>…Cold. Like frost on my tongue.<>
<>That chill is clarity. The flesh beneath your chest listens, slackens. Your body is easing its grip on the curves it tried to claim.<>
<>It’s strange. I feel lighter. Emptier, almost.<>
<>Lighter isn’t emptier. It’s just… breathing room. And that is no small thing.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_5_chest_4_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: ……好冷。像冰霜在舌頭上化開。

thalara: 那股寒意就是清晰。你胸前的肌膚正在聆聽、放鬆。你的身體正在鬆開它試圖抓住的曲線。

mc: 真奇怪。我覺得更輕了。幾乎有點……空蕩蕩的。

thalara: 更輕並非更空。那只是……喘息的空間。而這絕非小事。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_5_chest_4_6
passages.content:
<> <>They’re still there. But less. Like a memory.<>
<>That’s exactly what they are now a promise you can revisit. One sip forward, or one back. All under your will.<>
<>…Thank you.<>
<>When the heart trembles, we do not shame it we listen. That, my dear prince, is the first step of any queen.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它們還在。但變少了。像一段記憶。

thalara: 現在它們正是如此——一個你可以重訪的承諾。向前啜飲一口，或向後一步。全憑你的意願。

mc: ……謝謝你。

thalara: 當心靈顫抖時，我們不該羞辱它，而應傾聽。親愛的王子，那是任何一位女王的第一步。

[I feel the potion working in my breast]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_3
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve thought this through. I want to slow things down.|chest_4_chest_3_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I’m doing the right thing… but I need a breather.|chest_4_chest_3_1]] |

[[I’m not ready to be someone else’s fantasy. Not yet. Maybe not ever.|chest_4_chest_3_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我已經仔細想過了。我想放慢腳步。] |
[我不知道這是否正確……但我需要喘口氣。] |
[我還沒準備好成為別人的幻想。現在還沒。或許永遠都不會。] |

passages.name: chest_4_chest_3_1
passages.content:
<> <>You carry hesitation in your chest now. I see it in the way you hold your arms.<>
<>It felt different. I thought I’d welcome the change more. I mean… it was barely noticeable, but I knew something was there.<>
<>A budding curve. A whisper of what’s to come. Even the smallest shift echoes deeply when your body has never changed like this before.<>
<>That’s just it. It echoed too loudly. I looked in the mirror and saw someone in-between… and I didn’t know how to feel about him. Or her.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_3_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你心中此刻懷著猶豫。從你抱臂的姿勢就能看出來。

mc: 感覺不一樣了。我以為我會更樂於接受改變。我是說……變化幾乎難以察覺，但我知道有什麼東西在那裡。

thalara: 一個萌芽的曲線。一個未來變化的低語。當你的身體從未經歷過這樣的改變時，即使是最微小的轉變也會在心中迴盪深遠。

mc: 正是如此。它迴盪得太響亮了。我看著鏡子，看到一個介於中間的人……我不知道該如何看待他。或是她。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_3_2
passages.content:
<> <>That is no failure, Caelan. Not all paths are walked in straight lines. Even rivers bend to find their flow.<>
<>What does this one do?<>
<>It tells your body to quiet. To hold, rather than bloom. It draws back the earliest growth, reshaping you back into ambiguity. No curve. No edge. Just stillness again.<>
<>Neutral. Neither prince nor princess.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_3_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這並非失敗，Caelan。並非所有道路都是筆直前行。就連河流也會蜿蜒以尋求其流向。

mc: 這個藥水有什麼作用？

thalara: 它會讓你的身體安靜下來。保持原狀，而非綻放。它會收回最初的生長，將你重塑回模糊的狀態。沒有曲線。沒有稜角。再次回歸靜止。

mc: 中性。既非王子，也非公主。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_3_3
passages.content:
<> <>Sometimes, neutrality is power. You are not erasing what you’ve done only taking a breath.<>
<>Will I regret this?<>
<>Only if you believe change must always move forward. But in truth, wisdom often moves in circles.<>
<>…It’s cold.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_3_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 有時，中立本身就是一種力量。你並非抹去已做之事，只是稍作喘息。

mc: 我會後悔嗎？

thalara: 只有當你相信改變必須永遠向前時才會。但事實上，智慧往往在循環中運行。

mc: ……它是冰涼的。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_3_4
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. Icevine and soulmint. Agents of stillness. Of clarity.<>
<>I can feel it. The tingling’s gone. That hum beneath the skin… silent.<>
<>Your chest is settling. You’ll notice the slight swell flattening again. It will feel softer than before less muscular, but also less feminine.<>
<>So I’m… back in between. Again.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_3_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。冰藤與魂薄荷。靜止與澄明的媒介。

mc: 我能感覺到。那種刺痛感消失了。皮膚下的那股嗡鳴……寂靜了。

thalara: 你的胸膛正在平復。你會注意到輕微的隆起再次平坦下去。它會感覺比以前更柔軟——肌肉感減少，但女性化的特徵也減弱了。

mc: 所以我……又回到了中間狀態。再一次。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_3_5
passages.content:
<> <>You are always ‘in between,’ Caelan. Between who you were, and who you will be. There is no shame in pausing there.<>
<>People will ask why I stopped. Why I didn’t go all the way.<>
<>Let them ask. Let them wonder. Their curiosity is not your command. You shape your story.<>
<>I thought I'd feel guilt. But instead… I feel like I can breathe again.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_4_chest_3_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你永遠都「介於中間」，Caelan。介於過去的你，與未來的你之間。在那裡暫停並不可恥。

mc: 人們會問我為什麼停下。為什麼不一路走到底。

thalara: 讓他們問吧。讓他們好奇。他們的好奇心不是你的指令。你塑造你自己的故事。

mc: 我以為我會感到愧疚。但相反……我覺得自己又能呼吸了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_4_chest_3_6
passages.content:
<> <>Then you’ve made the right step for now. And when your heart calls again, forward or backward, I will be here. With draughts, with counsel… with no judgment.<>
<>Back to flat. But… not the same flat I started with.<>
<>Because you’ve changed, even if only inside. And no potion can undo that.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼就目前而言，你已邁出了正確的一步。當你的心再次呼喚時，無論是向前還是向後，我都會在這裡。帶著藥水，帶著建議……不帶任何評判。

mc: 恢復平坦了。但是……和我最初的那種平坦不一樣了。

thalara: 因為你已經改變了，即使只是在內心。而沒有任何藥水能抹去這一點。

[我感覺到藥水在我胸中起作用]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_2
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to feel like myself again. Or at least, like the version I was before all this.|chest_3_chest_2_1]] |

[[I’m not sure what I’m doing. I just… I don’t want to be nothing anymore.|chest_3_chest_2_1]] |

[[So I erased myself last time. This time, I take something back. Don’t try to stop me.|chest_3_chest_2_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想再次感覺像我自己。或者至少，像這一切發生之前的我。] |
[我不確定自己在做什麼。我只是……我不想再什麼都不是了。] |
[所以我上次抹去了自己。這次，我要拿回一些東西。別想阻止我。] |

passages.name: chest_3_chest_2_1
passages.content:
<> <>You’re returning to definition today. Shape. Identity. Perhaps even strength. Just a little.<>
<>It’s strange. I didn’t think I’d want this again. But I miss feeling… solid.<>
<>The in-between can be freeing. But it can also feel like floating too long.<>
<>I’ve felt untethered lately. Like my chest doesn’t belong to anyone just some blank space between selves.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_2_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你今天要回歸明確的形態了。輪廓。身份。或許甚至是一點力量。只是一點點。

mc: 這很奇怪。我沒想到我會再次想要這個。但我懷念那種……堅實的感覺。

thalara: 中間狀態可以是自由的。但也可能感覺像漂浮得太久。

mc: 我最近感覺無所依憑。好像我的胸膛不屬於任何人——只是自我之間的一片空白。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_2_2
passages.content:
<> <>So you seek form again. There’s no shame in that. Becoming a queen isn’t a straight line. It’s a spiral. Sometimes we walk it backward.<>
<>Will this make me masculine again?<>
<>Not fully. This draught brings back tone, not dominance. It sharpens what was dulled. It whispers strength doesn’t shout it.<>
<>Why does it feel like a guilty sip?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_2_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 所以你再次尋求形態。這並不可恥。成為女王並非一條直線。它是一個螺旋。有時我們會向後走。

mc: 這會讓我再次變得男性化嗎？

thalara: 不會完全如此。這劑藥水帶來的是緊實的線條，而非支配感。它會銳化那些被鈍化的部分。它低語著力量，而非吶喊。

mc: 為什麼喝下它感覺像是一種罪惡？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_2_3
passages.content:
<> <>Because we’re trained to think undoing is failure. But it isn’t. It’s remembering. Testing. Feeling the old skin again to see if it still fits.<>
<>…It’s hot. Almost peppery.<>
<>Fireroot and ironleaf. Masculine herbs. They fuel will, not just muscle.<>
<>It’s not what it was… but it’s something again.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_2_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為我們被教導認為「逆轉」就是失敗。但並非如此。它是回憶。是測試。是再次感受舊日的皮膚，看看它是否依然合身。

mc: ……它是熱的。幾乎帶點胡椒味。

thalara: 火根與鐵葉。陽剛的藥草。它們激發的是意志，而不僅僅是肌肉。

mc: 這和過去不一樣……但它又再次是某種東西了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_2_4
passages.content:
<> <>Not prince, not queen. But anchored again. Re-shaped, not erased.<>
<>I don’t know what I want to be. But I think I need to feel… real. Defined. Even if it’s temporary.<>
<>Then this session has done its work. You are not a prisoner of either path, Caelan. You are a walker between them.<>
<>You make it sound noble.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_3_chest_2_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不是王子，也不是女王。但再次有了錨點。重塑，而非抹除。

mc: 我不知道自己想成為什麼。但我覺得我需要感覺……真實。明確。即使只是暫時的。

thalara: 那麼這次調製已完成了它的工作。你並非任何一條道路的囚徒，Caelan。你是行走於其間的旅人。

mc: 你說得這聽起來很高尚。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: chest_3_chest_2_5
passages.content:
<> <>It is noble. Few have the courage to step backward. Even fewer to admit they need it.<>
<>Thank you… for not shaming me.<>
<>This chamber does not demand shame. Only honesty. Come back when you’re ready for the next step forward or back.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這確實高尚。很少有人有勇氣向後退一步。更少人願意承認他們需要這麼做。

mc: 謝謝你……沒有讓我感到羞恥。

thalara: 這個房間不要求羞恥。只要求誠實。當你準備好邁出下一步——無論向前或向後——時，再回來吧。
[我感覺到藥水在我胸中起作用]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_1
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve changed my mind. I want my strength back.|chest_2_chest_1_1]] |

[[I… don’t know why, but I need to feel like myself again. Even if just for a while.|chest_2_chest_1_1]] |

[[You don’t get to take everything from me. Not yet. Maybe not ever.|chest_2_chest_1_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經釀好了藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我改變主意了。我想要回我的力量。] |
[我……不知道為什麼，但我需要再次感覺像我自己。哪怕只是一會兒。] |
[你不能從我這裡奪走一切。還不行。也許永遠都不行。] |

passages.name: chest_2_chest_1_1
passages.content:
<> <>The brew is ready. Fireroot for your blood, ironroot for your bones. It will rebuild what you softened last time.<>
<>Will it hurt?<>
<>No. But it will burn. The kind of burn you feel when your breath hits the cold air after a run. It’s not pain it’s memory.<>
<>So… I’ll look the way I used to again?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_1_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 藥劑準備好了。火根為你的血液，鐵根為你的骨骼。它將重建你上次軟化的部分。

mc: 會痛嗎？

thalara: 不會。但會有灼燒感。就像你跑步後，呼吸觸及冷空氣時感受到的那種灼燒。那不是疼痛，是記憶。

mc: 所以……我會變回以前的樣子？

[繼續]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_1_2
passages.content:
<> <>More or less. The edge will return angles beneath the skin, the firmness of muscle rebuilt. Your chest will square again. And with it, your presence. Bold. Clear.<>
<>It’s strange. I thought I wanted to move forward. But something about seeing myself fade like that… I wasn’t ready.<>
<>That’s not weakness. It’s awareness. The transformation you’re undertaking isn’t a straight road. There are turns, retreats, and resting points. And there is power in saying no.<>
<>So you don’t disapprove?<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_1_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 差不多。稜角會回歸，皮膚下的線條，肌肉的緊實度會重建。你的胸膛會再次變得方正。隨之而來的，是你的存在感。鮮明。清晰。

mc: 真奇怪。我以為我想向前走。但看到自己那樣消逝……我還沒準備好。

thalara: 那不是軟弱。那是覺察。你正在經歷的轉變並非一條直路。其中有轉彎、後退與歇息點。而說「不」本身，就蘊含力量。

mc: 所以你不反對？
[繼續]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_1_3
passages.content:
<> <>I do not decide who you are. I only provide what lets you discover it.<>
<>The potion will draw the strength from deep within you not from muscle alone, but from memory. From your boyhood games, the swordplay in the training yards, the day you first bested your father in a match.<>
<>He let me win.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_1_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我不決定你是誰。我只提供讓你發現自己的東西。

thalara: 這藥水會從你深處汲取力量，不僅來自肌肉，更來自記憶。來自你兒時的遊戲、訓練場上的劍術、你第一次在比試中勝過父親的那天。

mc: 他讓我贏的。

[繼續]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_1_4
passages.content:
<> <>Perhaps. But you still stood straighter afterward. This will give you that straightness again.<>
<>…It’s like swallowing firewood and steel.<>
<>And now it spreads. Your blood carries it into the fibers of your chest. Look already, the shape is shifting.<>
<>I feel… heavier. Solid. Like I’ve filled back into myself.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_1_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 或許吧。但之後你站得更挺直了。這會讓你再次擁有那份挺直。

mc: ……這感覺像吞下了柴火和鋼鐵。

thalara: 現在它擴散開了。你的血液將它帶入胸膛的肌理。看，形狀已經在改變。

mc: 我覺得……更沉重了。結實。好像我重新填滿了自己。

[繼續]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_1_5
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve claimed something. That will always change how you walk. This choice is yours to make again and again, as often as you need to.<>
<>Does it disappoint you?<>
<>No. It reminds me you are not a vessel. You are a storm, caught between winds. That means you are alive.<>
<>I just… needed to feel like I still had a say.<>
[[Move Forth|chest_2_chest_1_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你取回了某些東西。這永遠會改變你行走的方式。這個選擇你可以一再做出，隨你需要多少次。

mc: 這讓你失望嗎？

thalara: 不。這提醒我你不是容器。你是一場困在風暴間的風暴。這意味著你還活著。

mc: 我只是……需要感覺自己仍有發言權。

[繼續]

passages.name: chest_2_chest_1_6
passages.content:
<> <>Then say it with your chest. It listens.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my breast|use_success_potion_create_chest]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就用你的胸膛去說。它在傾聽。
[我感覺到藥水在我胸中起作用]

[離開薄暮之塔]

passages.name: crotch_1_crotch_2
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve worn this form proudly. Now I need to remember what came before|crotch_1_crotch_2_1]] |

[[I’m not ashamed it’s just… this feels like trading one truth for another.|crotch_1_crotch_2_1]] |

[[No more half-measures. If I can forge forward, I can step back too.|crotch_1_crotch_2_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。 Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我一直以這個形態為傲。但現在我需要記起過去的模樣。] | 
[我並不感到羞恥，只是……這感覺像是用一種真實交換另一種。] | 
[不再妥協。既然我能向前塑造自己，也能向後退一步。] |

passages.name: crotch_1_crotch_2_1
passages.content:
<>
<>Reversal is not denial. It is reflection a chance to see what has shifted in the light of morning.<>
<>I’ve lived these last days in a shape I claimed as mine. But part of me wonders if I’m rushing the journey.<>
<>Every path deserves its pauses. It is wise to breathe, look back, then decide which step to take next.<>
<>This potion… it will reshape me again. Bring back the form I left behind yesterday.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_1_crotch_2_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 逆轉並非否定。它是一種反思，讓你有機會在晨光中看清哪些事物已然改變。

mc: 過去這些日子，我以自己宣稱的形態生活。但有一部分的我懷疑，我是否在匆忙趕路。

thalara: 每條路都值得停頓。停下來呼吸、回顧，然後決定下一步該怎麼走，這是明智之舉。

mc: 這瓶藥水……它會再次重塑我。帶回我昨日拋在身後的形態。

[繼續]

passages.name: crotch_1_crotch_2_2
passages.content:
<> <>It will restore what you relinquished not to trap you, but to remind you of your fullness in both forms.<>
<>Will I feel… fragmented? Or more whole?<>
<>Perhaps both. Integration often feels like two melodies weaving into harmony each distinct, each necessary.<>
<>I choose harmony.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_1_crotch_2_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它將恢復你所放棄的，不是為了困住你，而是為了提醒你，你在兩種形態中都是完整的。

mc: 我會感到……支離破碎嗎？還是更加完整？

thalara: 或許兩者皆是。融合的過程常像是兩段旋律交織成和聲，各自獨特，各自必要。

mc: 我選擇和諧。

[繼續]

passages.name: crotch_1_crotch_2_3
passages.content:
<> <>It’s familiar… and new.<>
<>You carry both shapes within you now. Neither defines you alone. What matters is how you combine their strengths.<>
<>I feel grounded… like my center shifts with choice, not with circumstance.<>
<>Then let your choices continue to shape you. Morning returns each day so too can the forms you walk in, as long as they serve your truth.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_1_crotch_2_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這感覺熟悉……又陌生。

thalara: 你現在將兩種形態都容納於內。沒有一種能單獨定義你。重要的是你如何結合它們的力量。

mc: 我感到踏實……彷彿我的中心會隨著選擇而移動，而非隨環境改變。

thalara: 那麼，讓你的選擇繼續塑造你吧。晨光每日回歸，你所行走的形態亦然，只要它們服務於你的真實。

[繼續]

passages.name: crotch_1_crotch_2_4
passages.content:
<> <>Thank you, Thalara. For guiding me both forward and back.<>
<>You are your own compass, Caelan. I merely help you read the stars.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 謝謝你，Thalara。引領我向前，也向後。

thalara: 你才是自己的羅盤，Caelan。我只是幫你解讀星辰。
[我感到藥水在我胯下起作用]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_1
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve surrendered what was. Now I’m ready to embrace what is.|crotch_2_crotch_1_1]] |

[[I know this is the last shift. I’m… nervous. But I came here for it.|crotch_2_crotch_1_1]] |

[[This was never about comfort. Do your magic let’s finish this.|crotch_2_crotch_1_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。 Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我已放下過去。現在我準備好擁抱當下。] | 
[我知道這是最後一次轉變。我……很緊張。但我正是為此而來。] | 
[這從來不是為了舒適。施展你的魔法吧，讓我們完成它。] |

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_1_1
passages.content:
<> <>Here we stand at the threshold of your becoming. The final threshold.<>
<>All the petals before me… each session felt like shedding a layer. This one feels like blooming.<>
<>Because it is. Each flower here opened in moonlight, just as you have. Today’s elixir completes what has been forming within you.<>
<>I’ve feared this moment worried it might feel hollow. But I also know I’ve arrived at it by choice.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_2_crotch_1_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我們此刻站在你成為之途的門檻前。最後一道門檻。

mc: 所有在我面前綻放的花瓣……每一次調製都像褪去一層外殼。這一次卻感覺像在盛開。

thalara: 因為正是如此。這裡的每一朵花都在月光下綻放，正如你一樣。今日的靈藥將完成你內在已然成形的過程。

mc: 我曾恐懼這一刻，擔心它會感覺空虛。但我也知道，我是憑自己的選擇來到這裡的。

[繼續]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_1_2
passages.content:
<> <>This potion carries lunar oils softening, deepening, refining. It doesn’t erase the journey; it honors it.<>
<>I’m ready… I think.<>
<>Then let us begin. Remember: you do not become less. You become more whole.<>
<>It’s… alive. Not just a shape, but a presence. I can feel depth I never knew existed.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_2_crotch_1_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這藥劑蘊含月華精油，能軟化、深化、精煉。它並非抹去旅程，而是尊崇它。

mc: 我準備好了…我想。

thalara: 那麼讓我們開始吧。記住：你並非變少，而是變得更完整。

thalara: 它…是活的。不僅僅是一個形狀，更是一種存在。我能感受到從未知曉的深度。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_1_3
passages.content:
<> <>Your body has been a canvas. Tonight, it paints itself into form soft, strong, authentic. This is not completion it is emergence.<>
<>I don’t recognize all of me yet. But I recognize this me. And she feels... right.<>
<>She is you. Not a copy, not a hiding. A true shape of your truth, born from choice and courage.<>
<>Every session felt like loss of power, of identity. But this… this feels like reclaiming power I never had.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_2_crotch_1_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的身體曾是畫布。今夜，它將自己繪成柔軟、強韌、真實的形態。這不是終點，而是顯現。

mc: 我還未能認出全部的自己。但我認得這個我。而她感覺…對了。

thalara: 她就是你。不是複製品，不是偽裝。是你真實的形貌，源自選擇與勇氣。

mc: 之前的每個階段都感覺像在失去力量、失去身份。但這個…這感覺像是取回我從未擁有過的力量。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_1_4
passages.content:
<> <>Power that flows from authenticity is stronger than any inherited throne or blade. You have crafted it yourself.<>
<>I’m afraid of what comes next. Courtly eyes, politics... the crown.<>
<>You will walk among them as your true self. Some will marvel. Some will fear. But none can deny the grace of someone who stands in her own form.<>
<>Then I will walk that path. Not as a prince, not as a man. But as who I have chosen to be.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_2_crotch_1_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 源自真實的力量，比任何繼承而來的王座或刀劍都更強大。這是你親手鍛造的。

mc: 我害怕接下來的事。宮廷的目光、政治…還有王冠。

thalara: 你將以真實的自我行走於他們之間。有人會驚嘆，有人會畏懼。但無人能否認一個立足於自身形態之人所展現的優雅。

mc: 那麼我將踏上那條路。不是以王子之姿，不是以男人之身。而是以我選擇成為的樣子。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_1_5
passages.content:
<> <>And that choice is your legacy. May it guide you far beyond these walls.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而那個選擇就是你的遺產。願它引領你遠離這些高牆。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_3
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This is a course correction. Not shame. Not regret.|crotch_2_crotch_3_1]] |

[[I didn’t think I’d come back here. But maybe I need to understand what I left behind.|crotch_2_crotch_3_1]] |

[[If this body’s mine, then I have the right to decide its shape again.|crotch_2_crotch_3_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎…

[這是一次航向修正。不是羞恥。不是後悔。] |
[我沒想過會回到這裡。但或許我需要理解我遺留在身後的東西。] |
[如果這身體是我的，那麼我有權再次決定它的形狀。] |

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_3_1
passages.content:
<> <>Your path is yours, Caelan. Not because you chose it once, but because you keep choosing it again and again.<>
<>I thought I crossed a line I couldn’t return from. But lately... I feel like something in me is adrift. Like I stepped forward before I understood what I was leaving behind.<>
<>That is not failure. That is wisdom in motion. You gave something up. And now you feel its echo calling back to you.<>
<>Will this feel like betrayal? To the part of me that accepted the change?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_2_crotch_3_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的道路屬於你自己，Caelan。不是因為你曾選擇過一次，而是因為你一次又一次地持續選擇它。

mc: 我曾以為我跨過了一條無法回頭的界線。但最近…我覺得內心的某部分在漂泊。彷彿我在理解自己留下什麼之前，就向前邁步了。

thalara: 那不是失敗。那是流動的智慧。你曾捨棄了某些東西。而現在你感受到它的迴響在呼喚你。

mc: 這會感覺像是背叛嗎？對那個接受了改變的「我」而言？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_3_2
passages.content:
<> <>It will feel like integration. You’re not undoing anything you’re acknowledging that you are not a single truth. You are a story still being written.<>
<>I remember the silence after that last transformation. Not just on the outside inside too. It was like a chapter ended... but the next one didn’t start.<>
<>Then let this be punctuation. Not a period. Not a reversal. A pause. A chance to breathe between sentences.<>
<>You always make it sound poetic. But this feels… personal.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_2_crotch_3_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它會感覺像是整合。你不是在撤銷任何事，你是在承認你並非單一的真相。你是一個仍在被書寫的故事。

mc: 我記得上次轉變後的寂靜。不僅是外在，內心也是。就像一個章節結束了…但下一章卻沒有開始。

thalara: 那麼就讓這成為一個標點吧。不是句號。不是逆轉。是一個停頓。一個在句子之間喘息的機會。

mc: 你總是說得如此詩意。但這感覺…很個人。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_3_3
passages.content:
<> <>That’s because it is. Every shape you wear is a conversation between your soul and your skin. And you, brave one, are still listening.<>
<>Will it hurt?<>
<>No. But it may feel. And that’s the point.<>
<>It’s strange. It’s me, and it isn’t.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_2_crotch_3_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 正是如此。你穿戴的每一種形體，都是你靈魂與肌膚之間的對話。而你，勇敢的人，仍在傾聽。

mc: 會痛嗎？

thalara: 不會。但可能會有所感覺。而這正是重點。

mc: 很奇怪。這是我，卻又不是我。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_3_4
passages.content:
<> <>That’s how you know you’re growing. You are meeting a version of yourself you hadn’t seen in a while.<>
<>Will this confuse people?<>
<>They’ll wonder. They may question. But they will see you. Because you are not the transformation you are the chooser of it.<>
<>I don’t know if I’ll stay here. But for now... it feels better.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_2_crotch_3_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這正是你正在成長的證明。你正遇見一個許久未見的自己。

mc: 這會讓人困惑嗎？

thalara: 他們會好奇。他們可能會質疑。但他們會看見你。因為你不是轉變本身，你是做出選擇的人。

mc: 我不知道我會不會停留在這裡。但此刻…這樣感覺更好。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_2_crotch_3_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then that is all that matters. You are not wrong to seek what you need, even if what you need shifts with the seasons of your heart.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼這就足夠了。追尋你所需並非錯誤，即使你所需會隨著你內心的季節而變遷。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_2
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve let go of what I was. I’m ready to create what comes next.|crotch_3_crotch_2_1]] |

[[This part feels... heavier. Like something I can't undo.|crotch_3_crotch_2_1]] |

[[So this is it. No going back after this, is there?|crotch_3_crotch_2_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎…

[我已放下過去的我。我準備好創造接下來的一切。] |
[這部分感覺…更沉重。像是某種無法挽回的東西。] |
[所以就是這樣了。在這之後就無法回頭了，對吧？] |

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_2_1
passages.content:
<> <>No going back? Perhaps. But going forward truly forward was never meant to be without weight.<>
<>Everything until now felt like subtraction. This... this feels different.<>
<>Because it is. Until now, the body made room. Today, it begins to build. This is not just transformation it is genesis.<>
<>I didn’t think creation would feel like this. Like I’m standing on the edge of a cliff, and I’m the one who has to step off.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_3_crotch_2_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 無法回頭？或許吧。但真正的前行，從不意味著毫無重量。

mc: 至今為止的一切都感覺像是削減。這個…感覺不同。

thalara: 因為確實如此。至今為止，身體是在騰出空間。今日，它開始構築。這不僅是轉變，這是創生。

mc: 我沒想到創造會是這種感覺。就像我站在懸崖邊緣，而必須邁步離開的人是我自己。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_2_2
passages.content:
<> <>It’s not a fall. It’s a release. And wings often sprout after the leap.<>
<>You always have a metaphor ready.<>
<>Old mages speak in riddles when truth is too sharp. But I won’t lie to you. This potion ends something final. Not because it erases it replaces. What follows may feel foreign at first. But foreignness is not the same as wrongness.<>
<>What does it feel like? Afterward?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_3_crotch_2_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這不是墜落。這是一種釋放。翅膀往往在躍下之後才生長出來。

mc: 你總是準備好一個比喻。

thalara: 當真相過於鋒利時，老法師總愛說謎語。但我不會對你說謊。這藥水終結的是某種終局。並非因為它抹去，而是因為它取代。隨之而來的，起初或許會感到陌生。但陌生並不等同於錯誤。

mc: 之後會是什麼感覺？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_2_3
passages.content:
<> <>New. Tender. Sometimes confusing. But also... aligned. Like the body stops resisting itself.<>
<>It doesn’t look like much. Just liquid. Just light.<>
<>And yet in it is a world waiting to shape itself around you. A foundation not borrowed from your past but crafted for your future.<>
<>I always thought this moment would feel violent. But it doesn’t. It feels... quiet.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_3_crotch_2_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 嶄新。脆弱。有時令人困惑。但也……契合。就像身體不再抗拒自身。

mc: 它看起來沒什麼特別。只是液體。只是光。

thalara: 然而其中蘊含著一個世界，正等待著環繞你成形。一個並非從過去借來，而是為你未來打造的根基。

mc: 我總以為這一刻會感覺很劇烈。但並沒有。感覺……很平靜。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_2_4
passages.content:
<> <>The loudest changes happen in silence. The earth shifts beneath roots before the flower ever blooms.<>
<>There’s an ache. Not sharp, but deep. Like something’s opening, or reaching…<>
<>That’s because it is. Your body is listening to a new song now. One it hasn’t heard before, but somehow remembers.<>
<>I don’t know what I’m becoming. But I know I’m not who I was.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_3_crotch_2_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 最劇烈的變化總在寂靜中發生。大地在根鬚之下移動，花朵才會綻放。

mc: 有一種痛。不尖銳，但深沉。像是有什麼正在打開，或是延伸……

thalara: 正是如此。你的身體此刻正在聆聽一首新的歌。一首它從未聽過，卻又莫名記得的歌。

mc: 我不知道我正在變成什麼。但我知道我已不是過去的我。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_2_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then you’re on the right path. This form the one beginning to take shape it isn’t a mask. It’s yours. Not inherited, not imposed. Chosen.<>
<>What if I don’t know how to live in it yet?<>
<>Then we’ll teach it together. And in time, you’ll stop noticing where you end and your truth begins.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼你就在正確的道路上。這個開始成形的形體，它不是面具。它是你的。不是繼承而來，不是強加於你。是你選擇的。

mc: 如果我還不知道該如何以這個形體生活呢？

thalara: 那我們就一起教會它。時日一久，你將不再察覺你於何處終結，而你的真實又於何處開始。
[我感覺到藥水在我胯下起作用]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_4
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve been at the edge… and I need to step back. Just one step.|crotch_3_crotch_4_1]] |

[[This feels like turning the tide. I don’t know if it’s right|crotch_3_crotch_4_1]] |

[[Maybe I was wrong to let it go completely.|crotch_3_crotch_4_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我曾站在邊緣……而我需要退後一步。就一步。] |
[這感覺像是扭轉潮流。我不知道這是否正確] |
[也許我讓它完全消失是錯的。] |

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_4_1
passages.content:
<> <>You return to reclaim something. A fragment. A feeling. That is not weakness it is awareness.<>
<>It's not about reclaiming pride, or power. Not entirely. It's about feeling whole again even if that wholeness means reaching backward.<>
<>Then do so mindfully. Do not grasp from fear. Let it be a hand extended to your past self, not a rejection of the woman you are becoming.<>
<>When I passed through that last threshold… I thought I’d feel complete. Instead, I felt… erased. Like my foundation had vanished, and nothing had replaced it yet.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_3_crotch_4_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你回來是為了取回某物。一個碎片。一種感覺。這不是軟弱，這是覺知。

mc: 這不全然是為了取回驕傲，或力量。是為了再次感到完整，即使那份完整意味著向後觸及過往。

thalara: 那麼就帶著覺知去做。不要出於恐懼而緊抓。讓它成為向你過往自我伸出的一隻手，而非對你正在成為的女性的拒絕。

mc: 當我跨過最後那道門檻時……我以為我會感到完整。相反，我感到……被抹去。就像我的根基消失了，而尚未有任何東西取代它。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_4_2
passages.content:
<> <>Even nature doesn’t skip the dawn. The light returns slowly, one hue at a time. What you lost was not wrong to surrender. But regrowth can be part of the truth too.<>
<>So this doesn’t undo the path. It just… breathes into it again.<>
<>Exactly. The form you shape is not a verdict. It is a living sculpture, always evolving. You’ve earned the right to change forward or back.<>
<>I won’t lie. Part of me feels ashamed. Like I’m not brave enough to finish the journey.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_3_crotch_4_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 即使是自然也不會跳過黎明。光線緩慢回歸，一次一種色調。你所失去的，當初放棄並非錯誤。但重新生長也可以是真實的一部分。

mc: 所以這並不會抹去這條路徑。它只是……再次為它注入氣息。

thalara: 正是如此。你所塑造的形體不是判決。它是一座活的雕塑，總在演變。你已贏得向前或向後改變的權利。

mc: 我不會說謊。我的一部分感到羞愧。好像我不夠勇敢去完成這段旅程。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_4_3
passages.content:
<> <>Shame is a shadow of others' expectations. You are not reversing you're realigning. Sometimes, the soul whispers for balance. And balance may not look like anyone else’s ending.<>
<>It’s strange. I thought it would feel like stepping away from myself. But it feels like… I’m stepping toward something I still care about.<>
<>Then it was the right choice. Sometimes the tiniest part holds the deepest root.<>
<>Will I have to explain this? Defend it?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_3_crotch_4_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 羞愧是他人期待的陰影。你不是在逆轉，你是在重新調整。有時，靈魂低語著尋求平衡。而平衡，可能看起來不像任何其他人的結局。

mc: 很奇怪。我以為這會感覺像是遠離我自己。但感覺像是……我正走向我仍然在乎的某樣東西。

thalara: 那麼這就是正確的選擇。有時最微小的部分，卻連著最深的根。

mc: 我需要解釋這個嗎？為它辯護嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_3_crotch_4_4
passages.content:
<> <>Only to those who confuse transition with surrender. And you, my prince my queen in bloom owe them no clarity but your own.<>
<>I’m beginning to understand… this journey doesn’t move in a straight line.<>
<>No. It spirals. And in that spiral, you are always arriving. Always becoming.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 只需要向那些將轉變與投降混為一談的人解釋。而你，我的王子——我含苞待放的女王——你只欠他們你自己的清晰，而非他們的。

mc: 我開始明白了……這段旅程並非直線前進。

thalara: 是的。它是螺旋前進。而在那螺旋之中，你總是在抵達。總是在成為。
[我感覺到藥水在我胯下起作用]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_3
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This one matters, doesn’t it? Let’s finish what we started.|crotch_4_crotch_3_1]] |

[[This is harder than I expected. I don’t know if I’m ready… but I came.|crotch_4_crotch_3_1]] |

[[You’re going to say it’s ‘necessary.’ I’m not sure I believe you anymore.|crotch_4_crotch_3_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[這一次很重要，對吧？讓我們完成我們開始的事。] |
[這比我想像的更難。我不知道我是否準備好了……但我來了。] |
[你會說這是「必要的」。我不確定我還相不相信你了。] |

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_3_1
passages.content:
<> <>I won’t offer hollow comforts, Caelan. Not today. This session… is quiet. But not simple.<>
<>I thought I’d feel triumphant. Lighter. But instead, I feel like I’m watching myself disappear one breath at a time.<>
<>You are not disappearing. You are distilling. When water becomes mist, it doesn’t lose itself it rises.<>
<>Then why does each step feel like grief? Like I’m mourning something… even as I choose to let it go?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_4_crotch_3_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我不會提供空洞的安慰，Caelan。今天不會。這次療程……很安靜。但並不簡單。

mc: 我以為我會感到勝利。更輕盈。但相反，我覺得我正看著自己一次呼吸接著一次呼吸地消失。

thalara: 你沒有在消失。你正在提煉。當水化為霧氣，它並未失去自己，它升騰了。

mc: 那為什麼每一步都感覺像哀傷？就像我在哀悼著什麼……即使我選擇放手？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_3_2
passages.content:
<> <>Because part of you is grieving. Not for what’s lost, but for how it once defined you. This final trace of manhood… it has echoed in your posture, your fear, your pride. And now, it will become silence.<>
<>And after that silence? What am I?<>
<>You are what you decide to become. This potion clears the canvas. What you paint next is yours alone. The body will no longer speak in old symbols. The world may try but you will define what your shape means.<>
<>It’s so small now… barely even real. I used to think it meant strength. Manhood. All those old things I clung to.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_4_crotch_3_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為你的一部分正在哀悼。不是為了失去的東西，而是為了它曾經如何定義你。這最後一絲男性特徵……它一直在你的姿態、你的恐懼、你的驕傲中迴響。而現在，它將歸於寂靜。

mc: 在那寂靜之後呢？我是什麼？

thalara: 你將成為你決定要成為的樣子。這藥水清空了畫布。接下來要畫什麼，全由你自己決定。身體將不再用舊的符號說話。世界或許會嘗試定義，但你將決定自己形體的意義。

mc: 它現在好小……幾乎不真實了。我曾以為它代表力量。男子氣概。所有那些我曾緊抓不放的舊事物。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_3_3
passages.content:
<> <>And now?<>
<>Now it just feels like… a leftover. Something that doesn’t belong in the life I’m trying to live.<>
<>Then let it go with purpose. Don’t let it shrink from shame let it recede with dignity. You are not shedding failure. You are rising into power shaped for you.<>
<>That’s it, then. The last thread.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_4_crotch_3_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 現在呢？

mc: 現在它只感覺像……一個殘留物。一個不屬於我試圖過的生活的東西。

thalara: 那麼，就帶著目的放開它。不要讓它因羞愧而萎縮，讓它帶著尊嚴退去。你並非在擺脫失敗。你正在升入為你量身打造的力量之中。

mc: 就這樣了，那麼。最後一根線。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_3_4
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. What remains now is a body that listens for what you wish to become. The masculine root has been softened to its edge. The womb of possibility lies ahead.<>
<>It’s strange… I expected to feel emptier. But I think I feel lighter instead.<>
<>You’ve carried more than flesh, Caelan. Expectations, pride, fear. Now, there’s space for truth. The form that once declared ‘who you had to be’ no longer shouts over who you choose to be.<>
<>I’m not a queen yet. But I’m something closer than I was yesterday.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_4_crotch_3_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。現在剩下的，是一個傾聽你渴望成為何種樣貌的身體。男性的根源已被軟化至邊緣。可能性的子宮就在前方。

mc: 真奇怪……我以為會感覺更空虛。但我想我反而感覺更輕盈了。

thalara: 你背負的不只是血肉，Caelan。還有期望、驕傲、恐懼。現在，有空間容納真實了。那個曾經宣告「你必須是誰」的形體，不再能壓過你選擇成為誰的聲音。

mc: 我還不是女王。但我比昨天更接近了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_3_5
passages.content:
<> <>And every step you take, no matter how small, is a coronation of your becoming.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而你踏出的每一步，無論多麼微小，都是你成為之路上的一次加冕。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_5
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m not reversing everything. I just need to breathe again to feel more like me.|crotch_4_crotch_5_1]] |

[[I’m not even sure what I want anymore. But I know I can’t keep moving forward on empty.|crotch_4_crotch_5_1]] |

[[This was supposed to be my transformation. Not erasure.|crotch_4_crotch_5_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我並非要逆轉一切。我只是需要再次呼吸，感覺更像我自己。] |
[我甚至不確定自己想要什麼了。但我知道我不能一直空虛地前進。] |
[這本應是我的轉變，而非抹除。] |

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_5_1
passages.content:
<> <>The sky doesn’t punish the moon for waxing after it wanes. Why should you feel guilt for returning to fullness?<>
<>It’s not guilt. Not exactly. It’s… fear. That I’ve come too far to turn back. That going back is weakness.<>
<>No. Weakness would be to keep shrinking when your spirit is crying out to expand.<>
<>When I left after the last session, I told myself the reduction was necessary. A step toward something greater. But I keep waking up with silence where there used to be presence. It's not right. Not yet.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_4_crotch_5_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 天空不會因月亮虧缺後又盈滿而懲罰它。你為何要為恢復充盈而感到內疚？

mc: 不是內疚。不完全是。是……恐懼。害怕我已經走得太遠，無法回頭。害怕回頭是軟弱。

thalara: 不。軟弱是在你的靈魂哭喊著要擴張時，卻繼續萎縮。

mc: 上次療程結束離開時，我告訴自己這種縮減是必要的。是邁向更偉大事物的一步。但我總在醒來時，發現曾經存在的地方只剩寂靜。這不對勁。還不對。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_5_2
passages.content:
<> <>This dose won’t make you what you once were. But it will return some of what was lost. Not in defiance of your journey but in service to it.<>
<>So this isn’t a failure?<>
<>Correction is not failure. Rebalancing is not betrayal. You are sculpting a self, not tracing a blueprint.<>
<>I’ve tried to honor this path, truly. But I can’t rule or lead if I feel fragmented.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_4_crotch_5_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這一劑不會讓你變回過去的樣子。但它會歸還一些失去的東西。這並非對你旅程的否定，而是為它服務。

mc: 所以這不是失敗？

thalara: 修正不是失敗。重新平衡不是背叛。你是在雕塑自我，而非臨摹藍圖。

mc: 我試圖誠心尊重這條路，真的。但如果我感到支離破碎，我就無法統治或領導。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_5_3
passages.content:
<> <>And so, you honor yourself by reclaiming what you need. This body is yours. The throne will not judge your proportions.<>
<>That’s it? No tugging, no ache? Just... calm?<>
<>Not all returns must come with violence. Sometimes, regrowth is quiet.<>
<>Will I have to explain this? To the court? To my mother?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_4_crotch_5_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因此，你透過取回所需來尊重自己。這身體是你的。王座不會評判你的比例。

mc: 就這樣？沒有拉扯，沒有疼痛？只是……平靜？

thalara: 並非所有歸來都必須伴隨暴力。有時，再生是靜默的。

mc: 我需要解釋這一切嗎？向宮廷？向我母親？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_4_crotch_5_4
passages.content:
<> <>If they ask, tell them the truth: that you chose clarity over pride, wholeness over silence.<>
<>That’s a queen’s answer.<>
<>Then perhaps you’re already becoming one on your own terms.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 如果他們問起，就告訴他們真相：你選擇了清晰而非驕傲，完整而非寂靜。

mc: 這是女王的回答。

thalara: 那麼，或許你已經在以自己的方式成為女王了。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_4
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This one… it’s close to the end, isn’t it? Let’s see it through.|crotch_5_crotch_4_1]] |

[[There’s barely anything left of what I used to be. But I’m still not sure what I’m becoming.|crotch_5_crotch_4_1]] |

[[So, another piece of me goes today? I hope whatever’s left is enough to be heard.|crotch_5_crotch_4_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[這一劑……接近終點了，對吧？讓我們走完它。] |
[我過去的樣貌幾乎不剩什麼了。但我仍不確定我正在成為什麼。] |
[所以，今天又有一部分的我將離去？我希望剩下的部分足以被聽見。] |

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_4_1
passages.content:
<> <>You came without summons. That tells me you’ve been thinking.<>
<>Hard not to think when the changes echo louder than my heartbeat.<>
<>This session is delicate. What remains now is slight yet stubborn. The tiniest stone can still anchor a mountain.<>
<>Then I suppose I’m down to the pebble that used to be a tower.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_5_crotch_4_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你未經召喚而來。這告訴我你一直在思考。

mc: 當改變的迴響比我的心跳還大聲時，很難不去思考。

thalara: 這次療程很微妙。現在剩下的部分雖小卻頑固。最微小的石頭仍能錨定一座山。

mc: 那麼我想，我現在只剩下那曾經是座塔的卵石了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_4_2
passages.content:
<> <>You’re not broken, Caelan. You’re reshaping. This piece this sliver is only a symbol. One you may let go of, or hold onto longer. But today’s dose will begin the final tapering.<>
<>It used to be the center of everything. Pride. Power. Even shame. And now… it’s barely a whisper of who I was.<>
<>And still, you’re here. Still speaking. Still you. You’ve proven, over and over, that identity isn’t pinned to flesh.<>
<>Try convincing my reflection of that.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_5_crotch_4_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你沒有破碎，Caelan。你正在重塑。這塊碎片、這縷殘片只是一個象徵。一個你可以放手，或再握久一點的象徵。但今天的劑量將開始最後的遞減階段。

mc: 它曾經是一切的核心。驕傲。力量。甚至羞恥。而現在……它幾乎只是我過去的一個微弱回音。

Thalara: 但你依然在這裡。依然在說話。依然是你。你已經一次又一次地證明，身份並不依附於血肉。

mc: 試著說服我的倒影相信這一點吧。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_4_3
passages.content:
<> <>Look again, not just at the body. See what’s emerging behind the eyes. You’ve carried doubt, but also grace. Fragility, but also fire. These mirrors don’t lie.<>
<>I didn’t think it would get this far. I thought maybe I’d stop go halfway, hold the line. But the line keeps moving.<>
<>Transformation is not a road with clear borders. It’s a sea, and you’re building the boat as you cross it. The fact that you still pause, question, feel that’s not weakness. It’s wisdom.<>
<>Is it strange I feel more fear now than I did when it all began?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_5_crotch_4_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 再看一次，不僅僅是看身體。看看那雙眼睛背後正在浮現的東西。你承載著懷疑，但也帶著優雅。脆弱，但也有火焰。這些鏡子不會說謊。

mc: 我沒想過會走到這一步。我以為我也許會在半途停下，守住那條線。但那條線一直在移動。

Thalara: 轉變不是一條邊界清晰的道路。它是一片海洋，而你是一邊渡海一邊造船。你仍然會停頓、質疑、感受，這並非軟弱。那是智慧。

mc: 我現在感到的恐懼比開始時更多，這很奇怪嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_4_4
passages.content:
<> <>Not strange. You’re not afraid of losing what you were you’re afraid of not recognizing what you’ll become. That’s the hardest part.<>
<>I can barely feel anything now. Like it’s fading into dream.<>
<>And soon, the body will no longer need that shape to define its strength. You are not hollowing you are refining.<>
<>Will people still see me as whole?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_5_crotch_4_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 不奇怪。你不是害怕失去過去的自己，而是害怕認不出將來的自己。那才是最難的部分。

mc: 我現在幾乎感覺不到什麼了。就像它正漸漸淡入夢境。

Thalara: 很快，身體將不再需要那個形狀來定義它的力量。你不是在掏空自己，你是在精煉。

mc: 人們還會視我為完整的人嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_4_5
passages.content:
<> <>The ones who matter will see you as more than whole. They will see you as true.<>
<>I don’t know what kind of queen I’ll make… but I’m starting to believe I might still be one.<>
<>That belief is your crown’s foundation. And every session, every step you’ve taken willingly or not has carved space for it to rest.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那些重要的人會視你不僅為完整，他們會視你為真實。

mc: 我不知道我會成為什麼樣的女王……但我開始相信，我或許仍能成為一位女王。

Thalara: 那份信念是你王冠的基石。而每一次療程、你自願或非自願踏出的每一步，都為它鑿出了安放的空間。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_6
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I need to feel a part of myself return. Not all, just… enough.|crotch_5_crotch_6_1]] |

[[I don’t know if this is the right choice. But it’s the only one that feels… mine.|crotch_5_crotch_6_1]] |

[[You said I wouldn’t be trapped. Prove it.|crotch_5_crotch_6_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我需要感覺自己的一部分回歸。不是全部，只是……足夠的部分。] |
[我不知道這是否正確的選擇。但這是唯一感覺……屬於我的選擇。] |
[你說過我不會被束縛。證明給我看。] |

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_6_1
passages.content:
<> <>There is strength in changing course. Even fire knows when to shift direction with the wind.<>
<>Everything I was felt like it burned away in that last session. I walked out of here feeling hollow. Almost… erased.<>
<>Transformation asks much of us. But it should never ask for our soul. If what you lost was too much then this step back is a step toward yourself.<>
<>It’s not about undoing everything. I just… I need to feel solid again. To walk without wondering if something essential has vanished.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_5_crotch_6_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 改變方向也需要力量。即使是火焰也知道何時該隨風轉向。

mc: 上一次療程中，我感覺過去的一切都被燒盡了。我走出這裡時感覺空虛。幾乎……被抹去了。

Thalara: 轉變向我們索求甚多。但它絕不應索求我們的靈魂。如果你失去的太多，那麼這一步退後，便是邁向你自己的一步。

mc: 這不是要抹去一切。我只是……我需要再次感覺踏實。走路時不再懷疑某種本質的東西是否已經消失。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_6_2
passages.content:
<> <>This potion will restore what was reduced. Not to its peak, but to presence. It will return a shape not to defy who you were becoming, but to remind you of who you’ve always been.<>
<>You don’t judge me for this? Wanting some of it back?<>
<>I would only judge you if you stopped listening to yourself. This path you walk is not one-directional. Real becoming is messy, sacred, and entirely yours.<>
<>I thought I was ready to let go. I told myself it was just flesh. But I’ve felt… unbalanced since.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_5_crotch_6_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 這藥水會恢復被削減的部分。不是恢復到巔峰，而是恢復其存在感。它將歸還一個形體，不是為了否定你正在成為的樣子，而是為了提醒你，你始終是誰。

mc: 你不因此評判我嗎？想要回一部分？

Thalara: 我只會在你停止傾聽自己內心時評判你。你走的這條路並非單向。真正的成為是混亂的、神聖的，且完全屬於你自己。

mc: 我以為我準備好放手了。我告訴自己那只是血肉。但從那以後，我一直感到……失衡。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_6_3
passages.content:
