<> <>Then reclaim your balance. Your body is not a symbol of loyalty or rebellion. It is your anchor. If that anchor feels too light, you are allowed to add weight again.<>
<>It feels… right. Like a missing note sliding back into a melody.<>
<>That is your body remembering itself. You gave something up before you were truly ready. Now, you take back only what you need.<>
<>So I’m a patchwork prince-turned-princess now?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_5_crotch_6_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那就取回你的平衡。你的身體不是忠誠或反叛的象徵。它是你的錨。如果那錨感覺太輕，你有權再次增加重量。

mc: 這感覺……對了。就像一個遺失的音符滑回了旋律中。

Thalara: 那是你的身體在憶起自身。你在尚未真正準備好時放棄了一些東西。現在，你只取回你需要的部分。

mc: 所以，我現在是個拼湊而成的、由王子變成的公主了？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_5_crotch_6_4
passages.content:
<> <>You are not patchwork. You are process. You are possibility. No queen is forged in a single mold.<>
<>Thank you… for making this feel like a choice.<>
<>It always was. And it always will be.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你不是拼湊物。你是過程。你是可能性。沒有女王是在單一模具中鑄成的。

mc: 謝謝你……讓這一切感覺像是一個選擇。

Thalara: 它始終是。也永遠會是。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_5
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Another step… closer. I don’t flinch anymore but that doesn’t mean it’s easy.|crotch_6_crotch_5_1]] |

[[I thought by now I’d stop feeling this knot in my chest. But it’s still there… tight.|crotch_6_crotch_5_1]] |

[[What’s left of me now, Thalara? A ghost of a man? Let’s finish the carving, then.|crotch_6_crotch_5_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[又一步……更近了。我不再退縮，但這並不意味著它容易。] |
[我以為到現在，我胸口的這個結會停止存在。但它還在……緊緊的。] |
[現在我還剩下什麼，Thalara？一個男人的幽靈？那麼，讓我們完成這雕刻吧。] |

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_5_1
passages.content:
<> <>There you are. The echoes of your steps were different tonight.<>
<>Each step takes more of me with it.<>
<>Or perhaps, each step brings more of you into view. Like mist parting to reveal the river beneath.<>
<>Are you ever not poetic?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_5_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你在這兒。今晚你腳步的回聲不同了。

mc: 每一步都帶走更多屬於我的部分。

Thalara: 或者，也許每一步都讓更多的你顯現出來。如同迷霧散開，露出底下的河流。

mc: 你就沒有不詩意的時候嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_5_2
passages.content:
<> <>Only when the moment doesn’t deserve it. This one does.<>
<>It’s getting harder to look down. Not from fear. Just… discomfort. There’s almost nothing left of what I knew.<>
<>Yes. This phase is called The Hollowing. The time where space is made not just lost. As your form shrinks, the vessel begins to prepare.<>
<>Very small, huh? Soon it won’t even be worth noticing.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_5_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 只有在那一刻不值得時才如此。但這一刻值得。

mc: 越來越難低頭看了。不是因為恐懼。只是……不適。我所知的那個部分幾乎蕩然無存。

thalara: 是的。這個階段稱為「掏空」。這不僅是失去，更是創造空間的時刻。隨著你的形體縮小，容器開始準備。

mc: 非常小，是吧？很快它甚至不值得注意了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_5_3
passages.content:
<> <>Not to the world, perhaps. But to you? Even a nub can echo with memory. It is not shameful to mourn what you had, even as you reshape what you are.<>
<>You know, when I was younger… I thought my size was my power. That I could charm, control, intimidate, even seduce, just by what I carried between my legs.<>
<>Many believe that. Especially those raised as heirs, warriors, or kings. But true power never rests in flesh. It rests in how you wield yourself.<>
<>I don’t feel like I’m wielding anything anymore.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_5_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 對世界而言或許不是。但對你呢？即使是一個殘端也能迴盪著記憶。為你曾擁有的事物哀悼並不可恥，即使你正在重塑你自身。

mc: 你知道嗎，當我年輕時……我以為我的尺寸就是我的力量。以為憑藉我雙腿之間所攜帶的東西，我就能魅惑、控制、威嚇，甚至誘惑。

thalara: 許多人相信這點。尤其是那些被當作繼承人、戰士或國王養育長大的人。但真正的力量從不駐足於血肉之中。它存在於你如何運用自己。

mc: 我感覺我不再能運用任何東西了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_5_4
passages.content:
<> <>Then rest. Let this moment be what it is: a letting go. You’re not expected to feel triumphant. Not today.<>
<>What if I’m not strong enough to keep letting go?<>
<>Then let me hold the space until you are. You’re not alone in this. You never were.<>
<>It’s strange. I used to look down and feel pride. Now I look down and feel… silence. Like the part of me that used to speak so loudly has gone mute.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_5_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就休息吧。讓這一刻如其本然：一次放手。你不需要感到勝利。不是今天。

mc: 如果我沒有足夠的力量繼續放手呢？

thalara: 那就讓我為你撐住這個空間，直到你準備好。在這條路上你並不孤單。你從不孤單。

mc: 這感覺很奇怪。我曾經低頭看時感到自豪。現在我低頭看，卻感到……寂靜。就像那個曾經高聲喧嘩的部份，如今已沉默無聲。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_5_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then listen to the silence. There’s a new voice emerging beneath it. It hasn’t learned to speak yet but it will.<>
<>It’s… barely there.<>
<>Yes. This stage brings you to the edge. Beyond it, a new path begins. But for now, rest in this in-between.<>
<>It doesn’t even feel like me anymore. Not even the memory of me.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_5_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就聆聽這寂靜。在其之下，有一個新的聲音正在浮現。它尚未學會說話，但它會的。

mc: 它……幾乎不存在。

thalara: 是的。這個階段將你帶到邊緣。越過它，一條新的道路將開始。但現在，請在這過渡之間休息。

mc: 它甚至感覺不再像我了。連我的記憶都不像。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_5_6
passages.content:
<> <>Because a memory is still a kind of shadow. You are light now, not shadow. That means leaving old silhouettes behind.<>
<>What happens if I regret going this far?<>
<>Then we stop. Or we go back. You are never trapped, Caelan. Only transformed. And all transformations are choices, even when they’re made slowly.<>
<>I don’t know if I want to move forward… or run.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_5_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為記憶仍是一種陰影。你現在是光，而非陰影。這意味著要將舊日的輪廓拋在身後。

mc: 如果我後悔走到這麼遠呢？

thalara: 那我們就停止。或者我們回頭。你從未被困住，Caelan。你只是被轉化了。而所有的轉化都是選擇，即使它們是緩慢形成的。

mc: 我不知道我是想前進……還是逃跑。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_5_7
passages.content:
<> <>Then stay still for a while. You don’t have to choose everything tonight.<>
<>Is this what being queen means? Hollowing out until only duty remains?<>
<>No. Being queen means reshaping yourself so that your truth can rule not your fears. That truth doesn’t have to look like anyone else’s.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就靜止一會兒。你不必在今晚決定一切。

mc: 這就是成為女王的意思嗎？掏空自己，直到只剩下責任？

thalara: 不。成為女王意味著重塑自己，讓你的真實而非你的恐懼來統治。那份真實不必看起來像任何其他人的。
[我感覺到藥水在我胯下起作用]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_7
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to feel fuller again. To remember the way it used to be.|crotch_6_crotch_7_1]] |

[[I didn’t think I’d come back here. But… something’s missing. And I need to feel whole again.|crotch_6_crotch_7_1]] |

[[Let’s just get this over with. I’m not here to explain myself.|crotch_6_crotch_7_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想再次感到充實。想記起它曾經的樣子。] |
[我沒想過我會回到這裡。但是……總覺得少了什麼。我需要再次感到完整。] |
[我們就快點完成這件事吧。我不是來這裡解釋自己的。] |

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_7_1
passages.content:
<> <>Time brings many of us back to doors we once closed with certainty.<>
<>Maybe the door wasn’t locked. Just… ignored.<>
<>Or perhaps you always knew where it was. You just needed a reason to open it again.<>
<>It’s not about regret. It’s about... recalibration.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_7_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 時間將我們許多人帶回那些曾經篤定關上的門前。

mc: 也許那扇門並未上鎖。只是……被忽略了。

thalara: 又或者你一直知道它在哪裡。你只是需要一個理由再次打開它。

mc: 這無關後悔。而是關於……重新校準。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_7_2
passages.content:
<> <>A fair word. So many think transformation is linear forward, forward, forward. But even the stars loop back in their sky. You are not retreating. You are realigning.<>
<>When I looked down this morning… and saw what I had left, I didn’t feel proud. I felt… erased. Like part of me had vanished, and I wasn’t sure if I gave permission for that.<>
<>The body sometimes speaks truths our minds haven’t admitted yet. Tell me, Caelan what is it you hope to reclaim with this session?<>
<>Presence. Solidity. I need to feel grounded in myself again. I miss the weight of who I was.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_7_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 一個貼切的詞。許多人以為轉化是線性的前進、前進、再前進。但即使是星辰也在其天空中循環往復。你並非退縮。你是在重新調整。

mc: 今天早上我低頭看時……看到我所剩下的，我並不感到自豪。我感到……被抹去。彷彿我的一部分消失了，而我不確定我是否允許了這件事。

thalara: 身體有時會說出我們內心尚未承認的真相。告訴我，Caelan，你希望通過這次療程重新獲得什麼？

mc: 存在感。堅實感。我需要再次感到立足於自身。我懷念我曾經擁有的那份重量。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_7_3
passages.content:
<> <>Then this blend will serve you. It calls back what was reduced not in defiance of change, but in honor of balance. You will regain size, proportion, and sensation. The body remembers… and welcomes back what once belonged.<>
<>And what if I come to regret it again later?<>
<>Then you return again. You adjust. This journey was never a single path. It is a spiral, and you are allowed to turn.<>
<>You always make it sound so poetic.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_7_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼這劑調合物將為你服務。它召喚回那些被縮減的部分，並非為了抗拒改變，而是為了尊重平衡。你將恢復尺寸、比例和感覺。身體記得……並歡迎曾經屬於它的一切回歸。

mc: 如果我之後又後悔了呢？

thalara: 那你就再回來。你進行調整。這段旅程從來不是單一路徑。它是一個螺旋，而你有權轉彎。

mc: 你總是說得如此詩意。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_7_4
passages.content:
<> <>It is poetic. Every time you choose to listen to your truth, even when it contradicts yesterday’s truth you’re writing a living poem.<>
<>This’ll bring me back to where I was before? Not all the way, just… more?<>
<>Yes. From small to moderate. It will lengthen and thicken your form, enough that it regains prominence. Enough that you feel it again not just as a memory, but as part of your being.<>
<>Alright.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_7_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它本就是詩意的。每一次你選擇聆聽你的真實，即使它與昨日的真實相矛盾，你都在書寫一首活的詩篇。

mc: 這會讓我回到我以前的樣子嗎？不是完全恢復，只是……多一些？

thalara: 是的。從微小到適中。它會延長並增厚你的形體，足以讓它重新獲得顯著性。足以讓你再次感覺到它不僅僅是一個記憶，而是你存在的一部分。

mc: 好吧。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_7_5
passages.content:
<> <>It’s coming back. Gods, I didn’t realize how much I missed this until now…<>
<>And how does it feel? To stand with what you once laid down?<>
<>Strange. Familiar. Like a name I hadn’t spoken in months… but still remember how to write.<>
<>You are not betraying the path by walking backward a step. You are learning its full shape. No crown should demand the sacrifice of selfhood.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_6_crotch_7_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它正在回來。天啊，直到此刻我才意識到我有多麼懷念這個感覺……

thalara: 感覺如何？重新站起你曾經放下的東西？

mc: 陌生。熟悉。像一個數月未曾喚出的名字……卻依然記得如何書寫。

thalara: 你並非因後退一步而背叛了道路。你正在學習它完整的樣貌。沒有任何王冠應要求犧牲自我。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_6_crotch_7_6
passages.content:
<> <>I don’t know what this makes me now. I’m not sure where I’m heading anymore.<>
<>Then allow that unknowing to be your compass. You do not need to rush toward a fixed version of yourself. You only need to walk truthfully.<>
<>Just one step at a time, huh?<>
<>And today, that step brought you back. Tomorrow… it may take you forward again. What matters is that it’s yours.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我不知道這現在讓我成了什麼。我不確定自己將前往何方。

thalara: 那麼，就讓那份未知成為你的指南針吧。你無需急於奔向一個固定的自我版本。你只需要真實地前行。

mc: 就只是一步一步來，是吧？

thalara: 而今天，這一步帶你回來了。明天……它或許會再次帶你向前。重要的是，那是你自己的步伐。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_6
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Strange how I used to dread this, and now it almost feels like… progress.|crotch_7_crotch_6_1]] |

[[I keep thinking this will get easier, but… I’m still not sure how to feel.|crotch_7_crotch_6_1]] |

[[Fine. Another step down. Another chip off the old manhood.|crotch_7_crotch_6_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[Strange how I used to dread this, and now it almost feels like… progress.] |
[I keep thinking this will get easier, but… I’m still not sure how to feel.] |
[Fine. Another step down. Another chip off the old manhood.] |

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_6_1
passages.content:
<> <>You speak as though you’re losing battles, Caelan. But this isn’t war. It’s weathering.<>
<>Then why does each session feel like erosion? Like I’m being worn smooth.<>
<>Because smoothing isn’t erasure. It’s refinement. You aren’t being erased. You’re being reshaped.<>
<>This one feels… different already. I can tell.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_6_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你說得好像你在節節敗退，Caelan。但這不是戰爭。這是風化。

mc: 那為何每一次療程都感覺像侵蝕？彷彿我被磨得光滑。

thalara: 因為打磨並非抹除。它是精煉。你沒有被抹去。你正在被重塑。

mc: 這一次感覺……已經不一樣了。我能察覺到。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_6_2
passages.content:
<> <>It is. Today’s blend carries lighter properties gentler agents but deeper reach. It draws in, tucks close. This isn’t about power anymore. It’s about presence.<>
<>Presence. That’s one word for it. I used to walk into a room and know I owned the space. Even if I said nothing. That part of me did the talking.<>
<>And now?<>
<>Now I feel like the room is looking through me, not at me. And I hate that it matters this much.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_6_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 確實如此。今日的配方具有更輕盈的特性、更溫和的成分，但滲透更深。它向內收攏，貼近隱藏。這不再是關於力量了。而是關於存在感。

mc: 存在感。這說法真妙。我曾能走進一個房間，就知道我主宰了那個空間。即使我什麼也不說。我身上的那個部分會替我發言。

thalara: 那現在呢？

mc: 現在我覺得房間是穿透我在看，而不是看著我。而我痛恨這對我如此重要。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_6_3
passages.content:
<> <>Most things we grieve aren’t what they are but what they meant. You’re not grieving inches. You’re grieving attention. Assertion. Identity.<>
<>Isn’t that what I was? Am?<>
<>You were bold. Loud. Proud. And those things can remain even when the instrument that sang them grows quieter.<>
<>That’s poetic. But let’s not pretend that a small cock commands the same reverence a big one does. There’s no poetry in shrinkage.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_6_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我們所哀悼的大多數事物，並非其本身，而是它們所代表的意義。你哀悼的不是尺寸。你哀悼的是關注、是主張、是身份認同。

mc: 那不就是我嗎？曾經是？現在還是嗎？

thalara: 你曾是勇敢的、響亮的、驕傲的。而這些特質，即使在那個曾高歌它們的樂器逐漸沉寂時，依然可以留存。

mc: 這很詩意。但我們別假裝一根小陰莖能博得和大陰莖同等的敬畏。縮小之中沒有詩意。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_6_4
passages.content:
<> <>No. But there is poetry in humility. In transformation. In choosing to walk forward even when what made you bold begins to fall away.<>
<>Maybe it’s not falling away. Maybe it’s being peeled away.<>
<>Then take this, and peel. Shed. Discover what lies underneath the armor of flesh.<>
<>I used to be able to wrap my hand around it and feel… powerful. Now? It’s barely there.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_6_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是沒有。但詩意存在於謙遜之中。存在於轉變之中。存在於即使讓你勇敢的東西開始剝落，仍選擇向前邁進。

mc: 也許不是剝落。也許是被剝除。

thalara: 那麼就服下這個，去剝除吧。蛻變。去發現血肉鎧甲之下潛藏著什麼。

mc: 我曾經能用手握住它，感覺……充滿力量。現在？它幾乎不存在了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_6_5
passages.content:
<> <>And yet, you are still here. That’s the power that matters. This this is simply form. You are spirit. Will. Future.<>
<>It looks… fragile. I feel fragile.<>
<>Not fragile. Vulnerable. There’s a difference. Vulnerability is where strength is born not hidden behind size, but revealed in truth.<>
<>I don’t know if I’ll ever get used to seeing less of myself.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_6_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 然而，你依然在這裡。那才是真正重要的力量。這個，這只是形式。你是靈魂、是意志、是未來。

mc: 它看起來……很脆弱。我覺得自己很脆弱。

thalara: 不是脆弱。是易感。這其中有區別。易感是力量誕生之處，不是隱藏在尺寸之後，而是在真實中顯露。

mc: 我不知道我是否能習慣看到更少的自己。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_6_6
passages.content:
<> <>Maybe you’re not seeing less. Maybe you’re seeing what was always underneath waiting to matter.<>
<>What if I miss it later? Miss how it felt to take up space?<>
<>Then remember it with gratitude. But do not chase shadows of your former self. You are not fading. You’re evolving.<>
<>It’s strange. I feel a bit more me… and a bit less me. Like two threads pulling in different directions.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_6_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 或許你看到的並非更少。或許你看到的是一直潛藏在下、等待變得重要的東西。

mc: 如果我以後想念它呢？想念那種佔據空間的感覺？

thalara: 那就懷著感激記住它。但別追逐過往自我的幻影。你並非在消逝。你正在進化。

mc: 這很奇怪。我覺得更像自己一點……也更不像自己一點。像兩股線朝不同方向拉扯。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_6_7
passages.content:
<> <>Then braid them. Make them part of the same tapestry. You were never meant to be one thing forever.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就將它們編織在一起。讓它們成為同一幅織錦的一部分。你從不該永遠只是單一的模樣。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_8
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m not hiding from what I want anymore. Let’s bring it back.|crotch_7_crotch_8_1]] |

[[This might be a mistake… but I need to feel myself again.|crotch_7_crotch_8_1]] |

[[Let them whisper. Let them stare. I won’t disappear just to make them comfortable.|crotch_7_crotch_8_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[I’m not hiding from what I want anymore. Let’s bring it back.] |
[This might be a mistake… but I need to feel myself again.] |
[Let them whisper. Let them stare. I won’t disappear just to make them comfortable.] |

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_8_1
passages.content:
<> <>So. You wish to rise again.<>
<>Let’s not dress it in mystery. You know why I’m here.<>
<>I know many reasons you could be here. Not all of them will serve you.<>
<>I thought letting go was what I wanted. That if I shrank enough, I’d finally fit the mold they made for me.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_8_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 所以。你希望再次崛起。

mc: 別故弄玄虛了。你知道我為何而來。

thalara: 我知道你來此可能有許多原因。並非所有原因都對你有益。

mc: 我曾以為放手是我想要的。以為只要我縮得夠小，最終就能符合他們為我打造的模子。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_8_2
passages.content:
<> <>And you found emptiness in that absence?<>
<>I found silence. Not peace. And silence… silence hurts.<>
<>The quiet after a storm can seem like mourning, especially if the storm defined you.<>
<>Call it what you will. But I miss the presence. The command. That part of me felt like an anchor. And now I feel like I’m floating… fading.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_8_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而在那份空缺中，你找到了空虛？

mc: 我找到了寂靜。不是平靜。而寂靜……寂靜會傷人。

thalara: 風暴後的寧靜可能像一場哀悼，尤其當那場風暴曾定義了你。

mc: 隨你怎麼稱呼。但我懷念那份存在感。那份掌控感。那部分的我曾像一個錨。而現在我覺得自己像在漂浮……逐漸淡去。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_8_3
passages.content:
<> <>Are you sure you aren’t simply afraid of being seen differently? That what’s inside won’t be taken as seriously without what once stood outside?<>
<>I’m afraid of not recognizing myself in the mirror. And I’m tired of pretending that doesn’t matter.<>
<>There is no shame in reclaiming what once gave you strength. But if you’re only doing this to resist your path, it will not hold. This must be your choice, not your rebellion.<>
<>It is. I need this not to prove a point. To remember that I can still take up space.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_8_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你確定你不是單純害怕被以不同的眼光看待嗎？害怕沒有了曾經外在的形體，內在的東西就不會被認真對待？

mc: 我害怕在鏡中認不出自己。我也厭倦了假裝這不重要。

thalara: 重新取回曾賦予你力量的東西並不可恥。但如果你這麼做只是為了抗拒你的道路，那將無法持久。這必須是你的選擇，而非你的反叛。

mc: 是的。我需要這個，不是為了證明什麼。而是為了記住我依然可以佔據空間。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_8_4
passages.content:
<> <>Then know this: What grows back will feel… heavier than before. Not just in size, but in consequence. This is not a denial of the feminine path but a re-centering of your own narrative.<>
<>Then let me feel that weight again.<>
<>This blend reignites what was reduced. It stirs dormant essence. You’ll feel blood thrum with returning force. Girth and length will stretch again your body recalling its former shape, with renewed vigor. It may ache. That is memory taking root.<>
<>Let it ache. At least I’ll feel real.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_8_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼記住：重新長回來的東西，感覺會……比以前更沉重。不僅是尺寸，更是其帶來的後果。這並非否定女性之路，而是重新將你自己的敘事置於中心。

mc: 那就讓我再次感受那份重量吧。

thalara: 這混合劑將重燃被削減的部分。它將攪動沉睡的精髓。你會感到血液隨著力量回歸而奔騰。粗壯與長度將再次伸展，你的身體會以煥新的活力憶起它昔日的形態。可能會伴隨疼痛。那是記憶正在扎根。

mc: 讓它痛吧。至少我會感覺真實。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_8_5
passages.content:
<> <>Gods… it’s back. It’s really back.<>
<>And does it still define you? Or simply remind you?<>
<>It reminds me I’m not gone. That I still have weight. That when I speak, I don’t have to wonder if they’re looking past me.<>
<>And when you walk forward… will it be in resistance, or in awareness?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_7_crotch_8_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 諸神啊……它回來了。真的回來了。

thalara: 那麼，它依然定義著你嗎？還是僅僅提醒著你？

mc: 它提醒我，我並未消失。我仍有份量。當我說話時，我不必再懷疑他們是否視而不見。

thalara: 而當你向前邁步時……會是出於抗拒，還是出於覺知？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_7_crotch_8_6
passages.content:
<> <>In awareness. I’m not abandoning the journey. I’m just… taking a firmer step.<>
<>Then let it hold you. But know this: the more you reclaim, the more carefully you must ask why. This form carries old habits. Old privileges. Use them wisely or let them go, when the time is right.<>
<>I will. But for now… this is what I need.<>
<>Then walk as you are, Prince. And let no crown past or future dictate the shape of your truth.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 出於覺知。我並非放棄這趟旅程。我只是……踏出更堅實的一步。

thalara: 那就讓它支撐你吧。但要明白：你取回得越多，就必須越仔細地詢問原因。這副形態承載著舊習性。舊有的特權。明智地運用它們，或在時機成熟時將其放下。

mc: 我會的。但現在……這是我所需要的。

thalara: 那麼就以你此刻的模樣前行吧，王子。讓無論過去或未來的任何冠冕，都無法定義你真實的形狀。
[我感到藥劑在我胯下起作用]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_7
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m starting to understand why each session feels heavier than the last.|crotch_8_crotch_7_1]] |

[[Every time it changes, I feel a little less certain.|crotch_8_crotch_7_1]] |

[[Let’s just get this over with. I'm done pretending this isn’t absurd.|crotch_8_crotch_7_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我開始明白為何每次療程感覺都比上一次更沉重。] |
[每次它改變，我都感到更不確定一點。] |
[我們直接開始吧。我受夠了假裝這一切不荒謬。] |

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_7_1
passages.content:
<> <>Absurd or not, you returned. That’s the only part that matters today.<>
<>I suppose I did.<>
<>This session marks a turning. You won’t feel the pull of visibility the same way after this. Not the way you used to.<>
<>So I go from ‘very large’ to just… ‘large.’ Imposing to impressive. Not sure that counts as transformation.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_7_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 無論荒謬與否，你回來了。這才是今天唯一重要的事。

mc: 我想是的。

thalara: 這次療程標誌著一個轉折。此後，你將不會再以同樣的方式感受到「被看見」的引力。不會像過去那樣。

mc: 所以我從「非常巨大」變成只是……「巨大」。從懾人變成引人注目。不確定這算不算轉變。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_7_2
passages.content:
<> <>But it does. Monument to landmark. The difference between casting a shadow and standing tall. This is where size begins to lose its power and identity starts to take its place.<>
<>Funny. When I was younger, that size was power. Boys envied it. Lovers praised it. I thought it made me unshakable.<>
<>And yet here you are. Choosing to let it go.<>
<>Not because I want to be lesser. But because I need to be more than just that. I just… don’t know what comes next.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_7_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 但這確實是。從紀念碑變成地標。從投下陰影到昂然挺立的差別。這是尺寸開始失去其力量，而身份開始取而代之的時刻。

mc: 有趣。當我年輕時，那尺寸就是力量。男孩們羨慕它。情人們讚美它。我曾以為它讓我不可動搖。

thalara: 然而你卻在這裡。選擇放手。

mc: 不是因為我想變得不那麼重要。而是因為我需要成為不只是那樣的存在。我只是……不知道接下來是什麼。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_7_3
passages.content:
<> <>What comes next is understanding you are not reduced you are refined. Power does not vanish. It merely shifts.<>
<>There’s still a sting, you know. Watching it shrink. Feeling the ache after. Like part of me is resisting like it knows it's being rewritten.<>
<>That ache is not pain. It’s memory unraveling. Muscles remembering their shape, nerves recalibrating. A farewell whispered by the flesh.<>
<>And what if I miss it? What if I don’t feel whole without that… that dominance?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_7_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 接下來是去理解你並非被削減，而是被精煉。力量並未消失。它只是轉移了。

mc: 你知道嗎，看著它縮小，依然有種刺痛感。事後感覺到的那種疼痛。彷彿我的一部分在抵抗，彷彿它知道自己在被改寫。

thalara: 那種疼痛並非痛苦。那是記憶正在鬆解。肌肉在回憶它們的形狀，神經在重新校準。是肉體輕聲訴說的告別。

mc: 但如果我懷念它呢？如果沒有那種……那種支配感，我覺得自己不完整呢？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_7_4
passages.content:
<> <>Then mourn it. Respect it. But do not worship it. You are not the weight between your legs. You are the will behind your choices.<>
<>It’s not gone. But it’s… quieter. Less boastful.<>
<>And does that frighten you?<>
<>Maybe. Or maybe I’m just afraid I liked being loud.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_7_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就哀悼它。尊重它。但不要崇拜它。你並非你雙腿之間的重量。你是你選擇背後的意志。

mc: 它沒有消失。但它……更安靜了。不那麼張揚了。

thalara: 這讓你害怕嗎？

mc: 也許吧。或者也許我只是害怕自己曾經喜歡那麼張揚。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_7_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then learn to speak in different volumes. The crown will not care about your size. The court will not measure your worth in inches. But you must not silence yourself where it matters.<>
<>You always make it sound noble. Like this is part of some sacred calling.<>
<>It is, Caelan. Not just for Velmoria. For you. To become who you were meant to be, not who your body once declared you were.<>
<>Still feels strange. How something I once guarded like treasure now slips away without a fight.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_7_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那就學會用不同的音量說話。王冠不會在乎你的尺寸。宮廷不會用英寸衡量你的價值。但你不能在重要時刻噤聲。

mc: 你總是說得如此高尚。彷彿這是某種神聖使命的一部分。

Thalara: 確實如此，Caelan。不僅僅是為了Velmoria。也是為了你。為了成為你注定要成為的人，而不是你的身體曾經宣稱的那個你。

mc: 還是感覺很奇怪。曾經我像守護寶藏般守護的東西，如今卻毫不抵抗地悄然消逝。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_7_6
passages.content:
<> <>Because the treasure was never in the size. It was in the meaning you gave it. And meanings evolve.<>
<>Then I suppose I’ll need to find new ones.<>
<>And you will. There are still many sessions to come. And many versions of you waiting to be discovered.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 因為寶藏從來不在尺寸裡。而在你賦予它的意義。而意義是會演變的。

mc: 那麼我想我需要找到新的意義了。

Thalara: 你會找到的。未來還有許多療程。還有許多個你，等待被發現。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_9
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This time, I won’t question it. I want more of myself back.|crotch_8_crotch_9_1]] |

[[I can’t tell if this is a retreat or a pause. But I… I need to feel it again.|crotch_8_crotch_9_1]] |

[[I’m done pretending this doesn't matter. If they want me small, they can deal with this.|crotch_8_crotch_9_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已經調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[這次，我不會再質疑。我想要找回更多過去的自己。] |
[我分不清這是退縮還是暫停。但我…我需要再次感受它。] |
[我受夠了假裝這不重要。如果他們要我變小，那就讓他們面對這個。] |

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_9_1
passages.content:
<> <>The balance tilts again, I see. You return not as the same man who left this room before.<>
<>I haven’t been the same for a while, Thalara.<>
<>No one ever is. Every transformation, forward or back, leaves a mark. Even reversals echo louder than we expect.<>
<>This one… it puts me back into something more visible. Heavier. Sharper in the world’s eyes.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_9_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 我看見天平再次傾斜了。你歸來時，已非離開此室的那個男人。

mc: 我已經不是同一個人有一段時間了，Thalara。

Thalara: 從來沒有人是。每一次轉變，無論前進或後退，都會留下印記。即使是逆轉，其迴響也比我們預期的更響亮。

mc: 這一次…它讓我回歸到某種更顯眼、更沉重、在世人的眼中更銳利的狀態。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_9_2
passages.content:
<> <>You’ll notice it more than they do. But yes this grants you volume again. Command. The kind that doesn't ask for space it takes it.<>
<>I thought I was getting used to it… being lighter. Less there. But after that last session... it was like part of me went silent.<>
<>And now you want the noise back?<>
<>No. Not noise. I want a presence I recognize. Something I can feel without questioning if it’s still mine.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_9_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你會比他們更注意到它。但沒錯，這將再次賦予你份量。威嚴。那種不請求空間，而是直接佔據空間的氣勢。

mc: 我以為我正在習慣…變得更輕盈。存在感更低。但經過上次療程後…彷彿我的一部分陷入了沉寂。

Thalara: 而現在你想要那喧囂回來？

mc: 不。不是喧囂。我想要一種我能認可的存在感。一種我能感受到，而無需質疑它是否仍屬於我的東西。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_9_3
passages.content:
<> <>This session won’t bring back the full flame. But the heat will rise again. You’ll feel the pull. The heft. The press of something undeniably male returning.<>
<>I remember when I thought I’d never want to feel that again. But I miss it. Even if I still want to change… I need to pause in something familiar.<>
<>There is no shame in reclaiming a shape you once trusted. Growth isn’t always forward. Sometimes, we grow roots before we bloom.<>
<>What if I’m just being selfish? Undoing what others sacrificed so much to build?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_9_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 這次療程不會帶回完整的火焰。但熱度會再次上升。你會感受到那股牽引、那份沉重、某種無可否認的男性特質回歸時的壓迫感。

mc: 我記得我曾以為自己再也不想感受那些了。但我懷念它。即使我仍想改變…我也需要在熟悉的狀態中暫停一下。

Thalara: 重新擁抱你曾經信賴的形體，並不可恥。成長並非總是向前。有時，我們在綻放前先紮根。

mc: 萬一我只是自私呢？毀掉他人付出那麼多才建立起來的東西？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_9_4
passages.content:
<> <>Then good. Be selfish. Let your body be yours before it belongs to titles, crowns, or counsel. Let no one steal your becoming not even for noble reasons.<>
<>I’m not ready to let it all go. Not yet.<>
<>Then don’t. Take what you need to remember your center. Even if it swells you back into old shapes. What matters is that you decide the rhythm.<>
<>What should I expect?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_8_crotch_9_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那很好。就自私吧。讓你的身體先屬於你自己，再屬於頭銜、王冠或議會。不要讓任何人竊取你成為的過程，即便是以高尚的理由。

mc: 我還沒準備好完全放手。還不行。

Thalara: 那就別放。取回你所需，以記住你的核心。即使它會讓你膨脹回舊日的形狀。重要的是，節奏由你決定。

mc: 我該預期什麼？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_8_crotch_9_5
passages.content:
<> <>A deep rush. Tissue awakening. Expansion that comes with heat. You’ll feel full again weight redistributes, veins pulse wider, and sensitivity sharpens. It is not painful… but it will not be quiet.<>
<>Good. Let it roar a little.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 一股深沉的衝擊。組織甦醒。伴隨著熱度的擴張。你會再次感到充盈，重量重新分佈，血管搏動得更寬闊，敏感度變得尖銳。這並不痛苦…但也不會靜默無聲。

mc: 很好。讓它咆哮一下吧。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_8
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I think I’m ready for this one. Less fire this time. More quiet.|crotch_9_crotch_8_1]] |

[[It’s starting to feel too real… and I’m not sure I know what that means anymore.|crotch_9_crotch_8_1]] |

[[Still think this is ridiculous. But I’m here. Let’s do it.|crotch_9_crotch_8_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已經調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想我準備好進行這次了。這次少點火焰。多點靜默。] |
[這開始感覺太真實了…而我不確定自己是否還明白那意味著什麼。] |
[還是覺得這很荒謬。但我人在這裡。開始吧。] |

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_8_1
passages.content:
<> <>You walked lighter today. Not sure-footed, but quieter. The way someone walks into a temple they don’t believe in... yet still enters.<>
<>I guess it’s getting harder to pretend that this isn’t changing me.<>
<>Because it is. Each measure rebalances the scales inside you. Today’s potion won’t roar. It will whisper.<>
<>Is it strange that I’m almost more afraid of that?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_8_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你今天腳步輕盈了些。並非步履堅定，而是更安靜。就像一個人走進一座他不相信的神殿…卻依然踏入。

mc: 我想，要假裝這沒有改變我，是越來越難了。

Thalara: 因為它確實改變了。每一次測量都在重新平衡你內心的天平。今天的藥水不會咆哮。它會低語。

mc: 我幾乎更害怕那樣，這很奇怪嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_8_2
passages.content:
<> <>No. Dramatic change gives you something to push against. But this… this is subtle. It sinks in, unnoticed. It’s how the deepest parts of identity are rewritten.<>
<>This one brings me… to average, right? Not small. Not imposing. Just… forgettable.<>
<>Neutral. Not invisible. Just no longer the center of everything. A body without dominance, but not without presence.<>
<>You know… growing up, that was the thing. Every bathhouse whisper. Every noble sneer. Every moment I was measured it was by this. And now it’s slipping out of focus.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_8_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 不。劇烈的改變讓你有東西可以對抗。但這個…這個是微妙的。它悄然滲入，不被察覺。最深層的身份認同就是這樣被改寫的。

mc: 這次會讓我…變得普通，對吧？不小。不引人注目。只是…容易被遺忘。

Thalara: 是中性的。並非隱形。只是不再是萬物的中心。一具沒有支配性，但並非沒有存在感的身體。

mc: 你知道嗎…長大過程中，那一直是關鍵。每一次澡堂裡的竊竊私語。每一次貴族的嗤笑。每一次我被衡量，都是以此為標準。而現在，它正逐漸失焦。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_8_3
passages.content:
<> <>That is not loss, Caelan. That is release. Your manhood once declared your arrival in every room before your voice could. But soon, it is your voice that must carry your presence.<>
<>So I’m supposed to just... blend now?<>
<>Not blend. Balance. You are being sculpted not erased. The extremes of masculinity are being worn into neutrality. A center from which you may still lean in either direction.<>
<>I don’t know how I’ll feel afterward. Like something is missing, or like a weight I didn't know I was carrying is gone.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_8_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那不是失去，Caelan。那是釋放。你的男性氣概曾在你開口前，便於每個房間宣告你的到來。但很快地，必須由你的聲音來承載你的存在。

mc: 所以我現在應該要……融入背景嗎？

thalara: 不是融入，是平衡。你正在被雕琢，而非抹除。男性氣質的極端正被磨礪至中性。那是一個中心點，你仍可向任一方向傾斜。

mc: 我不知道事後我會有何感受。像是失去了什麼，又像是一個我從未察覺的重擔消失了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_8_4
passages.content:
<> <>Likely both. You may grieve a little. You may also breathe easier.<>
<>Lovely. Emotional whiplash served warm.<>
<>Change is always a little mad. But there is grace in choosing it.<>
<>You’ve said before this isn’t about becoming less… but it feels like subtraction every time. Inch by inch, until I don’t know what’s left.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_8_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 很可能兩者皆是。你可能會哀悼片刻。你也可能呼吸得更輕鬆。

mc: 真美妙。情緒上的鞭笞還熱騰騰地奉上。

thalara: 改變總是帶點瘋狂。但選擇改變之中自有優雅。

mc: 你說過這不是為了變少……但每次感覺都像在削減。一寸一寸，直到我不知道還剩下什麼。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_8_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then let me ask you this: What part of you cannot be measured?<>
<>My… choices, I guess.<>
<>Exactly. And what you choose today says as much about your strength as any sword you’ve lifted or bed you’ve conquered.<>
<>I’m not sure who I’m becoming, Thalara. Not anymore.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_8_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼讓我問你：你身上的哪一部分是無法被衡量的？

mc: 我的……選擇，我猜。

thalara: 正是如此。而你今日的選擇，與你曾舉起的任何一把劍或征服的任何一張床一樣，都訴說著你的力量。

mc: 我不確定我正在變成誰，Thalara。再也不確定了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_8_6
passages.content:
<> <>Then you are exactly where you need to be.<>
<>It’s smaller after this?<>
<>Yes. Medium. Common. Nothing extraordinary in size but the act of choosing it? That’s rare.<>
<>Cheers to being… statistically average.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_8_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼你正處於你需要的位置上。

mc: 這次之後會變小？

thalara: 是的。中等。普通。尺寸上不再非凡，但選擇這個行為本身？那才是罕見的。

mc: 為成為……統計學上的平均值乾杯。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_8_7
passages.content:
<> <>Cheers to clarity.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 為清晰乾杯。

[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_10
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I know what I’m doing. I want this… I need it.|crotch_9_crotch_10_1]] |

[[I don’t know if this is right, but... something inside says I need to feel whole again.|crotch_9_crotch_10_1]] |

[[Sick of this back-and-forth. If I'm going to be pulled in all directions, I choose this one today.|crotch_9_crotch_10_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我知道我在做什麼。我想要這個……我需要它。] |
[我不確定這是否正確，但……內心有個聲音說我需要再次感到完整。] |
[厭倦了這種反反覆覆。如果我注定要被拉扯向各個方向，今天我選擇這個。] |

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_10_1
passages.content:
<> <>I felt you coming before the door opened. The air thickened. Intention returns with a scent all its own.<>
<>I thought I was past this. Thought I could keep going. Shrinking. Changing. Letting go.<>
<>But something called you back.<>
<>Not something. Me. I called me back.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_10_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 在門打開之前，我就感覺到你來了。空氣變得濃稠。意圖帶著它獨有的氣味回歸了。

mc: 我以為我已經跨過這道坎了。以為我可以繼續下去。縮小。改變。放手。

thalara: 但有什麼東西呼喚你回來。

mc: 不是什麼東西。是我。是我呼喚自己回來。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_10_2
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve made progress. Real change. Do you understand what this reversal means?<>
<>It means I’m taking back something. Not because I hate where I was going. But because I’m not done being who I was.<>
<>That’s not weakness. It’s clarity. Every step must be owned. If you move forward too fast without belief, you fracture. And I will not let you shatter, Caelan.<>
<>I never thought I'd want this back. The weight. The pull. But after that last session, everything felt... too quiet. Too small. I looked down and felt like I’d erased a chapter before I was ready.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_10_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已取得進展。真正的改變。你明白這次逆轉意味著什麼嗎？

mc: 意味著我正在收回某些東西。不是因為我厭惡我前進的方向。而是因為我還沒完成成為過去的自己。

thalara: 那不是軟弱。那是清晰。每一步都必須被認可。如果你在沒有信念的情況下前進得太快，你會碎裂。而我不會讓你粉碎，Caelan。

mc: 我從沒想過我會想要回這個。那份重量。那種牽引力。但在上一次療程後，一切都感覺……太安靜了。太小了。我低頭看去，感覺就像在我準備好之前就抹去了一個章節。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_10_3
passages.content:
<> <>You felt like a guest in your own skin. That is no place from which to rule or evolve.<>
<>So this’ll bring it back? Not all the way… but more?<>
<>Yes. From where you were very large to where you once stood with pride. The potion restores what has receded. Blood will rush. Tissue will swell. Veins awaken. You’ll feel heavy again, not only in body, but in presence.<>
<>I missed that word. Presence.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_10_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你感覺像是自己皮膚裡的客人。那不是統治或進化的立足點。

mc: 所以這會把它帶回來？不是全部……但更多一些？

thalara: 是的。從你曾經非常巨大的狀態，回到你曾引以為傲的狀態。藥水會恢復已消退的部分。血液將奔流。組織將膨脹。血管甦醒。你會再次感到沉重，不僅是身體上，更是存在感上。

mc: 我懷念那個詞。存在感。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_10_4
passages.content:
<> <>Presence does not only come from parts, Caelan. But reclaiming them can be a declaration, if done knowingly.<>
<>And if this becomes a cycle? Back and forth forever. Do I just keep undoing myself?<>
<>No. The cycle ends when you end it. Not when the potions do. If this is what brings your truth closer, then it is not regression. It’s refinement.<>
<>My mother wouldn’t approve. She thinks every drop I take should go in the other direction.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_10_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 存在感不只來自於身體部位，Caelan。但若有意為之，重新奪回它們可以是一種宣告。

mc: 如果這變成一個循環呢？永遠來來回回。我就這樣不斷地否定自己嗎？

thalara: 不。循環在你結束它時終止，而非在藥水用盡時。如果這能讓你更接近真實的自己，那就不是倒退。而是精煉。

mc: 我母親不會贊同的。她認為我服下的每一滴藥水都該用在另一個方向。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_10_5
passages.content:
<> <>Your mother sees a queen. I see a soul in flux. Only you see who you are becoming. Or should. If this reversal helps you see it more clearly, it’s worth it.<>
<>I need this. Not forever. But today.<>
<>Then take it. Feel the return not of manhood, but of something you feared had vanished without your say.<>
<>I won’t apologize for reclaiming myself.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_9_crotch_10_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你母親看到的是一位女王。我看到一個變動中的靈魂。只有你看到你正在成為誰。或者應該成為誰。如果這次逆轉能幫助你更清晰地看見，那就值得。

mc: 我需要這個。不是永遠。而是今天。

thalara: 那就服下它。感受那歸來的，不是男子氣概，而是你曾害怕在你未經同意下就已消失的某種東西。

mc: 我不會為奪回自己而道歉。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_9_crotch_10_6
passages.content:
<> <>You never have to.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你永遠不必道歉。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_9
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Let’s continue. I expected worse, honestly. I can handle this.|crotch_10_crotch_9_1]] |

[[Still not sure how I feel about all this… but I didn’t come to turn back.|crotch_10_crotch_9_1]] |

[[Whatever. If we’re doing this, let’s just get it over with.|crotch_10_crotch_9_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我們繼續吧。說實話，我預期會更糟。我能應付這個。] |
[我仍然不確定對這一切感覺如何……但我不是來打退堂鼓的。] |
[隨便吧。如果我們要做，那就快點做完。] |

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_9_1
passages.content:
<> <>You wear different masks each time you arrive, Caelan. Strength, fear, apathy. They all speak to the same truth: you’re still deciding who you want to be.<>
<>I don’t need a speech. I need to know what this dose is going to take from me.<>
<>Not take. Ease. Reduce. Allow to let go. You’ll feel another shift smaller again, just enough to notice. Less girth, less weight. Less commanding.<>
<>Great. I always wanted to be less commanding in the bathhouse.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_9_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你每次到來都戴著不同的面具，Caelan。堅強、恐懼、冷漠。它們都訴說著同一個真相：你仍在決定自己想成為什麼樣的人。

mc: 我不需要聽演講。我需要知道這劑藥會從我身上奪走什麼。

thalara: 不是奪走。是舒緩。是減輕。是讓你放手。你會感覺到又一次更微小的轉變，小到剛好能察覺。更少的粗壯，更輕的重量。更不具支配性。

mc: 太好了。我一直想在澡堂裡顯得更不具支配性。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_9_2
passages.content:
<> <>You still can be just in other ways. Presence is not always measured in inches.<>
<>Easy for you to say. You’ve never had to say goodbye to a part of yourself that announced you when you entered a room.<>
<>No, but I’ve helped others do it. There’s grief in every transformation. Even those that are chosen freely. Even in joy, there is loss. That is the price of becoming something new.<>
<>And if I don’t want to become something new? What then?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_9_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你依然可以保有支配性，只是方式不同。存在感並非總是以英寸來衡量。

mc: 你說得倒輕鬆。你從不需要告別那個當你走進房間時、宣告你存在的那部分自己。

thalara: 是的，但我曾幫助其他人這麼做。每一次轉變都伴隨著哀傷。即使是那些自由選擇的轉變。即使在喜悅中，也有失落。這就是成為新事物的代價。

mc: 那如果我不想成為新事物呢？然後呢？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_9_3
passages.content:
<> <>Then you remain exactly as you are. But you came here, again. You stood still for the first draft of change. That means something. Whether you admit it or not.<>
<>It’s strange. It’s not pain that bothers me it’s watching it happen in stages. Like I’m being unraveled bit by bit.<>
<>Yes. It’s a long undoing of threads stitched into your life since birth. Masculinity sewn into flesh, sewn into expectation. But you are not your expectations, Caelan.<>
<>I used to think it made me powerful. That this body gave me leverage. And now it’s… less. Not useless, but less certain.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_9_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼你就保持原樣。但你再次來到了這裡。你為了改變的初稿而駐足。這意味著什麼。無論你承認與否。

mc: 很奇怪。困擾我的不是疼痛，而是看著它分階段發生。就像我被一點一點地拆解開來。

thalara: 是的。這是一個漫長的拆解過程，拆解那些自你出生以來就縫入你生命的線。男子氣概縫進了血肉，縫進了期望。但你並非你的期望，Caelan。

mc: 我曾以為它讓我強大。以為這副身體給了我優勢。而現在它…變少了。並非無用，只是不那麼確定了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_9_4
passages.content:
<> <>It gave you one kind of power. But not the only kind. The weight between your legs can shape how others see you. But the weight behind your words your choices that’s what rules nations.<>
<>Spoken like a woman who’s never needed to piss standing up to get respect.<>
<>Oh, I’ve wielded more authority seated on a stool than most men do on horseback.<>
<>Fine. Point taken.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_9_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它給了你一種力量。但不是唯一的一種。你雙腿間的重量可以塑造別人對你的看法。但你話語背後的份量、你選擇的份量——那才是統治國家的東西。

mc: 說得像妳從不需要站著小便來獲得尊重似的。

thalara: 噢，我坐在凳子上行使的權威，比大多數男人騎在馬背上還多。

mc: 好吧。說得有理。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_9_5
passages.content:
<> <>This one will be warmer than before. Gentle, but undeniable. Your body will sigh away another layer. You may feel heat along the base, a hollowing in your groin. The muscle will shrink; the veins will quiet. Your form will simplify.<>
<>Is there a point where it stops feeling like I’m losing… and starts feeling like I’m becoming?<>
<>Yes. But no one can tell you when. It’s different for every soul.<>
<>And what if I still don’t know if I want to be a queen?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_9_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這次會比之前更溫暖。溫和，但不容忽視。你的身體將嘆息著褪去另一層。你可能會感覺到根部發熱，腹股溝有種掏空的感覺。肌肉會收縮；血管會平靜下來。你的形體將趨於簡化。

mc: 是否會有那麼一刻，我不再感覺自己正在失去…而是開始感覺自己正在「成為」？

thalara: 有的。但沒人能告訴你那一刻何時到來。對每個靈魂而言都不同。

mc: 那如果我仍然不知道自己是否想成為女王呢？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_9_6
passages.content:
<> <>Then be Caelan. Fully, fiercely. And when the crown comes, you’ll know whether to wear it or cast it aside.<>
<>Cheers to uncertainty, then.<>
<>To transformation, however it unfolds.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就做 Caelan。完整地、熾烈地。當王冠到來時，你就會知道是該戴上它，還是將它拋開。

mc: 那麼，為不確定性乾杯吧。

thalara: 為轉變乾杯，無論它以何種方式展開。
[我感覺到藥劑在我胯下起作用]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_11
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve made my choice. I want it back. All of it.|crotch_10_crotch_11_1]] |

[[I’m not sure if this is right… but I need to feel like myself again. Even if only for now.|crotch_10_crotch_11_1]] |

[[I never wanted this change in the first place. I’m done pretending. Give me back what was mine.|crotch_10_crotch_11_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我已做出選擇。我想要它回來。全部都要。] |
[我不確定這是否正確……但我需要再次感覺像我自己。即使只是暫時的。] |
[我從一開始就不想要這種改變。我受夠假裝了。把我原有的還給我。] |

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_11_1
passages.content:
<> <>…So. You seek to walk backward down a path others rarely even survive going forward.<>
<>I didn’t come to be judged. I came to be restored.<>
<>I do not judge. I warn. This potion is not like the others. Feminine alchemy eases, reshapes, persuades. But masculine magic... it demands. It returns power, yes but it comes clawing.<>
<>Good. I want it to claw. I want to feel like I belong in my skin again. I want to stop shrinking.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_11_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: …所以。你尋求在一條他人連向前走都難以倖存的路上，逆向而行。

mc: 我不是來接受評判的。我是來尋求恢復的。

thalara: 我不評判。我警告。這劑藥水與其他不同。女性的煉金術是舒緩、重塑、說服。但男性的魔法…它要求。它歸還力量，是的，但它伴隨著抓撓般的痛楚。

mc: 很好。我就是要它抓撓。我想要再次感覺自己屬於這副軀殼。我想要停止縮小。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_11_2
passages.content:
<> <>And yet, just a session ago, you allowed that part of yourself to begin fading. What changed, Caelan?<>
<>Everything. Or maybe nothing. I looked at myself. And I didn’t recognize who I was becoming. I thought I could bend for the crown. But I’m not sure if I’m bending, or breaking.<>
<>There is no shame in fear. And there is no disgrace in retreat. The body your body is a battlefield of meanings. No spell undoes that struggle.<>
<>This… isn’t about rebelling. It’s about remembering. I need to feel like I exist again. That my body is still mine. That there’s still something left.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_11_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 然而，就在上一次療程，你還允許那部分的自己開始消褪。是什麼改變了，Caelan？

mc: 一切。或者也許什麼都沒變。我看著自己。卻認不出我正在成為的那個人。我以為我可以為王冠而彎腰。但我不確定我是在彎腰，還是在折斷。

thalara: 恐懼並不可恥。退縮也並非恥辱。身體——你的身體——是意義的戰場。沒有咒語能消除那種掙扎。

mc: 這…不是關於反抗。是關於記起。我需要再次感覺到我存在。感覺我的身體仍然屬於我。感覺仍有東西留下。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_11_3
passages.content:
<> <>The potion will restore what was lost perhaps more. Your endowment will swell past what it was, rising to its previous form. You may feel heat, throbbing, discomfort. Masculine hunger returns with the flesh. Be prepared to hold it.<>
<>And emotionally? What happens then?<>
<>You will feel power rush back in and the old identity may surge with it. Dominance. Urgency. Cravings long muted. But it won’t fill the hollow. Only delay the reckoning. You cannot un-know who you've begun to become.<>
<>Then let it be my reckoning. I just want to stand tall again.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_11_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這藥水將恢復你所失去的，或許更多。你的天賦將會膨脹，超越以往，恢復到先前的形態。你可能會感到灼熱、搏動、不適。隨著血肉歸來，男性的飢渴也將復甦。準備好承受它。

mc: 那情感上呢？接下來會發生什麼？

thalara: 你會感到力量奔湧而回，舊有的身份可能隨之高漲。支配感、急迫感、長久沉寂的渴望。但它無法填補內心的空洞，只會推遲最終的清算。你無法抹去你已開始成為的那個自己。

mc: 那就讓清算到來吧。我只想再次挺直腰桿。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_11_4
passages.content:
<> <>I’ll grant you the form, but not the illusion. If you believe this makes you whole, drink. If you believe this makes you safe, wait. You cannot drink both destinies.<>
<>I’m not asking for forever. Just a moment to feel real again.<>
<>Then take it, and know the weight of what returns.<>
<>It’s back…<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_10_crotch_11_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我會賜予你形體，但不會給予幻象。如果你相信這能讓你完整，就喝下。如果你相信這能讓你安全，就等待。你無法同時飲下兩種命運。

mc: 我祈求的不是永恆。只是一個能再次感受真實的片刻。

thalara: 那就接受它，並知曉隨之歸來的重量。

mc: 它回來了……

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_10_crotch_11_5
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. But so are the doubts that made you leave it behind.<>
<>Then maybe I have to lose it all again… just to know which version of me can survive.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。但讓你當初捨棄它的那些疑慮，也一同回來了。

mc: 那麼，或許我必須再次失去一切……才能知道哪一個版本的我能存活下來。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]

passages.name: crotch_11_crotch_10
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready, Thalara. I’ve made peace with this. Just… guide me through it.|crotch_11_crotch_10_1]] |

[[I don’t know how to feel about this… but I’ll go through with it. For the Queen. For the kingdom.|crotch_11_crotch_10_1]] |

[[Let’s get this over with. I’m not doing this because I want to. I’m doing it because I have to.|crotch_11_crotch_10_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[I’m ready, Thalara. I’ve made peace with this. Just… guide me through it.] |
[I don’t know how to feel about this… but I’ll go through with it. For the Queen. For the kingdom.] |
[Let’s get this over with. I’m not doing this because I want to. I’m doing it because I have to.] |

passages.name: crotch_11_crotch_10_1
passages.content:
<> <>One beginning. Willing, unsure, or rebellious it matters not. The body will respond, and the spirit will follow… in time.<>
<>How can you speak about this like it’s a rite of passage and not… erasing who I am?<>
<>Because it is a rite of passage, Caelan. But not one that erases it redefines. Transforms. Like a blade reforged in fire, you are being reshaped, not destroyed.<>
<>I was proud of who I was. Of my body. I don’t know how I’m supposed to let go of that without losing something.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_11_crotch_10_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 一個開始。心甘情願、猶豫不決或心懷抗拒，都無關緊要。身體會做出反應，而靈魂終將隨之……假以時日。

mc: 你怎能說得像是某種成年儀式，而不是……抹去我是誰？

thalara: 因為這就是成年儀式，Caelan。但並非抹去，而是重新定義。轉變。如同在烈火中重鑄的刀刃，你正在被重塑，而非摧毀。

mc: 我曾以自己為榮。以我的身體為榮。我不知道該如何放下這些而不失去某些東西。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_11_crotch_10_2
passages.content:
<> <>You should be proud. Your form, your strength none of it is shameful. But pride need not be bound to flesh. Pride can live in resilience, in adaptation… in what you choose to become, not just what you were born as.<>
<>And if I don’t want to become something else?<>
<>Then your resistance will shape the path differently. You need not surrender instantly. But know this change has already begun. Within you, and around you. The kingdom has chosen. Your mother has chosen. The only one who hasn’t… is you.<>
<>And this… potion. What exactly will it do to me?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_11_crotch_10_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你理應感到自豪。你的形體、你的力量，沒有一樣是可恥的。但自豪不必束縛於血肉。自豪可以存在於韌性、適應力之中……存在於你選擇成為的樣子，而不僅是你與生俱來的模樣。

mc: 如果我不想變成別的什麼呢？

thalara: 那麼你的抗拒將使道路轉向不同的方向。你無須立刻屈服。但要知道，改變已然開始。在你之內，也在你周遭。王國已做出選擇。你的母親已做出選擇。唯一尚未抉擇的……是你。

mc: 而這……藥水。它究竟會對我造成什麼影響？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_11_crotch_10_3
passages.content:
<> <>In this first stage? Only a gentle contraction. Your… current endowment will begin to reduce slowly. From what it is, to something slightly less. No pain. Just heat. Pressure. Perhaps an ache you won’t know how to describe.<>
<>That’s still my body you’re talking about.<>
<>Of course it is. It remains yours. Even when it changes, it belongs to you. This is not theft, Caelan it’s alchemy guided by intent. Your intent, if you will let it be.<>
<>What if I change my mind? Or stop halfway?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_11_crotch_10_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 在第一階段？僅是溫和的收縮。你……當前的天賦將開始緩慢減少。從現狀，變為稍弱一些的狀態。沒有痛苦。只有熱度、壓力。或許還有一種你不知如何形容的隱痛。

mc: 你談論的依然是我的身體。

thalara: 當然是。它仍屬於你。即使它改變了，也依然屬於你。這不是竊取，Caelan——這是以意圖引導的煉金術。你的意圖，如果你願意讓它成為的話。

mc: 如果我改變主意呢？或是中途停止？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_11_crotch_10_4
passages.content:
<> <>Then we adjust. The process is not a prison. There is room for pause. Reassessment. Even retreat though the deeper you go, the harder it becomes to reverse. Not impossible, but costly.<>
<>And you’ve done this before? Changed others?<>
<>Only a few. This magic is sacred. It’s not done lightly. But each who walked the path before you found their truth some in becoming, some in choosing to remain between.<>
<>I don’t want to lose… all of me.<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_11_crotch_10_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那我們就調整。這個過程不是牢籠。有暫停、重新評估的空間。甚至撤退——儘管你走得越深，逆轉就越困難。並非不可能，但代價高昂。

mc: 你以前做過這種事嗎？改變過其他人？

thalara: 僅有少數。這種魔法是神聖的。不會輕易施行。但每一位在你之前踏上這條道路的人，都找到了他們的真實——有些在轉變中，有些則選擇停留在中間地帶。

mc: 我不想失去……全部的我。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_11_crotch_10_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then don’t. Keep what matters. Let the rest evolve. This is not about losing. It’s about crafting a shape that holds your purpose your strength as a queen, if you wish to be one.<>
<>What happens when I drink it?<>
<>You’ll feel a pull inward. A soft unraveling of what anchors you to maleness. Not all at once. Just a first nudge. Your body will shift slightly enough to know this is real.<>
<>And you’ll be here the whole time?<>
[[Move Forth|crotch_11_crotch_10_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就別失去。保留重要的部分。讓其餘的進化。這關乎的不是失去，而是塑造一個能承載你目標的形態——你作為女王的實力，如果你想成為一位女王的話。

mc: 我喝下它後會發生什麼？

thalara: 你會感到一股向內的牽引。一種將你錨定在男性特質上的柔軟解構。不會一次完成。只是最初的推動。你的身體會輕微轉變，足以讓你明白這是真實的。

mc: 你會全程都在這裡嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: crotch_11_crotch_10_6
passages.content:
<> <>From first drop to final form. I do not abandon those I guide, Caelan. Whether you come to me proud, scared, or spitting fire you are not alone in this.<>
<>…Then let’s begin.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my crotch|use_success_potion_create_crotch]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 從第一滴到最終形態。我不會拋棄我引導的人，Caelan。無論你是帶著驕傲、恐懼，還是怒火來到我面前——在這條路上，你並非孤身一人。

mc: ……那麼，我們開始吧。
[I feel the potion working in my crotch]
