passages.name: hair_1_hair_2
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready, Thalara. Let’s begin.|hair_1_hair_2_1]] |

[[…I still don’t know if this is right, but… I’m here. Do what you must.|hair_1_hair_2_1]] |

[[You know this doesn’t feel natural. But I guess no one’s giving me a real choice, are they?|hair_1_hair_2_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已釀好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了，Thalara。我們開始吧。] |
[…我仍然不確定這是否正確，但是……我在這裡。做你必須做的事吧。] |
[你知道這感覺並不自然。但我想沒有人給我真正的選擇，對吧？] |

passages.name: hair_1_hair_2_1
passages.content:
<>
<>Choice is a curious thing, Your Highness. Some find it in rebellion, others in surrender. But even indecision... is a choice in disguise.<>
<>You speak in riddles, Thalara. Do you ever say anything plainly?<>
<>Rarely. Plain words carry heavy truths, and most prefer a little mystery in their medicine.<>
<>Hair is trivial to most. A vanity. A fashion. But for those born to rule in Velmoria, it is part of the rite. Our ancestors believed that a ruler’s hair must mirror her heart growing wild only when she accepts herself.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_1_hair_2_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 選擇是件奇妙的事，殿下。有些人從反抗中找到它，有些人則在屈服中發現。但即使猶豫不決……也是一種偽裝的選擇。

mc: 你說起話來像謎語，Thalara。你有沒有說過直白的話？

thalara: 很少。直白的言語承載著沉重的真相，而大多數人寧願他們的藥裡帶點神秘。

thalara: 對多數人而言，頭髮微不足道。是虛榮，是時尚。但對於那些生來統治 Velmoria 的人，它是儀式的一部分。我們的祖先相信，統治者的頭髮必須映照她的內心，唯有在她接納自己時，才會恣意生長。

[繼續]

passages.name: hair_1_hair_2_2
passages.content:
<> <>And if I never accept myself like that? If I don’t want to grow into the queen they all expect?<>
<>Then you may never grow hair beyond your collar… or perhaps you’ll grow it and still feel like a stranger inside your own skin. But that is not failure, dear prince. That is simply a different path.<>
<>This potion will awaken the follicles that once lay dormant. It is slow, respectful magic. The body must learn it is safe to change.<>
<>It tingles already. Like… like my head is remembering something it forgot.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_1_hair_2_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 如果我永遠無法那樣接受自己呢？如果我不想長成他們所有人期待的那位女王？

thalara: 那麼你的頭髮或許永遠不會長過衣領……又或者，即便長了，你仍會感覺像個困在自己皮囊裡的陌生人。但這並非失敗，親愛的王子。那只是一條不同的道路。

thalara: 這劑藥水將喚醒那些曾經沉睡的毛囊。這是緩慢而充滿敬意的魔法。身體必須學會明白，改變是安全的。

mc: 已經有刺痛感了。就像……就像我的頭正在回憶某件被遺忘的事。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_1_hair_2_3
passages.content:
<> <>Good. That’s the potion greeting your nerves. The mind resists faster than the flesh, but flesh has patience. You may fight it, mourn it, or lean into it. All of those reactions are sacred.<>
<>Is it wrong that I feel… nervous?<>
<>No. It would be stranger if you felt nothing. But nerves are not enemies. They are just truth in motion.<>
<>Look. Only wisps now, but they are yours. The first strand, born of your decision however it was made.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_1_hair_2_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 很好。那是藥水在問候你的神經。心靈的抗拒比肉體更快，但肉體更有耐心。你可以與之對抗、為之哀傷，或是順應它。所有這些反應都是神聖的。

mc: 我感到……緊張，這不對嗎？

thalara: 不。如果你毫無感覺，那才奇怪。但緊張並非敵人。它們只是流動中的真實。

thalara: 看。現在還只是幾縷細絲，但它們屬於你了。第一縷髮絲，因你的決定而生——無論這決定是如何做出的。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_1_hair_2_4
passages.content:
<> <>It looks soft… like my mother’s when I was little.<>
<>Then you carry more of her than you knew. But you are not her echo, Caelan. You are your own unfolding.<>
<>Will the rest be like this? Gentle and slow?<>
<>Some potions are like whispers. Others like fire. When we begin changing what lies below the scalp bones, skin, organs there may be… harsher tides. But the hair? It begins with kindness.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_1_hair_2_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它看起來好柔軟……像我小時候母親的頭髮。

thalara: 那麼你承載著比她所知更多的部分。但你不是她的回聲，Caelan。你是你自己的綻放。

mc: 剩下的過程也會像這樣嗎？溫和而緩慢？

thalara: 有些藥水如同耳語。有些則像烈火。當我們開始改變頭皮之下、骨骼、皮膚、器官……那些更深層的東西時，可能會遇到更猛烈的浪潮。但頭髮？它始於溫柔。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_1_hair_2_5
passages.content:
<> <>This session is complete. Rest well. Tonight, your head dreams as a prince. Tomorrow, it may wake as something new.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這次的療程結束了。好好休息。今夜，你的頭顱將以王子之姿做夢。明日，它或許會以嶄新的樣貌醒來。
[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_3
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[It’s growing faster than I thought. I… don’t hate how it feels.|hair_2_hair_3_1]] |

[[I’m not sure this is what I want yet… but I guess we keep going.|hair_2_hair_3_1]] |

[[Another potion? Let’s just get this over with.|hair_2_hair_3_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[它長得比我想像的還快。我……並不討厭這種感覺。] |
[我還不確定這是不是我想要的……但我想我們得繼續下去。] |
[又要用藥水？我們快點結束這件事吧。] |

passages.name: hair_2_hair_3_1
passages.content:
<>
<>Your hair tells more stories than your lips ever will, Caelan. You may lie, you may hide but each inch grown is a secret whispered to the world.<>
<>I don’t want the world whispering about me. Not like this.<>
<>Then let it whisper. And you… you may choose whether to listen or ignore it. That too is power.<>
<>It’s strange. I thought hair would just be hair. But every session feels like another part of me is being... unraveled. Rewritten.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_3_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的頭髮訴說的故事，比你的雙唇所能說的更多，Caelan。你可以說謊，可以隱藏，但每生長一寸，就是向世界低語一個秘密。

mc: 我不想讓世界對我竊竊私語。至少不是像這樣。

thalara: 那就讓它低語吧。而你……你可以選擇傾聽或無視。那同樣是一種力量。

mc: 這很奇怪。我原以為頭髮就只是頭髮。但每一次療程，都感覺像是我的一部分正在被……拆解、重寫。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_3_2
passages.content:
<> <>Because it is. Hair has memory. Not just of genetics, but of intent. Each time I touch your crown, it listens. It remembers your resistance. Your surrender. Your curiosity.<>
<>What if I don’t know what I’m feeling anymore? Some days I wake up and want this. Others I feel like I’m erasing myself.<>
<>You are not erasing. You are shedding. There's a difference. The serpent does not mourn its old skin. The tree does not grieve last season’s leaves. And yet both continue wiser, changed, alive.<>
<>You make it sound beautiful. But it doesn’t always feel that way. Sometimes I feel like I’m pretending. Like I’m performing softness, but I still ache inside.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_3_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為確實如此。頭髮擁有記憶。不僅是基因的記憶，還有意圖的記憶。每當我觸碰你的頭頂，它都在傾聽。它記得你的抗拒、你的屈服、你的好奇。

mc: 如果我不知道自己現在是什麼感覺了呢？有些日子我醒來時渴望這一切。其他時候，卻覺得自己正在抹去自我。

thalara: 你不是在抹去。你是在蛻變。這其中有著區別。蛇不會哀悼牠的舊皮。樹不會為上個季節的落葉悲傷。然而兩者都繼續前行，更為智慧、已然改變、充滿生機。

mc: 你說得如此美好。但感覺並非總是那樣。有時我覺得自己在假裝。彷彿我在表演溫柔，但內心依然疼痛。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_3_3
passages.content:
<> <>And yet here you are sitting before me, letting the strands grow. Even pretending is a kind of bravery. Sometimes we walk into roles before we grow into them.<>
<>That sounds like manipulation.<>
<>No. It is hope. I am not twisting you. I am showing you the mirror and asking, 'What might you become if you stepped closer?'<>
<>See how it falls now less like the child prince, more like the lady who waits beneath. But only if you wish her to be.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_3_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 然而你此刻仍坐在我面前，任由髮絲生長。即使是假裝，也是一種勇氣。有時我們在真正成長為某個角色之前，便已走入其中。

mc: 這聽起來像是操縱。

thalara: 不。這是希望。我並非在扭曲你。我只是向你展示鏡子，並問道：『如果你再靠近一點，可能會成為什麼？』

thalara: 看它現在垂落的樣子，不再像那個孩童王子，更像那位潛藏其下的女士。但前提是，你希望她存在。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_3_4
passages.content:
<> <>I… look different already. Not just in the mirror. Even when I speak, I hear it. My voice isn’t higher, but the tone… the hesitations…<>
<>Ah. That is the mind catching up to the body. And soon, the body will follow the soul’s pacing.<>
<>Do you think I’ll ever feel... like her? Like a real woman, not just a made one?<>
<>Real is not a mold. It is a resonance. If you feel the music rising inside you, you are not fake you are becoming. All of this..." she gestures to your reflection "…is simply harmony catching up.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_3_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我……看起來已經不一樣了。不僅僅是在鏡中。甚至當我說話時，我也聽得出來。我的聲音沒有變高，但語氣……那些遲疑……

thalara: 啊。那是心靈正在趕上身體的變化。很快地，身體也會跟上靈魂的步調。

mc: 你覺得我有一天會感覺……像她嗎？像一個真正的女人，而不僅僅是被塑造出來的？

thalara: 「真實」不是一個模子。它是一種共鳴。如果你感覺到內在的樂音正在升起，你便不是虛假的——你正在成為。所有這一切……"她朝你的倒影比了比手勢"……不過是和諧終於趕上了腳步。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_3_5
passages.content:
<> <>Hair to frame your face. Words to shape your future. And a body in-between, learning to trust you.<>
<>How much longer until it reaches my shoulders?<>
<>Another session or two. Hair grows fast when it's fed with intention.<>
<>Then I guess I better figure out what mine is.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 髮絲勾勒你的臉龐。言語形塑你的未來。而身體居於其間，學習信任你。

mc: 還要多久它才會長到我的肩膀？

thalara: 再一兩次療程。當頭髮被意圖滋養時，它生長得很快。

mc: 那麼我想我最好弄清楚我的意圖是什麼。
[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_4
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[You weren’t lying this part is starting to feel… kind of nice.|hair_3_hair_4_1]] |

[[This is happening faster than I expected. I’m not sure I’m keeping up.|hair_3_hair_4_1]] |

[[Another vial? What’s the point just so I can look ‘pretty’ enough for the council?|hair_3_hair_4_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[你沒說謊，這部分開始感覺……有點舒服。] |
[這發生得比我預期的快。我不確定我是否跟得上。] |
[又一小瓶？有什麼意義？就只是為了讓我在議會面前看起來夠「漂亮」嗎？] |

passages.name: hair_3_hair_4_1
passages.content:
<> <>Hair that flows, Caelan, has little to do with beauty. It’s not for their gaze it’s for your reflection.<>
<>You say that like I’m supposed to believe this is for me, not the throne.<>
<>It’s always both. That’s the paradox of power, isn't it? Your body is yours, and yet… it becomes a symbol for others.<>
<>It feels strange… like it doesn’t quite belong to me yet. Every time it touches my shoulders, it’s a reminder.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_4_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 流瀉的長髮，Caelan，與美醜關係不大。它不是為了他們的凝視，而是為了你自己的倒影。

mc: 你說得好像我應該相信這是為了我自己，而不是為了王位。

thalara: 總是兩者皆是。這就是權力的悖論，不是嗎？你的身體屬於你，然而……它卻成了他人的象徵。

mc: 感覺很奇怪……好像它還不完全屬於我。每次髮絲觸及我的肩膀，都是一種提醒。

[繼續]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_4_2
passages.content:
<> <>A reminder of what?<>
<>That I’m not who I used to be. That something is changing, and I can’t slow it down anymore.<>
<>Change is a current. You can swim with it or against it but either way, you will be moved.<>
<>Do you know what it meant, once, to let one’s hair grow beyond the collar in Velmoria?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_4_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 提醒什麼？

mc: 提醒我已不再是過去的我。提醒某些事物正在改變，而我再也無法讓它慢下來。

thalara: 改變是一股水流。你可以順流而游，也可以逆流而上，但無論如何，你都會被推動。
thalara: 你知道在 Velmoria，曾經，讓頭髮長過衣領意味著什麼嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_4_3
passages.content:
<> <>No. Another ancient rite I’ve never heard of?<>
<>Mmm. In the old kingdoms, it was a sign of spiritual readiness of leaving behind the boy's sword and taking up the queen’s mantle. To let one’s hair touch the back was to welcome intuition over instinct. Wisdom over conquest.<>
<>I wasn’t raised to think that way. Everything was discipline, duty, dominion.<>
<>And yet you sit here, letting starlight drip through your veins.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_4_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 不知道。又是一個我從未聽聞的古老儀式？

thalara: 嗯。在古老的王國裡，這是一種精神上準備就緒的標誌——放下男孩的劍，拾起女王的斗篷。讓髮絲觸及背部，是為了迎接直覺超越本能，智慧超越征服。

mc: 我並非在這種觀念下長大。一切都是紀律、責任、統治。

thalara: 然而你卻坐在這裡，讓星光滴淌過你的血管。

[繼續]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_4_4
passages.content:
<> <>I didn’t think it would feel like this. The longer it gets… the more I catch glimpses of someone else in the mirror. But she’s not someone I hate. That’s what scares me.<>
<>Do not fear her, Caelan. She is not your replacement. She is your possibility.<>
<>You’re not being erased. You’re being rewritten. Authored anew, one sentence at a time.<>
<>Do you think I’m… starting to look like a princess?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_4_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我沒想到感覺會是這樣。頭髮越長……我越常在鏡中瞥見另一個人。但我並不討厭她。這正是讓我害怕的地方。

thalara: 別害怕她，Caelan。她不是你的替代品。她是你的可能性。
thalara: 你並非被抹去。你正在被改寫。被重新書寫，一次一個句子。

mc: 你覺得我……開始看起來像個公主了嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_4_5
passages.content:
<> <>You’re starting to look like yourself, when you’re no longer trying to fit someone else’s shape.<>
<>And if I change too much and decide I don’t want to go back?<>
<>Then you’ve found your truth. And truth is no betrayal it’s a kind of return. A coming home.<>
<>That reaction? That’s not magic. That’s you feeling your own form anew.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_4_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你開始看起來像你自己了，當你不再試圖去適應他人的形狀時。

mc: 如果我改變太多，決定我不想回去了呢？

thalara: 那你就找到了你的真實。而真實並非背叛——它是一種回歸。一種歸家。
thalara: 那種反應？那不是魔法。那是你重新感受自己的形體。

[繼續]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_4_6
passages.content:
<> <>I didn’t expect to feel… sensual. That’s not something I ever associated with myself.<>
<>That’s because it was hidden beneath armor. This is not weakness. It’s awareness. And awareness breeds presence. Presence breeds power.<>
<>Now your hair rests not only as a crown, but as a curtain framing the thoughts you have yet to speak aloud. When the council looks at you next, they won’t see a boy trying. They’ll see a ruler emerging.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我沒預料到會感到……性感。這是我從未與自己聯想在一起的東西。

thalara: 那是因為它被隱藏在盔甲之下。這不是軟弱。這是覺知。而覺知孕育存在感。存在感孕育力量。
thalara: 現在你的頭髮不僅僅是一頂王冠，更是一道帷幕，框住你尚未說出口的思緒。下次議會注視你時，他們不會看到一個在嘗試的男孩。他們會看到一位正在崛起的統治者。

[我感覺到藥水在我頭部和髮絲間作用]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_5
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve actually been looking forward to this one. There’s something… grounding about the ritual.|hair_4_hair_5_1]] |

[[It’s just brushing, right? That doesn’t sound so bad… unless there’s a catch?|hair_4_hair_5_1]] |

[[You know this doesn’t feel natural. But I guess no one’s giving me a real choice, are they?|hair_4_hair_5_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[其實我一直很期待這一次。這種儀式有種……讓人腳踏實地的感覺。] |
[只是梳頭，對吧？聽起來不壞……除非有什麼陷阱？] |
[你知道這感覺並不自然。但我想沒人給我真正的選擇，對嗎？] |

passages.name: hair_4_hair_5_1
passages.content:
<> <>Brushing one’s hair is not an act of vanity, Caelan. It’s an act of stewardship. A lesson in tending to what grows slowly.<>
<>So you want me to slow down, savor every strand?<>
<>No. I want you to notice yourself really notice. Not in fragments or reactions, but in rhythm. Brushing teaches presence, something rulers often lose in pursuit of power.<>
<>It’s strange… I used to think growing my hair was something girls did to attract attention. Something soft. Decorative.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_5_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 梳理頭髮並非虛榮之舉，Caelan。這是一種管理的行為。一門學習照料緩慢生長之物的課程。

mc: 所以你想讓我慢下來，細細品味每一縷髮絲？

thalara: 不。我想讓你注意自己——真正地注意。不是零碎的片段或反應，而是節奏。梳理教導存在感，這是統治者在追求權力時常常遺失的東西。

mc: 很奇怪……我以前總認為留長頭髮是女孩為了吸引注意而做的事。某種柔軟的、裝飾性的東西。

[繼續]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_5_2
passages.content:
<> <>And now?<>
<>Now I realize it’s work. The brushing alone takes patience. And there’s something… intimate about it.<>
<>Exactly. Intimacy with the self. We spend so much time trying to be seen that we forget how to look inward. Brushing is a conversation with your reflection one without words.<>
<>And what is this reflection supposed to say back?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_5_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那現在呢？

mc: 現在我意識到這是項工作。光是梳理就需要耐心。而且有種……親密的感覺。

thalara: 正是如此。與自我的親密。我們花了太多時間試圖被看見，以至於忘記了如何向內觀看。梳理是一場與你倒影的對話——一場無言的對話。

mc: 那這個倒影又該回應些什麼呢？

[繼續]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_5_3
passages.content:
<> <>‘I am changing, and I am watching myself change. I do not flinch from either truth.’<>
<>I used to polish my boots before battle. That was ritual too. But this… this feels different. Softer. Not weaker, just... quieter.<>
<>You’re learning the difference between force and presence. Force pushes. Presence pulls. Hair, especially long hair, pulls attention. It demands softness to manage, but grace to carry.<>
<>Sometimes I catch myself moving differently. Tilting my head when it brushes my cheek. Turning slower so it doesn’t tangle. It’s like my body’s learning new habits without asking me.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_5_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 「我正在改變，而我正注視著自己的改變。我對這兩種真相都毫不退縮。」

mc: 我以前會在戰鬥前擦亮靴子。那也是一種儀式。但這個……感覺不同。更柔和。不是更軟弱，只是……更安靜。

thalara: 你正在學習力量與存在感之間的區別。力量是推。存在感是拉。頭髮，尤其是長髮，會拉動注意力。它需要溫柔來打理，但需要優雅來承載。

mc: 有時我發現自己動作不一樣了。當髮絲拂過臉頰時會歪頭。轉身更慢以免糾結。就像我的身體在沒問過我的情況下，就學會了新習慣。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_5_4
passages.content:
<> <>It is asking. You’re just listening now. And more importantly you’re responding.<>
<>And what if I don’t want to become someone who has to worry about these things?<>
<>Then don’t. But know this: worry and awareness are not the same. You can wear long hair and still wield a sword. You can glide like silk and still command like steel.<>
<>I didn’t think I’d be so aware of something so… simple.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_5_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它正在詢問。你現在只是在傾聽。更重要的是，你正在回應。

mc: 那如果我不想變成一個必須擔心這些事情的人呢？

thalara: 那就別擔心。但要明白：擔心和覺察不是一回事。你可以留著長髮，同時揮舞長劍。你可以如絲綢般滑行，同時如鋼鐵般發號施令。

mc: 我沒想到自己會對這麼……簡單的事情如此有意識。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_5_5
passages.content:
<> <>It’s not simple. It’s symbolic. You are shaping how you’ll be perceived, yes but you’re also shaping how you’ll perceive yourself.<>
<>And if I start liking this more than I thought I would?<>
<>Then you are discovering something vital: this path doesn’t rob you of identity it reveals it.<>
<>Let your hair fall like a banner behind you, Caelan. Not of surrender… but of awakening.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這不簡單。這是象徵性的。你正在塑造別人看待你的方式，沒錯，但你也在塑造你如何看待自己。

mc: 那如果我開始比想像中更喜歡這樣呢？

thalara: 那麼你正在發現某種至關重要的東西：這條路不會剝奪你的身份，而是揭示它。

thalara: 讓你的頭髮像一面旗幟般垂在你身後吧，Caelan。不是投降的旗幟……而是覺醒的旗幟。
[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_6
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[You’ve got that look again, Thalara. The one that says I’m about to feel something new.|hair_5_hair_6_1]] |

[[Mid-back, huh? Sounds… manageable. I suppose I can live with that.|hair_5_hair_6_1]] |

[[Another potion, another piece of me slipping away. Let’s just get it over with.|hair_5_hair_6_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[你又露出那種表情了，Thalara。那種預示我即將感受新事物的表情。] |
[及背中長髮，是嗎？聽起來……還能應付。我想我可以接受。] |
[又一瓶藥水，又一部分的自我逐漸遠去。我們就快點完成吧。] |

passages.name: hair_5_hair_6_1
passages.content:
<> <>You always think these potions take something from you. But they don’t strip they reveal.<>
<>Easy for you to say. You’re not the one growing a silk curtain down your spine.<>
<>No. But I remember when mine reached that length. I remember how it changed how I moved, how I sat, how I felt seen. There is power in the way something brushes against you constantly it reminds you of your presence.<>
<>You make it sound like hair is some kind of… spiritual tether.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_6_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你總認為這些藥水從你身上奪走了什麼。但它們不是剝奪，而是揭示。

mc: 你說得倒輕鬆。你又不是那個沿著脊椎長出一幅絲綢帷幕的人。

thalara: 是沒錯。但我記得我的頭髮長到那個長度的時候。我記得它如何改變了我的動作、我的坐姿、我被注視的感覺。當某物不斷輕拂你時，其中蘊含著力量——它提醒著你自身的存在。

mc: 你說得好像頭髮是某種……靈性的繫繩。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_6_2
passages.content:
<> <>It is. Especially for women. And for those becoming women, it marks a threshold. Hair this long carries weight not just physically, but symbolically.<>
<>I do feel it now. When I turn my head, or breathe too deep. It’s everywhere.<>
<>And soon it will be part of how others perceive you. Mid-back length draws attention differently. People will read you as someone practiced in elegance. Whether you feel elegant or not, your appearance starts doing the work for you.<>
<>Feels strange… that a length of hair could influence how others treat me.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_6_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 確實如此。尤其是對女性而言。而對於那些正在成為女性的人，它標誌著一個門檻。這麼長的頭髮不僅有物理上的重量，更有象徵性的重量。

mc: 我現在確實感覺到了。當我轉頭，或深呼吸時。它無處不在。

thalara: 很快，它也將成為他人如何看待你的一部分。及背的長度會以不同的方式吸引注意。人們會將你解讀為熟諳優雅之道的人。無論你是否感到優雅，你的外表已開始為你發揮作用。

mc: 感覺很奇怪……一段頭髮的長度竟能影響他人對待我的方式。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_6_3
passages.content:
<> <>Strange, yes. But not untrue. In this court, in this kingdom, perception shapes reality. Long hair signals not just femininity, but maturity. Grace. Fertility. Control.<>
<>I thought ruling meant commanding armies, negotiating treaties not conditioning hair and dodging tangles.<>
<>You'll do all of those things. But a queen must also understand symbolism. Her hair becomes her banner. Her voice becomes law. Her body becomes myth. And myths, Caelan, start with details like these.<>
<>I never asked to become a myth.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_6_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 奇怪，是的。但並非虛假。在這個宮廷，在這個王國，認知塑造現實。長髮不僅象徵女性氣質，更象徵成熟、優雅、生育力與掌控力。

mc: 我以為統治意味著指揮軍隊、談判條約，而不是保養頭髮和躲避打結。

thalara: 這些事你都會做。但一位女王也必須理解象徵意義。她的頭髮成為她的旗幟。她的聲音成為法律。她的身體成為神話。而神話，Caelan，正是從這樣的細節開始的。

mc: 我從未要求成為神話。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_6_4
passages.content:
<> <>No myth ever does. But those who resist it… often become the most unforgettable ones.<>
<>Sometimes I wonder if this is really me. Or just… a role I’m learning to perform.<>
<>Then let me ask you something: when you feel your hair brush your skin, when you notice yourself turning just a little slower, holding your head a little higher does it feel false?<>
<>No. Just… unfamiliar.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_6_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 沒有神話是自願的。但那些抗拒它的人……往往成為最令人難忘的神話。

mc: 有時我會想，這真的是我嗎？還是只是……一個我正在學習扮演的角色。

thalara: 那麼讓我問你：當你感覺到髮絲拂過肌膚，當你注意到自己轉身稍微慢了一點，頭抬得稍微高了一點時，那感覺虛假嗎？

mc: 不。只是……陌生。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_6_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then you are not acting. You are becoming. Transformation always feels like pretending at first. That doesn’t make it untrue.<>
<>I never thought I’d say this… but I think I miss it when it’s not touching me.<>
<>That’s how you know it’s yours now. Welcome to the weight of grace, Caelan.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼你並非在演戲。你正在成為。轉變起初總感覺像在假裝。但這並不意味著它是虛假的。

mc: 我從沒想過我會這麼說……但我想，當它沒有觸碰到我時，我竟會想念那種感覺。

thalara: 這正是你明白它現在屬於你的方式。歡迎來到優雅的重量之中，Caelan。
[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_7
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[So, today I’m one step closer to having my own royal veil, huh?|hair_6_hair_7_1]] |

[[Waist-length hair. That’s… quite the commitment. I guess we’re doing this.|hair_6_hair_7_1]] |

[[Let me guess another fancy clasp, and more poetic nonsense about queenship?|hair_6_hair_7_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[所以，今天我離擁有自己的王室面紗又近了一步，是吧？] |
[及腰長髮。這真是……相當重大的承諾。我想我們就這麼做吧。] |
[讓我猜猜，又是一個花俏的髮夾，還有更多關於女王身份的詩意廢話？] |

passages.name: hair_6_hair_7_1
passages.content:
<> <>I find it fascinating how you measure transformation in inches, when truly, you’ve crossed miles since your first strand grew in.<>
<>Well, when those inches start weighing down your neck, it’s hard not to notice.<>
<>True. But that weight is a sign of legacy. Queens don’t just inherit crowns they carry them, strand by strand, choice by choice.<>
<>I’m not sure I chose this.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_7_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我覺得很有趣，你竟用英寸來衡量轉變，而事實上，從你的第一縷髮絲長出起，你早已跨越了數英里。

mc: 嗯，當那些英寸開始壓得你脖子發沉時，想不注意都難。

thalara: 沒錯。但那重量是傳承的標誌。女王繼承的不僅僅是王冠，她們承載著它，一絲一縷，一個選擇接著一個選擇。

mc: 我不確定這是我選擇的。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_7_2
passages.content:
<> <>You did. Perhaps not all at once. Perhaps not aloud. But in every moment you stayed. Every time you came back here. Even when you protested.<>
<>That sounds suspiciously like you’re rewriting history.<>
<>No. I'm reading it. And history rarely waits for perfect consent. It unfolds while we’re still deciding who we are.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_7_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你選擇了。或許不是一蹴而就。或許沒有說出口。但在你留下的每一刻。在你每一次回到這裡的時候。甚至在你抗議的時候。

mc: 這聽起來可疑地像是你在改寫歷史。

thalara: 不。我是在解讀它。而歷史很少等待完美的同意。它在我們仍在決定自己是誰時，便已展開。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_7_3
passages.content:
<> <>It’s strange. This… hair. I thought it would just be decoration. But it’s changing how I walk. How I breathe. I keep brushing it aside, and every time I do, I feel <>
<> A little more aware of your own presence?<>
<>Yeah. Like I’m filling the space around me in a way I didn’t before.<>
<>That’s the veil’s first lesson. Not to conceal but to expand. A queen’s hair doesn’t hide her. It extends her.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_7_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這很奇怪。這……頭髮。我原以為它只是裝飾。但它正在改變我走路的姿態。我呼吸的方式。我不斷將它撥開，而每當我這麼做時，我都感到

thalara:  對自身存在多了一點覺察？

mc: 是的。就像我正以一種前所未有的方式，填滿我周圍的空間。

thalara: 這就是面紗的第一課。不是為了隱藏，而是為了擴展。女王的頭髮不會掩蓋她。它延伸了她。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_7_4
passages.content:
<> <>So it’s not about modesty.<>
<>No. It’s about magnetism. Ritual. Discipline. Power. Hair this long is a declaration. Not everyone can carry it. You are.<>
<>It’s… beautiful. I won’t lie. But also, I feel so… seen.<>
<>You are. And you will be more and more, in ways you’ve never experienced. You’ll be admired. Envied. Doubted. Desired.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_7_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 所以這與謙遜無關。

thalara: 無關。這關乎吸引力。儀式。紀律。權力。如此長的頭髮是一種宣告。並非人人都能承載它。而你能。

mc: 它……很美。我不否認。但同時，我感到如此……被注目。

thalara: 你確實被注目。而且你將越來越如此，以你從未體驗過的方式。你將被欽羨。被嫉妒。被質疑。被渴望。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_7_5
passages.content:
<> <>And judged, no doubt.<>
<>Always. But the veil gives you a choice. You can use that judgment as a wall or as a mirror. Let it show you what others project, then choose what to reflect back.<>
<>I keep thinking about how different I look now. And how little of who I was remains visible.<>
<>You’re not shedding the past. You’re integrating it. This isn’t a costume. It’s a culmination.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_7_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 毫無疑問，也會被評判。

thalara: 一向如此。但面紗給了你選擇。你可以將那些評判用作一道牆，或一面鏡子。讓它向你展示他人投射了什麼，然後選擇要將什麼反射回去。

mc: 我不斷想著我現在的樣子有多麼不同。以及過去的我，還有多少是清晰可見的。

thalara: 你並非在拋棄過去。你是在整合它。這不是一套戲服。這是一場圓滿。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_7_6
passages.content:
<> <>Then why does it still feel like I’m playing pretend some days?<>
<>Because pretending is practice. And practice is the path to embodiment.<>
<>So I’m nearly there. Nearly wearing the Queen’s Veil.<>
<>Not yet… but you’ll know when the final strands fall. When your hair kisses your hips and wraps you in command. Then, my dear, you won’t just look like royalty you’ll move like it.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 那為什麼有些日子，我仍然覺得自己像是在假裝？

thalara: 因為假裝就是練習。而練習是通往體現的道路。

mc: 所以我快到了。快能戴上女王的面紗了。

thalara: 還未……但當最後的髮絲垂落時，你會知道的。當你的髮絲輕吻你的臀部，將你包裹於統御之中時。那時，親愛的，你不僅看起來像王室，你的一舉一動也將如是。
[我感覺到藥水在我頭部和髮絲中作用]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_8
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Seven candles… fitting for seven steps. I’ve come too far to stop now.|hair_7_hair_8_1]] |

[[So this is it? The last of my old self gone in a strand of hair?|hair_7_hair_8_1]] |

[[You really think a few extra inches of hair makes me some goddess? Let’s get this over with.|hair_7_hair_8_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[七根蠟燭……對應七個階段。我已走得太遠，無法回頭。] |
[所以就是這樣了嗎？我最後的舊日自我，將隨一縷髮絲逝去？] |
[你真的認為多幾英寸頭髮就能讓我成為女神？我們快點結束吧。] |

passages.name: hair_7_hair_8_1
passages.content:
<> <>Seven stages. Seven flames. Seven versions of you… each one further from who you were, and closer to who you are becoming.<>
<>I never thought hair could feel this heavy. Or this important.<>
<>It is not just hair. It is memory made manifest. A timeline in silk. With each inch, you’ve rewritten a part of yourself.<>
<>That sounds more poetic than I’m ready to admit. I still catch myself reaching for the short back I used to have.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_8_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 七個階段。七道火焰。七個版本的你……每一個都離過去的你更遠，離你正在成為的那個人更近。

mc: 我從未想過頭髮能感覺如此沉重。或如此重要。

thalara: 這不僅僅是頭髮。這是具象化的記憶。一段絲綢編織的時間線。每一英寸，你都改寫了一部分的自己。

mc: 這聽起來比我願意承認的更富詩意。我仍然會不自覺地伸手去摸我過去那頭短髮的背後。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_8_2
passages.content:
<> <>Ah. That phantom comfort. The body remembers until it finally accepts the new shape of its story.<>
<>And now that story touches my hips.<>
<>Indeed. It wraps you in softness, yes but also in strength. Feminine grace is not weakness. It is wielded like velvet steel.<>
<>I thought the transformation would feel like losing pieces of me. But sometimes it feels like I’m recovering things I didn’t know I’d buried.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_8_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 啊。那種幻影般的慰藉。身體會一直記得，直到它最終接受其故事的新形態。

mc: 而現在，那故事已觸及我的臀部。

thalara: 確實。它用柔軟包裹著你，是的，但也用力量包裹著你。女性的優雅並非軟弱。它如同天鵝絨鋼鐵般被運用。

mc: 我曾以為這種轉變會感覺像失去一部分的我。但有時感覺像是我正在找回一些我不知道自己早已埋藏的東西。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_8_3
passages.content:
<> <>You’re not becoming someone else. You’re becoming someone more.<>
<>It’s strange. I still feel like me but the world is already reacting to me like I’m someone else.<>
<>The world sees symbols first. Hips. Hair. Softness. Eyes. But only queens command both symbol and substance. That is your path.<>
<>And this is the final step?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_8_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你並非變成另一個人。你是在變得更豐滿。

mc: 很奇怪。我仍然感覺像我自己，但世界已經開始像對待另一個人那樣回應我。

thalara: 世界首先看到的是象徵。臀部。長髮。柔軟。眼眸。但唯有女王能同時駕馭象徵與實質。那就是你的道路。

mc: 而這是最後一步嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_8_4
passages.content:
<> <>For your hair, yes. The veil has dropped. The crown of your hips is your declaration. Now, your every turn, every breath, every glance will be watched, admired, interpreted.<>
<>Sounds exhausting.<>
<>It is. But it’s also intoxicating. You will wield beauty like a blade and tenderness like armor. Not all will understand. But they will kneel, nonetheless.<>
<>Do you know what I see?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_8_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 對你的頭髮而言，是的。面紗已垂落。你臀部的冠冕即是你的宣告。現在，你的每一次轉身、每一次呼吸、每一道目光都將被注視、被欽羨、被解讀。

mc: 聽起來很累人。

thalara: 確實。但它也令人沉醉。你將像揮舞刀刃般運用美麗，像穿戴盔甲般運用溫柔。並非所有人都能理解。但他們仍將跪拜。

thalara: 你知道我看見了什麼嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_8_5
passages.content:
<> <>Enlighten me.<>
<>I see someone who could turn a ballroom into silence with a single entrance. Someone whose laughter will make men ache and women watch. Someone who will never be mistaken for ordinary again.<>
<>That’s a lot to live up to.<>
<>Then live beyond it. You’ve passed every test. Suffered the doubts. Endured the awkward middles. This… this is your unveiling. The hair brushing your hips is not a burden it is your banner.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_8_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 請點醒我。

thalara: 我看見的，是一個能以一次登場便讓舞廳陷入靜默之人。一個笑聲能令男人心碎、女人凝視之人。一個再也不會被誤認為平凡之人。

mc: 這期待可真沉重。

thalara: 那就超越它。你已通過了所有考驗。承受了懷疑。忍受了尷尬的過渡期。此刻……正是你的揭幕之時。垂至你臀部的長髮不是負擔，而是你的旗幟。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_8_6
passages.content:
<> <>I don’t think I can hide anymore. Even if I wanted to.<>
<>Good. Queens don’t hide. They command the room. And from this moment forward… every step you take will remind others of your power.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我想我再也無法隱藏了。即使我想。

thalara: 很好。女王從不隱藏。她們主宰全場。而從此刻起……你的每一步都將提醒他人你的力量。
[我感覺到藥水在我頭上和髮間作用]

passages.name: hair_8_hair_7
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This feels right. It was time. I want to walk a little lighter again.|hair_8_hair_7_1]] |

[[I’m not sure this is what I want. But I know I can't keep pretending it's not weighing on me.|hair_8_hair_7_1]] |

[[Maybe I regret ever letting it grow this long. Don’t expect tears, mage just cut it.|hair_8_hair_7_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[這感覺是對的。是時候了。我想再次走得輕盈些。] |
[我不確定這是否我想要的。但我知道我不能再假裝它沒有壓垮我。] |
[也許我後悔讓它長到這麼長。別指望我會流淚，法師，剪掉它就是了。] |

passages.name: hair_8_hair_7_1
passages.content:
<> <>You came to me once, trembling with doubt but full of possibility. You stood in this very room and drank change like firewater. And now, you ask me to walk you back from that fire.<>
<>I know. And I didn’t come lightly.<>
<>No. You didn’t. I can see the weight behind your eyes. This isn’t about hair, is it?<>
<>...Maybe not just hair. Maybe it’s what it came to represent. How people looked at me. What they expected of me. Every inch felt like another promise I wasn’t sure I could keep.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_8_hair_7_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你曾來找我，渾身顫抖充滿懷疑，卻也充滿可能性。你站在這個房間裡，像飲烈酒般喝下了改變。而現在，你卻要我帶你從那烈火中走回來。

mc: 我知道。而我並非輕率前來。

thalara: 是的，你不是。我看見你眼底的重量。這不僅僅是關於頭髮，對吧？

mc: ……也許不只是頭髮。也許是它所代表的一切。人們看我的眼神。他們對我的期望。每一寸增長都像是另一個我不確定能否履行的承諾。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_8_hair_7_2
passages.content:
<> <>Or didn’t want to keep.<>
<>Do you know why hair is sacred in the old rites?<>
<>Because it holds magic?<>
<>Yes. And because it holds memory. Each strand that grew was spun with your courage, your confusion, your longing. Every lock was a declaration even if you didn’t always know what it declared.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_8_hair_7_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 或者是你不想履行的承諾。

thalara: 你知道為何在古老儀式中，頭髮是神聖的嗎？

mc: 因為它蘊含魔力？

thalara: 是的。也因為它蘊含記憶。每一縷生長的髮絲都編織著你的勇氣、你的困惑、你的渴望。每一綹頭髮都是一種宣言，即使你並不總是清楚它宣告了什麼。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_8_hair_7_3
passages.content:
<> <>And now I’m taking that declaration back.<>
<>Or rewriting it. There's no shame in stepping back to find your balance. But know this, this is not erasure. You cannot undo who you’ve become.<>
<>I don’t want to erase anything. I just… need to breathe. Need to remember what it feels like not to be constantly observed. Measured. Interpreted.<>
<>And do you think a few inches of hair were the cause of all that?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_8_hair_7_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 而現在我要收回那個宣言。

thalara: 或是改寫它。退後一步找回平衡並不可恥。但要明白，這不是抹除。你無法抹去你已成為的那個人。

mc: 我不想抹去任何東西。我只是……需要呼吸。需要記住不被持續注視、衡量、解讀的感覺。

thalara: 而你認為這一切都是那幾英寸頭髮造成的嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_8_hair_7_4
passages.content:
<> <>No. But they were the banner. The signal. And maybe I’m tired of flying it.<>
<>You may feel lighter. But you may also feel loss. You’re allowed to grieve what you’re choosing to let go.<>
<>I think I’m just… scared that this is weakness. That I couldn’t bear the crown I grew.<>
<>Then let me tell you what I see, I see someone strong enough to explore transformation and brave enough to pause it. That isn’t weakness. That’s wisdom.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_8_hair_7_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 不是。但它是旗幟。是信號。也許我只是厭倦了高舉它。

thalara: 你可能會感到輕盈。但你也可能感到失落。你有權為你選擇放手的東西哀悼。

mc: 我想我只是……害怕這是軟弱。害怕我無法承受自己親手培育的冠冕。

thalara: 那麼讓我告訴你我所看見的：我看見一個足夠強大去探索轉變，也足夠勇敢去暫停它的人。那不是軟弱。那是智慧。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_8_hair_7_5
passages.content:
<> <>You always sound like you’ve already seen where my path ends.<>
<>Not ends. Forks. Rivers branch, remember? But the water still flows. Whether you wear your hair to your hips or to your shoulders or not at all your essence remains. The kingdom will respond to that, not your silhouette.<>
<>Will you mourn the veil, Caelan?<>
<>I think I’ll miss the weight. But not the pressure.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_8_hair_7_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 你說話總是像早已看見我道路的終點。

thalara: 不是終點。是分岔。河流會分道，記得嗎？但水仍在流動。無論你將頭髮留到臀部、肩膀，或是根本不留，你的本質依舊。王國回應的會是那個本質，而非你的輪廓。

thalara: 你會為這層面紗哀悼嗎，Caelan？

mc: 我想我會懷念那份重量。但不是那份壓力。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_8_hair_7_6
passages.content:
<> <>Then you’ve made the right choice. Come what may.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼你做出了正確的選擇。無論結果如何。
[我感覺到藥水在我頭上和髮間作用]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_6
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I know what I want now. I’m ready to see myself differently.|hair_7_hair_6_1]] |

[[This isn’t easy. I’m still not sure if this is the right path.|hair_7_hair_6_1]] |

[[If this is what it takes, then so be it. I’m done playing the part.|hair_7_hair_6_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我現在知道我想要什麼了。我準備好看見不同的自己。] |
[這並不容易。我仍不確定這是否正確的道路。] |
[如果這是必經之路，那就這樣吧。我受夠扮演這個角色了。] |

passages.name: hair_7_hair_6_1
passages.content:
<> <>You look at your reflection now, and I see someone who is both familiar and strange. That is the nature of change sometimes it makes us strangers to ourselves.<>
<>It’s… hard to recognize who I am in that mirror.<>
<>Change carves new shapes into our soul’s vessel. But what you see is still you, only in a different light.<>
<>I feel lighter somehow. Less burdened by expectation, but also... less certain.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_6_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你現在看著自己的倒影，我看見一個既熟悉又陌生的人。這就是改變的本質——有時它讓我們對自己感到陌生。
mc: 這……很難認出鏡中的自己是誰。

thalara: 改變在我們靈魂的容器上刻下新的形狀。但你所見的依然是你，只是光線不同了。

mc: 不知怎的，我感到輕盈了些。少了期待的負擔，但也……少了些確定感。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_6_2
passages.content:
<> <>Certainty is a luxury rarely afforded to those who walk transformations. But it is the uncertainty that makes your journey meaningful.<>
<>This potion is bitter, yes. But it carries the grace of slowing the flood, of giving you space to breathe to reconsider.<>
<>Am I retreating or progressing?<>
<>Neither. You are choosing your own rhythm. You have the courage to step forward and to step back. Both are acts of strength.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_6_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 確定感是極少賜予那些經歷轉變之人的奢侈。但正是這份不確定，讓你的旅程有了意義。

thalara: 這藥水是苦澀的，沒錯。但它也帶有緩和洪流、給予你呼吸與重新思考空間的恩典。

mc: 我是在退縮還是在前進？

thalara: 都不是。你是在選擇自己的節奏。你有勇氣向前邁步，也有勇氣向後退步。兩者皆是力量的展現。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_6_3
passages.content:
<> <>Do you fear what this smaller silhouette will say to the world?<>
<>I fear what I will say to myself when I see it. I’ve tasted power, beauty, and expectation wrapped in these long strands. To let them fall is to strip away a part of that identity.<>
<>And yet, identity is never one thing. It is a tapestry woven from many threads some thick, some thin, some shining, some shadowed.<>
<>You are not diminished by letting your hair fall. You are refined. Like silver polished by flame.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_6_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你害怕這個較小的剪影會向世界訴說什麼嗎？

mc: 我害怕當我看見它時，我會對自己說什麼。我已經嚐過蘊藏在這長長髮絲中的力量、美麗與期望。讓它們落下，就是剝去那身份的一部分。

thalara: 然而，身份從來不是單一的。它是一幅由許多線織成的掛毯，有些粗，有些細，有些閃亮，有些陰暗。

thalara: 讓你的頭髮落下並不會減損你。你會被精煉。如同被火焰打磨過的銀器。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_6_4
passages.content:
<> <>Sometimes I wonder if the kingdom will see me as less. If my reflection becomes less of a queen and more of… something else.<>
<>The kingdom sees through the surface only if you let it. True rulership is carried in your spirit, your decisions, your strength. Not the length of your hair.<>
<>Are you ready to embrace what this change means?<>
<>I think I am. I want to find peace in this version of myself, even if it’s unfamiliar.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_7_hair_6_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 有時我會想，王國是否會因此看輕我。如果我的倒影變得不那麼像女王，而更像是……別的什麼。

thalara: 只有當你允許時，王國才會只看表面。真正的統治力存在於你的精神、你的決策、你的力量之中。而非你頭髮的長度。

thalara: 你準備好擁抱這個改變所代表的意義了嗎？

mc: 我想我準備好了。我想在這個版本的自己身上找到平靜，即使它如此陌生。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_7_hair_6_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then let this be a turning point not an ending, but a new beginning. The grace in falling is the promise of rising again.<>
<>Remember, Caelan, every change is a step closer to your truth whatever that may be.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼，讓這成為一個轉折點，不是結束，而是一個新的開始。墜落中的優雅，正是再次升起的承諾。

thalara: 記住，Caelan，每一次改變都讓你更接近你的真實——無論那真實是什麼。
[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_5
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready for this. I want to understand what’s truly mine beneath the surface.|hair_6_hair_5_1]] |

[[It’s hard to let go… but maybe I need to.|hair_6_hair_5_1]] |

[[If this is what it takes to stop feeling lost, then I’ll do it though it feels like giving in.|hair_6_hair_5_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。我想了解表面之下，什麼才是真正屬於我的。] |
[放手很難……但或許我需要這麼做。] |
[如果這是停止感到迷失所必須付出的代價，那麼我會去做，即使這感覺像是屈服。] |

passages.name: hair_6_hair_5_1
passages.content:
<> <>Your willingness, reluctance, or defiance it all matters less than your honesty with yourself. Each choice reveals a piece of your heart.<>
<>It’s strange how cutting back can sometimes feel more powerful than growing forward.<>
<>True strength often lies not in expansion but in restraint. To carry less, but carry it well.<>
<>I’m beginning to see the weight long hair carries. It’s beauty, yes, but also a burden... a borrowed identity.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_5_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的意願、遲疑或抗拒——這些都比不上你對自己的誠實來得重要。每一個選擇都揭示了你內心的一角。
mc: 很奇怪，有時向後修剪，感覺起來比向前生長更有力量。

thalara: 真正的力量往往不在於擴張，而在於克制。承擔得更少，但承擔得更好。
mc: 我開始明白長髮所承載的重量了。是的，它是美麗，但也是一種負擔……一種借來的身份。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_5_2
passages.content:
<> <>Borrowed, yes. A gift from the magic that shaped you, but not the whole story of who you are.<>
<>Tell me, Caelan, what do you feel as your hair shortens?<>
<>A mixture. Relief that it’s not so heavy, but also loss like I’m losing something I earned.<>
<>Loss is not absence. It is transformation. Sometimes shedding is necessary to grow stronger roots.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_5_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的，借來的。是塑造你的魔法所給予的禮物，但並非你全部的故事。

thalara: 告訴我，Caelan，當你的頭髮變短時，你感覺如何？
mc: 很複雜。為它不再那麼沉重而感到輕鬆，但也感到失落……就像我正在失去我贏得的東西。
thalara: 失落並非空無。它是轉變。有時，蛻變是為了讓根基更強壯所必需的。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_5_3
passages.content:
<> <>But how do I hold onto myself when the reflection keeps changing? How do I know who I am beneath these shifts?<>
<>You know by looking beyond the mirror. Your spirit, your choices, your courage those are constants, even as your form shifts.<>
<>Do you remember when you first came here? How uncertain you were?<>
<>Vividly. I was afraid of becoming something I didn’t want to be.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_5_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 但是，當倒影不斷變化時，我該如何抓住自己？在這些變動之下，我如何知道我是誰？

thalara: 透過看向鏡子之外來認識自己。你的精神、你的選擇、你的勇氣——這些都是恆常的，即使你的形體在變化。

thalara: 你還記得你初次來到這裡的時候嗎？那時你是多麼不確定？
mc: 歷歷在目。我那時害怕變成自己不想要的樣子。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_5_4
passages.content:
<> <>And now?<>
<>Now, I’m afraid of losing what I have become... but I also wonder if that fear is keeping me from finding something deeper.<>
<>Fear is a natural companion on any path worth taking. But it should not be a prison.<>
<>I want to be free of that prison. I want to own my reflection whatever it may be, short hair or long.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_5_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那現在呢？
mc: 現在，我害怕失去我已成為的樣子……但我也在想，這份恐懼是否正阻止我發現更深層的東西。

thalara: 在任何值得踏上的道路上，恐懼都是自然的伴侶。但它不該是一座牢籠。
mc: 我想從那座牢籠中解脫。我想擁有我的倒影——無論它是什麼樣子，短髮或長髮。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_5_5
passages.content:
<> <>That is the beginning of true grace. Ownership of your story, not just the appearance.<>
<>This potion, this moment it’s not just about hair. It’s about shedding expectations. About choosing what you carry forward and what you leave behind.<>
<>Sometimes I wonder if the crown I seek is more than just a title or appearance.<>
<>The crown is your spirit, your will, your authenticity. Magic is merely the language we use to speak it.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_5_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就是真正優雅的開始。擁有你的故事，而不僅僅是外表。

thalara: 這藥水，這一刻——不僅僅是關於頭髮。這是關於擺脫期望。關於選擇你要帶往前方的事物，以及你要留在身後的事物。
mc: 有時我會想，我所追尋的王冠，是否不僅僅是一個頭銜或外表。

thalara: 王冠是你的精神、你的意志、你的真實性。魔法僅僅是我們用來述說它的語言。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_5_6
passages.content:
<> <>How do you feel now, Caelan?<>
<>Less like a borrowed image. More like... myself, though still learning who that truly is.<>
<>And that is the path of every ruler worth their salt. The journey inward is the greatest transformation of all.<>
<>Remember, no matter the length of your hair, the kingdom will follow the strength of your heart.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_6_hair_5_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你現在感覺如何，Caelan？

mc: 不那麼像一個借來的形象了。更像……我自己，儘管仍在學習那究竟是誰。

thalara: 而這就是每一位稱職的統治者必經之路。向內的旅程，是所有轉變中最偉大的。

thalara: 記住，無論你的頭髮長度如何，王國都將追隨你內心的力量。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_6_hair_5_7
passages.content:
<> <>I’m beginning to believe that. Maybe this shedding is a gift, not a loss.<>
<>It is. And when you are ready, the magic will be here again always adapting, always growing with you.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我開始相信了。或許這次的蛻變是一份禮物，而非損失。

thalara: 是的。當你準備好時，魔法會再次在此——永遠適應，永遠與你一同成長。[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_4
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I understand now. I want to find myself in a truer way.|hair_5_hair_4_1]] |

[[It’s harder than I imagined to let go of what my hair represented. I’m not sure I’m ready.|hair_5_hair_4_1]] |

[[If this is another step backwards, then so be it. I’ll do whatever it takes to reclaim who I am.|hair_5_hair_4_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我現在明白了。我想以更真實的方式找到自己。] |
[要放下我的頭髮所代表的意義，比我想像的更難。我不確定我是否準備好了。] |
[如果這是另一步倒退，那就這樣吧。我會不惜一切代價，重新找回我自己。] |

passages.name: hair_5_hair_4_1
passages.content:
<> <>You approach this change with an openness I respect, regardless of your feelings about it.<>
<>It still feels strange… like losing a piece of the armor I wore.<>
<>Hair, in magic and metaphor, is armor and banner both. But sometimes the strongest armor is the one we can lay aside.<>
<>But what if the world expects me to keep that armor? To keep the long flowing locks, the symbol of the transformation?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_4_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你以一種我尊敬的開放態度面對這個改變，無論你對它感受如何。
mc: 還是感覺很奇怪……就像失去了我曾經穿戴的一片盔甲。

thalara: 在魔法與隱喻中，頭髮既是盔甲，也是旗幟。但有時，最強大的盔甲是我們能夠卸下的那一件。

mc: 但如果這個世界期望我繼續穿著那盔甲呢？期望我保留那象徵轉變的飄逸長髮？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_4_2
passages.content:
<> <>The world often clings to appearances, yes. But a ruler’s true power is in her resolve, not her looks.<>
<>This potion won’t erase what you’ve become, only refine it. It’s like a sculptor smoothing the rough edges of a statue.<>
<>I wonder if I’m sculpting myself or someone else’s vision of me.<>
<>You are both artist and canvas, Caelan. The choices you make now define the shape your story will take.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_4_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的，這個世界常常執著於表象。但一位統治者真正的力量在於她的決心，而非她的容貌。

thalara: 這藥水不會抹去你已成為的樣子，只會精煉它。就像雕塑家打磨雕像粗糙的邊緣。

mc: 我在想，我是在雕塑自己，還是別人對我的想像。

thalara: 你既是藝術家，也是畫布，Caelan。你此刻的選擇，將決定你故事未來的樣貌。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_4_3
passages.content:
<> <>What do you fear most in this change?<>
<>Losing the identity I fought so hard to embrace. What if shoulder-length hair feels like fading into invisibility?<>
<>Invisibility is not the same as subtlety. Sometimes, the quiet presence commands attention in ways the loud cannot.<>
<>But what if I lose myself in the quiet?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_4_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 在這個改變中，你最害怕的是什麼？

mc: 失去我曾經奮力擁抱的身分。如果及肩的頭髮感覺像是逐漸隱形、消失呢？

thalara: 隱形與細膩並不相同。有時，安靜的存在能以喧囂無法企及的方式吸引目光。

mc: 但如果我在這份安靜中迷失了自己呢？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_4_4
passages.content:
<> <>You do not lose yourself you reveal more layers beneath the surface. Like a melody that’s richer when played softly.<>
<>Your hair has carried your story, yes. But your spirit the true essence of you remains untouched by length or style.<>
<>I want to believe that. It’s just… hard to let go of the beauty, the power, the statement my hair made.<>
<>Power can be wielded in many ways. Elegance and strength are not always loud; sometimes they are quiet, deliberate, and commanding in stillness.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_4_5]] <>

passages.name: hair_5_hair_4_5
passages.content:
<> <>I suppose there’s something freeing about that idea being less visible but no less significant.<>
<>Exactly. Your presence will fill any room, not because of what flows behind you, but because of what shines from within.<>
<>As your hair settles to your shoulders, remember it’s a transformation of essence, not just appearance.<>
<>I feel the change already. A little lighter, a little more… myself, maybe.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_4_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我想，這個想法有種解放感——變得不那麼顯眼，但重要性絲毫不減。

thalara: 正是如此。你的存在將充滿任何房間，並非因為你身後飄動的髮絲，而是因為你內心散發的光芒。

thalara: 當你的頭髮垂落至肩時，記住這是一次本質的轉變，而不僅僅是外觀的改變。

mc: 我已經感覺到變化了。感覺輕盈了一些，感覺更……像我自己了，也許。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_4_6
passages.content:
<> <>That is the gift of this moment. Each length tells a different story, but the author remains constant.<>
<>I want to write my story honestly. Even if it means changing the chapters I once loved.<>
<>And I will be here to guide your pen, no matter where the tale leads.<>
<>How do you feel looking in the mirror now?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_5_hair_4_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這就是此刻的禮物。每一種長度訴說著不同的故事，但作者始終如一。

mc: 我想誠實地書寫我的故事。即使這意味著要改寫我曾鍾愛的篇章。

thalara: 無論故事走向何方，我都會在這裡引導你的筆。

thalara: 現在看著鏡中的自己，你感覺如何？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_5_hair_4_7
passages.content:
<> <>More at peace. Like I’m stepping into a role that fits, instead of wearing a mask.<>
<>That peace will be your greatest strength. The kingdom will see that, even if they cannot see the magic.<>
<>Thank you, Thalara. For helping me find the courage to keep reshaping myself.<>
<>The courage was always within you. Sometimes it just needs a little coaxing to shine.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 更加平靜了。就像我正踏入一個適合的角色，而不是戴著一副面具。

thalara: 那份平靜將是你最大的力量。王國會看見這一點，即使他們看不見魔法。

mc: 謝謝你，Thalara。感謝你幫助我找到勇氣，繼續重塑自己。

thalara: 勇氣始終在你心中。有時，它只是需要一點鼓勵才能閃耀。

[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_3
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to remember who I was. Maybe find who I am now.|hair_4_hair_3_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I’m ready to go back this far, but I have to try.|hair_4_hair_3_1]] |

[[This change won’t break me. I’ll hold onto myself, no matter the length of my hair.|hair_4_hair_3_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想記起我曾是誰。或許，找到現在的我。] |
[我不知道是否準備好回溯到這麼遠，但我必須嘗試。] |
[這個改變不會擊垮我。無論頭髮長短，我都會堅守自我。] |

passages.name: hair_4_hair_3_1
passages.content:
<> <>This has seen many versions of you. The prince you once were, the princess you became, and the soul in between.<>
<>I never thought I’d hold this again. It feels… strange. Almost like a reminder of a past life.<>
<>Memories cling to objects, but they don’t define the present. Yet, they guide us through uncertainty.<>
<>I wonder if I’m losing myself in this reversal. If going back means forgetting everything I fought to become.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_3_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這把梳子見證過許多個你。曾經的王子，後來成為的公主，以及介於兩者之間的靈魂。

mc: 我從沒想過會再次握著它。感覺……很奇怪。幾乎像是對前世的一種提醒。

thalara: 記憶依附於物品，但它們並不定義現在。然而，它們能引導我們穿越迷茫。

mc: 我在想，我是否在這逆轉中迷失了自我。如果回到過去，是否意味著遺忘我奮鬥成為的一切。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_3_2
passages.content:
<> <>Sometimes the path forward loops back, not to erase but to integrate. Freedom is not a destination but a dance.<>
<>How do you feel, knowing your hair will shorten again? That familiar weight will be lost?<>
<>It’s like shedding armor. I want the freedom, but the thought of losing those signs of who I am now… it scares me.<>
<>Fear is natural. To let go of parts of ourselves can feel like losing a piece of our story.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_3_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 有時前進的道路會繞回原點，不是為了抹去，而是為了整合。自由不是一個目的地，而是一場舞蹈。

thalara: 知道你的頭髮將再次變短，感覺如何？那熟悉的重量即將消失？

mc: 就像卸下盔甲。我渴望那份自由，但想到要失去那些代表此刻自我的標誌……這讓我害怕。

thalara: 恐懼是自然的。放下自我的一部分，感覺就像失去了一段自己的故事。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_3_3
passages.content:
<> <>But maybe… maybe it’s not losing, but rewriting? Taking control of the narrative instead of letting it be written for me.<>
<>Exactly. The comb is a tool, not just for hair, but for weaving your identity anew.<>
<>I wonder what the kingdom would say, seeing me with this shorter, less feminine hair. Would they see me as less?<>
<>Acceptance from others is fragile and often conditional. True strength is rooted in how you see yourself.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_3_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 但或許……或許這不是失去，而是改寫？是奪回敘事的主導權，而不是任由它被他人書寫。

thalara: 正是如此。這把梳子不僅是梳理頭髮的工具，更是重新編織你身分的工具。

mc: 我在想，王國的人們會怎麼說，看到我留著這頭更短、較不女性化的頭髮。他們會覺得我不如從前嗎？

thalara: 他人的接納是脆弱且常有條件的。真正的力量，根源於你如何看待自己。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_3_4
passages.content:
<> <>That’s easier said than done. Sometimes I catch myself measuring my worth in appearances and expectations.<>
<>The reflection can be a harsh judge, but remember: the mirror shows only surface. The soul is beyond sight.<>
<>I want to believe that. To see myself without the labels, without the pressure to be perfect or fit a mold.<>
<>Perfection is an illusion, Caelan. Your worth is in your resilience, your courage to choose.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_3_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你並非迷失自己，而是展露了表面之下更多的層次。就像一首以輕柔方式演奏時更顯豐富的旋律。

thalara: 你的頭髮承載了你的故事，是的。但你的靈魂——你真正的本質——並不會因長度或樣式而改變。

mc: 我想相信這一點。只是……很難放下我的頭髮所代表的美麗、力量與宣言。

thalara: 力量可以透過多種方式展現。優雅與力量並非總是喧嘩；有時它們是安靜、深思熟慮，並在靜止中充滿威嚴的。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_3_5
passages.content:
<> <>This potion feels like a step back, but maybe it’s a step toward understanding the whole journey.<>
<>Each strand lost is a piece of the puzzle falling into place. You’re not undoing; you’re refining.<>
<>I’m afraid of what I might lose, but also curious about what I might find beneath.<>
<>And that curiosity will be your guide. No matter the length of your hair, your spirit remains.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_4_hair_3_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這藥水感覺像是倒退一步，但也許它是邁向理解整個旅程的一步。

thalara: 每一縷失去的髮絲，都是拼圖歸位的一片。你不是在復原；你是在精煉。

mc: 我害怕可能會失去的，但也好奇在表象之下可能會發現什麼。

thalara: 而那份好奇心將成為你的嚮導。無論你的頭髮長短，你的靈魂始終如一。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_4_hair_3_6
passages.content:
<> <>Thank you, Thalara. For holding space for all of me the willing, the scared, and the defiant.<>
<>It’s my honor. Remember, no matter the form, you are always whole.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 謝謝你，Thalara。為我所有的面向——情願的、恐懼的、叛逆的——都保留了空間。

thalara: 這是我的榮幸。記住，無論是何種形態，你始終是完整的。

[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_2
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Yes, I’m certain. It’s time to feel what I once sought, even if it’s different now.|hair_3_hair_2_1]] |

[[I’m still unsure, but maybe I need to understand this part of myself better.|hair_3_hair_2_1]] |

[[I’m done with this softness. Let the old strength return, whether anyone likes it or not.|hair_3_hair_2_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[Yes, I’m certain. It’s time to feel what I once sought, even if it’s different now.] |
[I’m still unsure, but maybe I need to understand this part of myself better.] |
[I’m done with this softness. Let the old strength return, whether anyone likes it or not.] |

passages.name: hair_3_hair_2_1
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve come far on this path of change. Tonight’s step isn’t just about hair it’s about confronting the edges of your own spirit.<>
<>Edges that feel sharper, colder. When my hair was longer, I felt sheltered, like wrapped in a warmth I’m not sure I can carry anymore.<>
<>Warmth and shelter can sometimes be a cage, as much as a comfort. You’re stepping out from one and into another.<>
<>That’s what scares me. Will this change make me stronger… or just more hollow?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_2_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你在這條改變之路上已走了很遠。今晚這一步不僅關乎頭髮——更是直面你靈魂的邊界。

mc: 感覺更鋒利、更冰冷的邊界。當我頭髮更長時，我感到被庇護，像是被一種我不確定自己是否還能承載的溫暖所包裹。

thalara: 溫暖與庇護有時既是慰藉，也是牢籠。你正從一個之中踏出，步入另一個。

mc: 這正是我害怕的。這種改變會讓我更強大……還是只會讓我更空洞？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_2_2
passages.content:
<> <>Strength doesn’t come from length or volume. It comes from knowing what you are softness and steel, shadow and light.<>
<>Softness is not weakness, and masculinity is not absence of feeling. They are threads woven into the same tapestry.<>
<>I remember asking you about softness… back when I craved change. I thought it meant surrender.<>
<>And now?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_2_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 力量並非來自長度或份量。它來自於知曉你為何物——柔軟與鋼鐵，陰影與光明。

thalara: 柔軟並非軟弱，陽剛也非缺乏情感。它們是交織在同一幅織錦中的絲線。

mc: 我記得我曾問過你關於柔軟的事……在我渴望改變的時候。我那時以為它意味著投降。

thalara: 那現在呢？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_2_3
passages.content:
<> <>Now, I see softness is more complicated. It’s courage too allowing yourself to be vulnerable without losing control.<>
<>Exactly. And tonight, as you shed those final strands from your shoulders, you’re embracing a different form of courage.<>
<>Do you fear what you’re becoming? Or what you’re leaving behind?<>
<>I fear both. The past felt like a promise, a new version of me. But this… feels like stepping back into old skin that might not fit anymore.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_2_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 現在，我明白柔軟更為複雜。它也是一種勇氣——允許自己脆弱，卻不失去掌控。

thalara: 正是如此。而今晚，當你從肩上褪去那些最後的髮絲時，你正擁抱一種不同形式的勇氣。

thalara: 你害怕你正在成為的樣子嗎？還是害怕你正在拋下的過往？

mc: 兩者都怕。過去感覺像一個承諾，一個嶄新的我。但這……感覺像是重新踏入一件可能已不合身的舊皮囊。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_2_4
passages.content:
<> <>Change isn’t linear, nor is it a battle won or lost. It’s a dance, sometimes forward, sometimes back, but always moving.<>
<>So it’s okay to feel exposed? To feel this uncertainty?<>
<>More than okay. It is necessary. Only when the old is stripped away can the new truly settle.<>
<>Your neck bare now is a place of vulnerability, but also power. It is the pivot of your posture, your voice, your presence.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_2_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 改變並非線性，也非一場勝負已分的戰鬥。它是一支舞，時而前進，時而後退，但始終在移動。

mc: 所以感到暴露也沒關係嗎？感到這種不確定也沒關係嗎？

thalara: 不僅沒關係，更是必要的。唯有當舊的被剝離，新的才能真正安頓。

thalara: 你如今裸露的頸項，是一個脆弱之處，卻也是力量的所在。它是你姿態、聲音、氣場的支點。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_2_5
passages.content:
<> <>I never thought about it that way. I always hid behind my hair, behind the changes. Now, I have no shield.<>
<>Sometimes, the absence of shield invites others to see the true strength beneath. You don’t need armor to command respect.<>
<>Will the kingdom see it? Or will they judge me by the length of my hair, the softness of my voice?<>
<>Judgment is inevitable, but your response to it shapes who you truly are. Your power lies in your reaction.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_2_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我從未這樣想過。我總是躲在頭髮後面，躲在改變後面。現在，我沒有盾牌了。

thalara: 有時，沒有盾牌，反而邀請他人看見底下真正的力量。你不需要盔甲來贏得尊重。

mc: 王國會看見嗎？還是他們會以我頭髮的長短、我聲音的柔和來評判我？

thalara: 評判無可避免，但你對它的回應，才塑造了你真正的樣貌。你的力量在於你的反應。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_2_6
passages.content:
<> <>Are you ready to face what lies beyond the veil of hair, beyond appearances?<>
<>I want to be. But I’m afraid that beneath this softer surface, the old doubts will creep back.<>
<>Those doubts are not enemies they are reminders of your humanity. You don’t have to silence them, only listen and learn.<>
<>Softness is not the absence of power it is its form reshaped. You are not losing yourself. You are refining your essence.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_3_hair_2_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你準備好面對隱藏在髮絲帷幕之外、表象之外的東西了嗎？

mc: 我想準備好。但我害怕在這更柔軟的表象之下，舊日的疑慮會悄悄爬回來。

thalara: 那些疑慮並非敵人——它們是你人性的提醒。你無須壓制它們，只需傾聽與學習。

thalara: 柔軟並非力量的缺席——它是力量重塑後的形態。你並未失去自我。你正在精煉你的本質。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: hair_3_hair_2_7
passages.content:
<> <>Thank you, Thalara. For helping me hold onto myself through all this.<>
<>And thank you, Caelan, for trusting me with your journey. The story is far from over.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 謝謝你，Thalara。感謝你幫助我在這一切中始終堅守自我。

thalara: 也謝謝你，Caelan，感謝你信任我，讓我參與你的旅程。故事還遠未結束。

[I feel the potion working in my head and hair]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_1
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to face myself completely. No more masks, no more illusions.|hair_2_hair_1_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I can do this… but I guess there’s no turning back now.|hair_2_hair_1_1]] |

[[If this means losing everything I built, so be it. I’ll face what’s under, head-on.|hair_2_hair_1_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我已準備好完全面對自己。不再有面具，不再有幻象。] |
[我不確定自己能否做到……但我想現在已無法回頭了。] |
[如果這意味著失去我所建立的一切，那就這樣吧。我將直面隱藏其下的事物，正面迎擊。] |

passages.name: hair_2_hair_1_1
passages.content:
<> <>This moment, Caelan, is the purest form of choice. The final thread that binds you to the path you’ve walked, now loosened.<>
<>I can feel it already. The weight lifting but also the emptiness settling in.<>
<>That emptiness isn’t absence, but a space waiting to be filled with your truth.<>
<>It’s terrifying to stand so bare. No hair, no cover. Just me.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_1_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這一刻，Caelan，是最純粹的選擇形式。那將你束縛於過往道路的最後一根線索，如今已然鬆脫。

mc: 我已經能感覺到了。重擔正在減輕……但空虛也隨之降臨。

thalara: 那空虛並非缺失，而是一個等待被你真實自我填滿的空間。

mc: 如此赤裸地站立著，令人恐懼。沒有頭髮，沒有遮掩。只有我。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_1_2
passages.content:
<> <>And that ‘just you’ is stronger than any crown or cloak. The essence beneath the illusion is your real power.<>
<>But what if I don’t know who that ‘me’ is without the hair? Without the signs of transformation?<>
<>You are not defined by outward signs, but by the choices you make and the strength you nurture within.<>
<>Hair was your armor, your banner, your shield against the world’s gaze. Now you stand with none of that completely exposed.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_1_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而那個「只有你」，比任何王冠或斗篷都更加強大。幻象之下的本質，才是你真實的力量。

mc: 但如果沒有了頭髮，沒有了那些轉變的象徵，我不知道那個「我」是誰呢？

thalara: 定義你的並非外在的標誌，而是你所做的選擇，以及你在內心培育的力量。

thalara: 頭髮曾是你的盔甲、你的旗幟、你抵禦世人目光的盾牌。如今你站立於此，毫無遮掩，完全暴露。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_1_3
passages.content:
<> <>I always thought long hair meant I was closer to the person I wanted to be. Now… I wonder if I was hiding behind it.<>
<>Sometimes hiding is the first step to finding oneself. The illusion is a path, not a prison.<>
<>But I don’t want to be lost in illusions anymore. I want to be seen. Truly seen.<>
<>Then you must be brave enough to show what you’ve always carried beneath the surface.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_1_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我總以為長髮意味著我更接近自己想成為的那個人。現在……我懷疑自己是否一直躲在它後面。

thalara: 有時，躲藏是尋找自我的第一步。幻象是一條路徑，而非牢籠。

mc: 但我不想再迷失於幻象之中了。我想要被看見。真正地被看見。

thalara: 那麼你必須有足夠的勇氣，展現你一直以來隱藏於表象之下的東西。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_1_4
passages.content:
<> <>This final potion isn’t magic to change your form, but magic to reveal your core.<>
<>And if that core is something I don’t recognize?<>
<>You will recognize yourself, perhaps for the first time, without anything to obscure or soften the edges.<>
<>Being bare is vulnerability and from vulnerability grows authentic strength.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_1_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這最後的藥水並非改變你形體的魔法，而是揭示你核心的魔法。

mc: 如果那個核心是我不認識的東西呢？

thalara: 你會認出自己，或許是第一次，沒有任何東西來模糊或柔化你的稜角。

thalara: 赤裸即是脆弱，而從脆弱之中，會生長出真實的力量。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_1_5
passages.content:
<> <>It feels like falling, but maybe it’s just flying, stripped of everything but the essentials.<>
<>You are exactly right. It is the flight of the soul weightless and true.<>
<>Will the kingdom accept me like this? Without the symbols of power they expect?<>
<>Acceptance from others is never guaranteed, but self-acceptance is the foundation of any true reign.<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_1_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這感覺像是墜落，但也許這只是飛行，剝離一切，只剩下最本質的東西。

thalara: 你說得完全正確。這是靈魂的飛翔，無重而真實。

mc: 王國會接受這樣的我嗎？沒有他們所期待的力量象徵？

thalara: 他人的接納從無保證，但自我接納才是任何真正統治的基石。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_1_6
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve journeyed far beyond physical change. This is the test of spirit.<>
<>I want to be strong enough to pass it. Strong enough to lead, no matter how I look.<>
<>You already are. Your courage to face yourself is the mark of a true ruler.<>
<>When you look in the mirror tonight, what will you see?<>
[[Move Forth|hair_2_hair_1_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已遠行至超越肉體改變的境地。這是對靈魂的考驗。

mc: 我希望自己足夠強大，能通過考驗。無論外表如何，都足夠強大去領導。

thalara: 你已經做到了。你面對自我的勇氣，就是真正統治者的標記。

thalara: 今晚當你凝視鏡中，你會看見什麼？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: hair_2_hair_1_7
passages.content:
<> <>Someone unafraid. Someone raw but real. Someone ready to be more than appearances.<>
<>Then you are ready.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my head and hair|use_success_potion_create_hair]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 一個無所畏懼的人。一個粗糙但真實的人。一個準備好超越外表的人。

thalara: 那麼你已準備就緒。

[我感覺到藥水在我頭部和頭髮中起作用]

Needed: <<=_needed>> <<=$userItems[_item].unit>> | Added: <<=$potionInventory[_item]>> <<=$userItems[_item].unit>>
< 0>> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <= $userItems[_item].min_amount*2>> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <
