passages.name: head_ml_head_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Let’s begin. I’ve accepted the path… and I’ll walk it fully.|head_ml_head_mm_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I’m ready, but… I came, didn’t I?|head_ml_head_mm_1]] |

[[This is a waste of time. But if I must drink your cursed brew again, let’s just get it over with.|head_ml_head_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我們開始吧。我已接受這條路……並將完整走完它。] | 
[我不確定是否準備好了，但……我來了，不是嗎？] | 
[這是在浪費時間。但如果我必須再次喝下你那受詛咒的藥水，那就快點結束吧。] |

passages.name: head_ml_head_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <>Your face holds the legacy of your father’s line bold, strong, uncompromising. A sculptor might say it was hewn from stone. But even stone yields, given time… or magic.<>
<>And now you’ll chisel it away. One gulp at a time.<>
<>Not chisel. Melt. Like snow turning to stream. This is not destruction, Caelan. This is reshaping. Every part of you will still be you. Only… seen differently. Felt differently. Worn differently.<>
<>It feels like wearing a mask. One I can never take off.<>
[[Move Forth|head_ml_head_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的臉龐承襲了你父親一脈的遺產——大膽、堅毅、不妥協。雕塑家或許會說那是從岩石中鑿刻出來的。但即使是岩石，假以時日……或魔法，也會屈服。

mc: 而現在你要將它鑿去。一次一口。

thalara: 不是鑿去。是融化。像雪化為溪流。這不是毀滅，Caelan。這是重塑。你的每一部分都仍是你自己。只是……看起來不同了。感受起來不同了。呈現的方式不同了。

mc: 感覺像是戴上一張面具。一張我永遠無法取下的面具。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_ml_head_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <>A mask hides. This brings forth what lies beneath. You may not know her yet, the woman who waits inside. But she is watching… and waiting for breath.<>
<>...You speak like this is sacred.<>
<>Because it is. A face is not just flesh. It’s identity. It’s how the world answers you. But it also shapes how you answer the world.<>
<>So what answers will this face give? Will I smile easier? Cry more? Speak softer?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ml_head_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 面具是隱藏。這則是讓潛藏之物顯現。你可能還不認識她，那位在內心等待的女子。但她正注視著……等待著呼吸。

mc: ……你說得彷彿這是神聖之事。

thalara: 因為它就是。臉龐不僅僅是血肉。它是身份。是世界回應你的方式。但它也塑造了你回應世界的方式。

mc: 那麼這張臉會給出什麼樣的回應？我會更容易微笑嗎？更常哭泣嗎？說話更輕柔嗎？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_ml_head_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>You will smile with meaning. Cry when your spirit demands it. Speak not softer, but with clarity born from both power and elegance. That’s the gift of balance.<>
<>It smells like… violets. And honey.<>
<>And lavender stem, ground moonstone, and a drop of your blood from last night’s offering. All aligned to your lineage, your essence.<>
<>It’s warm… it’s crawling through my jaw… gods, that’s <>
[[Move Forth|head_ml_head_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你將帶著深意微笑。在你的靈魂需要時哭泣。說話並非更輕柔，而是帶著源自力量與優雅的清晰。這就是平衡的禮物。

mc: 它聞起來像……紫羅蘭。還有蜂蜜。

thalara: 還有薰衣草莖、研磨過的月長石，以及一滴你昨晚獻祭的鮮血。一切都與你的血脈、你的本質相契合。

mc: 它是溫熱的……它正爬過我的下顎……天啊，那感覺真是

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_ml_head_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>It will pass. The ache of transition. Your brow is lightening. See? Even your neck relaxes… the angles soften. No more harsh shadow beneath the chin.<>
<>I feel… like I’m sinking into something. Like a blanket pulling over my bones.<>
<>Look. The beginning of grace. Your father’s jaw still echoes there… but now, so too does your mother’s cheekbones.<>
<>It’s me. But not me. It’s… her, isn’t it? The one waiting beneath?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ml_head_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 會過去的。轉變的痛楚。你的額頭正在變得柔和。看？連你的頸部都放鬆了……線條變得柔和。下巴下方不再有生硬的陰影。

mc: 我覺得……好像正沉入某物之中。像有條毯子覆蓋上我的骨骼。

thalara: 看。優雅的開端。你父親的下顎線條仍在那裡迴響……但現在，你母親的顴骨線條也同樣顯現了。

mc: 這是我。但又不是我。這是……她，對吧？那個在底下等待的人？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_ml_head_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <>Only the first glimpse. More will come, if you let it.<>
<>I didn’t think a few degrees of cheekbone would feel different. But it does. Like my smile knows it’s meant for court instead of campfire.<>
<>That is the beginning of understanding. Not just of body but of presence. You will find new ways to be seen. But more importantly… you will learn how to see yourself.<>
<>Do you think she’ll be proud of me? The Queen?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ml_head_mm_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 僅僅是第一瞥。若你允許，更多將會到來。

mc: 我沒想到顴骨幾度的差異會帶來如此不同的感受。但它確實如此。就像我的笑容知道它屬於宮廷，而非營火。

thalara: 那是理解的開端。不僅是對身體，更是對存在本身的理解。你將發現被注視的新方式。但更重要的是……你將學會如何看見自己。

mc: 你認為她會為我感到驕傲嗎？女王？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_ml_head_mm_6
passages.content:
<> <>I think you will be. In time. That matters more than even a crown.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我認為你會的。假以時日。這比任何王冠都更重要。
[我感覺到藥水在我體內作用]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ml
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve made my decision. If strength must return to my face, let it return fully.|head_mm_head_ml_1]] |

[[I don’t know what I’ll see in the mirror after this… but I have to know if it still fits me.|head_mm_head_ml_1]] |

[[I never wanted to lose my face in the first place. Let’s fix what never should’ve changed.|head_mm_head_ml_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我已做出決定。若力量必須回歸我的臉龐，那就讓它完整歸來。] |
[我不知道在這之後，我會在鏡中看見什麼……但我必須知道它是否仍適合我。] |
[我從一開始就不想失去我的臉。讓我們修復那不該改變的模樣。] |

passages.name: head_mm_head_ml_1
passages.content:
<> <>So, the pendulum swings once more. Are you returning to what was? Or simply testing the shape of the past?<>
<>Not everything that’s lost needs replacing. Maybe I want to remember who I was before all of this started.<>
<>Memory lives in more than your bones. But I understand. There’s something sacred about reclaiming old armor, even if it no longer fits as it once did.<>
<>I’ve seen too many versions of my own reflection lately. One day, I see her. The next… someone in between. Maybe I just want a face that matches the fight still left in me.<>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ml_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 所以，鐘擺再次擺盪。你是要回歸過去？還是僅僅在測試過往的形狀？

mc: 並非所有失去的事物都需要替換。也許我只是想記起在這一切開始之前，我是誰。

thalara: 記憶不僅僅存在於你的骨骼中。但我明白。重拾舊盔甲有其神聖之處，即使它已不再如往昔般合身。

mc: 最近我見過太多自己倒影的版本了。某天，我看見她。隔天……是介於兩者之間的人。也許我只是想要一張臉，能與我體內殘存的鬥志相匹配。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ml_2
passages.content:
<> <>You seek the blunt edge again the square lines, the force of masculinity etched across your brow. This draught will give that back, in part. But remember, the mirror shows only surface. Not resolve. Not truth.<>
<>But the world listens to the face before it hears the voice.<>
<>That it does. Then let the face speak the language you need today.<>
<>This one burns more than the last… it’s… tightening. I feel pressure behind my eyes jaw’s locking up. Gods, that’s sharp <>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ml_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你再次尋求那鈍重的稜角、方正的線條，那刻劃在你眉宇間的陽剛之力。這劑藥水將部分歸還這些。但記住，鏡子只映照表面。而非決心。亦非真相。

mc: 但這個世界總是先看臉，再聽聲音。

thalara: 確實如此。那就讓這張臉說出你今天需要的語言吧。

mc: 這劑比上一劑更灼熱……它在……緊縮。我感到眼睛後方有壓力，下顎鎖緊了。天啊，這刺痛感真尖銳。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ml_3
passages.content:
<> <>Let it surge. You’re not weakening you’re hardening. The flesh obeys your will. Look now already, your chin strengthens, your jaw firms. The softness flees like morning fog.<>
<>My brow… it’s like my whole face is shifting forward. Like I’m being carved again.<>
<>And so you are. The angles of command return. You’ve traded the whisper of grace… for the shout of presence.<>
<>My gods. I look… older. Stronger. Harsher.<>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ml_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 讓它奔湧。你不是在軟化，而是在硬化。血肉服從你的意志。看，現在你的下巴已變得堅毅，下顎線條分明。柔軟如晨霧般消散。

mc: 我的眉骨……好像我的整張臉都在向前移動。彷彿我正被重新雕琢。

thalara: 正是如此。那發號施令的稜角回歸了。你已用優雅的細語……換取了存在感的吶喊。

mc: 我的天。我看起來……更年長了。更強壯了。更嚴峻了。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ml_4
passages.content:
<> <>Power wears many masks. This one blunt, assertive is no less royal than the last. The question is: Which do you wear by choice, and which by fear?<>
<>I don’t know yet. But I remember this face. And it remembers battle.<>
<>Then carry it like a sword, not a shield. You don’t have to defend the past. Only learn from it.<>
<>How long until it stays this way?<>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ml_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 力量佩戴著許多面具。這張——直率、強勢——並不比上一張缺少王者風範。問題是：哪一張是你選擇佩戴的，哪一張又是出於恐懼？

mc: 我還不知道。但我記得這張臉。而它也記得戰鬥。

thalara: 那就像揮劍一樣佩戴它，而非像舉盾。你不必捍衛過去。只需從中學習。

mc: 要多久它才會固定成這樣？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ml_5
passages.content:
<> <>As long as you will it to… or until the next turning of the wheel.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 只要你願意……或者直到下一次命運之輪轉動。
[我感覺到藥水在我體內作用]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Another step toward feminine face… Let’s see what this one brings.|head_mm_head_ms_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I’m ready to let more of him go… but I’m here.|head_mm_head_ms_1]] |

[[Fine. Let’s get this over with. Another sip, another piece of me gone.|head_mm_head_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[朝著女性化的臉龐再進一步……看看這次會帶來什麼。] |
[我不知道是否準備好讓他更多的部分離去……但我已在這裡。] |
[好吧。讓我們結束這一切。再飲一口，又一部分的我將消失。] |

passages.name: head_mm_head_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <>Come, Caelan. The next veil lifts today not with force, but with quiet grace. Sit.<>
<>I’ve noticed it, you know. The way my face catches the light differently. How the guards glance at me longer, unsure what they’re seeing.<>
<>Your reflection begins to speak in new tones. Not louder just… more refined.<>
<>I used to have a face that made people step aside in a hallway. Now they hesitate like they don’t know whether to bow or flirt.<>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 來吧，Caelan。今日，下一層面紗將被揭開——不是憑藉力量，而是憑藉靜謐的優雅。坐下。

mc: 你知道嗎，我注意到了。我的臉捕捉光線的方式不同了。守衛們注視我的時間變長了，不確定他們看到了什麼。

thalara: 你的倒影開始以新的語調訴說。並非更響亮，只是……更精緻。

mc: 我曾擁有一張能讓人在走廊上讓路的臉。現在他們猶豫不決，彷彿不知道該鞠躬還是調情。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <>Isn’t that the subtle power of a queen’s presence? Confusion is a kind of control, too.<>
<>Feels more like exposure than control.<>
<>You were carved for war once. But the world you're stepping into now… doesn’t need carved stone. It needs marble shaped by conversation, compromise, and quiet confidence.<>
<>And this is what… smooths more of me away?<>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這不正是女王氣場所具備的微妙力量嗎？困惑也是一種控制。

mc: 感覺更像是暴露，而非控制。

thalara: 你曾為戰爭而被雕琢。但如今你踏入的這個世界……不再需要被雕琢的石頭。它需要的是經由對話、妥協與沉靜自信所塑造的大理石。

mc: 而這就是……將我更多稜角磨平的東西？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>It will lift your brow, lighten the bones beneath your cheeks, soften what’s still holding on. Not to erase who you were but to reveal who you might be beneath the shell of that prince.<>
<>It’s… not as bitter as last time.<>
<>This one’s kinder. Less reshaping, more refining. Tell me what you feel.<>
<>My temples… tingling. Like the bones are loosening beneath the skin.<>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它將抬高你的眉線，減輕你顴骨下的骨骼感，柔化那些仍在堅持的稜角。不是為了抹去過去的你，而是為了揭示在那位王子的外殼之下，你可能成為的樣子。

mc: 它……沒有上次那麼苦。

thalara: 這一劑更溫和。較少重塑，更多精煉。告訴我你的感覺。

mc: 我的太陽穴……在刺痛。好像皮膚下的骨頭正在鬆動。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>Good. The potion’s taking to your essence quickly today. Your body’s stopped resisting. It’s… inviting change.<>
<>My skin feels thinner… no, softer. Like a layer’s peeled away. Gods, even the wind on my face feels different.<>
<>You’re beginning to glow, Caelan. Not from magic, but from balance. Your soul and your body are speaking in harmony, even if your mind still debates.<>
<>...That doesn’t look like a warrior.<>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ms_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 很好。今天藥劑與你的本質融合得很快。你的身體不再抗拒了。它……正在接納改變。

mc: 我的皮膚感覺變薄了……不，是變柔軟了。像有一層被剝離了。諸神啊，連拂過臉上的風感覺都不一樣了。

thalara: 你開始發光了，Caelan。不是魔法所致，而是源於平衡。你的靈魂與身體正和諧共鳴，即使你的心智仍在爭辯。

mc: ……那看起來不像個戰士。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ms_5
passages.content:
<> <>No. But it looks like a ruler who can win battles without lifting a blade.<>
<>My brow isn’t as heavy… my eyes look clearer?<>
<>They were always clear. But now the world might finally notice.<>
<>Mother would say this is progress.<>
[[Move Forth|head_mm_head_ms_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是不像。但它看起來像一位無需舉劍便能贏得戰爭的統治者。

mc: 我的眉骨沒那麼沉重了……我的眼神看起來更清澈了？

thalara: 它們一直都很清澈。但現在，這個世界或許終於會注意到了。

mc: 母親會說這是進步。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_mm_head_ms_6
passages.content:
<> <>And what do you say?<>
<>I say… I’m scared of forgetting who I was. But I don’t hate who I’m becoming.<>
<>Then you are already wiser than most queens crowned before you.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼，你怎麼說？

mc: 我說……我害怕忘記過去的自己。但我不討厭正在成為的這個我。

thalara: 那麼，你已經比在你之前加冕的大多數女王都更有智慧了。
[我感覺到藥劑在我體內作用]

passages.name: head_ms_head_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Time to feel solid again. Let’s bring back some edge.|head_ms_head_mm_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I should undo this… but I have to know what I’m choosing.|head_ms_head_mm_1]] |

[[You’re turning me back. Bit by bit. Is that what the kingdom wants now?|head_ms_head_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[是時候重拾堅實感了。讓我們找回一些稜角吧。] |
[我不確定是否該逆轉這一切……但我必須知道我在選擇什麼。] |
[你要把我變回去了。一點一點地。這就是王國現在想要的嗎？] |

passages.name: head_ms_head_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <>This will not be like the first time, Caelan. Reclaiming form is not as gentle as letting go of it.<>
<>I remember when you first softened my jaw… it felt like fog brushing stone. What will this feel like?<>
<>Like the fog receding. Like your bones remembering the shapes they once held. Some part of you never forgets.<>
<>I started to like this face. Less judgment in it. Less… armor.<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這不會像第一次那樣，Caelan。重拾形體並不像放下它那般溫和。

mc: 我記得你第一次柔化我的下顎時……感覺像霧氣輕撫岩石。這次會是什麼感覺？

thalara: 像霧氣散去。像你的骨骼憶起它們曾經持有的形狀。你的一部分從未忘記。

mc: 我開始喜歡這張臉了。少了些評斷。少了些……盔甲。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_ms_head_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <>And yet, you chose to drink again. Do you seek the armor back, Caelan?<>
<>Maybe. Or maybe I just want to know how much of me is still mine to choose.<>
<>This dose will raise your brow ridge, define your chin, thicken the neck slightly. Your features will speak louder again more command, less grace.<>
<>And will I lose what I’ve gained? The things I’ve learned in silence?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 然而，你選擇再次飲下。你是想尋回那副盔甲嗎，Caelan？

mc: 也許吧。或者我只是想知道，有多少個我仍可由我自己選擇。

thalara: 這劑藥會抬高你的眉脊，定義你的下巴，讓頸部略微增厚。你的五官將再次更響亮地發言——更多威嚴，更少優雅。

mc: 那我會失去我已獲得的東西嗎？那些我在靜默中學到的事物？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_ms_head_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>You will not lose anything, Caelan. This is not a reversal. It is a rebalancing. A different truth carved from the same stone.<>
<>Ugh. That’s… stronger than I remember.<>
<>It has to be. Your body had accepted softness. Now it must be reminded of edge.<>
<>My jaw… it’s tightening. Gods, it’s like sinew pulling back into place.<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你不會失去任何東西，Caelan。這不是逆轉。這是重新平衡。從同一塊石頭上雕琢出的另一種真實。

mc: 呃。這……比我記憶中的更強烈。

thalara: 必須如此。你的身體已接納了柔軟。現在它必須被提醒何謂稜角。

mc: 我的下顎……正在繃緊。諸神啊，這就像肌腱被拉回原位。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_ms_head_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>Your brow is knitting deeper. There’s more shadow to your gaze already.<>
<>It hurts. Not the potion. Just… seeing it return. This isn’t just my face. It’s him. The version of me who never questioned anything.<>
<>Does he scare you?<>
<>He disappoints me. But I don’t hate him.<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的眉頭皺得更深了。你的眼神已然多了更多陰影。

mc: 這很痛。不是藥劑的關係。只是……看著它回來。這不僅僅是我的臉。是他。那個從不質疑任何事的我。

thalara: 他讓你害怕嗎？

mc: 他讓我失望。但我不恨他。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_ms_head_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then you carry him forward with wisdom, not regret.<>
<>There’s strength here. But less peace.<>
<>Strength can be a mask or a mirror. You decide which.<>
<>I’ll need both, won’t I?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_mm_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼，你將帶著智慧而非悔恨，攜他前行。

mc: 這裡有力量。但少了些平靜。

thalara: 力量可以是面具，也可以是明鏡。由你決定是哪一種。

mc: 我兩者都需要，不是嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_ms_head_mm_6
passages.content:
<> <>If you’re to rule Velmoria? Absolutely.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 如果你想統治 Velmoria？絕對需要。
[我感覺到藥劑在我體內作用]

passages.name: head_ms_head_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready. Let’s see who’s waiting behind the mist this time.|head_ms_head_fs_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I’ll recognize myself after this… but I suppose that’s the point, isn’t it?|head_ms_head_fs_1]] |

[[Tell me how much of me will be left once this is over? Or is that not part of the plan?|head_ms_head_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。讓我們看看這次迷霧背後等待著誰。] |
[我不確定在這之後我是否還能認出自己……但我想這就是重點，對吧？] |
[告訴我，這結束後，我還剩下多少自己？或者這不在計畫之內？] |

passages.name: head_ms_head_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <>Today’s potion carries a softer magic, but make no mistake its effects are no less profound. It touches your reflection first, and then… the soul behind it.<>
<>I thought I’d gotten used to these sessions. But this one feels… closer. Like it’ll change what people see in my eyes.<>
<>Because it will. Until now, your features still echoed both the prince and the path before you. But after this… the ambiguity fades.<>
<>So I stop being a ‘he who looks softer’ and become something… uncertain?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 今日的藥劑蘊含較為柔和的魔法，但別搞錯——其效果同樣深刻。它首先觸及你的倒影，然後是……其後的靈魂。

mc: 我以為我已經習慣這些療程了。但這一次感覺……更貼近。彷彿它會改變人們在我眼中看到的東西。

thalara: 因為它確實會。直到現在，你的容貌仍同時迴盪著王子的影子與你面前的道路。但在這之後……那種模稜兩可將會褪去。

mc: 所以我將不再是「那個看起來較柔和的『他』」，而變成某種……不確定的存在？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_ms_head_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <>No, Caelan. You begin to become a ‘she who has not yet arrived.’ There is a difference.<>
<>I keep expecting to wake up and see my old face again. Jawline sharp. Eyes like my father’s. But every time, I drift further. Like memory turning to fog.<>
<>Not fog. Mist. And mist can reveal as much as it hides.<>
<>Will it hurt?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不，Caelan。你開始成為一個「尚未完全抵達的『她』」。這其中有區別。

mc: 我總期待醒來時會再次看到我舊日的臉龐。鋒利的下顎線。如我父親般的眼神。但每一次，我都漂得更遠。像記憶化為霧氣。

thalara: 不是霧氣。是薄霧。而薄霧所揭示的，可能與它所隱藏的一樣多。

mc: 會痛嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_ms_head_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>Not in the way you fear. There may be warmth tingling along the cheekbones, a tightness in your lips. But the real ache comes when you look at the mirror… and she looks back.<>
<>Still bitter as ever…<>
<>The bitterness is not from the potion. It’s from what it asks of you.<>
<>My skin feels… thinner. Not weaker. Just… like silk instead of leather.<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 並非如你所懼怕的那樣。或許顴骨會傳來一陣溫熱的刺痛，你的嘴唇會感到緊繃。但真正的痛楚，是在你望向鏡中時……而她正回望著你。

mc: 還是和以往一樣苦澀……

thalara: 苦澀並非來自藥水。它來自藥水對你的索求。

mc: 我的皮膚感覺……變薄了。並非變弱。只是……像是從皮革變成了絲綢。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_ms_head_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>The cheekbones will lift now. Your lips will taper. The muscles behind your eyes will relax, letting softness pool there.<>
<>How do you know all this? Every inch of change, every flicker?<>
<>I’ve walked others through this mist, Caelan. Queens who were not born as women. Nobles who gave up comfort for clarity. Some of them screamed. Others… sang.<>
<>And what did I do?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_fs_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 顴骨現在會開始上提。你的嘴唇會變得纖細。眼周的肌肉會放鬆，讓柔軟的氣息在那裡匯聚。

mc: 你怎麼知道這一切？每一寸變化，每一次細微的閃動？

thalara: 我曾引領其他人穿過這片迷霧，Caelan。那些並非生而為女的王后。那些為了清晰而放棄安逸的貴族。他們之中有些人尖叫。另一些人……則歌唱。

mc: 那我做了什麼？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_ms_head_fs_5
passages.content:
<> <>You watched the mirror. And you listened. That is rarer than you think.<>
<>She’s already there, isn’t she? The version of me I haven’t met yet.<>
<>She’s not a stranger, Caelan. She’s you without your armor.<>
<>That’s the part I don’t know how to face. What if I like her? What if I don’t?<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_fs_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你注視著鏡子。並且你傾聽著。這比你想像的更為罕見。

mc: 她已經在那裡了，對吧？那個我尚未遇見的我自己。

thalara: 她不是陌生人，Caelan。她是卸下盔甲的你。

mc: 這正是我不知道該如何面對的部分。萬一我喜歡她呢？萬一我不喜歡呢？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_ms_head_fs_6
passages.content:
<> <>You don’t need to love her yet. Just let her breathe.<>
<>My lips… they’re thinner. Softer. Eyes look… different.<>
<>You’re not supposed to recognize her completely. Not yet. She’ll grow clearer with each choice you make.<>
<>I feel like I’m standing between two portraits. Neither finished.<>
[[Move Forth|head_ms_head_fs_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你還不需要愛上她。只需讓她呼吸。

mc: 我的嘴唇……變薄了。更柔軟了。眼睛看起來……不一樣了。

thalara: 你本就不該完全認出她。還不到時候。她會隨著你做出的每一個選擇而變得更加清晰。

mc: 我覺得自己彷彿站在兩幅畫像之間。兩幅都未完成。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_ms_head_fs_7
passages.content:
<> <>Then let your reflection be a painting in progress. And remember what you become doesn’t erase who you were.<>
<>Into the mirror’s mist… and through it, I suppose.<>
<>Exactly, my lady. And mist always clears… when it’s time.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼，就讓你的倒影成為一幅進行中的畫作吧。並且記住，你將成為的樣子，並不會抹去你曾經是誰。

mc: 進入鏡中的迷霧……然後穿過它，我想是這樣。

thalara: 正是如此，我的女士。而迷霧總會散去……當時機到來。
[I feel the potion working in my body]

passages.name: head_fs_head_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to pull back from the edge. Let’s find what still belongs to me.|head_fs_head_ms_1]] |

[[This isn’t as simple as undoing a braid, is it?|head_fs_head_ms_1]] |

[[So we just throw her away? Like none of it mattered?|head_fs_head_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好從邊緣撤回。讓我們找回仍屬於我的部分。] |
[這不像解開一條辮子那麼簡單，對吧？] |
[所以我們就這樣把她拋棄？彷彿一切都無關緊要？] |

passages.name: head_fs_head_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <>This potion… doesn’t erase. It rebalances. But yes, she will step aside for now.<>
<>She’s still there. I can almost see her outline, just behind my eyes.<>
<>And she always will be. This magic doesn’t tear away it folds.<>
<>What if I liked the way she smiled? It was different. Lighter. As if the world wasn’t watching so closely.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這藥水……並非抹除。它是重新平衡。但沒錯，她此刻會退居一旁。

mc: 她仍然在那裡。我幾乎能看見她的輪廓，就在我的眼簾之後。

thalara: 而她將永遠都在。這魔法並非撕裂，而是摺疊。

mc: 萬一我喜歡她微笑的樣子呢？那不一樣。更輕盈。彷彿世界沒有那麼密切地注視著。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fs_head_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <>Then remember it. Even as your lips shift, remember how that smile felt. No transformation can take your truth from you.<>
<>Still bitter. But not like the last ones. This one tastes… dry. Empty, almost.<>
<>Because it’s not building something new it’s closing a chapter. There’s melancholy in that. Even in power regained.<>
<>My skin… feels thicker again. Less delicate. Jaw feels… heavier?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就記住它。即使你的嘴唇正在變化，也要記住那個微笑的感覺。沒有任何轉變能奪走你的真實。

mc: 還是很苦。但不像前幾次。這次嚐起來……乾澀。幾乎是空洞的。

thalara: 因為它並非在構建新事物，而是在結束一個篇章。其中自有憂傷。即使是在重獲的力量之中。

mc: 我的皮膚……感覺又變厚了。沒那麼精緻了。下顎感覺……更重了？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fs_head_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>The lines return gradually. The cheeks broaden. The balance of muscle in your face begins to reassert.<>
<>So I’m becoming him again. Not her. Not both. Just… him.<>
<>No, Caelan. You are still you. But the world will see him first again. It’s only a mask if you forget who's wearing it.<>
<>Why does it hurt more going back than it did going forward?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 線條逐漸回歸。臉頰變寬。你臉部肌肉的平衡開始重新確立。

mc: 所以我又變回他了。不是她。不是兩者。只是……他。

thalara: 不，Caelan。你依然是你。但世界將再次首先看見他。只有當你忘記是誰戴著它時，那才是一個面具。

mc: 為什麼回去比向前走更痛？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fs_head_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>Because forward was the unknown. Backward carries memory. The weight of what you’ve felt, lived, questioned. That’s heavier than transformation.<>
<>I can already feel my cheekbones dulling… my lips firming. The softness is still there, but it's… covered. Hidden.<>
<>And that’s a kind of strength too. You’ve touched grace. Now you carry it inside, even if the mirror forgets.<>
<>What will people see now?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_ms_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為向前是未知。向後則承載著記憶。那些你感受過、經歷過、質疑過的一切的重量。那比轉變更沉重。

mc: 我已經能感覺到我的顴骨在變得遲鈍……我的嘴唇在變得堅實。那份柔軟仍在，但它被……覆蓋了。隱藏了。

thalara: 而這也是一種力量。你已觸及優雅。如今你將其攜於內心，即使鏡子已遺忘。

mc: 人們現在會看到什麼？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fs_head_ms_5
passages.content:
<> <>They’ll see a prince who once glimpsed the queen within. That vision doesn’t vanish. It lives in your voice, your eyes, your choices.<>
<>Will she miss me? The one in the mist?<>
<>She won’t need to. She is you. She’s waiting, not mourning.<>
<>I didn’t expect to grieve.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_ms_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 他們會看到一位曾窺見內心女王的王子。那景象不會消失。它活在你的聲音、你的眼神、你的選擇之中。

mc: 她會想念我嗎？迷霧中的那個她？

thalara: 她不需要。她就是你。她在等待，而非哀悼。

mc: 我沒料到會感到哀傷。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fs_head_ms_6
passages.content:
<> <>Transformation always leaves echoes. Some fade. Some follow. But all of them shape the ruler you will be.<>
<>Then let her echo guide me. Even if the world calls me prince again… she was real. She is real.<>
<>And should the time come to find her again… the mist will part. As it always does.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 轉變總會留下迴響。有些會消逝。有些會跟隨。但它們全都會塑造你將成為的統治者。

mc: 那麼就讓她的迴響引導我吧。即使世界再次稱我為王子……她曾是真實的。她現在也是真實的。

thalara: 而當時機到來，需要再次尋覓她時……迷霧將會分開。一如既往。
[I feel the potion working in my body]

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Let’s do it. If I’m to wear this face before the court, let it be flawless.|head_fs_head_fm_1]] |

[[Another layer peeled away... I’m not sure who’s left underneath.|head_fs_head_fm_1]] |

[[So I’m just a mask now? A doll for court approval?|head_fs_head_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我們開始吧。如果我必須以這張臉面對宮廷，那就讓它完美無瑕。] |
[又一層被剝離……我不確定底下還剩下誰。] |
[所以我現在只是一個面具嗎？一個為了宮廷認可而存在的玩偶？] |

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <>Not a mask. A canvas. And every queen has the right to choose how her portrait is painted.<>
<>This potion looks... prettier than the last.<>
<>Because it touches closer to beauty’s core. The features that stir emotion subtle symmetry, softness, allure.<>
<>So now it’s about being beautiful?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不是面具。是畫布。而每位女王都有權選擇自己的肖像如何被描繪。

mc: 這藥水看起來……比上一瓶更漂亮。

thalara: 因為它觸及了美的核心。那些能激起情感的臉部特徵——微妙的對稱、柔和的線條、誘人的魅力。

mc: 所以現在的重點是變美？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <>It’s about wielding beauty, Caelan. As others wield blades or words. You are nearing a point where your presence alone will speak volumes.<>
<>My lips are already... softer than they were. My eyes seem larger somehow.<>
<>Your face is learning a new language. One not written in strength, but in expression. In silence. In invitation and denial.<>
<>The kind of face that stops a room?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 重點是駕馭美麗，Caelan。就像他人駕馭刀劍或言語一樣。你正接近一個境界，屆時僅憑你的存在就足以說明一切。

mc: 我的嘴唇已經……比之前柔軟了。我的眼睛看起來也莫名變大了。

thalara: 你的臉正在學習一種新的語言。一種不訴諸力量，而訴諸表情的語言。在靜默中。在邀請與拒絕之間。

mc: 那種能讓整個房間為之駐足的臉？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. Or conquers one, without ever raising a voice.<>
<>Tingles this time. Right behind the eyes... and along my jaw. It’s strange.<>
<>The potion eases the underlying muscles. Shapes them to respond to subtler emotion smiles, glances, soft amusement. It draws out grace you didn’t know you possessed.<>
<>My chin looks... different. Pointed?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。或者征服一個房間，無需提高一絲聲量。

mc: 這次有刺痛感。就在眼睛後面……還有沿著下顎。感覺很奇怪。

thalara: 藥水正在舒緩底層的肌肉。塑造它們，讓它們對更細微的情感做出反應——微笑、眼神、輕柔的愉悅。它引出了你從未自知擁有的優雅。

mc: 我的下巴看起來……不一樣了。變尖了？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <>Tapered, yes. And your lips are beginning to round. Soon, every expression you make will be read differently. Felt differently.<>
<>That sounds... dangerous.<>
<>It is. But so is any form of power. Your face will no longer command it will compel.<>
<>Would people even believe I was ever a prince?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_fm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 變纖細了，是的。你的嘴唇也開始變得豐潤。很快，你做出的每一個表情都會被以不同的方式解讀。被以不同的方式感受。

mc: 聽起來……很危險。

thalara: 確實。但任何形式的力量都是如此。你的臉將不再只是命令——它將使人臣服。

mc: 還會有人相信我曾是個王子嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm_5
passages.content:
<> <>Some may forget. Others will only whisper. And a few will remember and revere you for the journey.<>
<>There’s something unreal about it all. Like watching someone else emerge from inside me.<>
<>Not someone else. Just another truth. A truth you buried beneath duty, sword drills, and expectation.<>
<>And if I wanted to stop here?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_fm_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 有些人或許會忘記。其他人只會私下低語。而少數人會記得，並因這段旅程而敬重你。

mc: 這一切有種不真實感。就像看著另一個人從我體內浮現。

thalara: 不是另一個人。只是另一個真實的你。一個被你埋藏在責任、劍術訓練和期望之下的真實。

mc: 如果我想在這裡停下呢？

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm_6
passages.content:
<> <>You could. But you'd carry an unfinished song in your skin. And songs half-sung tend to haunt their singers.<>
<>It already doesn’t feel like mine. And yet... it’s not wrong.<>
<>That’s because you’re not losing yourself you’re unfolding. And every fold you reveal adds depth to the queen you may yet become.<>
<>I don’t know if I’ll ever believe that fully.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_fm_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你可以。但你將帶著一首未完成的歌銘刻於身。而只唱了一半的歌，往往會縈繞著歌者。

mc: 它已經感覺不像我的臉了。然而……這感覺並不壞。

thalara: 那是因為你並非失去自我——你正在綻放。而你展現的每一道褶皺，都為你未來可能成為的女王增添了深度。

mc: 我不知道我是否會完全相信這點。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm_7
passages.content:
<> <>Then believe in the possibility. In the silence of a hall when you walk in. In the way a rival stumbles over their words beneath your gaze. That is real. That is yours.<>
<>So… after this, I won’t just look like someone new. I’ll feel it, too?<>
<>You’ll begin to. And the world will respond. Be ready, Caelan. Beauty carries its own burden.<>
<>Then teach me to wield it. Not like a mask… but like a blade.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fs_head_fm_8]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就相信可能性。相信當你步入大廳時那一片寂靜。相信敵手在你的注視下語無倫次的模樣。那是真實的。那是屬於你的。

mc: 所以……在這之後，我不僅會看起來像個全新的人。我也會感覺到，對嗎？

thalara: 你會開始感覺到的。而世界也會回應。做好準備，Caelan。美麗自有其負擔。

mc: 那就教我駕馭它。不是像面具……而是像一把利刃。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fs_head_fm_8
passages.content:
<> <>Spoken like a true ruler. Grace sharpened is grace that conquers.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這才像真正的統治者會說的話。經過磨礪的優雅，即是征服的優雅。
[我感覺到藥水在體內作用]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to see what’s left of the old me… before it vanishes completely.|head_fm_head_fs_1]] |

[[This doesn’t feel right. Like taking back something I already gave away.|head_fm_head_fs_1]] |

[[I never asked for this elegance. Let it go. Let me go.|head_fm_head_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想看看舊我的殘跡……在它完全消失之前。] |
[這感覺不對。像是收回我已經交出去的東西。] |
[我從未要求這份優雅。讓它去吧。讓我也去吧。] |

passages.name: head_fm_head_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <>You know, most who walk forward through change rarely glance back. And fewer still ask to undo the spell’s embroidery.<>
<>Maybe I just need to know what’s still mine. If anything is.<>
<>This won’t bring back all you were. But it will soften the queenly mark you now wear. A gentler return… not a full retreat.<>
<>My lips… they used to be thinner. I remember biting them before battles, cracking them in the cold.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你知道嗎，大多數在改變中前行的人很少回頭看。而要求撤銷魔法刺繡的人更是少之又少。

mc: 也許我只是需要知道還有什麼是屬於我的。如果還有任何東西屬於我的話。

thalara: 這不會讓你完全變回過去的模樣。但它會軟化你現在所帶有的女王印記。一次溫和的回歸……而非全面撤退。

mc: 我的嘴唇……它們以前更薄。我記得在戰鬥前會咬緊它們，在寒冷中會乾裂。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <>You will feel that tension return. The softness will give way to endurance. Your nose will broaden. The tip will shift upward slightly.<>
<>This curve… It made me look fragile. Vulnerable.<>
<>Now it will firm again. More square, more weight beneath your words. But vulnerability is not weakness, Caelan.<>
<>I know. But the court sees with old eyes.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你將再次感受到那種緊繃感。柔軟將讓位於堅韌。你的鼻子會變寬。鼻尖會略微上揚。

mc: 這道曲線……它讓我看起來脆弱。易受傷害。

thalara: 現在它會再次變得堅實。更方正，為你的話語增添更多分量。但脆弱並非軟弱，Caelan。

mc: 我知道。但宮廷是用舊眼光看人的。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>The court can be taught to blink. If only you dared to stay the course.<>
<>I’m not turning back entirely. I just I need to feel anchored again. Even if only a little.<>
<>Then sip. Let the potion find the tension in your features. Let it sculpt with memory instead of magic.<>
<>It burns, more than I thought.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 宮廷可以被教導著睜開眼睛。只要你敢於堅持下去。

mc: 我不是要完全回頭。我只是……我需要再次感到有所依歸。哪怕只有一點點。

thalara: 那就啜飲吧。讓藥水找到你面容中的緊繃之處。讓它以記憶而非魔法來雕琢。

mc: 好灼熱，比我想像的更甚。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>Because the skin resists what the mind regrets.<>
<>My mouth feels tight again. Less expressive. My nose… sharper somehow.<>
<>The muscles are realigning. Returning to their old habits. You may find your smile changed. Less invitation, more calculation.<>
<>I feel older.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fs_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為皮膚抗拒著心靈所後悔的事物。

mc: 我的嘴巴又感到緊繃了。沒那麼善於表達。我的鼻子……不知怎地變銳利了。

thalara: 肌肉正在重新對齊。回歸它們舊有的習慣。你可能會發現你的笑容改變了。少了邀請的意味，多了算計的感覺。

mc: 我覺得自己變老了。

[繼續]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fs_5
passages.content:
<> <>No. You feel earlier. Before beauty touched you. Before softness tempered you.<>
<>My face… it’s still not what it was. But… there’s something stronger there.<>
<>Strength and beauty are not enemies, Caelan. They’re just two sides of will.<>
<>Do you think I’m making a mistake?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fs_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不。你感受到的是更早的模樣。在美麗觸及你之前。在柔軟將你淬鍊之前。

mc: 我的臉……依然不是從前的樣子。但……那裡多了某種更堅韌的東西。

thalara: 力量與美麗並非敵人，Caelan。它們只是意志的兩面。

mc: 你認為我在犯錯嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fs_6
passages.content:
<> <>I think you’re searching for balance. And the only mistake is believing you must be only one thing or the other.<>
<>Will they still believe in me? The people?<>
<>If you believe in yourself, they will. Whether queen, prince, or something entirely new.<>
<>Then maybe… just for today, I needed to feel something solid. Something I could still call mine.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fs_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我認為你在尋找平衡。而唯一的錯誤，是相信你必須只能是其中一種模樣。

mc: 人們還會信任我嗎？

thalara: 只要你信任自己，他們就會。無論是女王、王子，或是某種全然嶄新的存在。

mc: 那麼或許……就只是今天，我需要感受某種堅實的東西。某種我仍能稱之為自己的東西。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fs_7
passages.content:
<> <>And tomorrow, you may want something else. That is not weakness, Caelan. That is evolution.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而明天，你可能會渴望別的東西。那不是軟弱，Caelan。那是蛻變。
[我感覺到藥水在我體內作用]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fl
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Let it happen. I’ve come too far to stop at almost.|head_fm_head_fl_1]] |

[[What if I don’t recognize myself anymore?|head_fm_head_fl_1]] |

[[Do it. Let’s get this over with. I’ve learned not to flinch.|head_fm_head_fl_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[讓它發生吧。我已走得太遠，不能在幾乎完成時停下。] | 
[如果我不再認得自己了呢？] | 
[動手吧。讓我們結束這一切。我已學會不再退縮。] |

passages.name: head_fm_head_fl_1
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve changed more than just your face, Caelan. This last step this final turn of the sculptor’s hand will not make you someone new. It will only reveal who you’ve chosen to be.<>
<>Will I still see myself in the mirror when it’s done?<>
<>You will see yourself more clearly than ever. But perhaps not the you you were expecting.<>
<>Sometimes I try to remember what I looked like before. Strong jaw. Square chin. A soldier’s face. And now…<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fl_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你改變的不只是臉，Caelan。這最後一步——雕塑家最終的收尾——不會讓你變成另一個人。它只會顯露出你選擇成為的模樣。

mc: 完成後，我還能從鏡中認出自己嗎？

thalara: 你會比以往任何時候都更清晰地看見自己。但或許不是你預期中的那個你。

mc: 有時我試著回憶從前的樣貌。堅毅的下顎線。方正的下巴。一張士兵的臉。而現在……

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fl_2
passages.content:
<> <>And now you carry a face that commands in different ways. Not with fear. With presence.<>
<>Presence. Right. But what if I don’t feel present inside it?<>
<>The body is an instrument. It reflects your soul in time, not the other way around. Let your spirit catch up, or pull ahead whichever path you choose.<>
<>It smells like roses and something ancient.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fl_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而現在你擁有一張能以不同方式統御的臉龐。不是憑藉恐懼。而是憑藉氣場。

mc: 氣場。是啊。但如果我在這張臉裡感受不到自己的存在呢？

thalara: 身體是一件樂器。它會隨著時間映照你的靈魂，而非反其道而行。讓你的靈魂跟上，或是引領向前——無論你選擇哪條路。

mc: 它聞起來有玫瑰和某種古老事物的氣味。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fl_3
passages.content:
<> <>Star-lotus and mirrorvine. Bloom only once per decade, only when bathed in moonlight and truth.<>
<>It’s warm. Almost too warm.<>
<>That warmth is the essence weaving through you. It finds the bones. The skin. The tension that remains.<>
<>I can feel it… my bones are lighter. Is that even possible?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fl_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 星蓮與鏡藤。每十年只綻放一次，唯有沐浴在月光與真實之中時才會開花。

mc: 它是溫熱的。幾乎太熱了。

thalara: 那股暖意是流經你體內的菁華。它尋覓骨骼。肌膚。以及殘存的緊繃。

mc: 我能感覺到……我的骨頭變輕了。這真的可能嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fl_4
passages.content:
<> <>The cheekbones rise to meet your gaze. The jaw eases its burden. The eyes yes, there they open wider now. Not with surprise, but with grace.<>
<>It feels like I’m smiling even when I’m not. These lips… this skin…<>
<>Porcelain smooth. Not made for war, but for rule. That’s a different kind of strength.<>
<>I don’t look like a prince anymore. Or even someone who once was.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fl_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 顴骨隆起，迎向你的注視。下顎卸下了重擔。雙眼——是的，它們此刻睜得更開了。並非出於驚愕，而是帶著優雅。

mc: 感覺就像我即使沒在笑，也像是在微笑。這雙唇……這肌膚……

thalara: 如瓷器般光滑。不是為戰爭而生，而是為統治而生。那是另一種力量。

mc: 我不再像個王子了。甚至不像曾經是王子的那個人。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fl_5
passages.content:
<> <>You don’t look like anyone else, either. You look like her. The queen not yet crowned. The woman forged in fire, shaped by purpose.<>
<>I… I don’t know what to say.<>
<>Then don’t. Let the silence speak. Let it tell you, you’ve arrived.<>
<>It’s done, isn’t it?<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fl_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你也不像其他任何人。你像她。那位尚未加冕的女王。那位在火焰中鍛造、被意志塑形的女子。

mc: 我……我不知道該說什麼。

thalara: 那就別說。讓沉默訴說。讓它告訴你，你已抵達。

mc: 完成了，對嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fl_6
passages.content:
<> <>The outer work, yes. But what happens from here is not my magic. It’s yours.<>
<>I see her now. In the mirror. Not Caelan the prince. Not even Caelan the student. Just… her.<>
<>She is you. Fully, finally. And beautifully so.<>
<>Then let the court look upon me. Let them see the crown they don’t yet know they’ll kneel to.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fm_head_fl_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 外表的轉變，是的。但從此刻開始的變化，並非我的魔法所能及。那是屬於你的。

mc: 我現在看見她了。在鏡中。不是王子Caelan。甚至不是學徒Caelan。只是……她。

thalara: 她就是你。完整地，終於。如此美麗地。

mc: 那麼就讓宮廷注視我吧。讓他們看見那頂他們尚未知曉自己將屈膝臣服的冠冕。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fm_head_fl_7
passages.content:
<> <>As they should. And as you were always meant to be seen.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 理應如此。正如你始終注定被看見的模樣。
[我感覺到藥水在我體內作用]

passages.name: head_fl_head_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[It’s time I find a middle ground one I choose.|head_fl_head_fm_1]] |

[[I thought I’d feel more… finished. But something tugs at me.|head_fl_head_fm_1]] |

[[I never asked to go that far. Now I want something back.|head_fl_head_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[是時候尋找一個中間地帶——一個我選擇的平衡點。] | 
[我以為我會感覺更……完整。但有什麼在牽動著我。] | 
[我從未要求走到那一步。現在我想取回一些東西。] |

passages.name: head_fl_head_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <>You tread backwards through a door few ever dare reopen. Most fear the loss of beauty. Others fear the clarity it brings.<>
<>I didn’t come here to be beautiful. I came to be me. And I’m still figuring out who that is.<>
<>That’s honest. And rare. This elixir won’t return you to the battlefield, nor to the boy who stood at its edge. But it will bring balance if that’s what you truly want.<>
<>My face it felt… right, but not entirely mine. Like a mask I was growing into.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fl_head_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你正踏過一扇少有人敢重新開啟的門，往回走去。多數人畏懼失去美麗。另一些人則畏懼美麗帶來的清晰。

mc: 我來這裡不是為了變美。我是為了成為自己而來。而我仍在摸索那究竟是誰。

thalara: 這很誠實。也很罕見。這劑靈藥不會將你帶回戰場，也不會帶回那個曾站在戰場邊緣的少年。但它會帶來平衡——如果這真是你想要的。

mc: 我的臉……感覺很對，卻又不完全屬於我。像一張我正在逐漸適應的面具。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fl_head_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <>Perhaps you wore it too well. Sometimes perfection imprisons more than it frees.<>
<>What will change?<>
<>The cheeks will ease. The chin will settle stronger. The lips less sculpted, more real. You’ll still carry her grace, but not her ideal.<>
<>That sounds almost… comforting.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fl_head_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 或許你戴得太好了。有時完美帶來的禁錮，多過解放。

mc: 什麼會改變？

thalara: 臉頰會放鬆。下巴會變得更堅毅。雙唇不再那麼雕琢，更加真實。你仍會保有她的優雅，但不會是她的理想化身。

mc: 聽起來幾乎……令人安心。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fl_head_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <>Comfort isn’t weakness, Caelan. Sometimes, it’s the soil in which identity finally takes root.<>
<>It’s like… the pressure is lifting. My bones aren’t pulling as tight.<>
<>Good. The potion listens when the spirit speaks. And yours is steady today.<>
<>It’s firmer again. But not harsh. Just enough.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fl_head_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 舒適並非軟弱，Caelan。有時，那正是身份認同最終扎根的土壤。

mc: 感覺就像……壓力正在消散。我的骨骼不再繃得那麼緊了。

Thalara: 很好。當靈魂發聲時，藥水會傾聽。而你今日的靈魂很穩定。

mc: 它又變得更堅實了。但並不嚴苛。恰到好處。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fl_head_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <>The mirror will show someone neither prince nor queen. But someone true. Someone becoming.<>
<>Less polish. More presence.<>
<>Exactly. Beauty is not a crown. It’s a tool. Sometimes you put it down so your hands can be free.<>
<>I think I needed this. Not to undo anything but to feel like I’m choosing, not being shaped.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fl_head_fm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 鏡子將映照出既非王子亦非女王的人。而是一個真實的人。一個正在成形的人。

mc: 少些雕琢，多些存在感。

Thalara: 正是。美麗不是一頂王冠。它是一件工具。有時你將它放下，雙手才能獲得自由。

mc: 我想我需要這個。不是為了抹去什麼，而是為了感覺我在選擇，而非被塑造。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fl_head_fm_5
passages.content:
<> <>Then you’ve taken your place at the forge. And that, my dear, is the mark of all true rulers.<>
<>So… I’m not less than I was yesterday?<>
<>No. You are more yourself than ever. Every backward step was still forward because you took it.<>
<>I’m ready for the world to see this version of me.<>
[[Move Forth|head_fl_head_fm_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那麼你已在你自己的鍛爐前就位。而這，親愛的，是所有真正統治者的標記。

mc: 所以……我並沒有比昨天遜色？

Thalara: 沒有。你比以往任何時候都更像你自己。每一個後退的步伐依然是前進，因為那是你主動踏出的。

mc: 我準備好讓世界看見這個版本的我了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: head_fl_head_fm_6
passages.content:
<> <>And the world will learn to bow not to perfection, but to truth. That truth is you.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my body|use_success_potion_create_head]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 而世界將學會不向完美鞠躬，而是向真實低頭。那真實就是你。
[我感覺到藥水在我體內作用]

passages.name: left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready for this. If becoming queen means changing, then I want to face it head-on.|left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I like this... But if it’s what the Queen demands, I’ll endure.|left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t want this. Changing who I am feels wrong. |left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已熬好藥水。先讓我看看。 Caelan 你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。如果成為女王意味著改變，那我想要正面迎接它。] |
[我不確定我喜歡這樣……但若是女王的要求，我會忍受。] |
[我不想要這樣。改變我是誰，感覺不對。] |

passages.name: left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <>Whether you welcome it or resist, transformation demands patience. This first potion will not soften your hand, but loosen its grip the grip of old strength and rigid certainty.<>
<>Loosen? Sounds like you want me to lose my edge.<>
<>Not lose reshape. A sword is sharp, yes, but a blade that never bends will shatter. Grace is strength learned anew, not weakness taken.<>
<>I’ve trained my whole life to hold fast. What if I don’t want to let go?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 無論你是欣然接受還是抗拒，轉變都需要耐心。
這第一劑藥水不會軟化你的手，而是鬆開它的握力——鬆開舊有力量與僵化確信的掌控。

mc: 鬆開？聽起來你想讓我失去我的鋒芒。

thalara: 不是失去，是重塑。劍是鋒利的，沒錯，但從不彎曲的刀刃終會碎裂。
優雅是重新習得的強大，而非被奪走的軟弱。

mc: 我訓練了一輩子就是要緊握不放。如果我不想放手呢？
[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <>Letting go does not mean forgetting. The strength in your fingers will remain it will simply serve a different purpose. One less bound to conflict, more to connection.<>
<>I feel the warmth already. It’s spreading, slow and strange.<>
<>That warmth is the magic working through your flesh and bone. It loosens the tension in your tendons, softening where hardness once ruled.<>
<>My knuckles feel lighter, almost... fragile.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 放手並非遺忘。你手指中的力量將會保留——它只是將服務於不同的目的。一個較少束縛於衝突，而更多連結於羈絆的目的。

mc: 我已經感覺到那股暖意了。它正在蔓延，緩慢而奇異。

thalara: 那股暖意是魔法在你血肉與骨骼中運作。它鬆開了你肌腱中的緊繃，軟化了曾經由堅硬主宰之處。

mc: 我的指節感覺變輕了，幾乎……脆弱。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>Fragile is a word your hand has never known. But grace requires lightness, a fluid strength that moves like water over stone.<>
<>I’m not sure I like this feeling. It’s like my hand isn’t mine anymore.<>
<>It is still yours. But yours transformed. The beginning of a hand that will know precision, sensitivity, and elegance alongside power.<>
<>So this is just the first step? The rest will go further?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 「脆弱」這個詞，你的手從未知曉。但優雅需要輕盈，一種如水流過岩石般流動的、流暢的力量。

mc: 我不確定我喜歡這種感覺。好像我的手不再屬於我了。

thalara: 它仍是你的。只是轉變後的你。這是一隻手的開端，它將在力量之外，同時知曉精準、敏銳與優雅。

mc: 所以這只是第一步？後續還會更進一步？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>Much further. Each stage will bring your hand closer to its new shape not weaker, but refined. This first loosening prepares you to embrace what comes next.<>
<>I hope I can hold on to who I am beneath all this.<>
<>You will. This transformation reveals who you are, not erases it. Like a sculptor revealing the statue within the marble.<>
<>And if I resist? If I cling to what I was?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 遠不止如此。每個階段都會讓你的手更接近其新形態——並非更弱，而是更精煉。這第一次的鬆弛，是為了讓你準備好迎接接下來的改變。

mc: 我希望在這一切之下，我還能緊守住我是誰。

thalara: 你會的。這場轉變是揭示你是誰，而非抹去你。如同雕刻家從大理石中顯現出內在的雕像。

mc: 那如果我抗拒呢？如果我緊抓著過去的自己不放？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_hand_ml_left_hand_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <>Resistance may slow the flow, but magic is patient. It will continue shaping you, whether willingly or not. Your choice is in how you meet it.<>
<>Then I’ll try. For now.<>
<>That is all I ask. Breathe into the change, and let the beginning of grace take root.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 抵抗或許能減緩進程，但魔法是耐心的。它將持續塑造你，無論你情願與否。你的選擇在於如何面對它。

mc: 那麼我願意嘗試。至少現在是。

thalara: 這便是我所求。在變化中呼吸，讓優雅的萌芽生根。
[我感到藥水在我左手中作用]

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to reclaim what was once mine.|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_1]] |

[[I never thought I’d want this… to grow tougher again.|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_1]] |

[[I reject this softening they took too much already. |left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想取回曾經屬於我的東西。] |
[我從未想過我會渴望這個……再次變得強韌。] |
[我拒絕這種軟化，他們奪走的已經夠多了。] |

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_1
passages.content:
<> <>The grace you’ve gained is like a whispered song, subtle and delicate. But even the gentlest melody can grow bold again, if you call it forth. <>
<>I’ve felt the looseness, the softening… and now I want the grip back. The power in my hand.<>
<>Power is not lost. it waits beneath the surface, beneath the delicate layers. This potion will draw it back like iron warming in a forge.<>
<>It sounds like a battle in my blood.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你所獲得的優雅，如同一首低吟的歌，細膩而精緻。
但即使是最柔和的旋律，只要你呼喚，也能再次變得激昂。

mc: 我已感受到那種鬆弛，那種軟化……而現在我想要回那份握力。我手中的力量。

thalara: 力量並未消失。它潛伏在表面之下，在精緻的層次之下。
這藥水會將它召回，如同鍛爐中逐漸熾熱的鐵。

mc: 聽起來像是我血液中的一場戰爭。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_2
passages.content:
<> <>A battle, yes but one you control. The strength in muscle and bone will return, tighter and harder, but with the wisdom of what you once embraced.<>
<>I’m afraid of losing what I learned… the balance.<>
<>Balance is not a prison, Caelan. It is a tool. You can wield softness and strength both, but sometimes one must lead.<>
<>What will this feel like? The pain, the change?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 一場戰爭，是的，但由你掌控。
肌肉與骨骼中的力量將會回歸，更緊實、更堅硬，但帶著你曾擁抱過的智慧。

mc: 我害怕失去我所學到的……那份平衡。

thalara: 平衡不是牢籠，Caelan。它是一種工具。
你可以同時運用柔軟與力量，但有時必須由一方主導。

mc: 這會是什麼感覺？痛苦，改變？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_3
passages.content:
<> <>Like cold fire burning deep. Your veins will thrum, muscles knot and tighten, skin thickening like bark on a tree. The world will feel heavier but steadier.<>
<>And the scars? The marks left behind by magic?<>
<>Faint, like whispers in stone. They remind you of your journey where you’ve been and where you choose to go.<>
<>Will the Queen see this as a failure? Turning back?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 如同深處燃燒的冷火。
你的血管將搏動，肌肉糾結緊縮，皮膚增厚如樹皮。世界會感覺更沉重，但也更穩固。

mc: 那傷疤呢？魔法留下的印記？

thalara: 會很淡，如同石中的低語。它們提醒著你的旅程——你曾到過何處，以及你選擇前往何方。

mc: 女王會將此視為失敗嗎？一種倒退？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ml_4
passages.content:
<> <>Strength is never failure. It is adaptation. The throne is not won by change alone, but by the will behind it.<>
<>Then let this be my choice not just magic’s.<>
<>As always, Caelan. The magic shapes the flesh, but the spirit shapes destiny.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 力量絕非失敗。它是適應。王座並非僅靠改變贏得，而是靠其背後的意志。

mc: 那麼，讓這成為我的選擇，而不僅僅是魔法的。

thalara: 一如既往，Caelan。魔法塑造肉體，但靈魂塑造命運。
[我感到藥水在我左手中作用]

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to embrace the softer strength I’ve gained.|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms_1]] |

[[It feels strange to soften, but I trust the process.|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms_1]] |

[[I don’t want to lose my old strength.|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想擁抱我已獲得的、更柔軟的力量。] |
[軟化的感覺很奇怪，但我信任這個過程。] |
[我不想失去我舊有的力量。] |

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <>Your hand has known the roughness of battle the weight of the sword and the sting of sweat. But now, it is time to let the tension ease.<>
<>I feel the power in my grip loosening, like armor melting away.<>
<>Not melting transforming. The muscles relax, the calluses fade, but the core remains. This is strength refined, not lost.<>
<>It’s a different kind of strength, isn’t it? One I’m still learning.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的手曾知曉戰鬥的粗礪——劍的重量，汗水的刺痛。
但現在，是時候讓緊繃鬆弛了。

mc: 我感到我握力中的力量正在鬆懈，如同鎧甲融化脫落。

thalara: 不是融化，是轉化。肌肉放鬆，老繭褪去，但核心仍在。
這是精煉後的力量，並非失去。

mc: 這是另一種力量，對吧？一種我仍在學習的力量。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. Strength that wields not just weapons but words and warmth. Your hand will still hold a sword but also a delicate quill, a lover’s touch.<>
<>It tingles… almost like it’s waking up in a new way.<>
<>That tingling is the awakening of grace within power. You’re beginning to balance both.<>
<>Will it hurt? The change?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。一種不僅能揮舞武器，也能駕馭言語與溫暖的力量。
你的手仍將持劍，但也將執起精緻的羽筆，給予愛人的撫觸。

mc: 有種刺痛感……幾乎像是它以一種新的方式甦醒。

thalara: 那刺痛感是力量之中優雅的覺醒。你正開始平衡兩者。

mc: 會痛嗎？這種改變？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_mm_left_hand_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>There is always some ache in transformation. But this is a softening ache, like stretching after a long battle.<>
<>I want to believe the queen will see me differently stronger, yet softer.<>
<>She will. Because strength wears many faces, and you are learning them all.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 轉變中總伴隨著一些疼痛。
但這是一種柔和的疼痛，如同漫長戰鬥後的伸展。

mc: 我願意相信女王會以不同的眼光看我——更強大，卻也更柔和。

thalara: 她會的。因為力量有許多面貌，而你正在學習全部。
[我感到藥水在我左手中作用]

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to take back the strength I had before.|left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t want to lose the gentleness I’ve found...|left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_1]] |

[[Softness is weakness. I want my old grip back|left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好取回我曾經擁有的力量。] |
[我不想失去我找到的溫柔……] |
[柔軟即是軟弱。我想要回我舊日的握力。] |

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <>The journey from warrior to diplomat brought new grace to your hand. But strength never fully disappears it waits, coiled like a spring.<>
<>I can feel it stirring beneath the surface, like a sleeping wolf.<>
<>This potion will awaken it. The bones will harden, the muscles thicken, the skin roughen. The weight of war will return not as a burden, but as a shield.<>
<>It feels strange, wanting this return after everything.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 從戰士到外交官的旅程，為你的手帶來了新的優雅。
但力量從未完全消失——它等待著，如同盤繞的彈簧。

mc: 我能感覺到它在表面下騷動，像一頭沉睡的狼。

thalara: 這藥水將喚醒它。骨骼將硬化，肌肉將增厚，皮膚將變得粗糙。
戰爭的重量將會回歸——不是作為負擔，而是作為盾牌。

mc: 感覺很奇怪，在經歷這一切後，竟渴望這種回歸。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <>Change is never simple. Your hand has learned to hold both quills and swords. Now it will learn to balance power and precision again.<>
<>Will I lose the touch that calmed the court and soothed allies?<>
<>No. The strongest hands are those that know both strength and gentleness. Your hand will carry that wisdom forward.<>
<>And the pain of transformation? Is it worse this time?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 改變從來就不簡單。你的手已學會同時握持鵝毛筆與長劍。如今，它將再次學習平衡力量與精準。

mc: 我會失去那份安撫朝臣、慰藉盟友的觸感嗎？

Thalara: 不會。最強壯的手，是那些同時懂得力量與溫柔的手。你的手將帶著這份智慧前行。

mc: 那轉變的痛苦呢？這次會更劇烈嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>It burns colder, sharper. Like steel tempered in frost. But pain is a reminder you’re alive, you’re changing, you’re choosing.<>
<>Choosing… yes. For the throne, or for myself?<>
<>That choice, as always, rests with you. Magic is but a tool. will is the true power.<>
<>Then I choose strength.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 它燃燒得更冰冷、更尖銳。如同在寒霜中淬鍊的鋼鐵。但痛苦提醒著你，你還活著，你正在改變，你正在選擇。

mc: 選擇……是的。為了王座，還是為了我自己？

Thalara: 這個選擇，一如既往，取決於你。魔法只是工具。意志才是真正的力量。

mc: 那麼，我選擇力量。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>Then strength it shall be. The weight of war returns to your grasp.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那麼，力量將屬於你。戰爭的重量將重回你的掌握。
[I feel the potion working in my left hand]

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to meet the reflection waiting in this mirror.|left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I like who I see halfway between, but I’ll keep going.|left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t like this shadow self half prince, half princess.|left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好去見鏡中等候的倒影了。] |
[我不確定自己是否喜歡這介於兩者之間的模樣，但我會繼續前進。] |
[我不喜歡這個半王子、半公主的陰影自我。] |

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <>Look closely, Caelan. This hand, this form… it is the threshold of transformation. Neither here nor there, but the promise of what is to come.<>
<>It feels strange, like I’m touching a stranger. My own hand, but different.<>
<>That is the magic at work. The essence of maleness softening, giving way to something new yet familiar. Not erased evolved.<>
<>The nails… they’re longer, and my fingers feel thinner. Like they’re meant to create, not just to grip.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 仔細看，Caelan。這隻手，這個形態……它是轉變的門檻。既非此亦非彼，而是對即將到來之物的承諾。

mc: 感覺很奇怪，彷彿在觸碰一個陌生人。我自己的手，卻又不同。

Thalara: 這就是魔法的作用。男性的本質正在軟化，讓位給某種嶄新卻又熟悉的事物。並非抹去，而是進化。

mc: 指甲……變長了，我的手指感覺更纖細。彷彿它們是為了創造而生，而不僅僅是為了抓握。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. The hand becomes a tool of creation, of subtlety, of expression. Your touch will carry new meaning.<>
<>Am I losing myself in this mirror? Or finding who I truly am?<>
<>Both. The old you is not gone, but expanded. You are becoming whole, in ways you never imagined.<>
<>It’s a delicate balance… I want to keep the strength but embrace the grace.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 是的。這隻手將成為創造、細膩與表達的工具。你的觸碰將承載新的意義。

mc: 我是在這面鏡子中迷失自我嗎？還是正在發現真實的自己？

Thalara: 兩者皆是。舊的你並未消失，而是擴展了。你正在變得完整，以你從未想像過的方式。

mc: 這是個微妙的平衡……我想保留力量，同時擁抱優雅。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>And you shall. This stage is your crucible where metal tempers into fine steel, where spirit learns to dance.<>
<>Will the court accept this new form? Or will they see only the uncertainty?<>
<>Perception shifts with confidence, and confidence you will find within yourself. Your presence will command respect because it will be authentic.<>
<>This is only the beginning, isn’t it?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你會的。這個階段是你的試煉場，金屬在此淬鍊成精鋼，靈魂在此學會起舞。

mc: 朝廷會接受這個新形態嗎？還是他們只會看到不確定性？

Thalara: 觀感會隨著自信而轉變，而這份自信你將在自己內心找到。你的存在將贏得尊重，因為它將是真實不虛的。

mc: 這僅僅是個開始，對吧？
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_ms_left_hand_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>Yes, Caelan. The journey is long, but you step forward with courage. Let the reflection guide you not bind you.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 是的，Caelan。旅程漫長，但你正帶著勇氣向前邁進。讓倒影引導你，而非束縛你。
[I feel the potion working in my left hand]

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to reclaim what I once was.|left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_1]] |

[[I’m unsure about losing this part of me, but maybe it’s time to return.|left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_1]] |

[[I never wanted to change in the first place. I want my old hand back|left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好取回我曾經的模樣了。] |
[我不確定是否要失去這部分的自己，但或許是時候回歸了。] |
[我從一開始就不想改變。我想要回我原來的手。] |

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <>The mirror does not lie, Caelan. What was softened now hardens again feminine curves retreating, strength returning.<>
<>It feels foreign still, like a mask I’m peeling off. My own hand, but less familiar than I remember.<>
<>Change is a journey both ways. The slender fingers thicken, the nails shorten. Power reclaims its form.<>
<>The grace fades… the touch becomes firm again. This is strength, not delicacy.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 鏡子不會說謊，Caelan。曾經柔軟的現在再次變得堅硬，女性的曲線正在消退，力量正在回歸。

mc: 感覺依然陌生，就像我正在剝下一張面具。我自己的手，卻比我記憶中更不熟悉。

Thalara: 改變是一趟雙向的旅程。纖細的手指變得粗壯，指甲縮短。力量重新奪回了它的形態。

mc: 優雅逐漸褪去……觸感再次變得堅定。這是力量，而非精緻。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <>Indeed. A hand built for command and combat, for certainty rather than softness. But remember, strength is tempered by wisdom.<>
<>Am I losing her? The woman I was becoming?<>
<>Not lost, but held in balance. Your essence is multifaceted sometimes one side leads, sometimes the other.<>
<>I want to hold onto my power. I want to be whole again.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 確實。一隻為統御與戰鬥而生的手，為了確信而非柔軟。但記住，力量需由智慧來淬鍊。

mc: 我正在失去她嗎？那個我正在成為的女人？

Thalara: 並未失去，而是被置於平衡之中。你的本質是多面向的——有時這一面主導，有時另一面。

mc: 我想要緊握我的力量。我想要再次變得完整。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>This is the reclaiming of self, not a rejection. You are weaving the threads of your identity anew.<>
<>Will the court see me as less now? As uncertain or weak?<>
<>Perception follows the truth you project. Confidence is your armor, whether in softness or strength.<>
<>So this is the turning point.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 這是自我的重獲，而非拒絕。你正在重新編織你身份的絲線。

mc: 朝廷現在會看輕我嗎？視我為不確定或軟弱？

Thalara: 觀感追隨你所展現的真實。自信是你的盔甲，無論是在柔軟還是力量之中。

mc: 所以，這就是轉折點。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>Yes, the hand that was delicate is now a hand ready to grasp fate once more. Embrace it.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 是的，那隻曾經精緻的手，如今已準備好再次掌握命運。擁抱它吧。
[I feel the potion working in my left hand]

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This feels… easier now. Like my body finally agrees with the change.|left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_1]] |

[[I’m still not sure how much of this is me.|left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_1]] |

[[You keep calling this refinement. But all I see is the strength I earned being covered up|left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[這感覺……現在容易多了。彷彿我的身體終於接受了改變。] |
[我仍不確定有多少部分還是原本的我。] |
[你一直稱這為精煉。但我只看到我辛苦得來的力量被掩蓋了] |

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <>Even the strongest steel, when polished, reveals a gleam. The hand you see is no less powerful, only subtler now meant to wield words, silk, and the weight of crowns.<>
<>It doesn’t ache like before. It just feels… warm. Like sunlight through my fingers.<>
<>That is the body learning to welcome the transformation. No longer bracing against change, but flowing with it.<>
<>The skin… it’s so smooth. Softer than I remember my own ever being. It almost doesn’t look like a man’s hand at all.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 即使是最堅硬的鋼鐵，經過打磨也會顯露光澤。
你看到的這隻手並未減損力量，只是變得更為精細，如今意在駕馭言語、絲綢與王冠的重量。

mc: 它不像以前那樣疼痛了。
只感覺……溫暖。像陽光穿透我的手指。

thalara: 那是身體正在學習接納轉變。
不再抗拒變化，而是與之共流。

mc: 這皮膚……如此光滑。比我記憶中自己的手還要柔軟。
它看起來幾乎不像是一隻男人的手了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <>It isn’t. Not anymore. The edges have dulled, the bluntness dissolved. What remains is grace in every tendon and bone.<>
<>The veins they don’t stand out like they used to. Just faint silver threads now, like embroidery beneath the surface.<>
<>Beautiful, isn’t it? Beauty not as vanity, but as presence. The kind that draws eyes, invites touch, and commands silence.<>
<>So much is changing. It used to feel like a costume. Now it’s starting to feel like a skin I never knew I needed.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 確實不是了。邊緣已鈍化，粗獷已消融。
留存下來的是每一條肌腱與骨骼中的優雅。

mc: 血管不再像過去那樣突出。
現在只是淡淡的銀色細線，像表皮下的刺繡。

thalara: 很美，不是嗎？這美並非虛榮，而是一種存在感。
那種能吸引目光、邀請觸碰、並命令寂靜的美。

mc: 太多東西在改變了。以前感覺像穿著戲服。
現在開始感覺像一層我從未知道自己需要的皮膚。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <>That is not deception, Caelan. That is awakening. You are not hiding behind a mask you are shedding one.<>
<>Will this hand ever fight again? Could I still wield a blade if I needed to?<>
<>You could. But it would be a different kind of strike one aimed at truth, not flesh. This hand now holds influence, not just iron.<>
<>I keep thinking about how it would feel to hold someone’s hand like this. Not as a prince, but… as a lady.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那不是欺騙，Caelan。那是覺醒。
你並非躲在面具之後，你正在蛻去一層面具。

mc: 這隻手還能再戰鬥嗎？如果我需要，還能揮劍嗎？

thalara: 可以。但那會是另一種打擊——旨在真相，而非血肉。
這隻手現在掌握的是影響力，而不僅僅是鋼鐵。

mc: 我一直在想，用這樣的手去握住別人的手會是什麼感覺。不是以王子的身份，而是……以一位淑女的身份。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fs_left_hand_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <>And you will. One day, someone will press their lips to this hand not out of obedience, but reverence.<>
<>It feels strange to say… but I’m starting to like it. How it moves. How it looks in the light.<>
<>That is the silken vein within you awakening the royal pulse beneath the surface. Let it flow, and you will shine.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你會的。總有一天，會有人將雙唇印在這隻手上——並非出於服從，而是出於崇敬。

mc: 這麼說感覺很奇怪……但我開始喜歡它了。喜歡它的動作。喜歡它在光線下的模樣。

thalara: 那是你體內絲綢般的脈絡正在甦醒——表面之下那王族的脈動。讓它流淌，你將會閃耀。
[I feel the potion working in my left hand]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve walked far into femininity… maybe it’s time to step back|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_1]] |

[[I still feel the warmth of what I was becoming|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_1]] |

[[All that grace, that softness they weren’t mine. |left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我已深入女性特質的領域……或許是時候退一步了] |
[我仍能感受到我正在成為的那個模樣所留下的餘溫] |
[所有那些優雅，那些柔軟……它們並不屬於我。] |

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <>Even rivers reverse, for a moment, before finding their course again. This step backward does not erase your journey it reframes it.<>
<>My hand feels heavier. Not like it used to, but… denser. Less like silk, more like flesh again.<>
<>The shimmer fades, but not the memory. What you learned in delicacy remains, even as the skin thickens once more.<>
<>The veins… they don’t lace beneath the surface anymore. They pulse, stronger, clearer. It’s strange how quickly that changes.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 即使是河流，在找到其河道前，也會有逆流的一刻。這一步後退並未抹去你的旅程，而是重新構築了它。

mc: 我的手感覺更沉重了。不像過去那樣，而是……更結實了。不再像絲綢，更像血肉之軀了。

thalara: 光澤會褪去，但記憶不會。你在精細中學到的一切依然留存，即使皮膚再次變得厚實。

mc: 血管……它們不再像刺繡般潛伏在表皮下了。它們搏動著，更強勁、更清晰。變化如此之快，真是奇怪。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <>Not strange. Natural. The body remembers. Just as it can open itself to grace, it can reawaken strength.<>
<>But this strength feels quieter. Like it’s not for show, just… grounding.<>
<>Exactly. This form still carries refinement but it no longer wears it as a crown. It holds it beneath the skin, in stillness.<>
<>You sound like this is some kind of lesson.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不奇怪。很自然。身體記得。正如它能向優雅敞開，它也能重新喚醒力量。

mc: 但這力量感覺更沉靜了。彷彿不是為了展示，只是……為了紮根。

thalara: 正是如此。這副形體仍帶著精煉，但不再將其像王冠般戴在頭上。而是將其蘊藏在皮膚之下，於靜默之中。

mc: 聽起來你覺得這像是某種教訓。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>Every change is. You have known the power of softness, now you carry it differently. It lingers in your manner, your poise even if your wrist no longer narrows like a dancer’s.<>
<>So… what happens next? If I keep going backward, do I lose her completely? The woman I was starting to become?<>
<>Only if you choose to forget her. She’s part of you now woven into the lines of your palm, the tilt of your fingers. A quieter echo, perhaps… but still there.<>
<>It’s less strange than I thought. I feared I’d feel hollow but it’s just… different.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 每一次改變都是。你已體會過柔軟的力量，如今你以不同的方式承載它。它縈繞在你的舉止、你的儀態中——即使你的手腕不再如舞者般纖細。

mc: 那麼……接下來會怎樣？如果我繼續往回走，會完全失去她嗎？那個我開始成為的女人？

thalara: 只有當你選擇忘記她時才會。她現在已是你的一部分，交織在你的掌紋、你手指的傾斜角度之中。或許是一個更安靜的回聲……但依然存在。

mc: 這比我想像的要不奇怪。我曾害怕會感到空虛，但現在只是……不同了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>Different is not lesser. You’ve balanced between worlds, and that balance will remain even as the silk is tucked away.<>
<>So I can walk forward, even if I step back a little first.<>
<>Yes, Caelan. And every step, forward or back, shapes who you become. Not prince or princess, but something whole. Something yours.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不同並非較差。你已在兩個世界之間取得平衡，即使絲綢被收起，這份平衡也將留存。

mc: 所以，即使我先退後幾步，依然可以向前走。

thalara: 是的，Caelan。每一步，無論前進或後退，都在塑造你將成為的樣子。不是王子或公主，而是某種完整的存在。某種屬於你自己的存在。
[I feel the potion working in my left hand]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[If I must become her… then let it be with open eyes.|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_1]] |

[[I’ve come so far. It feels right… but frightening.|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_1]] |

[[So this is what it means to let go entirely. Fine.|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[若我必須成為她……那就讓我睜大眼睛面對吧。] |
[我已走了這麼遠。感覺是對的……但令人恐懼。] |
[所以這就是徹底放手的意義。好吧。] |

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_1
passages.content:
<> <>The body remembers struggle. The hand especially. It holds our pride, our fears, our first instincts. But this final shaping… it is no longer about holding. It is about offering.<>
<>Offering what? Beauty? Compliance?<>
<>Elegance. Precision. Command without force. The hand of a queen guides, soothes, commands and caresses. This is not about surrender. It is about presence.<>
<>You say it like it's sacred.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 身體記得掙扎。手尤其如此。它握著我們的驕傲、恐懼、與最初的本能。但這最終的塑形……不再是關於緊握。而是關於奉獻。

mc: 奉獻什麼？美麗？順從？

thalara: 優雅。精準。無需武力的統御。女王之手引導、安撫、命令與愛撫。這不是關於屈服。而是關於存在。

mc: 你說得好像這很神聖。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_2
passages.content:
<> <>Because it is. This this is the hand that will be extended at coronations, kissed in fealty, held in alliance, raised in judgment.<>
<>It doesn't feel like mine yet.<>
<>Then let it become yours. Drink.<>
<>It’s warm again. Not like before this is deeper. It’s humming inside the joints, in the skin… gods, even my nails are tingling.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為確實如此。這隻手將在加冕禮上伸出、被親吻以示忠誠、在結盟時緊握、在審判時舉起。

mc: 它還不感覺像是我的。

thalara: 那就讓它成為你的。喝下吧。

mc: 又變溫暖了。不像之前……這次更深沉。它在關節裡、皮膚下嗡鳴……天啊，連我的指甲都在刺痛。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_3
passages.content:
<> <>Let the form open. Let the last cords of roughness loosen. Breathe through it, Caelan.<>
<>My fingers… they’re longer. Not just slimmer they move like they’re dancing even when they’re still.<>
<>Yes. The final precision. Not delicate like glass delicate like blade-edge silk. You are not fragile. You are refined.<>
<>Even the smallest movements feel… beautiful. I can feel air ripple off my skin when I raise my hand.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 讓形體敞開。讓粗糙的最後一絲束縛鬆開。呼吸，Caelan，透過它呼吸。

mc: 我的手指……變長了。不只是更纖細……它們即使在靜止時也像在跳舞。

thalara: 是的。最終的精準。不是像玻璃般易碎，而是像刀刃邊緣的絲綢般精緻。你並不脆弱。你是精煉過的。

mc: 即使最微小的動作也感覺……很美。當我舉起手時，能感覺到空氣從皮膚上泛起漣漪。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_4
passages.content:
<> <>That is the culmination. The hand of a queen does not take it invites. It reveals control in grace. Hold it to the light.<>
<>It doesn’t even look like I could have ever held a sword with this hand. But I don’t feel weak. Just… elevated.<>
<>That is how you know the transformation is complete. You are not less. You are more with less effort. Power without force. Command without constraint.<>
<>It’s me. And… it’s her. She’s finally there, in the mirror. In the reach of my hand.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這就是最終的成果。女王之手不索取，它邀請。它在優雅中展現控制。將它舉向光。

mc: 這隻手看起來甚至不像曾經握過劍的樣子。但我並不感到虛弱。只是……昇華了。

thalara: 這便是你知道轉變已完成的方式。你並未減少。你以更少的努力成就更多。無需武力的權力。無需束縛的統御。

mc: 這是我。而且……也是她。她終於在那裡了，在鏡中。在我伸手可及之處。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fm_left_hand_fl_5
passages.content:
<> <>She always was. You simply hadn’t yet met her fingers.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 她一直都在。你只是尚未遇見她的手指罷了。
[我感到藥水正在我的左手中作用]

passages.name: left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Maybe I don’t need to be perfect to rule. Just… present.|left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_1]] |

[[It felt right, the elegance… but I suppose not every part of me|left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_1]] |

[[Maybe it looked like a queen’s hand, but it never felt like mine.|left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[或許統治不需要完美。只需要……在場。] |
[那份優雅感覺是對的……但我想並非我的每一部分都如此] |
[或許它看起來像女王的手，但它從未感覺像是我的。] |

passages.name: left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <>You stand at the edge of what could have been ideal refined, polished, poised. But perfection is not the only crown you may wear.<>
<>The shine fades when I look at it now. My fingers are still long, but they’ve lost that… gleam. That precision.<>
<>Yes. The form remains elegant, but not exquisite. This is the elegance of movement, not of stillness. Of presence, not perfection.<>
<>The skin feels… real again. Less like porcelain. There’s warmth to it. Weight.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你站在那本可臻至理想——精煉、光潔、沉穩——的邊緣。但完美並非你唯一能戴上的王冠。

mc: 現在看著它，那光澤褪去了。我的手指依然修長，但失去了那種……光輝。那種精準。

thalara: 是的。形體依舊優雅，但不再精緻絕倫。這是動態的優雅，而非靜止的。是存在的優雅，而非完美的。

mc: 皮膚感覺……又真實了。不那麼像瓷器。有了溫度。有了重量。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve let go of the image. Now you return to essence. The queen’s hand softens not in failure, but in favor of truth.<>
<>I don’t know if I miss it or feel relieved. I thought I’d want to hold onto it forever.<>
<>What you held was an ideal. And you can return to it, if you wish. But ruling doesn’t come from symmetry. It comes from steadiness.<>
<>Do you think I’ve stepped backward too far?<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已放下了那形象。現在你回歸本質。女王之手並非因失敗而軟化，而是為了更貼近真實。

mc: 我不知道我是懷念它，還是感到解脫。我以為我會想永遠抓住它不放。

thalara: 你所抓住的是一個理想。只要你願意，你可以隨時回到它。但統治並非源於對稱。它源於穩固。

mc: 你認為我退得太遠了嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <>No. You’ve stepped into clarity. And clarity is what a queen needs more than a flawless hand, more than grace that blinds.<>
<>It still moves like hers… just a little heavier. A little less ethereal.<>
<>Then it’s yours now. Not mine. Not your mother’s. Not the idea of a queen etched in glass. But yours.<>
<>Strange how something as simple as a hand can carry so much of who I am becoming.<>
[[Move Forth|left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不。你踏入了清明。而清明，是女王比一隻完美無瑕的手、比令人目眩的優雅更需要之物。

mc: 它移動起來依然像她的手……只是稍微重了一點。少了一點飄渺。

thalara: 那麼它現在是你的了。不是我的。不是你母親的。不是刻在玻璃上的女王理想。而是你的。

mc: 真奇怪，像手這樣簡單的東西，竟能承載這麼多我正在成為的樣子。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_hand_fl_left_hand_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <>Because the hand acts. It touches. It leads. And now, it reflects not who you were told to be… but who you choose to be.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my left hand|use_success_potion_create_left_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為手會行動。它觸碰。它引領。而現在，它反映的不是別人告訴你該成為的樣子……而是你選擇成為的樣子。
[我感到藥水正在我的左手中作用]

passages.content:
