passages.name: left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready. Let’s begin the transformation.|left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I want this… but I’ll try.|left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_1]] |

[[I’m doing this because I have to, not because I want to.|left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經熬好了藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。我們開始轉化吧。] |
[我不確定自己是否想要這個……但我會試試看。] |
[我這麼做是因為我必須如此，而非出於自願。] |

passages.name: left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. The first transformation is never about the body it is about your relationship with what you think it means. <>
<> …Right. <>
<> This draught won’t sculpt breasts or enchant curves. Not yet. All it will do is ask your chest to let go, to ease its grip on a shape that has served you until now. <>
<> So it’ll make me weaker? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。第一次轉化從來不是關於身體本身——而是關於你與你對其意義的認知之間的關係。

mc:
……沒錯。

thalara:
這劑藥水不會塑造胸部或賦予曲線。還不會。它只會要求你的胸膛放開，鬆懈它對那個至今為止一直服務於你的形態的緊握。

mc:
所以它會讓我變弱？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <> No. But it will unfasten the pride your muscles have worn like armor. Not every kind of strength shows in bulk. Sometimes, strength shows in surrender. <>
<> You sound like a philosopher. <>
<> When you’ve brewed potions that change bones and bend voices, you learn to respect the philosophy of flesh. <>
<> This will taste like mint, metal, and maybe… regret. You may feel your chest ache for its former form. That’s normal. Muscles remember. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
不會。但它會解開你的肌肉如盔甲般穿戴的驕傲。並非所有力量都顯現於體積。有時，力量顯現於臣服。

mc:
你聽起來像個哲學家。

thalara:
當你熬製過能改變骨骼、扭轉聲音的藥水後，你就學會尊重肉體的哲學了。

thalara:
這會嚐起來像薄荷、金屬，或許……還有悔意。你可能會感到你的胸膛為它先前的形態而疼痛。那是正常的。肌肉擁有記憶。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <> How fast will it work? <>
<> Gradually. Within the hour, the tautness in your chest will soften. Your posture will shift. Clothes will feel looser. And you may… feel exposed. <>
<> You mean… like I’m losing something? <>
<> You are. But you’re not being robbed. You are offering it, in exchange for something else. That’s what every step in magic is a trade, not a theft. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
效果會多快出現？

thalara:
逐漸地。一小時內，你胸部的緊實感會軟化。你的姿勢會改變。衣物會感覺更寬鬆。而你或許……會感到暴露。

mc:
你是說……就像我正在失去什麼？

thalara:
是的。但你並非被奪走。你正在將其獻出，以換取別的東西。這就是魔法中每一步的本質——一場交易，而非盜竊。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <> …It’s cold. <>
<> Good. That means it’s working. The swelling in your chest will ease first. That defined line under your collarbone it’ll blur. Pectorals will yield to smoother flesh. Your heart will beat more openly, less behind armor. <>
<> …It feels strange already. Like I’ve been… unmade a little. <>
<> That’s the beginning, Caelan. Unmaking to remake. You’re shedding the rigid frame of the past to shape the future queen. You will have moments of doubt moments when you want to reach back. That’s human. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
……好冷。

thalara:
很好。這表示它正在生效。你胸部的腫脹感會先緩解。那鎖骨下分明的線條——它會變得模糊。胸肌將讓位給更柔軟的肌膚。你的心跳會更開放地搏動，不再那麼像藏在盔甲之後。

mc:
……已經感覺很奇怪了。好像我……被拆解了一部分。

thalara:
這就是開始，Caelan。拆解以重構。你正在褪去過往僵硬的框架，以塑造未來的女王。你會有懷疑的時刻——那些你想伸手抓回過去的時刻。那是人之常情。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <> And if I don’t want to reach forward? What then? <>
<> Then you will wrestle with yourself. The path is yours to choose. But know this: transformation is not merely physical; it is the bending of will and mind. The body follows where the spirit leads. <>
<> Sounds like the hardest part is what’s inside. <>
<> Exactly. The body can be changed by potion and spell. The mind that is a more delicate alchemy. One that takes time, patience, and courage. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
那如果我不想向前伸手呢？然後呢？

thalara:
那麼你將與自己角力。道路由你選擇。但要知道：轉變不僅僅是肉體的；它是意志與心靈的彎折。身體追隨靈魂引領的方向。

mc:
聽起來最難的部分在內心。

thalara:
正是。身體可以被藥水和法術改變。心靈——那是更精妙的鍊金術。需要時間、耐心和勇氣的鍊金術。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_leg_ml_left_leg_mm_6
passages.content:
<> <> And you think I have those things? <>
<> I see in you a spirit capable of more than you know. But only you can decide whether to nurture it or let it fade. <>
<> Then… I’ll drink. If not for myself, then for the kingdom. <>
<> That is the first true step. Drink now, and let the change begin. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
而你認為我擁有這些特質嗎？

thalara:
我在你身上看到一個潛力超乎你已知的靈魂。但只有你能決定是要培育它，還是任其消逝。

mc:
那麼……我喝。如果不是為了我自己，那就是為了王國。

thalara:
這是第一個真正的步伐。現在喝下吧，讓改變開始。

[I feel the potion working in my left leg]

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to regain my old strength. Let’s begin the reversal.|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_1]] |

[[I’m unsure if I should do this… but I’ll try.|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_1]] |

[[I’m doing this because I want my body back, not because anyone tells me to.|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想重獲昔日的力量。讓我們開始逆轉吧。] |
[我不確定是否該這麼做……但我會試試看。] |
[我這麼做是因為我想要回我的身體，不是因為任何人告訴我該這麼做。] |

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. Reversal is never about undoing the body alone it is about reclaiming what you believe strength to be. <>
<> …Right. <>
<> This draught won’t carve muscle instantly or restore the bulk of your former self. Instead, it will ask your chest to tighten again to wear the armor of power it once bore with pride. <>
<> So it’ll make me stronger? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。逆轉從來不僅僅是復原身體——更是重新奪回你所相信的力量為何。

mc:
……沒錯。

thalara:
這劑藥水不會立刻雕琢出肌肉，也不會恢復你過往的魁梧體格。相反地，它會要求你的胸膛再次緊實起來——重新披上它曾自豪穿戴的力量鎧甲。

mc:
所以它會讓我變得更強壯？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_2
passages.content:
<> <> Yes, in one way. But strength is more than size it is also the courage to reclaim what was lost. Not every kind of power is visible. Sometimes it shows in resolve. <>
<> You sound like a philosopher. <>
<> When you brew potions that build flesh and restore voice, you learn that flesh has memory and spirit, too. <>
<> This will taste of iron, earth, and maybe… hope. You may feel your chest tighten and muscles contract. That’s normal. Flesh remembers. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
是的，從某種意義上來說。但力量不僅僅是體型——它也是奪回所失之物的勇氣。並非所有形式的力量都肉眼可見。有時它顯現在決心之中。

mc:
你聽起來像個哲學家。

thalara:
當你調製塑造血肉、恢復嗓音的藥水時，你會明白血肉擁有記憶——靈魂亦然。

thalara:
這會嚐起來有鐵、泥土的味道，或許還有……希望。你可能會感到胸口緊繃、肌肉收縮。那是正常的。血肉記得。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_3
passages.content:
<> <> How fast will it work? <>
<> Gradually. Within the hour, your chest will regain tautness. Your posture will harden. Clothes will feel tighter. And you may… feel more guarded. <>
<> You mean… like I’m gaining something back? <>
<> You are. But you are not simply reclaiming what was lost. You are forging it anew stronger, clearer. Every step in magic is a renewal, not a reversal. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
它多久會生效？

thalara:
逐漸地。一小時內，你的胸膛將恢復緊實。你的姿態會變得硬挺。衣服會感覺更貼身。而你或許……會感到更加戒備。

mc:
你是說……就像我正在取回某些東西？

thalara:
是的。但你並非單純取回失去之物。你正在重新鍛造它——更強壯、更清晰。魔法中的每一步都是新生，而非逆轉。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_4
passages.content:
<> <> …It’s hot. <>
<> Good. That means it’s working. The softness in your chest will shrink first. That smooth line under your collarbone will sharpen. Smooth flesh will give way to muscle once again. Your heart will beat with resolve, beneath armor renewed. <>
<> …It feels strange already. Like I’ve been… remade a little. <>
<> That is the beginning, Caelan. Unmaking to remake but now you remake what once was, with intention and will. You will have moments of pride moments when you feel power return. That’s human. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
……好熱。

thalara:
很好。這表示它正在作用。你胸口的柔軟處會最先收縮。你鎖骨下方那平滑的線條會變得銳利。平滑的肌膚將再次讓位給肌肉。你的心臟將在重獲新生的鎧甲下，帶著決心跳動。

mc:
……已經感覺很奇怪了。就像我……被重塑了一點。

thalara:
這只是開始，Caelan。解構以重構——但現在你是帶著意圖與意志，重構曾經的存在。你將會有感到自豪的時刻——感到力量回歸的時刻。那是人之常情。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_5
passages.content:
<> <> And if I want to stop? What then? <>
<> Then you will wrestle with yourself. The path is yours to choose. But know this: transformation and reversal alike shape both body and mind. The body follows where the spirit leads. <>
<> Sounds like the hardest part is what’s inside. <>
<> Exactly. The body can be changed by potion and spell. The mind that is the delicate alchemy. One that takes time, patience, and courage. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
如果我想停止呢？然後呢？

thalara:
那麼你將與自己角力。道路由你選擇。但要知道：無論是轉變還是逆轉，都同樣塑造著身體與心靈。身體追隨靈魂引領的方向。

mc:
聽起來最難的部分在內心。

thalara:
正是。身體可以被藥水和法術改變。心靈——那是精妙的鍊金術。需要時間、耐心和勇氣的鍊金術。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ml_6
passages.content:
<> <> And you think I have those things? <>
<> I see in you a spirit capable of more than you know. But only you can decide whether to nurture it or let it fade. <>
<> Then… I’ll drink. If not for myself, then for my strength. <>
<> That is the first true step. Drink now, and let the restoration begin. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
而你認為我擁有這些特質嗎？

thalara:
我在你身上看到一個潛力超乎你已知的靈魂。但只有你能決定是要培育它，還是任其消逝。

mc:
那麼……我喝。如果不是為了我自己，那就是為了我的力量。

thalara:
這是第一個真正的步伐。現在喝下吧，讓復原開始。

[I feel the potion working in my left leg]

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to regain the muscle and strength I had. Let’s start the reversal.|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ms_1]] |

[[I’m not sure about this, but I’ll try to reverse the change.|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ms_1]] |

[[I’m doing this on my own terms I want my old body back.|left_leg_mm_left_leg_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想重獲曾經擁有的肌肉和力量。讓我們開始逆轉吧。] |
[我不太確定，但我會試著逆轉這個變化。] |
[我按自己的意願行事——我想要回我舊時的身體。] |

passages.name: left_leg_mm_left_leg_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. The journey back is not merely about muscle but about reclaiming your form with intention and purpose. <>
<> …Right. <>
<> This potion will ask your leg to regain its robust muscle, the contours that spoke of strength and endurance. Not just bulk, but the power beneath it the foundation you stand on. <>
<> So it’ll add strength back? <>
<> Yes. But remember, strength also comes from how you carry it. This step restores the structure beneath the surface, the solid ground for all your strides. <>
<> You sound like you’ve done this many times. <>
<> I have. And each restoration teaches me to respect not just the body, but the spirit that drives it. <>
<> This will taste of earth, iron, and a whisper of determination. You may feel a deep warmth in your muscles, a stretching and building sensation. That is normal the flesh remembers its shape. <>
<> How fast will the change take? <>
<> It will come gradually. You will notice your leg firming, strength returning. Movement will feel more grounded, power more assured. <>
<> Will I feel different? <>
<> Yes. You may feel more solid, more anchored. Like a tree that has grown roots where once it swayed. <>
<> Sounds… reassuring. <>
<> That is the magic at work restoring balance and confidence, not just muscle. <>
<> And if I change my mind halfway? <>
<> Then you will face your own will. Magic bends to spirit, but it is no simple path. Reversal, like transformation, is a conversation with yourself. <>
<> I
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
向前一步，Caelan。回歸之路不僅僅關乎肌肉，更是關於以意志與目的重新奪回你的形體。

mc:
…好的。

thalara:
這瓶藥劑將要求你的腿恢復其強健的肌肉，那些訴說著力量與耐力的輪廓。不僅僅是體積，更是其下的力量——你立足的根基。

mc:
所以它會把力量加回來？

thalara:
是的。但記住，力量也來自於你如何承載它。這一步恢復的是表層之下的結構，是你所有步伐的堅實基礎。

mc:
聽起來你已經做過很多次了。

thalara:
確實。而每一次重塑都教會我不僅要尊重身體，更要尊重驅動它的靈魂。

thalara:
這藥劑嚐起來會有泥土、鐵，以及一絲決心的低語。你可能會感到肌肉深處傳來一股暖意，一種伸展與構築的感覺。那是正常的——血肉記得它的形狀。

mc:
變化會多快發生？

thalara:
它會逐漸到來。你會注意到你的腿變得結實，力量正在回歸。移動會感覺更踏實，力量更篤定。

mc:
我會感覺不同嗎？

thalara:
會的。你可能會感覺更穩固、更紮根。就像一棵曾經搖晃的樹，如今已長出根鬚。

mc:
聽起來…令人安心。

thalara:
這就是魔法在運作——恢復平衡與信心，而不僅僅是肌肉。

mc:
如果我中途改變主意呢？

thalara:
那麼你將面對你自己的意志。魔法會順應心靈，但這並非一條簡單的路。逆轉，如同轉變，是一場與自己的對話。

mc:
我想我準備好了。

thalara:
很好。現在喝下它，感受你的力量歸來——穩定而真實。

[我感到藥劑在我的左腿起作用]

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to continue softening the muscle. Let’s do this.|left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_1]] |

[[I’m not sure about this step, but I’ll try.|left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t like losing strength, but if I must…|left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎...

[我準備好繼續軟化肌肉了。我們開始吧。] |
[我不太確定這一步，但我會試試。] |
[我不喜歡失去力量，但如果必須如此…] |

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This phase is about refinement not loss, but transformation. Your left leg will shed the last remnants of rugged bulk, becoming leaner and more graceful. <>
<> …Understood. <>
<> This potion will ease the dense muscle, smoothing harsh edges into gentle curves. Strength will remain enough to serve you in your training but your form will begin to embody a softer, more fluid grace. <>
<> So I won’t be weak? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_2]] <<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
向前一步，Caelan。這個階段關乎精煉而非失去，是轉變。你的左腿將褪去粗獷體積的最後殘餘，變得更精瘦、更優雅。

mc:
…明白了。

thalara:
這瓶藥劑將舒緩緻密的肌肉，將剛硬的邊緣撫平成柔和的曲線。力量將保留足夠以支持你的訓練，但你的形體將開始體現一種更柔和、更流暢的優雅。

mc:
所以我不會變弱？

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <> No. Strength is not only in bulk but in balance. You will find new power in fluidity and precision. <>
<> You speak as if this is an art. <>
<> Magic and art are intertwined. The body is a canvas, and transformation is the brushstroke. <>
<> The taste will be mint with a hint of stone and something elusive like a memory of movement. You may feel a gentle pulse in your muscles, a warmth that signals change. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
不會。力量不僅僅在於體積，更在於平衡。你將在流暢與精準中找到新的力量。

mc:
你說得好像這是一門藝術。

thalara:
魔法與藝術本就交織。身體是畫布，而轉變就是筆觸。

thalara:
味道會是薄荷，帶有一絲石頭的氣息，以及某種難以捉摸的東西——如同對動作的記憶。你可能會感到肌肉中傳來溫和的脈動，一種標誌著變化的暖意。

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <> How quickly will it take effect? <>
<> Gradually. Within the hour, you will notice the muscle softening, the leg’s outline smoothing. Movement will gain a new grace, the beginning of your next form. <>
<> What if I resist? <>
<> Resistance shapes the process, but it cannot stop the current of change. You will feel what you need to feel and learn what you need to learn. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
它多快會生效？

thalara:
逐漸地。一小時之內，你會注意到肌肉軟化，腿部輪廓變得平滑。動作將獲得一種新的優雅，是你下一個形態的開端。

mc:
如果我抗拒呢？

thalara:
抗拒會塑造這個過程，但它無法阻止變化的潮流。你將感受到你需要感受的，並學到你需要學習的。

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <> I’ll drink it then. <>
<> Good. Embrace the change as it comes, Caelan. Each step is part of your destiny. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
那我喝下它。

thalara:
很好。擁抱隨之而來的變化吧，Caelan。每一步都是你命運的一部分。

[我感到藥劑在我的左腿起作用]

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready for this change. Let’s begin.|left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I’m ready, but I’ll try.|left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t want this, but I have no choice.|left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎...

[我準備好迎接這個變化了。我們開始吧。] |
[我不知道自己是否準備好，但我會試試。] |
[我不想要這樣，但我別無選擇。] |

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. Today, the magic crosses a threshold. Your left leg will begin to shift from mere strength into a delicate balance of power and feminine grace. <>
<> …I feel the weight of this step. <>
<> It is no small thing to embrace a new form. This is the point where your flesh softens, your skin smoothes, and subtle curves emerge where once was rigid muscle. <>
<> Will I still be strong? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
向前一步，Caelan。今天，魔法將跨越一個門檻。你的左腿將開始從單純的力量，轉變為力量與女性優雅之間的微妙平衡。

mc:
…我感覺到這一步的份量。

thalara:
擁抱一個新的形態並非小事。這是你血肉軟化、皮膚變得光滑、曾經剛硬的肌肉處開始浮現微妙曲線的時刻。

mc:
我還會強壯嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <> Strength will remain, but it will take on a new shape a grace and fluidity unlike before. Power need not always roar; sometimes it whispers. <>
<> This sounds like a transformation of identity, not just body. <>
<> Indeed. The body and soul are entwined. Your leg will carry a new story one of balance and emerging womanhood. <>
<> The potion tastes of honey and wildflowers, with a touch of earth. You may feel warmth, tingling, or a gentle stretching as your skin and bone reshape. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
力量將會保留，但它將呈現新的形態——一種前所未有的優雅與流暢。力量未必總要咆哮；有時它只是低語。

mc:
這聽起來像是身份的轉變，而不僅僅是身體。

thalara:
確實。身體與靈魂是交織的。你的腿將承載一個新的故事——一個關於平衡與初現的女性特質的故事。

thalara:
藥劑嚐起來有蜂蜜和野花的味道，帶有一絲泥土的氣息。當你的皮膚與骨骼重塑時，你可能會感到溫暖、刺痛，或溫和的伸展感。

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <> How soon will I notice? <>
<> The change will begin within minutes but unfolds over hours. You will see subtle shifts skin softening, curves defining, a new harmony in your movement. <>
<> What if I resist this? <>
<> Resistance is natural. The magic will meet you where you are but moves steadily onward. Yielding allows the transformation to bloom fully. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
我多久會注意到變化？

thalara:
變化將在數分鐘內開始，但會持續數小時逐步展現。你會看到細微的轉變——肌膚柔化、曲線顯現，動作中透出新的和諧感。

mc:
如果我抗拒呢？

thalara:
抗拒是自然的。魔法會從你當下的狀態開始，但會穩定地推進。順應它，才能讓轉變完全綻放。

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_ms_left_leg_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <> I accept it, then. <>
<> Good. Take the vial and drink deeply. Your journey unfolds with each breath. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
那麼，我接受。

thalara:
很好。拿起藥水瓶，深深飲下。你的旅程將隨著每一次呼吸展開。

[我感到藥水在左腿生效]

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to reclaim my old form.|left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_1]] |

[[I’m hesitant, but I’ll try to change back.|left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_1]] |

[[I want this to end. Return me now.|left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好取回舊日的形體。] |
[我有些猶豫，但我會試著變回去。] |
[我想結束這一切。現在就讓我復原。] |

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. Today the magic will reverse the bloom, gently drawing back the feminine grace from your left leg. <>
<> …It feels strange to want to undo something so delicate. <>
<> Transformation is a journey, not a prison. Returning to your former strength is as much a step forward as going beyond. <>
<> Will I lose the grace I’ve begun to feel? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。今日的魔法將逆轉綻放，輕柔地從你的左腿收回那份女性的優雅。

mc:
……想要抹去如此精緻的變化，感覺真奇怪。

thalara:
轉變是一段旅程，而非牢籠。回歸你昔日的力量，與超越自我同樣是向前邁進的一步。

mc:
我會失去已開始感受到的那份優雅嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <> The soft curves will fade, but strength will deepen anew — muscle returning to its bold, steady presence. Power will roar where it once whispered. <>
<> It’s more than just my body changing again. It feels like my identity shifts with it. <>
<> Your body reflects your spirit’s ebb and flow. This reversal reclaims a chapter, but your story continues, rich and complex. <>
<> The draught tastes of iron and pine — grounding, sturdy. You may feel a cool tightening, muscles knitting back, bones firming. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
柔和的曲線將會淡去，但力量會重新深化——肌肉將恢復其鮮明而穩健的存在感。力量將在曾經低語之處咆哮。

mc:
這不僅僅是我的身體再次改變。感覺我的身份也隨之轉移。

thalara:
你的身體映照著你靈魂的潮起潮落。這次逆轉是收回一個篇章，但你的故事仍將繼續，豐富而複雜。

thalara:
藥劑嚐起來有鐵與松木的氣息——沉穩而堅實。你可能會感到一陣涼意緊縮，肌肉重新結實，骨骼變得堅固。

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <> How quickly will the change happen? <>
<> The shift begins immediately but solidifies over hours. Your leg will regain its strength, the soft curves replaced by lean, defined muscle. <>
<> What if I resist going back? <>
<> Magic listens, but it moves steadily. Yield to it, and the change will be smooth; resistance brings strain. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
變化會多快發生？

thalara:
轉變立即開始，但會在數小時內穩固下來。你的腿將重獲力量，柔軟的曲線將被精瘦、分明的肌肉取代。

mc:
如果我抗拒回去呢？

thalara:
魔法會傾聽，但它穩定前行。順應它，變化就會平順；抗拒則會帶來壓力。

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <> I accept this return, then. <>
<> Good. Drink deeply. With each breath, your leg’s form strengthens and hardens anew. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
那麼，我接受這次回歸。

thalara:
很好。深深飲下。隨著每一次呼吸，你腿部的形態將重新強化、堅實。

[我感到藥水在左腿生效]

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to step back to the gentler form I had before.|left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_1]] |

[[I’m not sure, but I’ll accept the change back.|left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_1]] |

[[I reject this deeper change take it away.|left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想退回先前那更柔和的形態。] |
[我不確定，但我會接受變回去。] |
[我拒絕這更深的變化——把它拿掉。] |

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. The magic will now ease the deeper bloom from your left leg, gently returning it to its earlier, softer state. <>
<> It feels like losing a part of myself again. <>
<> Change is fluid, not final. Sometimes we must soften before we grow strong again. <>
<> Will the grace fade completely? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。魔法現在將從你的左腿緩和那更深的綻放，輕柔地讓它回到先前較柔軟的狀態。

mc:
感覺像是再次失去了一部分的自己。

thalara:
變化是流動的，並非終局。有時我們必須先柔軟，才能再次茁壯。

mc:
那份優雅會完全消失嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <> No, the elegance remains — just less pronounced, more subtle. Your leg will still carry beauty, but with a lighter touch. <>
<> I’ve grown used to this deeper femininity… going back feels strange. <>
<> Your body remembers every step. This reversal is a gentle retreat, not a loss. You are still becoming, still evolving. <>
<> The potion tastes soft and floral, with a hint of earthiness. You may feel a soothing warmth as the curves ease. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
不，優雅仍會留存——只是不再那麼明顯，更加細微。你的腿仍將承載美麗，但以更輕盈的觸感呈現。

mc:
我已習慣了這更深層的女性特質……回去感覺很奇怪。

thalara:
你的身體記得每一步。這次逆轉是一次溫柔的退卻，而非失去。你仍在成為，仍在演化。

thalara:
藥水嚐起來柔軟而帶花香，有一絲泥土氣息。你可能會感到一股舒緩的暖意，曲線隨之緩和。

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <> How soon will I feel the change? <>
<> The shift will begin quickly but deepen gradually over the day. <>
<> What if I resist going back? <>
<> Magic flows best with your will. Resistance makes the path longer, but it listens still. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
我多快會感覺到變化？

thalara:
轉變將迅速開始，但會在一整天內逐漸深化。

mc:
如果我抗拒回去呢？

thalara:
魔法與你的意志共流時效果最佳。抗拒會讓路途更長，但它依然會傾聽。

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_fs_left_leg_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <> I’m ready to accept the change. <>
<> Then drink, and let your leg soften gently, the pronounced curves ebbing to reveal the subtler beauty beneath. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
我準備好接受變化了。

thalara:
那麼飲下吧，讓你的腿輕柔地軟化，明顯的曲線逐漸消退，顯露出底下更細微的美麗。

[我感到藥水在左腿生效]

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to embrace more of this feminine grace.|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_1]] |

[[I’m nervous, but I’ll try to accept the change.|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t want this, but if I must, so be it.|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好接納更多這份女性的優雅。] |
[我很緊張，但我會試著接受變化。] |
[我不想要這樣，但如果必須，那就這樣吧。] |

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. Today’s potion will deepen the feminine bloom in your left leg, enriching its curves and grace beyond what you’ve felt before. <>
<> I’ve felt this before, but... will it be overwhelming? <>
<> The change is gentle but undeniable. Your leg will carry itself with more fluidity, the subtle curves blossoming into something more pronounced. <>
<> Will I lose any of my strength? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。今日的藥水將深化你左腿的女性綻放，使其曲線與優雅超越你以往所感，更加豐盈。

mc:
我曾感受過這種變化，但……這次會難以承受嗎？

thalara:
變化是溫和的，但無可否認。你的腿將以更流暢的姿態行動，細微的曲線將綻放成更為明顯的形態。

mc:
我會失去任何力量嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <> Strength will shift in nature, from raw muscle to elegant power — grace itself is a form of strength. <>
<> I’m ready to see what this deeper form feels like. <>
<> Good. The potion tastes like fresh petals and dew, a softness that seeps into bone and skin alike. <>
<> How fast will the transformation take hold? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
力量的本質將會轉變，從原始的肌肉轉為優雅的力量——優雅本身就是一種力量的形式。

mc:
我準備好體驗這種更深層次的形態了。

Thalara:
很好。這藥水嚐起來像新鮮花瓣與露水，一種柔軟感滲入你的骨骼與肌膚。

mc:
變化的效果會多快顯現？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <> The change will flow through your flesh quickly, deepening over the next hours. Your leg will feel lighter, more graceful with each step. <>
<> What if I want to stop or reverse it later? <>
<> Magic responds to your will. Acceptance hastens the process, resistance slows it but never fully stops it once begun. <>
<> I’m willing. Let’s proceed. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
變化會迅速流經你的血肉，並在接下來幾小時內深化。你的腿會感覺更輕盈，每一步都更加優雅。

mc:
如果我之後想停止或逆轉呢？

Thalara:
魔法會回應你的意志。接受會加速過程，抗拒會減緩它，但一旦開始就無法完全停止。

mc:
我願意。我們繼續吧。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <> Then drink, and let the feminine elegance deepen within your left leg. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
那麼，喝下吧，讓女性的優雅在你左腿深植。

[我感覺到藥水在左腿起作用了]

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I am ready to fully embrace the final step of this transformation.|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I’m ready, but I will do what I must.|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_1]] |

[[I don’t want this, but if I must go through it, so be it.|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好完全接受這變化的最後一步。] |
[我不確定是否準備好了，但我會做我必須做的。] |
[我不想要這個，但如果必須經歷，那就這樣吧。] |

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This final dose will bring your left leg to its ultimate expression of feminine grace. It is not merely a change of form, but the embodiment of the queen you are becoming. <>
<> This... feels so final. Will I truly be able to walk as I was before? <>
<> Walking will become an art — fluid, precise, and utterly captivating. Your leg will balance strength with delicate elegance, a symbol of power refined. <>
<> I’m afraid of losing myself in this change. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
上前來，Caelan。這最後一劑將使你的左腿達到女性優雅的終極展現。這不僅是形態的改變，更是你即將成為的女王的體現。

mc:
這……感覺如此終極。我真的還能像以前那樣走路嗎？

Thalara:
行走將成為一門藝術——流暢、精準，且無比迷人。你的腿將在力量與精緻優雅間取得平衡，這是精煉力量的象徵。

mc:
我害怕在這變化中迷失自我。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_2
passages.content:
<> <> You are not losing yourself, Caelan. You are stepping into the fullest version of your destiny. Every curve, every contour has a purpose — to express your true self. <>
<> Will it hurt? Will I feel the magic twisting my bones and skin? <>
<> There may be a brief warmth, a shifting sensation as your flesh and bone find new harmony. It is not pain, but the stirring of transformation — like a blossom unfolding beneath the sun. <>
<> How long until the change is complete? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
你並未迷失自我，Caelan。你正步入你命運最完整的版本。每一道曲線、每一處輪廓都有其目的——表達真實的自我。

mc:
會痛嗎？我會感覺到魔法扭轉我的骨骼和肌膚嗎？

Thalara:
可能會有一陣短暫的暖意，一種變動的感覺，當你的血肉與骨骼找到新的和諧。那不是疼痛，而是轉變的萌動——如同花朵在陽光下綻放。

mc:
變化多久會完成？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_3
passages.content:
<> <> Within moments you will feel the shift begin, but the final grace will settle over hours. Each step you take will deepen your balance, your poise, your femininity. <>
<> And if I hesitate or resist? <>
<> Resistance only delays the inevitable. Acceptance allows the magic to flow freely, weaving you closer to your true form. <>
<> I want to be strong in this — not just changed. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
片刻之內你就會感覺到變化開始，但最終的優雅將在數小時內沉澱。你踏出的每一步都將深化你的平衡、你的儀態、你的女性特質。

mc:
如果我猶豫或抗拒呢？

Thalara:
抗拒只會延遲必然的結果。接受能讓魔法自由流動，將你更緊密地編織進你的真實形態。

mc:
我想要在這過程中保持堅強——不僅僅是被改變。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_fm_left_leg_fl_4
passages.content:
<> <> Strength is not the absence of grace, but its foundation. You will be both powerful and elegant — a queen worthy of her throne. <>
<> Then I’m ready. Let’s begin. <>
<> Drink deeply, Caelan. Let this final transformation complete your left leg’s journey into grace and beauty. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
力量並非缺乏優雅，而是其基礎。你將既強大又優雅——一位配得上其王座的女王。

mc:
那麼我準備好了。我們開始吧。

Thalara:
深深飲下，Caelan。讓這最終的轉變完成你左腿邁向優雅與美麗的旅程。

[我感覺到藥水在左腿起作用了]

passages.name: left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I accept the need to step back from this final transformation.|left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm_1]] |

[[I’m hesitant, but I will do what I must to reverse this.|left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm_1]] |

[[I reject this change and want to undo it now.|left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我接受需要從這最終轉變中退一步。] |
[我有些猶豫，但我會做我必須做的來逆轉這個變化。] |
[我拒絕這個變化，現在就想撤銷它。] |

passages.name: left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This dose will ease your left leg away from its fullest feminine grace. It is not loss, but a gentle return toward balance and strength. <>
<> This... feels like retreating. Will I lose the poise I’ve gained? <>
<> Poise will remain, though reshaped. Your leg will carry a sturdier elegance — strength softened, but not surrendered. <>
<> I’m afraid of feeling less myself after this. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fmlleft_leg_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
上前來，Caelan。這劑藥水將使你的左腿從其最極致的女性優雅中緩和下來。這不是失去，而是溫柔地回歸平衡與力量。

mc:
這……感覺像是在退縮。我會失去我已獲得的儀態嗎？

Thalara:
儀態將會保留，儘管會重新塑形。你的腿將承載一種更穩健的優雅——力量被柔化，但並未放棄。

mc:
我害怕在這之後感覺不再像自己。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <> You are not less, Caelan. You are stepping into a form that honors both your power and your grace, just in different measure. <>
<> Will it hurt? Will the magic pull and stretch my flesh back? <>
<> There may be warmth and a slight tension as your flesh and bone reconfigure. It is transformation’s ebb — the unweaving of enchantment with care. <>
<> How long until I feel like myself again? <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
你並未減少什麼，Caelan。你正步入一種形態，它同時尊重你的力量與優雅，只是比例不同。

mc:
會痛嗎？魔法會拉扯並伸展我的血肉回歸嗎？

Thalara:
當你的血肉與骨骼重新配置時，可能會感到暖意和輕微的緊繃感。那是轉變的退潮——魔法被細心拆解的過程。

mc:
多久後我才會感覺像原來的自己？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_fmlleft_leg_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <> The shift will begin quickly, but full ease comes over hours. Each step will ground your leg more firmly in strength and moderate elegance. <>
<> And if I resist going backward? <>
<> Resistance only prolongs tension. Acceptance allows your body to find harmony again in this gentler form. <>
<> I want to keep some of what I gained — not lose all of it. <>
[[Move Forth|left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
變化會迅速開始，但完全的舒適感將在數小時後到來。每一步都將使你的腿更穩固地立足於力量與適度的優雅之中。

mc:
如果我抗拒倒退呢？

Thalara:
抗拒只會延長緊繃感。接受能讓你的身體在這個更溫和的形態中再次找到和諧。

mc:
我想保留一些我所獲得的——不想失去全部。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: left_leg_fl_left_leg_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <> That balance is possible. You will retain elegance, softened but steady, as you return to a moderate feminine strength. <>
<> Then I’m ready. Let’s begin. <>
<> Drink deeply, Caelan. Let this dose ease your left leg from its full feminine grace into a balanced, refined strength. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my left leg|use_success_potion_create_left_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara:
那種平衡是可能的。當你回歸到適度的女性力量時，你將保有優雅，柔和卻穩健。

mc:
那麼我準備好了。我們開始吧。

Thalara:
大口喝下吧，Caelan。讓這劑藥水將你的左腿從完全的女性柔美，舒緩地轉變為平衡、精煉的力量。

[我感覺到藥水正在我的左腿發揮作用]

passages.name: interact_with_mage_random
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> Back again, I see. And still upright. Either the Vault hasn’t grown teeth, or you’re quicker than I thought. <>
<> Let’s say we’re both learning to tolerate each other. <>
<> Tolerate? Caelan, darling, the Vault respects only fear. But bring me those supplies and I’ll reward your bravery with a touch more beauty. <> <> <> Do you feel it yet? That flutter under your skin, like your body whispering its gratitude? <>
<> I’m not sure what I feel anymore. Excitement. Dread. Maybe both. <>
<> Good. The body should tremble before becoming divine. <> <> <> Hmm… the air around you. It’s beginning to change. A hint of violet, silk, and silver fire. <>
<> That’s... me? <>
<> It’s the you that waits beneath the skin. These potions only reveal what was always there. <> <> <> Ah, my loyal apothecary returns. What did the Vault offer you today? Bloodfern? Aetherglass? Or simply more bruises from that stubborn keeper? <>
<> Both. He growled at me like a troll. I think he’s warming up to me. <>
<> Then perhaps we should bottle you next. A prince turned potion fierce, fragrant, and impossible to ignore. <> <> <> You’re walking differently. Either the Vault got to your spine… or the changes are settling in. <>
<> You really notice everything, don’t you? <>
<> Of course. It’s not every day I sculpt a future queen from stubborn princely clay. <> <> <> Did the Vault Keeper insult your lineage again, or was
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
thalara:
又回來了，我看見了。而且還站得挺直。要麼是寶庫還沒長出牙齒，要麼就是你比我想的還要敏捷。

mc:
就當我們都在學習容忍彼此吧。

thalara:
容忍？Caelan，親愛的，寶庫只尊重恐懼。但把那些材料帶給我，我會用多一點美麗來獎賞你的勇氣。

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
thalara:
你感覺到了嗎？皮膚下的那種顫動，就像你的身體在低語著它的感激？

mc:
我不確定我現在感覺到什麼了。興奮。恐懼。也許兩者都有。

thalara:
很好。身體在變得神聖之前，理應顫抖。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
thalara:
嗯……你周圍的空氣。開始變了。一絲紫羅蘭色、絲綢和銀色火焰的氣息。

mc:
那是……我？

thalara:
那是皮膚之下等待著的你。這些藥水只是揭示一直存在於那裡的東西。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
thalara:
啊，我忠誠的藥劑師回來了。寶庫今天給了你什麼？血蕨？乙太玻璃？還是單純從那個頑固的看守者那裡得到更多瘀傷？

mc:
都有。他像巨魔一樣對我咆哮。我想他開始對我有好感了。

thalara:
那或許我們下次該把你裝瓶。一位王子變成藥水——猛烈、芬芳，令人無法忽視。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
thalara:
你走路的樣子不同了。要麼是寶庫傷到了你的脊椎……要麼就是變化正在穩定下來。

mc:
你真的注意到所有事情，對吧？

thalara:
當然。我可不是每天都有機會用頑固的王子之土，雕塑出一位未來的女王。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
thalara:
寶庫看守者又侮辱你的血統了嗎，還是只是他慣常那迷人的沉默？

mc:
他告訴我，他寧願去跟奇美拉摔角，也不想應付我。

thalara:
噢，多麼甜蜜。我想他是在調情。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
thalara:
今天你的靈氣中有種張力——細微，但不可否認。你正在綻放，Caelan。

mc:
是嗎？感覺……很奇怪。就像我穿著一件還不完全屬於自己的身體。

thalara:
那我們就讓它變成你的。一次一滴。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
thalara:
你今天看起來容光煥發。要麼是月亮眷顧了你的誕生……要麼就是豐胸藥水開始生效了。

mc:
Thalara！這……不是我預期你會說的話。

thalara:
你會明白的，親愛的——法師很少說出預期中的話。但我們幾乎總是對的。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
thalara:
你看起來累了。轉變起初會讓人付出代價。

mc:
我幾乎沒睡。我的皮膚癢得像要脫皮一樣。

thalara:
你確實是在脫皮。身體記得它曾經的模樣，但我們正在教導它必須成為的樣子。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
thalara:
別急。真正的鍊金術需要耐心……有時候，還需要一點尖叫。

mc:
你還真懂得如何讓人平靜下來，你知道嗎？

thalara:
你更喜歡用絲綢包裹的謊言？還是用火焰呈上的生猛真相？

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
thalara:
你知道嗎，有些法師用幻術來獲得美麗。但你？你正以誠實的方式贏得每一道曲線。

mc:
這就是你所謂的讚美嗎？

thalara:
這是我對「進展」的定義。有深度的美麗。有記憶的魔法。

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
thalara:
你今天敢照鏡子了嗎？

mc:
照了。比平時久了點。這次……感覺不像陌生人了。

thalara:
很好。心靈的轉變，往往比身體的變化來得更早。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
thalara:
你注意到你的聲音變柔和了嗎？或者你的雙手變得更纖細了？

mc:
直到現在才注意到。我之前太專注於任務，沒看到結果。

thalara:
然而它們正在發生。這就是真正改變的本質——安靜、潛行、無可避免。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
thalara:
你現在的步伐充滿了自信。甚至帶著驕傲。

mc:
我仍有疑慮。但它們不再支配我了。

thalara:
那麼你已經半隻腳踏入女王之境了。

[ELSEIF _i == 14]
thalara:
這次你獨自前來。沒有侍女，沒有騎士，只有你。

mc:
我不需要護衛來搬運一些花瓣和水晶。我沒那麼脆弱。

thalara:
不，你並不脆弱。而且你只會變得更強大——儘管並非總是以肉眼可見的方式。

[ELSEIF _i == 15]
thalara:
今天你的靈氣嗡鳴聲不同了。睡眠中發生了什麼事嗎？

mc:
也許吧。我夢見自己在跳舞……而每個人都向我鞠躬，彷彿我一直都是女王。

thalara:
夢境擁有力量，Caelan。有時它們低語著我們清醒時不敢說出口的真相。

[E

    [LINK: 製作藥水][GOTO potion_create_right_hand]
    [LINK: 嘗試其他藥水卷軸][GOTO potion_lab]
[ELSE]
    你沒有製作此藥水所需的所有材料。
    [LINK: 離開藥水卷軸選擇][GOTO veil_tower] |
    [LINK: 離開薄暮之塔][GOTO castle_map_back_select] |
    [LINK: 嘗試其他藥水卷軸][GOTO potion_lab]
[/IF]

    

[ELSE]

<><><><>
<>
<>

<>
<<=$userItems[_item].name>> (You have: <<=$userItems[_item].amount>> <<=$userItems[_item].unit>>)
Needed: <<=_needed>> <<=$userItems[_item].unit>> | Added: <<=$potionInventory[_item]>> <<=$userItems[_item].unit>>
< 0>> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <= $userItems[_item].min_amount*2>> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <> <
passages.content_zh:
🧪 組合中：
請匹配正確材料以調製此藥水：

	
			
                
                    [img[$userItems[_item].img]]
                    
                    
                    [LINK: 詳細資訊][GOTO IngredientDetail]
                
            
	

  
     (你擁有：  )

        [/IF]

        [/IF]
    [/IF]
    [IF $potionInventory[_item] > 0]
        
        
            
                
                
                [GOTO potion_create_right_hand]
            
        
        [IF $potionInventory[_item] >= $userItems[_item].min_amount*2]
        
            
                
                    
                    
                    [GOTO potion_create_right_hand]
                
        
        [/IF]
        [IF $potionInventory[_item] >= $userItems[_item].min_amount*5]
        
            
                
                    
                    
                    [GOTO potion_create_right_hand]
                
        
        [/IF]
    [/IF]
  

  [IF $potionInventory[_item] != $potion.ingredients[_item]]
    
  [/IF]

[IF $_matches]

  [LINK: 調製藥水]

[/IF]

[/IF]

[LINK: 取消]
  
    
  
  [GOTO potion_lab]
