passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready for this. If becoming queen means changing, then I want to face it head-on.|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I like this... But if it’s what the Queen demands, I’ll endure.|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t want this. Changing who I am feels wrong. |right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。如果成為女王意味著改變，那麼我想直面它。] |
[我不確定我喜歡這樣……但若是女王的要求，我會忍受。] |
[我不想要這樣。改變我是誰感覺不對。] |

passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <>Your face holds the legacy of your father’s line bold, strong, uncompromising. A sculptor might say it was hewn from stone. But even stone yields, given time… or magic.<>
<>And now you’ll chisel it away. One gulp at a time.<>
<>Not chisel. Melt. Like snow turning to stream. This is not destruction, Caelan. This is reshaping. Every part of you will still be you. Only… seen differently. Felt differently. Worn differently.<>
<>It feels like wearing a mask. One I can never take off.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你的臉龐承襲了你父親血脈的遺產——大膽、堅強、不妥協。雕塑家可能會說它是從石頭中鑿出來的。但即使是石頭，假以時日……或魔法，也會屈服。

mc: 而現在你要將它鑿掉。一次一口。

thalara: 不是鑿。是融化。像雪化為溪流。這不是毀滅，Caelan。這是重塑。你的每一部分都仍將是你。只是……被以不同的方式看待。以不同的方式感受。以不同的方式呈現。

mc: 感覺像是戴上一張面具。一張我永遠無法取下的面具。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <>A mask hides. This brings forth what lies beneath. You may not know her yet, the woman who waits inside. But she is watching… and waiting for breath.<>
<>...You speak like this is sacred.<>
<>Because it is. A face is not just flesh. It’s identity. It’s how the world answers you. But it also shapes how you answer the world.<>
<>So what answers will this face give? Will I smile easier? Cry more? Speak softer?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 面具是隱藏。這則是讓潛藏之物顯現。你可能還不認識她，那個在內心等待的女子。但她正注視著……並等待著呼吸。

mc: ……你說得彷彿這是神聖之事。

thalara: 因為它就是。臉龐不僅僅是血肉。它是身份。它是世界回應你的方式。但它也塑造了你回應世界的方式。

mc: 那麼這張臉會給出什麼樣的回應？我會更容易微笑嗎？更常哭泣？說話更輕柔？
[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>You will smile with meaning. Cry when your spirit demands it. Speak not softer, but with clarity born from both power and elegance. That’s the gift of balance.<>
<>It smells like… violets. And honey.<>
<>And lavender stem, ground moonstone, and a drop of your blood from last night’s offering. All aligned to your lineage, your essence.<>
<>It’s warm… it’s crawling through my jaw… gods, that’s <>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你將帶著深意微笑。在你的靈魂要求時哭泣。說話不是更輕柔，而是帶著源自力量與優雅的清晰。這就是平衡的禮物。

mc: 它聞起來像……紫羅蘭。還有蜂蜜。

thalara: 還有薰衣草莖、研磨過的月長石，以及一滴你昨晚獻祭時的血液。一切都與你的血脈、你的本質相協調。

mc: 它是溫熱的……它正爬過我的下顎……天啊，那是
[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>It will pass. The ache of transition. Your brow is lightening. See? Even your neck relaxes… the angles soften. No more harsh shadow beneath the chin.<>
<>I feel… like I’m sinking into something. Like a blanket pulling over my bones.<>
<>Look. The beginning of grace. Your father’s jaw still echoes there… but now, so too does your mother’s cheekbones.<>
<>It’s me. But not me. It’s… her, isn’t it? The one waiting beneath?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 會過去的。轉變的疼痛。你的額頭正在變得柔和。看？連你的頸部都放鬆了……線條變得柔和。下巴下不再有生硬的陰影。

mc: 我覺得……好像正沉入某種東西。像有條毯子覆蓋上我的骨頭。

thalara: 看。優雅的開端。你父親的下顎線條仍在那裡迴響……但現在，你母親的顴骨線條也同樣顯現了。

mc: 這是我。但又不是我。這是……她，對吧？那個在底下等待的人？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <>Only the first glimpse. More will come, if you let it.<>
<>I didn’t think a few degrees of cheekbone would feel different. But it does. Like my smile knows it’s meant for court instead of campfire.<>
<>That is the beginning of understanding. Not just of body but of presence. You will find new ways to be seen. But more importantly… you will learn how to see yourself.<>
<>Do you think she’ll be proud of me? The Queen?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 僅僅是第一瞥。若你允許，更多將會到來。

mc: 我沒想到顴骨幾度的差異會帶來如此不同的感受。但它確實如此。就像我的微笑知道它該屬於宮廷，而非營火。

Thalara: 那是理解的開端。不僅是對身體，更是對存在。你將發現被注視的新方式。但更重要的是…你將學會如何看見自己。

mc: 你認為她會為我感到驕傲嗎？女王陛下？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_6
passages.content:
<> <>I think you will be. In time. That matters more than even a crown.<>
<>And my hand… will it be weaker now? I trained so hard to master the sword.<>
<>It will not be weaker. Just different. You may wield a quill or a fan, a glance or a law, with the same precision you once gave to blade. Femininity is not the absence of strength it is strength reshaped.<>
<>Strange. I thought the hardest part would be pain. But it’s this… knowing I’ll never hold the hilt quite the same way again.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 我認為你會的。假以時日。這比任何王冠都更重要。

mc: 那我的手…現在會變弱嗎？我曾如此刻苦訓練，只為精通劍術。

Thalara: 它不會變弱。只是不同了。你或許能揮舞羽毛筆或扇子、一個眼神或一條律法，帶著與昔日持劍時相同的精準。女性氣質並非力量的缺失，而是力量的重塑。

mc: 真奇怪。我原以為最難的部分會是疼痛。但卻是這個…知道我再也無法以完全相同的方式握住劍柄了。
[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_7
passages.content:
<> <>And yet, someday soon, you’ll hold the realm itself in your hand. That is a grip far mightier than steel.<>
<>You speak as if you've seen it before. Have you done this to others?<>
<>I have guided a few across the threshold. Not all princes, not all queens. But every soul who braved the crossing came away changed… and closer to truth. Yours will be no different.<>
<>Then… let’s see who I become.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_8]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 然而，不久的將來，你將把整個王國握在手中。那可比鋼鐵的握力強大得多。

mc: 你說得彷彿親眼見過。你對其他人也做過這種事嗎？

Thalara: 我曾引導少數人跨越門檻。不全是王子，也不全是女王。但每個勇於跨越的靈魂，離開時都已改變…且更接近真實。你也不會例外。

mc: 那麼…讓我們看看我將成為誰。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ml_right_hand_mm_8
passages.content:
<> <>Then let the potion take root. Let your hand begin its remembering of who it was, and who it longs to be.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那麼，就讓藥劑生根吧。讓你的手開始回憶它曾是誰，以及它渴望成為誰。
[I feel the potion working in my right hand]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to reclaim what was once mine.|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_1]] |

[[I never thought I’d want this… to grow tougher again.|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_1]] |

[[I reject this softening they took too much already. |right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎...

[我想取回曾經屬於我的東西。] |
[我從未想過我會渴望這個…再次變得強韌。] |
[我拒絕這種軟化，他們奪走的已經夠多了。] |

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_1
passages.content:
<> <>You return to me as though retracing your own footsteps. Do you think the ground will feel the same beneath them?<>
<>I need it back. The grip, the strength, the callus. I don’t want this softness in me anymore.<>
<>And yet it’s not just in you. It is you now. Part of you. Magic doesn’t simply fade it remembers.<>
<>Then let it forget. I want my hand back. I want to be what I was before.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你回到我身邊，彷彿在重踏自己的足跡。你認為腳下的土地感覺會一樣嗎？

mc: 我需要它回來。那握力、那力量、那繭。我不再想要這份柔軟存在於我體內。

Thalara: 然而它不僅僅是在你體內。它現在就是你。是你的一部分。魔法不會簡單地消退，它會記得。

mc: 那就讓它遺忘。我想要我的手回來。我想變回從前的樣子。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_2
passages.content:
<> <>What you were before… or what you believe you must be again?<>
<>What I need to be. For me. For the fight. For my name.<>
<>So be it. But know this reversal does not undo insight. You will feel the difference. The hand you knew may return, but it will carry memory of softness. Of gentleness.<>
<>I’ll carry that memory. But I won’t wear it anymore.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 從前的你…還是你認為自己必須再次成為的樣子？

mc: 我需要成為的樣子。為了我自己。為了戰鬥。為了我的名譽。

Thalara: 那就這樣吧。但要知道，這種逆轉並不會抹去洞見。你會感受到不同。你熟悉的手或許會回來，但它將帶著柔軟的記憶。溫柔的記憶。

mc: 我會帶著那份記憶。但我不會再穿戴著它了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_3
passages.content:
<> <>Very well. Then we begin the return. The potion is heavier this time ironroot and dragonbone, the scent of ash and steel. Your veins will remember the forge.<>
<>Gah ! It burns. It’s like lightning in my bones.<>
<>Transformation backward always resists. You are not simply re-growing strength you are evicting vulnerability. That never leaves quietly.<>
<>My fingers they’re stiffening. Thickening again. The veins are rising…<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 很好。那麼我們開始回歸。這次的藥劑更為沉重——鐵根與龍骨，灰燼與鋼鐵的氣息。你的血管將記起鍛爐。

mc: 嘎啊！它在燃燒。像是我骨頭裡的閃電。

Thalara: 逆向的轉變總是伴隨著抗拒。你不僅僅是在重新增長力量，你是在驅逐脆弱。那東西從不會安靜離開。

mc: 我的手指…它們在變硬。再次變粗。血管在凸起…

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_4
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. The musculature returns. The flex of dominance. The imprint of the sword’s grip. Already your palm thickens. Already the wrist reshapes.<>
<>It’s so fast. It’s ugh it feels wrong, even if it’s what I wanted. Gods, what does that mean?<>
<>It means you now understand both sides. Strength as weapon… and strength as touch. You will always carry both, even if the world sees only one.<>
<>Is that shame I feel… or mourning?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 是的。肌肉結構正在回歸。支配力的屈伸。劍柄握印的痕跡。你的手掌已在增厚。手腕已在重塑。

mc: 好快。呃…感覺不對勁，即使這是我想要的。天啊，這意味著什麼？

Thalara: 這意味著你現在理解了兩面。力量作為武器…以及力量作為觸碰。你將永遠同時擁有兩者，即使世人只看見其一。

mc: 我感受到的是羞恥…還是哀悼？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_5
passages.content:
<> <>It is the ghost of change. The echo of becoming. Not every path forward leads through softness but every detour leaves a mark.<>
<>It’s finished. The bulk’s returned. My hand… it feels like it could crack stone again.<>
<>Then let it crack what must be broken, and spare what must be held. For a ruler must know when to wield… and when to release.<>
<>You speak as if this is still a lesson. I thought I was stepping away from all of that.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那是改變的幽靈。成為過程的迴響。並非每一條前進之路都需經過柔軟，但每一條繞行的路都會留下印記。

mc: 完成了。那厚實感回來了。我的手…感覺又能捏碎石頭了。

Thalara: 那麼就讓它粉碎必須被粉碎的，並呵護必須被握持的。因為統治者必須知道何時該揮舞…以及何時該放手。

mc: 你說得好像這仍是個教訓。我以為我正在遠離所有那些。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ml_6
passages.content:
<> <>There is no away. Only through. And you, my prince, have walked further than most ever dare. That truth will linger long after the hand forgets its shape.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 沒有「遠離」。只有「穿越」。而你，我的王子，走得比大多數人敢走的更遠。這個真相將在手忘記其形狀後，長久縈繞。
[I feel the potion working in my right hand]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to embrace the softer strength I’ve gained.|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_1]] |

[[It feels strange to soften, but I trust the process.|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_1]] |

[[I don’t want to lose my old strength.|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎...

[我想擁抱我已獲得的柔軟力量。] |
[軟化的感覺很陌生，但我信任這個過程。] |
[我不想失去我舊有的力量。] |

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <>Do you feel it already? Even before the touch… your hand is preparing to let go.<>
<>It’s just a bowl of potion. And yet… my palm aches like it knows what's coming.<>
<>Because it remembers. Last session left an impression. Magic reshapes the body, yes but it also stirs the spirit housed within. Each part of you whispers its own story as it changes.<>
<>It’s not screaming this time. Just… murmuring. Like it’s asking if it really has to let go.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經感覺到了嗎？甚至在觸碰之前……你的手就已經準備好要放開了。

mc: 這不過是一碗藥劑。然而……我的手掌隱隱作痛，彷彿知道即將發生什麼。

thalara: 因為它記得。上一次的療程留下了印記。魔法重塑肉體，是的，但它也攪動了寄居其中的靈魂。你身體的每一部分都在變化時，低語著自己的故事。

mc: 這次它沒有尖叫。只是……低語。像是在問，是否真的必須放手。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <>The grip is the last to surrender. Fingers remember every sword hilt, every bowstring. But they can learn new truths. The warmth of skin. The language of invitation rather than force.<>
<>But what if I need that grip again someday? To hold the kingdom? To defend it?<>
<>Then you will. But differently. Queens defend not always with blade, but with bonds. With hands that reach instead of strike. Grip does not vanish it transforms its purpose.<>
<>It’s warm… deeper than the first time. It’s in my wrist now, coiling. Almost… silken?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 握力是最後投降的。手指記得每一把劍柄、每一條弓弦。但它們可以學習新的真理。皮膚的溫暖。邀請的語言，而非強迫。

mc: 但如果有一天我又需要那種握力呢？為了掌握王國？為了保衛它？

thalara: 那麼你會的。但方式會不同。女王並非總是以刀刃守護，而是以羈絆。以伸出而非擊打的手。握力不會消失，它轉化了它的目的。

mc: 好溫暖……比第一次更深層。現在它在我手腕裡，盤繞著。幾乎……如絲綢般？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>The potion this time weaves between sinew and joint, loosening the armor around the gesture. This session teaches your hand to move with intent, not impulse. It begins to listen, not just act.<>
<>Gods, my knuckles feel strange. Like they’ve forgotten how to clench properly.<>
<>Good. The body forgets harshness before it remembers elegance. Let it feel hollow for now. It is only making space for grace.<>
<>There’s… less in the palm. Less tension. But I can still flex it. Still lift it. It's just… not driven anymore.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這次的藥劑在肌腱與關節間編織，鬆開了動作周圍的鎧甲。這次療程教導你的手以意圖行動，而非衝動。它開始傾聽，而不僅僅是行動。

mc: 天啊，我的指節感覺好奇怪。像是忘記了該如何正確握緊。

thalara: 很好。身體在記起優雅之前，先忘卻了粗暴。讓它暫時感受空洞吧。那只是在為優雅騰出空間。

mc: 手掌裡……少了些東西。少了緊繃感。但我仍然能彎曲它。仍然能抬起它。只是……不再被驅使了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>That is the hidden strength I want you to know. Not instinct. Not reflex. Choice. A hand that can choose whether to wield or welcome is one that rules justly.<>
<>I always thought ruling meant having control over others.<>
<>And now you’re learning… it begins with control over yourself. Over what you touch. What you release. What you carry and what you don’t.<>
<>My fingers are longer. I can see it now. The curve they don’t jut forward like before. They're… poised.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那就是我希望你知曉的隱藏力量。不是本能。不是反射。是選擇。一隻能選擇是要揮舞還是歡迎的手，才能公正地統治。

mc: 我總以為統治意味著掌控他人。

thalara: 而現在你正在學習……它始於掌控你自己。掌控你所觸碰的。你所釋放的。你所承擔的，以及你不承擔的。

mc: 我的手指變長了。我現在看得出來。那曲線……它們不像以前那樣向前突出。它們是……蓄勢待發的。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_5
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. And they will write letters instead of war orders. They will touch cheek and cloth and cradle a crown. Not as a burden. But as belonging.<>
<>That sounds… like someone else’s life.<>
<>It was. But it is becoming yours, line by line. Potion by potion. Look at your hand, Caelan. It still remembers strength but now, it is learning to speak in gentleness.<>
<>So I’m not losing my grip. I’m choosing not to use it the same way.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。它們將書寫信件，而非戰爭命令。它們將觸碰臉頰、布料，並托起王冠。不是作為負擔。而是作為歸屬。

mc: 那聽起來……像是別人的生活。

thalara: 曾經是。但它正一點一滴地成為你的，一行一行地。一劑藥一劑藥地。看看你的手，Caelan。它仍然記得力量，但現在，它正在學習以溫柔訴說。

mc: 所以我並非失去我的握力。我只是選擇不再以同樣的方式使用它。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_mm_right_hand_ms_6
passages.content:
<> <>Precisely. The Hollowing is not emptiness it is readiness. For touch, for truth, for the responsibilities only you will bear.<>
<>Then let it hollow. I want to know what that hand can hold when it’s not clenching a blade.<>
<>Very well. Then we continue. And as your grip fades, let your reach grow.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 正是如此。掏空並非虛無，而是準備就緒。為了觸碰，為了真理，為了只有你將承擔的責任。

mc: 那就讓它掏空吧。我想知道當那隻手不再緊握刀刃時，它能握住什麼。

thalara: 很好。那麼我們繼續。當你的握力消退時，讓你的觸及範圍增長。

[I feel the potion working in my right hand]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to take back the strength I had before.|right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t want to lose the gentleness I’ve found...|right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_1]] |

[[Softness is weakness. I want my old grip back|right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好取回我曾經擁有的力量。] |
[我不想失去我已發現的溫柔……] |
[柔軟即是軟弱。我想要我舊日的握力回來] |

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <>You come back again. To call strength home. Tell me… is it courage that brings you here or fear?<>
<>Maybe both. Maybe neither. All I know is I need to feel it again. The firmness. The grip that doesn’t hesitate.<>
<>And what will you do with that grip, Caelan? Crush? Command? Or merely remember what it was like not to doubt it?<>
<>I don’t know. I just miss knowing what my hand is for. Right now, it trembles when it should clench. Reaches when it should guard.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你又回來了。為了召喚力量歸家。告訴我……是勇氣帶你來此，還是恐懼？

mc: 也許兩者都是。也許兩者都不是。我只知道我需要再次感受它。那堅定。那毫不猶豫的握力。

thalara: 而你將用那握力做什麼，Caelan？粉碎？命令？或者僅僅是懷念毫不懷疑它的那種感覺？

mc: 我不知道。我只是懷念知道我的手該做什麼的時光。現在，它該握緊時卻顫抖。該守護時卻伸出。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <>Then let us show it another memory. One not of blade or brush, but of presence. The potion is stronger today stirred with wolfsbane root and charred oak. You’ll feel its intent like a drum beneath your skin.<>
<>The color… it’s darker now. Like amber in stormlight.<>
<>Yes. It remembers fire. And it will rekindle what was dimmed. But it will not erase what you’ve learned. No potion ever truly forgets.<>
<>Gods it bites. It’s crawling into the joints… curling the fingers inward. They want to close now.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼，讓我們向它展示另一段記憶。不是關於刀刃或畫筆，而是關於存在。今天的藥劑更強烈，混入了烏頭根與焦橡木。你會感受到它的意圖，如同皮膚下的鼓聲。

mc: 這顏色……現在更深了。像風暴之光中的琥珀。

thalara: 是的。它記得火焰。它將重新點燃曾被黯淡的事物。但它不會抹去你已學會的。沒有任何藥劑能真正遺忘。

mc: 天啊，它在啃噬。它正爬進關節……將手指向內捲曲。它們現在想要握起來了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>The muscle awakens. Old reflexes stir. The hollow places you once opened now fill again, slowly, deliberately. The grip returns, not as instinct but as intent.<>
<>It’s like someone is rewinding me. Pulling thread back into tight knots.<>
<>That is not failure. It is merely re-centering. Even queens must retreat at times. You are not choosing weakness or strength you are choosing understanding.<>
<>My fingers… they feel dense again. Less float. More presence. Like they’ve reclaimed weight.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 肌肉甦醒了。古老的反射在蠢動。你曾開啟的空虛之處，如今正緩慢而審慎地再次填滿。握力回來了，不是出於本能，而是出於意圖。

mc: 感覺像是有人在倒轉我。把線拉回，收成緊實的結。

thalara: 這並非失敗。這只是重新定錨。即便是女王，有時也必須退卻。你並非在選擇軟弱或力量，你是在選擇理解。

mc: 我的手指……它們又感覺沉重了。少了漂浮感。多了存在感。彷彿它們重新獲得了重量。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>They have. And with weight comes responsibility. You’ve felt softness. Now feel command again. But hold it with wisdom, not fear.<>
<>There’s a pulse in my palm. Familiar. Firm. But quieter than before.<>
<>Because now it knows balance. You are not the same boy who first clenched a sword. You’ve touched tenderness. That changes the strike even if you strike again.<>
<>So this isn't undoing. It's… remembering another version of me.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它們確實如此。而伴隨重量而來的是責任。你已感受過柔軟。現在，再次感受掌控吧。但要以智慧持握，而非恐懼。

mc: 我的掌心有脈動。熟悉。堅定。但比以往安靜。

thalara: 因為現在它懂得平衡了。你已不是初次握劍的那個男孩。你觸碰過溫柔。這改變了揮擊的方式，即便你再次揮擊。

mc: 所以這不是復原。這是……記起另一個版本的我。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <>Precisely. Let the hand flex again, if it must. Let it lead when the moment demands. But never forget it was also made to hold. To open.<>
<>It’s done. I can feel it in the grip. It’s not the brute strength I had before… but it’s closer. Firmer. Grounded.<>
<>Then let it serve you. Not as master or servant. But as instrument. You are not losing your path, Caelan. You’re feeling its curves.<>
<>...Then I’ll walk it with both hands. One that remembers war… and one that remembers warmth.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 正是如此。讓這隻手再次屈伸吧，如果它必須如此。讓它在必要時刻引領。但永遠別忘了，它也曾被創造來持握。來敞開。

mc: 完成了。我能從握力中感覺到。這不是我以前擁有的那種蠻力……但更接近了。更堅實。更沉穩。

thalara: 那就讓它為你所用吧。不是作為主人或僕從。而是作為工具。你並未迷失你的道路，Caelan。你正在感受它的曲折。

mc: ……那麼，我將用雙手行走其上。一隻記得戰爭……一隻記得溫暖。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_mm_6
passages.content:
<> <>That is the path of true rule. When the throne calls, let it find you ready not only to wield… but to receive.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這才是真正統治之道。當王座召喚時，讓它發現你不僅準備好揮舞……也準備好接納。
[我感覺到藥水在我右手中起作用了]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to meet the reflection waiting in this mirror.|right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_1]] |

[[I’m not sure I like who I see halfway between, but I’ll keep going.|right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t like this shadow self half prince, half princess.|right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好去見鏡中等候的倒影了。] |
[我不太確定自己喜歡這個介於中間的模樣，但我會繼續前進。] |
[我不喜歡這個半王子、半公主的陰影自我。] |

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <>You have crossed the halfway mark. Do you feel it? How the flesh no longer answers to memory alone, but to possibility?<>
<>It’s strange. I look at it and… it doesn’t feel like mine anymore. Or maybe it’s becoming mine in a way it never was.<>
<>That is not contradiction it is awakening. The hand you once forged in war now begins to shape the future in elegance, not edge.<>
<>But it still remembers… I still remember… what it was like to hold steel, to draw blood.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已跨越中點。感覺到了嗎？血肉不再僅回應記憶，而是回應可能性？

mc: 這感覺很怪異。我看著它……感覺它不再像是我的了。或者，也許它正以一種從未有過的方式，成為我的。

thalara: 這並非矛盾，而是覺醒。你曾在戰爭中鍛造的手，如今開始以優雅而非鋒刃塑造未來。

mc: 但它仍然記得……我仍然記得……握持鋼鐵、沾染鮮血的感覺。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <>And you always will. That memory doesn’t vanish it deepens. Refines. Would you have this hand unlearn its strength? Or let it rise again with a new form of power?<>
<>The runes are glowing. Why do they feel like they’re humming through my bones?<>
<>Because they’re not drawing power from the potion alone. They’re drawing it from you. From the will you carry. Your fear, your hope, your resistance… your surrender. All of it feeds the flame.<>
<>I can feel the shape changing. Gods… my wrist it's thin. Not weak… but delicate. I could never imagine calling it that before.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而你永遠都會記得。那份記憶不會消失，它會深化。會精煉。你希望這隻手遺忘它的力量嗎？還是讓它以一種新的力量形式再次崛起？

mc: 符文在發光。為什麼它們感覺像是在我的骨頭裡低鳴？

thalara: 因為它們不僅從藥水中汲取力量。它們也從你身上汲取。從你所懷抱的意志。你的恐懼、你的希望、你的抗拒……你的臣服。這一切都滋養著火焰。

mc: 我能感覺到形狀在改變。諸神啊……我的手腕變細了。不是虛弱……而是纖細。我以前從未想過會用這個詞形容它。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>Delicacy is not weakness, Caelan. It is precision. It is intent. Like silk thread that holds royal banners stronger than chain when woven with purpose.<>
<>The skin’s smoother. The fingers feel… lighter. Like they don’t want to clench anymore. Like they’re meant to gesture. Or to touch gently, not grip hard.<>
<>Yes. They are beginning to express, not just execute. They are learning the language of grace. Of allure. And of command through presence, not pressure.<>
<>My nails what’s happening? They’re shimmering. I didn’t think nails could glow.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 纖細並非軟弱，Caelan。那是精準。那是意圖。就像絲線，當懷抱目的編織時，能比鎖鏈更牢固地懸掛王旗。

mc: 皮膚更光滑了。手指感覺……更輕盈了。彷彿它們不再想緊握。彷彿它們注定要做出手勢。或是輕柔觸碰，而非用力抓握。

thalara: 是的。它們開始表達，而不僅僅是執行。它們正在學習優雅的語言。魅惑的語言。以及透過存在而非壓力來發號施令的語言。

mc: 我的指甲……怎麼了？它們在閃爍。我從沒想過指甲會發光。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>A reflection of your essence. They will always carry the echo of your bloodline, your magic, your decisions. You are not losing yourself, Caelan. You are refining your truth.<>
<>I want to say it still feels like me… but I’m not sure it does. It feels like her. Like someone else’s hand is growing where mine used to be.<>
<>Then speak to her. The woman whose hand this is becoming. She is not a stranger. She is a part of you long ignored. Greet her not with doubt, but with dignity.<>
<>…Hello. I suppose… you’ve waited long enough.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這是你本質的映照。它們將永遠帶著你血脈、你魔法、你決定的迴響。你並未失去自我，Caelan。你正在精煉你的真實。

mc: 我想說它仍然感覺像是我……但我不太確定了。它感覺像是「她」。像是別人的手正從我原有的位置長出來。

thalara: 那就對她說話吧。對這位手正在轉變成的女性說話。她不是陌生人。她是你長期忽略的一部分。以尊嚴問候她，而非懷疑。

mc: ……你好。我想……你已經等待夠久了。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_5
passages.content:
<> <>And she heard you. Look your fingers now rest in poise without effort. The muscles are still yours, but they obey a different rhythm now. One not born of resistance… but invitation.<>
<>It feels strange. Like the air touches it differently. Softer. Even the pulse in my wrist feels quieter.<>
<>That is the heartbeat of transformation. Faint now but it will grow louder, stronger. You are no longer just reshaped you are becoming.<>
<>So this is the threshold. After today, I don’t get to call it “my hand” in the same way anymore, do I?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而她聽見了你的心聲。看，你的手指現在毫不費力地保持著優雅姿態。肌肉仍是你的，但它們如今服從於另一種節奏。一種並非源自抗拒……而是邀請的節奏。

mc: 感覺很奇特。彷彿空氣觸碰它的方式都不同了。更輕柔。連我手腕的脈搏都感覺更沉靜了。

thalara: 那是轉變的心跳聲。此刻微弱，但它會變得愈發響亮、強勁。你不再只是被重塑，你正在成為。

mc: 所以這就是門檻了。過了今天，我就不能再以同樣的方式稱它為「我的手」了，對嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_ms_right_hand_fs_6
passages.content:
<> <>No. You call it yourself. Not what you held. Not what you lost. But what you have chosen to extend into the world. This hand will be your introduction. Your grace. Your authority. Your legacy.<>
<>Then… I’ll let it become what it needs to. Just promise me it will still know how to hold the weight of who I was.<>
<>It will. And it will carry it not as a burden but as a root. And roots, my dear Caelan, are what let the blossom rise.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不。你稱呼它為你自己。不是你曾緊握的。不是你曾失去的。而是你選擇延伸至這個世界的部分。這隻手將成為你的介紹、你的優雅、你的權威、你的遺產。

mc: 那麼……我會讓它成為它需要成為的樣子。只要答應我，它仍會懂得如何承載我曾經是誰的重量。

thalara: 它會的。而且它不會將其視為負擔，而是視為根基。而根基，我親愛的Caelan，正是讓花朵得以綻放的所在。
[I feel the potion working in my right hand]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to reclaim what I once was.|right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_1]] |

[[I’m unsure about losing this part of me, but maybe it’s time to return.|right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_1]] |

[[I never wanted to change in the first place. I want my old hand back|right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好取回我曾經的樣子了。] |
[對於失去這部分的我，我感到不確定，但或許是時候回歸了。] |
[我從一開始就不想改變。我想要回我原來的手。] |

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <>You step backward over a threshold you crossed with pain and promise. Are you prepared for what might be waiting on this side?<>
<>I don’t know. I just… I need to remember what it felt like. Before.<>
<>Then you shall. The body does not forget. It buries, but it does not erase. Already, your tendons respond the bones shift back, recalibrating for tension over tenderness.<>
<>It’s… tight. My fingers ache. The wrist feels heavier again. Like armor being slid over the skin.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你正退步跨越一道曾伴隨著痛苦與承諾跨過的門檻。你準備好迎接可能在此端等待著你的事物了嗎？

mc: 我不知道。我只是……我需要記起過去的感覺。

thalara: 那麼你會的。身體不會遺忘。它會埋藏，但不會抹去。看，你的肌腱已經開始回應，骨骼正移回原位，重新調整以適應緊繃而非柔軟。

mc: 感覺……很緊繃。我的手指在痛。手腕又感覺沉重起來。像是盔甲滑過皮膚。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <>Because the form is remembering its former purpose. The hand regains its edge not for war, perhaps, but for certainty. This is the grip of assertion, not invitation.<>
<>The softness is fading. I can see it… feel it. Even the nails are dulling again. No more shimmer.<>
<>You called it a mask once, remember? Perhaps this was always another mask. Or perhaps… both versions were your face, from different angles.<>
<>Do you ever regret helping me change? Or unchange?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 因為形體正在憶起它舊日的用途。這隻手重拾了它的稜角，或許不是為了戰爭，而是為了篤定。這是主張的握力，而非邀請。

mc: 柔軟正在消逝。我看得見……也感覺得到。連指甲都再次變得黯淡。不再閃爍微光。

thalara: 你曾稱它為面具，記得嗎？或許這始終是另一張面具。又或許……兩種樣貌都是你的臉，只是角度不同。

mc: 你曾後悔幫助我改變嗎？或是幫助我變回原樣？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>I regret nothing done by choice. But I do mourn what is lost when that choice is made from fear rather than clarity.<>
<>The fingers they're thicker now. Less elegant. More blunt. I don’t know if I’m relieved or ashamed.<>
<>You are both. That is what makes you human. This transformation is not shameful it is simply honest. It reveals what you need in this moment.<>
<>I wanted to reach back… to be what I was. But now I don’t know if what I was is enough anymore.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 我從不後悔出於選擇而做的事。但我確實哀悼那些因恐懼而非清明而做出選擇時所失去的東西。

mc: 手指……現在變粗了。沒那麼優雅。更為鈍重。我不知道自己是感到寬慰還是羞愧。

thalara: 你兩者皆是。這正是你身為人類的特質。這種轉變並不羞恥，它只是誠實。它揭示了你此刻所需。

mc: 我想要回到過去……成為過去的我。但現在我不知道過去的我是否還足夠。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>Then you’ve learned the lesson of all shapeshifting: there is no going back. Only forward, into another form of understanding. This hand is not the same as before. It never will be.<>
<>So this… this is what a hand feels like when it’s caught between who I was and who I might have been.<>
<>Precisely. Neither weapon nor whisper. Not yet. But it will choose. And so will you.<>
<>It hurts. Not the pain of the potion. Something else. Like saying goodbye to a part of me I was just starting to trust.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那麼你已學到所有形變的教訓：沒有回頭路。只能向前，進入另一種形式的理解。這隻手已與過去不同。永遠不會再一樣了。

mc: 所以這……這就是一隻手卡在我曾是的人與我可能成為的人之間時的感覺。

thalara: 正是如此。既非武器，亦非低語。還不是。但它會做出選擇。你也一樣。

mc: 這很痛。不是藥水帶來的疼痛。是別的。像是在向一個我才剛開始信任的自我部分道別。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_5
passages.content:
<> <>Trust leaves echoes. Let them echo. Let them haunt you, even. From echo comes resonance and from that… choice that matters.<>
<>What will she think? The one I saw in the mirror. The one this hand used to belong to.<>
<>She watches still. And she waits. Whether you return to her… or carry her forward in new form, is yours to decide.<>
<>Then let this hand hold both of us. Him and her. Not erased. Not replaced. Just… remembered.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 信任會留下迴響。讓它們迴盪吧。甚至讓它們縈繞你。從迴響中產生共鳴，而從共鳴中……產生重要的選擇。

mc: 她會怎麼想？那個我在鏡中看見的人。那個這隻手曾經歸屬的人。

thalara: 她仍在觀看。並且等待。無論你是回歸到她身邊……還是以新的形態攜她前行，都由你決定。

mc: 那麼讓這隻手同時握住我們兩個吧。他，和她。不被抹去。不被取代。只是……被記住。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_ms_6
passages.content:
<> <>And in remembering, reshaped.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 並在記憶中，重塑。
[I feel the potion working in my right hand]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This feels… easier now. Like my body finally agrees with the change.|right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_1]] |

[[I’m still not sure how much of this is me.|right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_1]] |

[[You keep calling this refinement. But all I see is the strength I earned being covered up|right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[這感覺……現在容易多了。彷彿我的身體終於認同了這個改變。] |
[我仍不確定這有多少是真正的我。] |
[你一直稱這為精煉。但我看到的，只是我辛苦得來的力量被掩蓋起來。] |

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <>Your hand is a story, Caelan. It tells of battles won and losses mourned. But now it will also tell of patience, finesse, and choice.<>
<>I can feel the difference. It’s like every movement is more deliberate, more… thoughtful. But sometimes, it feels unfamiliar. Almost foreign.<>
<>That unfamiliarity is the soil where new strength grows. Strength not forged in fire, but nurtured in calm. Elegance is its own kind of power.<>
<>It’s strange to think of power as something soft. Like velvet draped over steel.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你的手是一個故事，Caelan。它訴說著贏得的戰役與哀悼的損失。但現在，它也將訴說耐心、精妙與選擇。

mc: 我能感覺到不同。就像每一個動作都更加深思熟慮，更加……充滿思慮。但有時，它感覺很陌生。幾乎像是外來的。

Thalara: 那種陌生感，正是新力量生長的土壤。這力量並非在烈火中鍛造，而是在平靜中滋養。優雅本身就是一種力量。

mc: 把力量想成柔軟的東西，這感覺很奇怪。就像天鵝絨覆蓋在鋼鐵上。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <>Exactly so. Velvet protects the steel, but it also invites touch. It does not demand respect through force, but through allure. There is a deep courage in that.<>
<>I suppose I’m learning a new language one spoken in gestures and glances, not shouts and clangs.<>
<>And you will speak it fluently, in time. The world listens closely to those who wield grace. They bend not by weakness, but by wisdom.<>
<>Sometimes I wonder if I’ll ever fully belong in this new skin. If this hand, this body, will ever truly feel like mine.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 正是如此。天鵝絨保護著鋼鐵，但它也邀請觸碰。它不靠力量要求尊重，而是靠魅力。這其中蘊含著深沉的勇氣。

mc: 我想我正在學習一種新的語言，一種用手勢和眼神訴說的語言，而非叫喊與鏗鏘之聲。

Thalara: 假以時日，你將能流利地說它。這個世界會仔細傾聽那些駕馭優雅之人。他們彎曲並非因為軟弱，而是因為智慧。

mc: 有時我會想，我是否真的能完全屬於這副新的軀殼。這隻手、這個身體，是否真的會感覺像是我的。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <>Belonging is a journey, not a destination. This hand is becoming a reflection of who you are becoming. That reflection is still you just a version shaped by choice and magic.<>
<>There’s a beauty in that idea. A chance to remake myself without losing what matters.<>
<>Yes. Transformation is not erasure, but revelation. The layers you shed were only parts that no longer served you.<>
<>Do you think others will notice? Will they see the change before I do?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 歸屬感是一段旅程，而非目的地。這隻手正逐漸成為你正在成為的樣子的映照。那個映照依然是你——只是一個由選擇與魔法塑造的版本。

mc: 這個想法很美。一個重塑自我而不失去重要之物的機會。

Thalara: 是的。轉變並非抹除，而是揭示。你褪去的層次，只是那些不再服務於你的部分。

mc: 你覺得別人會注意到嗎？他們會在我察覺之前就看到改變嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <>Eyes trained in the old ways might miss it at first. But grace always finds its stage. Soon, the subtlety of your movements will speak louder than any word.<>
<>I want to be more than a symbol. I want to be real. To move with intention and truth.<>
<>That truth is within you already. The ritual is only the key to unlock it. Your hand is learning not just to perform, but to express.<>
<>Then I will practice every gesture, every motion. So when the moment comes, I won’t hesitate.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 習慣舊方式的眼睛起初可能會忽略它。但優雅總會找到它的舞台。很快，你動作的細膩將比任何言語都更響亮。

mc: 我不想只是一個象徵。我想要真實。帶著意圖與真實行動。

Thalara: 那份真實已在你心中。儀式只是開啟它的鑰匙。你的手正在學習的不只是表演，更是表達。

mc: 那麼我會練習每一個手勢，每一個動作。這樣當那一刻來臨時，我才不會猶豫。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fs_right_hand_fm_5
passages.content:
<> <>That is the spirit of elegance confidence born from preparation, not chance.<>
<>Thank you, Thalara. For helping me find this part of myself.<>
<>It is my honor, Caelan. The path is long, but with each step, you shape your own destiny.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 這正是優雅的精神——源自準備而非偶然的自信。

mc: 謝謝你，Thalara。幫助我找到自己的這一部分。

Thalara: 這是我的榮幸，Caelan。前路漫長，但每一步，你都在塑造自己的命運。
[I feel the potion working in my right hand]

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve walked far into femininity… maybe it’s time to step back|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_1]] |

[[I still feel the warmth of what I was becoming|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_1]] |

[[All that grace, that softness they weren’t mine. |right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已經調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我已在女性化的道路上走得太遠……或許是時候退一步了] |
[我仍能感受到我正在成為的那個樣子的餘溫] |
[所有的優雅，那份柔軟……它們並不屬於我。] |

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <>Strength is not lost, Caelan. It has only changed its form. You are reclaiming what is essential without erasing what you have learned.<>
<>It feels different now, heavier somehow. Not like before, but… sturdier. Like a foundation, not a dance.<>
<>Yes. This hand has learned to bend, to express softness but now it must learn to hold fast again. To be the anchor beneath the flow.<>
<>The grace feels like a distant memory. I almost miss the lightness, the ease.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 力量並未失去，Caelan。它只是改變了形式。你正在取回本質，而沒有抹去你已學會的一切。

mc: 現在感覺不同了，不知怎地更沉重了。不像以前，但是……更穩固了。像是地基，而非舞蹈。

Thalara: 是的。這隻手已學會彎曲，學會表達柔軟……但現在它必須重新學會堅守。成為流動之下的錨。

mc: 那份優雅感覺像是遙遠的記憶。我幾乎懷念那份輕盈，那份從容。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <>And yet, even as you reclaim strength, the grace will remain beneath the surface like roots feeding a mighty tree.<>
<>I’m afraid the elegance might fade too much. What if I become too rigid? Too harsh?<>
<>Balance is the goal, not absolutes. You will carry both within you power tempered by wisdom, strength softened by understanding.<>
<>Sometimes I wonder who I really am when I shift between these states. The woman I was becoming, or the warrior I was born.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 然而，即使在你取回力量的同時，那份優雅仍會留存於表面之下——如同滋養參天大樹的根。

mc: 我擔心優雅會消退太多。如果我變得過於僵化怎麼辦？過於嚴厲？

Thalara: 平衡才是目標，而非絕對。你將兩者都攜帶於內——被智慧調和的權力，被理解軟化的力量。

mc: 有時我會想，當我在這些狀態間轉換時，我究竟是誰。是那個我正在成為的女人，還是那個我生來就是的戰士。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>You are both and more. Transformation is a river, not a wall. You flow through many forms but remain one essence.<>
<>I want to be steady. To stand firm without losing what grace taught me.<>
<>That steadiness will grow with time. Strength is not just muscle it is the calm in the storm.<>
<>Do others see the change? Or am I the only one feeling this shifting inside?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你兩者皆是，且不止於此。轉變是一條河流，而非一道牆。你流經許多形態，但本質如一。

mc: 我想要穩固。想要堅定站立，而不失去優雅教會我的東西。

Thalara: 那份穩固會隨著時間增長。力量不僅僅是肌肉——它是風暴中的平靜。

mc: 別人看得到改變嗎？還是只有我一個人感覺到內在的這種轉變？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>Your presence will reflect your inner balance. Those who truly know you will notice the return of resolve and the persistence of softness.<>
<>Thank you, Thalara. For guiding me back, not just to what was, but to what can be.<>
<>It is your courage that guides the magic, Caelan. The path is yours to walk, with strength and grace intertwined.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你的存在將反映你內在的平衡。那些真正了解你的人，會注意到決心的回歸與柔韌的堅持。

mc: 謝謝你，Thalara。引導我回歸，不僅是回到過去，更是回到可能成為的樣子。

Thalara: 是你的勇氣引導著魔法，Caelan。這條路由你來走，力量與優雅交織其中。
[I feel the potion working in my right hand]

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[If I must become her… then let it be with open eyes.|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl_1]] |

[[I’ve come so far. It feels right… but frightening.|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl_1]] |

[[So this is what it means to let go entirely. Fine.|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[若我必須成為她……那就讓我睜大眼睛面對。] |
[我已走了這麼遠。感覺是對的……但令人畏懼。] |
[所以這就是徹底放手的意義。好吧。] |

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl_1
passages.content:
<> <>Change is never a loss, Caelan. It is transformation in motion. You carry both the queen’s elegance and the warrior’s might within you.<>
<>This hand feels heavier, but somehow more certain. The delicate curves are fading, replaced by strength that feels both familiar and new.<>
<>Strength and grace are threads woven together. Neither is less important than the other. You learn to hold both, shifting as the moment demands.<>
<>Will I forget the gentleness? The softness that made me feel… more than just power?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 改變從來不是失去，Caelan。它是進行中的蛻變。你體內同時承載著女王的優雅與戰士的力量。

mc: 這隻手感覺更沉重了，但不知為何也更篤定。精緻的曲線正在消退，被一種既熟悉又嶄新的力量所取代。

thalara: 力量與優雅是交織在一起的絲線。兩者同等重要。你學會同時掌握兩者，並隨當下需求而轉換。

mc: 我會忘記那份溫柔嗎？那份讓我感覺……不只是擁有力量的柔軟？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl_2
passages.content:
<> <>Gentleness remains, deeper than the skin. It shapes your touch, even when your hand wields authority.<>
<>It’s strange to feel this tug back toward a past self. Not a loss exactly, but a layering.<>
<>A layering is growth. The queen’s hand still guides, but the warrior’s grasp strengthens the foundation beneath it.<>
<>I wonder if I can carry both without losing myself.<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 溫柔依然存在，深植於肌膚之下。它塑造了你的觸感，即使當你的手執掌權威之時。

mc: 這種被拉回過去自我的拉扯感很奇特。不完全是失去，而是一種層疊。

thalara: 層疊即是成長。女王之手仍在引導，但戰士的掌握強化了其下的根基。

mc: 我在想，我是否能同時承載兩者而不迷失自我。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fm_right_hand_fl_3
passages.content:
<> <>You are never lost, only evolving. Both hands will come to reflect the whole you power tempered with grace.<>
<>Thank you for walking this path with me. For helping me hold onto what matters.<>
<>It is your heart that guides the magic, Caelan. The hand is but an instrument your spirit shapes its true strength.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你從未迷失，只是在進化。你的雙手終將反映出完整的你——力量與優雅交融。

mc: 感謝你陪我走過這條路。幫助我緊握重要的東西。

thalara: 是你的心引導著魔法，Caelan。手不過是工具，是你的靈魂塑造了它真正的力量。
[我感覺到藥水在我右手中起作用了]

passages.name: right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Maybe I don’t need to be perfect to rule. Just… present.|right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm_1]] |

[[It felt right, the elegance… but I suppose not every part of me|right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm_1]] |

[[Maybe it looked like a queen’s hand, but it never felt like mine.|right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[或許我不需要完美才能統治。只需要……在場。] |
[那份優雅感覺很對……但我想，並非我的每一部分都必須如此] |
[或許它看起來像女王的手，但它從未感覺像是我自己的。] |

passages.name: right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <>This transformation is a dance between strength and grace, Caelan. You are reclaiming a strength that does not diminish your elegance it reshapes it.<>
<>It feels strange, like the hand remembers something it had forgotten. The delicate glow fades, replaced by a steady pulse beneath the skin.<>
<>Power often wears many faces. Today, it wears a firmer skin a hand that commands without losing its refinement.<>
<>Will the softness return someday? Or is this a one-way path?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這次轉變是力量與優雅之間的舞蹈，Caelan。你正在取回一種力量，它不會削弱你的優雅，而是重塑它。

mc: 感覺很奇怪，彷彿這隻手記起了它曾遺忘的東西。精緻的光澤褪去，被皮膚下穩定的脈動所取代。

thalara: 力量常以多種面貌示人。今日，它披上了更堅實的皮膚——一隻既能發號施令又不失精緻的手。

mc: 柔軟有一天會回來嗎？還是這是一條單行道？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <>Magic is never so linear. The softness will always live beneath the surface, accessible when you call it forth.<>
<>I’m surprised to find comfort in this change. The hand feels more mine less a fragile ornament.<>
<>That is the balance you must master the harmony of strength and tenderness.<>
<>Do you think the queen who once held this hand would recognize it now?<>
[[Move Forth|right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 魔法從非如此線性。柔軟將永遠存在於表面之下，當你召喚時便能觸及。

mc: 我驚訝地發現自己從這改變中找到了慰藉。這隻手感覺更像是我的，而非一件脆弱的裝飾品。

thalara: 這正是你必須掌握的平衡——力量與溫柔的諧和。

mc: 你認為曾經擁有這隻手的那位女王，現在還能認出它嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_hand_fl_right_hand_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <>She would see the same soul, tempered and refined by experience. Different, yes but always you.<>
<>It’s hard to say goodbye to the final touches of grace. But maybe strength is its own kind of beauty.<>
<>Indeed. Your hand will carry the future strong, elegant, and entirely your own.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my right hand|use_success_potion_create_right_hand]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 她會看到同一個靈魂，經過歷練而淬鍊精進。是的，不同了——但永遠是你。

mc: 很難向優雅的最後痕跡道別。但或許力量本身就是一種美。

thalara: 確實。你的手將承載未來——強壯、優雅，且完全屬於你自己。
[我感覺到藥水在我右手中起作用了]
