passages.name: right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready. I understand what must be done.|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_1]] |

[[I suppose I have no choice. Let’s get this over with.|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t want this. But if the Queen demands it, so be it.|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。 Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。我明白必須做什麼。] |
[我想我別無選擇。我們速戰速決吧。] |
[我不想要這樣。但如果女王要求，那就這樣吧。] |

passages.name: right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. The first transformation is never about the body it is about your relationship with what you think it means. <>
<>…Right.<>
<> This draught won’t sculpt breasts or enchant curves. Not yet. All it will do is ask your chest to let go to ease its grip on a shape that has served you until now. <>
<>So it’ll make me weaker?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。第一次轉變從來不是關於身體，而是關於你與你對其意義的認知之間的關係。

mc: ……好吧。

thalara:
這劑藥水不會塑造胸部或賦予曲線。還不會。它只會要求你的胸膛放鬆，鬆開它至今為止一直維持的形態。

mc: 所以它會讓我變弱？

[繼續]

passages.name: right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <> No. But it will unfasten the pride your muscles have worn like armor. Not every kind of strength shows in bulk. Sometimes it shows in surrender. <>
<>You sound like a philosopher.<>
<> When you’ve brewed potions that change bones and bend voices, you learn to respect the philosophy of flesh. <>
<> This will taste like mint, metal, and maybe… regret. You may feel your chest ache for its former form. That’s normal. Muscles remember. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
不會。但它會卸下你的肌肉如盔甲般穿戴的驕傲。並非所有力量都顯現於體格。有時，力量顯現於臣服。

mc: 你聽起來像個哲學家。

thalara:
當你調製過改變骨骼、扭轉聲音的藥水後，你就學會尊重肉體的哲學。

thalara:
這會嘗起來像薄荷、金屬，或許……還有遺憾。你可能會感到胸膛為其過往的形態而疼痛。那是正常的。肌肉有記憶。

[繼續]

passages.name: right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>How fast will it work?<>
<> Gradually. Within the hour, the tautness in your chest will soften. Your posture will shift. Clothes will feel looser. And you may… feel exposed. <>
<>You mean… like I’m losing something?<>
<> You are. But you’re not being robbed. You are offering it, in exchange for something else. That’s what every step in magic is a trade, not a theft. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 效果多快會出現？

thalara:
逐漸地。一小時內，你胸部的緊實感會軟化。你的姿勢會改變。衣服會感覺更寬鬆。而且你可能……感到暴露。

mc: 你是說……就像我正在失去什麼？

thalara:
是的。但你並非被奪走。你正在將其獻出，以換取別的東西。這就是魔法中每一步的本質——一場交易，而非盜竊。

[繼續]

passages.name: right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>…It’s cold.<>
<> Good. That means it’s working. The swelling in your chest will ease first. That defined line under your collarbone? It’ll blur. Pectorals will yield to smoother flesh. Your heart will beat more openly, less behind armor. <>
<>…It feels strange already. Like I’ve been… unmade a little.<>
<> That is the beginning, Caelan. To become what you must be, you first must shed what you are. Do not fear the unmaking fear the refusal to remake. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: ……好冷。

thalara:
很好。這表示它正在生效。你胸部的腫脹感會先消退。你鎖骨下那條清晰的線條？它會變得模糊。胸肌將讓位給更平滑的肌膚。你的心跳會更開闊，不再那麼像躲在盔甲後方。

mc: ……已經感覺很奇怪了。好像我……被拆解了一部分。

thalara:
這只是開始，Caelan。要成為你必須成為的樣子，你首先必須褪去你現在的模樣。不要害怕拆解，要害怕拒絕重塑。

[繼續]

passages.name: right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <>What if I don’t want to be remade? What if I still want to be myself?<>
<> Then you will have a long and difficult path ahead. This magic is ancient and patient; it does not rush. But it does not forgive hesitation forever. You will be given choices, but know this every choice shapes not just your body, but your soul. <>
<>How do I keep hold of myself if I’m changing so much?<>
<> By remembering who you are beyond flesh and bone. You are Caelan, child of Queen Alinora and Therion. You carry their blood and their will. This transformation is not erasure, but evolution. The question is will you embrace it, or resist until the end? <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 如果我不想被重塑呢？如果我仍想保持自我呢？

thalara:
那麼你面前將是一條漫長而艱難的道路。這魔法古老而耐心；它不急於求成。但它不會永遠寬容猶豫。你將面臨選擇，但要知道，每個選擇不僅塑造你的身體，也塑造你的靈魂。

mc: 如果我改變如此之大，該如何保持自我？

thalara:
記住你超越血肉之軀的本質。你是 Caelan，Alinora 女王與 Therion 之子。你承載著他們的血脈與意志。這場轉變並非抹除，而是進化。問題在於：你會擁抱它，還是抵抗到底？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_6
passages.content:
<> <>And if I resist? Will it hurt more?<>
<> Magic follows intent as much as matter. Resistance will make the process slower, more painful, more uncertain. Surrender brings grace; defiance brings struggle. The choice is yours always. <>
<>…And what if I surrender but lose myself?<>
<> Then you will find a new self one forged in fire and rebirth. That self may be unfamiliar, but it will be yours in ways you cannot yet imagine. Trust the process, Caelan. The queen trusts you. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 如果我抵抗呢？會更痛苦嗎？

thalara:
魔法既遵循物質，也遵循意圖。抵抗會使過程更緩慢、更痛苦、更不確定。順服帶來優雅；反抗帶來掙扎。選擇權永遠在你手中。

mc: …那如果我順服了，卻迷失了自我呢？

thalara:
那麼你將找到一個全新的自我——一個在火焰與重生中鍛造而成的自我。那個自我或許陌生，但它將以你無法想像的方式屬於你。相信這個過程，Caelan。女王信任你。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_ml_right_leg_mm_7
passages.content:
<> <>I hope I can live up to that trust.<>
<> You already have. Now, drink. Let the first step begin. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我希望我能不辜負這份信任。

thalara:
你已經做到了。現在，喝下它吧。讓第一步開始。

[I feel the potion working in my right leg]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to regain the strength I had before.|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_1]] |

[[I’m not sure this is right, but I’ll try.|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_1]] |

[[I refuse to lose my strength any longer.|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想重獲昔日的力量。] |
[我不確定這是否正確，但我願意嘗試。] |
[我拒絕再繼續失去我的力量。] |

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This reversal is not merely physical it's a reclaiming of what once was, a renewal of power you’ve allowed to wane. <>
<>…Understood.<>
<> This draught will not bulk you up overnight, but it will call your muscles back to life. It asks your leg to remember its former strength, to rebuild fibers it once held tightly. <>
<>So it will make me stronger?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。這次逆轉不僅僅是肉體的改變——它是對過往的重新奪回，是對你任其衰微的力量的復甦。

mc: …明白了。

thalara:
這劑藥水不會讓你一夜之間變得魁梧，但它會喚醒你的肌肉。它要求你的腿憶起昔日的力量，重建它曾經緊握的纖維。

mc: 所以它會讓我變得更強壯？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_2
passages.content:
<> <> Yes. But with strength comes responsibility. You will regain the muscle that bore your burdens, but also the rigidity and armor that came with it. <>
<>You speak as though this is a burden.<>
<> Strength is a double-edged sword. It protects, but it can also confine. To wield it well requires wisdom as much as power. <>
<> This potion tastes of iron, earth, and resolve. You may feel a sudden rush of heat, a tightening of sinews and veins. It is your body waking from its softer state. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
是的。但伴隨力量而來的是責任。你將重獲那曾承擔重負的肌肉，但也會重獲隨之而來的僵硬與盔甲。

mc: 你說得彷彿這是種負擔。

thalara:
力量是一把雙刃劍。它能保護，但也可能束縛。要善用它，需要智慧與力量並重。

thalara:
這藥水嚐起來有鐵、泥土與決心的味道。你可能會感到一陣突如其來的灼熱，肌腱與血管的緊縮。那是你的身體正從柔軟的狀態中甦醒。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_3
passages.content:
<> <>How quickly will it take hold?<>
<> Within the hour, your leg will thicken, muscles contracting and swelling. Movement will feel more forceful, weightier. But with that, a sense of rawness may surface new strength comes with strain. <>
<>It sounds painful.<>
<> Transformation always challenges the body and mind. You may feel tightness or soreness as muscle reshapes. But it is a sign of progress your leg reawakening to its true power. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 它多久會生效？

thalara:
一小時內，你的腿會變粗，肌肉收縮膨脹。行動會感覺更有力、更沉重。但隨之而來的，可能是一種粗糙感——新的力量伴隨著緊繃而來。

mc: 聽起來很痛。

thalara:
轉變總是挑戰著身心。肌肉重塑時，你可能感到緊繃或痠痛。但這是進展的標誌——你的腿正重新覺醒，回歸其真正的力量。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_4
passages.content:
<> <>I’m afraid of becoming too rigid, too unyielding.<>
<> That is the nature of strength sometimes it hardens you, sometimes it frees you. The choice to balance it wisely rests with you. <>
<>What if I lose some of the grace I’ve gained?<>
<> Grace and strength can coexist, but often in tension. Your movement may become less fluid, but more purposeful. It’s a trade-off you must consider carefully. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我害怕變得太僵硬、太不屈不撓。

thalara:
這就是力量的本質——有時它使你堅硬，有時它使你自由。如何明智地平衡它，取決於你。

mc: 如果我失去了一些已獲得的優雅呢？

thalara:
優雅與力量可以共存，但往往處於拉鋸之中。你的動作可能變得不那麼流暢，但更有目的性。這是你必須仔細權衡的交換。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_5
passages.content:
<> <>Will this reversal undo the progress I’ve made mentally?<>
<> Body and mind are intertwined. As your form hardens, your thoughts may shift, perhaps toward fierceness and resolve. It is not a loss only a different path. <>
<>And if I resist this change?<>
<> Resistance will slow the process and make it harsher. But your will is strong if you choose this, you must embrace it fully. Half measures bring only pain. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這次逆轉會否抹去我在心智上的進步？

thalara:
身體與心靈緊密相連。當你的形體變得堅硬，你的思維也可能轉變，或許趨向兇猛與決斷。這並非失去——只是一條不同的道路。

mc: 如果我抵抗這個改變呢？

thalara:
抵抗會使過程減緩並更加嚴酷。但你的意志很堅強——如果你選擇這條路，就必須完全擁抱它。半途而廢只會帶來痛苦。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ml_6
passages.content:
<> <>…I hope I am ready.<>
<> You are more ready than you realize. Drink now, and reclaim your strength. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: …我希望我準備好了。

thalara:
你比你自己所想的更準備好了。現在喝下吧，重拾你的力量。

[I feel the potion working in my right leg]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want to regain more strength and power.|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_1]] |

[[I’m hesitant, but I will try to accept it.|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_1]] |

[[I refuse to remain in this weaker state any longer.|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想重獲更多力量與權能。] |
[我有些猶豫，但我會試著接受它。] |
[我拒絕再繼續停留在這種虛弱狀態。] |

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This potion calls upon your leg to reclaim its fuller strength. The subtle tone you’ve gained will shift toward the resolute muscle you once bore. <>
<>…I see.<>
<> You will feel a tightening, a gathering of power beneath the skin, as your leg begins to thicken and bulk. This strength is vital for the demands you will face. <>
<>Will I lose the smoothness I’ve started to enjoy?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。這瓶藥劑將呼喚你的腿，重拾它更飽滿的力量。你已獲得的細微線條，將轉變為你曾經擁有的堅實肌肉。

mc: …我明白了。

thalara:
你會感覺到一股緊實感，力量在皮膚下匯聚，你的腿將開始變得粗壯、厚實。這份力量對你將要面對的挑戰至關重要。

mc: 我會失去我開始享受的那份柔滑感嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <> Some softness will give way, yes. But the new firmness will lend you steadiness and endurance. There is honor in the balance of strength and grace. <>
<>This feels like stepping backward.<>
<> It is a return, not a regression. Strength and agility coexist you are rediscovering a part of yourself you once knew well. <>
<> The taste is earthier this time like fresh soil after rain, with a hint of iron. It may bring a warm pulse through your leg, a sign muscles waking from rest. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
是的，一些柔軟度會讓步。但新的堅實將帶給你穩定與耐力。力量與優雅之間的平衡，自有其尊嚴。

mc: 這感覺像是倒退。

thalara:
這是一種回歸，而非退步。力量與敏捷可以共存——你正在重新發現你曾經熟知的自己的一部分。

thalara:
這次的味道更為樸實，像雨後的新鮮土壤，帶著一絲鐵鏽味。它可能會讓你的腿感到一陣溫熱的脈動，那是肌肉從沉睡中甦醒的跡象。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>How long will the changes take?<>
<> Within the hour, your leg will gain thickness and firmness. Movement may feel heavier but more purposeful. You may notice a new sense of grounding. <>
<>What if I resist the changes?<>
<> Resistance will prolong discomfort and uncertainty. Embrace the change fully, and your body will thank you. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 變化需要多久？

thalara:
一小時之內，你的腿就會增加厚度與硬度。動作可能會感覺更沉重，但也更有目的性。你可能會注意到一種新的紮實感。

mc: 如果我抗拒變化呢？

thalara:
抗拒只會延長不適與不確定性。全然接納改變，你的身體會感謝你。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_mm_right_leg_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>I’m afraid of losing the elegance I’m growing into.<>
<> Strength need not erase elegance it can enhance it when balanced wisely. This is a step toward resilience, not forsaking grace. <>
<>I hope I am ready.<>
<> You are ready. Drink, and welcome the power returning to your frame. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我害怕失去我正在逐漸擁有的優雅。

thalara:
力量無需抹去優雅——若能明智地平衡，它更能襯托優雅。這是邁向韌性的一步，而非捨棄優雅。

mc: 希望我準備好了。

thalara:
你準備好了。喝下吧，迎接回歸你身軀的力量。

[I feel the potion working in my right leg]

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I am ready to soften and refine, to walk more lightly.|right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I want this change, but I’ll try.|right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t want to lose any more strength, but I’ll endure it.|right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[I am ready to soften and refine, to walk more lightly.] |
[I don’t know if I want this change, but I’ll try.] |
[I don’t want to lose any more strength, but I’ll endure it.] |

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This potion will continue the transformation, softening the remaining bulk of your right leg. Strength remains, but elegance will begin to weave into your form. <>
<>…I understand.<>
<> The muscles will relax, becoming leaner and more toned. You will still retain enough strength for your training, but the rough edges will smooth away. <>
<>Will it feel weak?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。這瓶藥劑將延續轉化，軟化你右腿剩餘的粗壯體積。力量猶存，但優雅將開始融入你的形體。

mc: …我懂了。

thalara:
肌肉將會放鬆，變得更精實、更有線條。你仍會保有足夠的力量進行訓練，但粗糙的稜角將被撫平。

mc: 會感覺虛弱嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <> Not weak, but more balanced. There is power in grace as much as in brute strength. You are learning to carry yourself differently. <>
<>It feels like losing part of myself.<>
<> Change always feels like loss before it becomes gain. You are becoming something new, something equally worthy. <>
<> This potion tastes of soft herbs and cool water, with a faint trace of iron. You may feel a gentle pulse in your leg as the muscles relax and reshape. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
不是虛弱，而是更平衡。優雅之中蘊含的力量，不亞於蠻力。你正在學習以不同的方式承載自己。

mc: 感覺像是失去了部分的自己。

thalara:
改變在成為收穫之前，總感覺像是失去。你正在成為某種嶄新的、同樣有價值的存在。

thalara:
這藥劑嚐起來有柔和的藥草與清涼的水味，帶著一絲淡淡的鐵鏽味。當肌肉放鬆並重塑時，你可能會感到腿部有一陣溫和的脈動。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>How soon will the change be noticeable?<>
<> Within the hour, you will feel your leg grow lighter, your movements more fluid. The bulk will decrease, replaced by a leaner strength. <>
<>What if I resist the changes?<>
<> Resistance only slows progress and increases discomfort. Trust the process, and your body will adapt gracefully. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 變化多快會顯現？

thalara:
一小時之內，你會感覺腿變得更輕盈，動作更流暢。粗壯的部分將減少，被更精實的力量取代。

mc: 如果我抗拒變化呢？

thalara:
抗拒只會拖慢進程，增加不適。信任這個過程，你的身體會優雅地適應。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>I’m afraid of what this means.<>
<> Fear is natural, but do not let it chain you. You are stepping into a new role, with new strengths. Embrace it fully. <>
<>I hope I can walk this path well.<>
<> You will. Drink now, and let the change begin. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我害怕這意味著什麼。

thalara:
恐懼是自然的，但別讓它束縛你。你正踏入一個新的角色，擁有新的力量。全然接納它吧。

mc: 希望我能走好這條路。

thalara:
你會的。現在喝下吧，讓改變開始。

[I feel the potion working in my right leg]

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I am ready to embrace this new form and the changes it will bring.|right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_1]] |

[[I am uncertain, but I will try to accept what must be.|right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t want to lose my strength or identity, but I will endure this.|right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[I am ready to embrace this new form and the changes it will bring.] |
[I am uncertain, but I will try to accept what must be.] |
[I don’t want to lose my strength or identity, but I will endure this.] |

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. Today, the magic you drink will mark a profound turning point. The muscles that have long defined your leg will soften into gentle curves and smooth skin. You will begin to carry the subtle grace of femininity. <>
<>…This feels different from before.<>
<> Indeed. This is not merely lessening strength or tone this is a reweaving of your very form. The boundaries between muscle and flesh will blur, and a new shape will take root. <>
<>Will I lose the power I’ve worked for?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。今日，你飲下的魔法將標誌一個深刻的轉折點。長久以來定義你腿部的肌肉，將軟化為柔和的曲線與光滑的肌膚。你將開始承載女性特有的細膩優雅。

mc: …這感覺和之前不同。

thalara:
確實。這不僅僅是減少力量或線條——這是對你形體本質的重新編織。肌肉與肌膚的界線將變得模糊，一個新的輪廓將生根成形。

mc: 我會失去我努力得來的力量嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <> Power will change, but it will not disappear. Strength manifests in many forms sometimes in muscle, sometimes in presence, in balance, in elegance. <>
<>I feel… warmth spreading already.<>
<> That is the magic flowing, reshaping your flesh and bone. Your leg will grow smoother, softer to the touch, with gentle curves hinting at the new identity you are forging. <>
<> This potion tastes of sweet herbs and soft honey, with a whisper of jasmine. Expect a sensation of deep warmth and gentle pressure as your leg reshapes. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
力量會改變，但不會消失。力量以多種形式展現——有時在肌肉中，有時在氣場、平衡感或優雅之中。

mc: 我感覺……溫暖已經開始擴散。

thalara:
那是流動的魔力，正在重塑你的血肉與骨骼。你的腿會變得更加光滑，觸感更柔軟，柔和的曲線將暗示你正在打造的新身分。

thalara:
這藥劑嚐起來有甜草和軟蜜的味道，帶著一絲茉莉花香。當你的腿重塑時，預期會感受到深層的溫暖和輕柔的壓力。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>How quickly will I notice the change?<>
<> Within the hour, you will feel your leg relax and reshape. The lines of muscle will soften; the skin will smooth and bloom with subtle curves. <>
<>What if I resist the change?<>
<> Resistance will make the magic harder to bear. Surrender to the transformation, and your body will adapt with grace and strength in new ways. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我多快會注意到變化？

thalara:
一小時之內，你就會感覺到你的腿放鬆並重塑。肌肉線條會軟化；皮膚會變得光滑，並綻放出細微的曲線。

mc: 如果我抗拒改變呢？

thalara:
抗拒會讓魔力更難承受。順應轉變，你的身體將以新的方式，優雅而有力地適應。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_ms_right_leg_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>It’s difficult to imagine myself like this.<>
<> Every transformation is a step into the unknown. But with each step, you grow closer to the queen you are destined to become. <>
<>I hope I can walk this path well.<>
<> You will. Drink deeply, and let your new form begin to blossom. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 很難想像自己變成這樣。

thalara:
每一次轉變都是踏入未知的一步。但每一步，都讓你更接近命中注定要成為的那位女王。

mc: 希望我能走好這條路。

thalara:
你會的。大口喝下，讓你新的形體開始綻放。

[我感覺到藥劑在我的右腿起作用了]

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I am ready to reclaim my former strength and identity.|right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_1]] |

[[I feel uncertain, but I will try to accept this change.|right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_1]] |

[[I don’t want to lose the grace I’ve gained, but I will endure this.|right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥劑了。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好取回我昔日的力量與身分了。] |
[我感到不確定，但我會試著接受這個改變。] |
[我不想失去我已獲得的優雅，但我會承受這一切。] |

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. Today, the magic you drink will mark a profound turning point the gentle curves of your leg will give way to renewed muscle and definition. You will reclaim strength and tone as your form shifts toward the masculine. <>
<>…This feels different from before.<>
<> Indeed. This is not simply regaining muscle it is a reweaving of your very form. The softness of flesh will yield to muscle and sinew once more, reshaping your leg with new power. <>
<>Will I lose the grace I’ve developed?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。今天，你飲下的魔力將標誌著一個深刻的轉折點——你腿上柔和的曲線將讓位給重新增長的肌肉與線條。隨著你的形體轉向男性化，你將重獲力量與緊實。

mc: ……這感覺和之前不同。

thalara:
確實。這不僅僅是恢復肌肉——這是對你自身形態的重新編織。肌膚的柔軟將再次讓位給肌肉與肌腱，以新的力量重塑你的腿。

mc: 我會失去我已經培養出的優雅嗎？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <> Grace will change, but it will not vanish. Strength manifests in many ways sometimes in elegance, sometimes in raw power. Both are valuable. <>
<>I feel… a coolness spreading already.<>
<> That is the magic flowing, reshaping your flesh and bone. Your leg will grow firmer, muscles tightening, returning to the stronger contours you once knew. <>
<> This potion tastes of sharp herbs and iron, with a whisper of cedar. Expect a sensation of cool pressure and tightening as your leg reshapes. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
優雅會改變，但不會消失。力量以多種方式展現——有時在優雅中，有時在純粹的力量中。兩者皆有價值。

mc: 我感覺……一股涼意已經開始擴散。

thalara:
那是流動的魔力，正在重塑你的血肉與骨骼。你的腿會變得更結實，肌肉緊繃，恢復到你曾經熟悉的、更強壯的輪廓。

thalara:
這藥劑嚐起來有辛辣草藥和鐵鏽味，帶著一絲雪松的氣息。當你的腿重塑時，預期會感受到冰冷的壓力和緊縮感。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>How quickly will I notice the change?<>
<> Within the hour, you will feel your leg firm up and reshape. The soft curves will harden; muscle will thicken and become more defined. <>
<>What if I resist the change?<>
<> Resistance will make the magic harder to bear. Surrender to the transformation, and your body will adapt with renewed strength and vigor. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我多快會注意到變化？

thalara:
一小時之內，你就會感覺到你的腿變得結實並重塑。柔軟的曲線會硬化；肌肉會增厚並變得更分明。

mc: 如果我抗拒改變呢？

thalara:
抗拒會讓魔力更難承受。順應轉變，你的身體將以煥然一新的力量和活力來適應。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>It’s difficult to imagine myself like this.<>
<> Every transformation is a step into the unknown. But with each step, you grow closer to the person you choose to be. <>
<>I hope I can walk this path well.<>
<> You will. Drink deeply, and let your new form begin to strengthen. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 很難想像自己變成這樣。

thalara:
每一次轉變都是踏入未知的一步。但每一步，都讓你更接近你選擇成為的那個人。

mc: 希望我能走好這條路。

thalara:
你會的。大口喝下，讓你新的形體開始變得強壯。

[我感覺到藥劑在我的右腿起作用了]

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready to deepen this change and embrace a fuller femininity.|right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_1]] |

[[I’m uncertain, but I will try to accept whatever comes.|right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_1]] |

[[I’m wary of losing myself, but I’ll endure this for the sake of the crown.|right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已經調製好藥劑了。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好深化這個改變，擁抱更完整的女性特質。] |
[我不確定，但我會試著接受任何結果。] |
[我擔心迷失自我，但為了王冠，我會承受這一切。] |

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This potion will deepen the transformation begun your right leg will gain softer curves, smoother skin, and a structure more suited for fluid, graceful motion. <>
<>It feels like the change will be more than skin deep.<>
<> Indeed. This stage shapes not just flesh but how your body moves and carries itself the very essence of feminine poise. <>
<>Will this make me feel more... exposed?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。這劑藥水將深化已開始的轉變——你的右腿將獲得更加柔和的曲線、更光滑的皮膚，以及更適合流暢、優雅動作的結構。

mc: 感覺這改變不僅僅是表面的。

thalara:
確實。這個階段不僅塑造血肉，更塑造你身體移動和承載自身的方式——那正是女性儀態的精髓。

mc: 這會讓我感覺更……暴露嗎？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <> Perhaps. The subtlety of muscle will give way to vulnerability in softness. But vulnerability is a kind of strength, especially for a queen. <>
<>The warmth in my leg is rising already.<>
<> That is the magic taking root reshaping muscle into gentle curves, rough skin into smooth, supple flesh. <>
<> The taste of this potion is sweet herbs with a whisper of wildflowers delicate but powerful. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
或許吧。肌肉的細微之處將讓位給柔軟所帶來的脆弱。但脆弱也是一種力量，尤其對一位女王而言。

mc: 我腿上的暖意已經在上升了。

thalara:
那是魔力正在扎根——將肌肉重塑為柔和的曲線，將粗糙的皮膚轉變為光滑、柔韌的肌膚。

thalara:
這藥劑的味道是甜草藥帶著一絲野花的香氣——精緻而強大。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <>How soon will I notice the difference?<>
<> Within the hour, you’ll feel your leg shifting movements lighter, the shape fuller and more elegant. <>
<>What if I resist the change?<>
<> Resistance only prolongs discomfort. Allow the magic to flow it serves the harmony of your new form. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我多久會注意到變化？

thalara:
一小時之內，你將感覺到你的腿開始轉變——動作更輕盈，線條更豐滿、更優雅。

mc: 如果我抗拒改變呢？

thalara:
抗拒只會延長不適。讓魔法流動吧——它服務於你新形態的和諧。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fs_right_leg_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <>This is harder than I imagined.<>
<> Every transformation tests you. But embracing it will reveal new strength in your femininity. <>
<>I hope I can move gracefully with this change.<>
<> You will. Drink the potion, and let your right leg blossom into fuller, more fluid grace. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這比我想像的更困難。

thalara:
每一次轉變都在考驗你。但接納它，將在你女性特質中展現出新的力量。

mc: 我希望自己能優雅地適應這個變化。

thalara:
你會的。喝下藥水，讓你的右腿綻放出更豐滿、更流暢的優雅。

[我感覺到藥水在右腿起作用了]

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I accept the return to a subtler femininity.|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_1]] |

[[I’m hesitant, but I’ll let the magic do its work.|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t want to lose this grace, but I’ll endure whatever comes.|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我接受回歸更含蓄的女性特質。] |
[我有些猶豫，但我會讓魔法完成它的工作。] |
[我不想失去這份優雅，但我會承受隨之而來的一切。] |

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <> Come forward, Caelan. Today’s potion will ease back the deeper curves, softening the pronounced femininity of your leg into a subtler, lighter form. Your movement will retain grace but with less bloom a return to a gentler, simpler shape. <>
<>…It feels like stepping back after progress.<>
<> Transformation is not always a straight path forward. Sometimes we must retreat to better understand the strength in simpler forms. <>
<>Will I lose the balance and beauty I gained?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。今日的藥水將緩和那些深刻的曲線，將你腿部顯著的女性特質軟化為一種更含蓄、更輕盈的形態。你的動作將保留優雅，但減少豐盈——回歸更柔和、更簡約的線條。

mc: ……感覺像是在進步之後又退了一步。

thalara:
轉變並非總是一條直線前進的道路。有時我們必須後退，才能更好地理解簡約形態中的力量。

mc: 我會失去已獲得的平衡與美麗嗎？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <> Balance remains, though more refined. Beauty is not only in depth but in subtlety. This step softens your leg without sacrificing its grace. <>
<>The warmth in my leg is fading already.<>
<> That signals the magic reshaping your flesh. The pronounced curves will ease, the skin’s texture will lighten a delicate shift back to gentler contours. <>
<> Expect a taste like sweet herbs with a faint trace of wildflowers gentle yet potent. <>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
平衡仍在，只是更為精緻。美麗不僅在於深度，也在於含蓄。這一步將軟化你的腿部，而不犧牲其優雅。

mc: 我腿部的暖意已經開始消退了。

thalara:
那標誌著魔法正在重塑你的血肉。顯著的曲線將趨於平緩，肌膚的質地將變得更輕盈——這是一次回歸更柔和輪廓的細微轉變。

thalara:
預期會嚐到甜草藥的滋味，帶有一絲野花的淡香——溫和卻強效。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>How soon will I feel the difference?<>
<> Within the hour, the curves will soften and your leg will carry itself with a lighter touch. Movements will become more fluid but less pronounced. <>
<>If I resist this, what then?<>
<> Resistance will delay the change and make it more uncomfortable. Let the magic flow freely it serves your body’s harmony. <>
<>This is hard to accept.<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我多久會感覺到不同？

thalara:
一小時之內，曲線將變得柔和，你的腿將以更輕盈的觸感承載自身。動作會變得更流暢，但不再那麼顯著。

mc: 如果我抗拒，會怎樣？

thalara:
抗拒會延遲改變，並使其更為不適。讓魔法自由流動吧——它服務於你身體的和諧。

mc: 這很難接受。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <> Every transformation, forward or back, teaches us something about ourselves. Embrace it, and you will find strength even in softness. <>
<>I hope I can move with this new form gracefully.<>
<> You will. Drink the potion, and your leg will begin to bloom into gentler grace once more. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
每一次轉變，無論前進或後退，都教會我們一些關於自己的事。接納它，你將在柔軟中找到力量。

mc: 我希望自己能優雅地適應這個新形態。

thalara:
你會的。喝下藥水，你的腿將再次開始綻放出更柔和的優雅。

[我感覺到藥水在右腿起作用了]

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve awaited this moment. Let the final step refine me fully.|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_1]] |

[[I’m nervous, but I know I must see this through.|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_1]] |

[[Even if this changes me beyond recognition, I will endure it for the kingdom.|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我一直在等待這一刻。讓這最後一步徹底精煉我吧。] |
[我很緊張，但我知道我必須堅持到底。] |
[即使這會讓我變得面目全非，我也會為了王國承受它。] |

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This last potion is unlike any before it will perfect your leg’s transformation, weaving strength and elegance into a single, flowing form. <>
<>It feels like the end of a long path... but also like a new beginning.<>
<> Precisely. Transformation is both an ending and a dawn. Your right leg will now carry the full grace and poise expected of a queen. <>
<>Will I feel different when I walk? More... aware?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。這最後一瓶藥水與以往不同——它將完善你腿部的轉變，將力量與優雅編織成一個單一、流暢的形態。

mc: 感覺像是一段漫長路途的終點……但也像一個新的開始。

thalara:
正是如此。轉變既是終結，也是黎明。你的右腿現在將承載一位女王應有的全部優雅與儀態。

mc: 我走路時會感覺不同嗎？更……有意識？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_2
passages.content:
<> <> Yes. The magic sharpens your senses, harmonizing muscle and bone with a dancer’s precision. Every step will feel natural, balanced, and fluid. <>
<>What about the strength? Will it be lost entirely?<>
<> Not lost, refined. Femininity is strength in a different form subtle, enduring, and graceful. Your leg will support you with quiet power, not blunt force. <>
<>I can feel it already warmth, lightness, and... something like pride.<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
是的。魔法會銳化你的感官，以舞者般的精準協調肌肉與骨骼。每一步都將感覺自然、平衡且流暢。

mc: 那力量呢？會完全喪失嗎？

thalara:
不會喪失，而是精煉。女性特質是另一種形式的力量——含蓄、持久且優雅。你的腿將以沉靜的力量支撐你，而非蠻力。

mc: 我已經能感覺到了——溫暖、輕盈，還有……類似自豪的感覺。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_3
passages.content:
<> <> Good. That pride is yours to claim the pride of becoming who you are meant to be. The curves, the softness, the grace they are all part of your new strength. <>
<>This change... it feels almost like magic itself has rewritten my body’s story.<>
<> Magic is the language of change, Caelan. Your body is a story written in flesh and bone, and now it tells a tale of transformation and power intertwined. <>
<>What happens after this session? Will I need to relearn how to move?<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
很好。那份自豪是你應得的——成為你注定要成為之人的自豪。曲線、柔軟、優雅——它們都是你新力量的一部分。

mc: 這個改變……感覺幾乎像是魔法本身重寫了我身體的故事。

thalara:
魔法是變化的語言，Caelan。你的身體是一個以血肉與骨骼寫就的故事，而現在它講述的是一個轉變與力量交織的傳說。

mc: 這次調製之後呢？我需要重新學習如何移動嗎？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: right_leg_fm_right_leg_fl_4
passages.content:
<> <> You will. But relearning is growth. Your body will guide you, teaching new rhythms and balances a dance of strength and femininity. <>
<>I am ready to embrace this final step, no matter what it means.<>
<> Then drink, and let the last threads of transformation weave their perfect pattern into your form. Your journey to becoming queen continues, stronger and more beautiful than ever. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
你會的。但重新學習即是成長。你的身體會引導你，教導你新的節奏與平衡——一場力量與女性氣質的舞蹈。

mc: 我已準備好迎接這最後一步，無論它意味著什麼。

thalara:
那麼，飲下吧，讓轉變的最後絲線將完美的圖案編織進你的形體。你成為女王的旅程將持續下去，比以往更加強大、更加美麗。

[我感到藥水在我的右腿發揮作用]

passages.name: right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I accept this step back. Sometimes strength lies in returning to what is simpler.|right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_1]] |

[[I’m hesitant to lose this final grace... but I trust your guidance.|right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_1]] |

[[I may not want this change, but I will endure it for the path ahead.|right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我接受這一步的倒退。有時力量存在於回歸更簡單的事物。] |
[我猶豫是否要失去這最後的優雅……但我相信你的指引。] |
[我或許不想要這個改變，但我會為了前方的道路而承受它。] |

passages.name: right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <> Step forward, Caelan. This potion will gently undo the last touches of your leg’s femininity softening and restoring balance where once there was pronounced elegance. <>
<>It feels like letting go of something precious... but maybe it’s necessary.<>
<> Transformation is never just gaining. Sometimes it requires release a reshaping, a return to steadiness. <>

[[Move Forth|right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
上前來，Caelan。這劑藥水將輕柔地解除你腿部最後的女性化特徵——軟化並恢復平衡，取代曾經顯著的優雅。

mc: 感覺像是要放開某種珍貴的東西……但或許這是必要的。

thalara:
轉變從來不只是獲得。有時它需要釋放——一次重塑，一次回歸穩固。

mc: 我會失去伴隨這份優雅而來的力量嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <> Not lost, shifted. The power of subtlety replaces the flair of refined elegance. Your leg will carry strength in a quieter, steadier form. <>
<>I can already feel the curves softening, the sharpness fading.<>
<> Yes. The magic is easing your muscles and bones back toward a moderate shape less striking, but no less vital. <>
<>It’s strange... as if I’m balancing between two identities.<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
並非失去，而是轉移。細微之力的力量將取代精緻優雅的風采。你的腿將以一種更沉靜、更穩固的形式承載力量。

mc: 我已經能感覺到曲線正在軟化，那種鮮明的特質正在消退。

thalara:
是的。魔法正讓你的肌肉和骨骼緩和地回歸到一種更適中的形態——不那麼引人注目，但同樣充滿活力。

mc: 這感覺很奇怪……彷彿我正處於兩種身份之間取得平衡。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <> That balance is your strength. It reminds you of the fluidity of form and self neither wholly one nor the other, but a path between. <>
<>Will my movements change much after this?<>
<> You will move with a steadier rhythm. The dance of grace will become simpler, grounded like walking on firm earth after floating on air. <>
<>I am ready to embrace this change, even if it feels like a loss.<>
[[Move Forth|right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
那份平衡正是你的力量。它提醒你形體與自我的流動性——既非完全屬於此，亦非完全屬於彼，而是兩者之間的一條道路。

mc: 這之後我的動作會改變很多嗎？

thalara:
你將以更穩定的節奏移動。優雅的舞蹈將變得更簡單、更踏實——就像在空氣中漂浮後，重新踏在堅實的土地上行走。

mc: 我已準備好接受這個改變，即使它感覺像是一種失去。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: right_leg_fl_right_leg_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <> Then drink deeply, Caelan. The unmaking is as vital as the making. Your journey continues, balanced between strength and softness. <>
[[I feel the potion working in my right leg|use_success_potion_create_right_leg]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
那麼，深深地飲下吧，Caelan。解構與建構同等重要。你的旅程將持續下去，在力量與柔軟之間取得平衡。

[我感到藥水在我的右腿發揮作用]
