passages.name: torso_ml_torso_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready. Let’s begin this transformation|torso_ml_torso_mm_1]] |

[[…I still don’t know if this is right, but I’ll go through with it… for the kingdom.|torso_ml_torso_mm_1]] |

[[Don’t expect me to smile while you change me. I didn’t ask for this.|torso_ml_torso_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我準備好了。讓我們開始這場轉變吧] | 
[…我仍不確定這是否正確，但我會繼續下去……為了王國。] | 
[別指望我會笑著接受你改變我。這不是我要求的。] |

passages.name: torso_ml_torso_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <>Welcome, Caelan. I see you’ve made your decision. However difficult, however noble or simply inevitable. This is the first of many transformations… and it begins not with grand spectacle, but with subtle change.<>
<>...So this is it. My body starts turning into something else. Into someone else.<>
<>No, not someone else. Into yourself, reimagined. You may feel disoriented, even betrayed by your own skin. But transformation is not loss it is refinement. The steel remains... we merely reshape the blade.<>
<>I still feel like this body is part of who I am. The strength, the width of my shoulders I've trained with Sir Aldric since I was a boy. This doesn’t just vanish.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ml_torso_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 歡迎，Caelan。看來你已做出決定。無論多麼艱難，無論是出於高尚或純粹的無可奈何。這是眾多轉變中的第一步……而它始於細微的變化，而非宏大的場面。

mc: ……所以就是這樣了。我的身體開始變成別的東西。變成另一個人。

thalara: 不，不是另一個人。是重新構想的你自己。你可能會感到迷失方向，甚至覺得自己的皮膚背叛了你。但轉變並非失去，而是精煉。鋼鐵依舊……我們只是重塑了刀刃。

mc: 我仍覺得這副身軀是我的一部分。這力量、我肩膀的寬度——我從小就跟 Sir Aldric 訓練。這些不會就這樣消失。

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_ml_torso_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <>And it shouldn’t. But strength has many forms, my prince. Some visible, some not. What you’ve learned in battle will live in your spine, in your balance. Even as your shape softens, your core your discipline remains. This potion doesn’t erase you; it invites the rest of you forward.<>
<>And yet, my waist will shrink, my bones realign, and I’ll lose the body I’ve known since childhood.<>
<>Yes. The potion guides your form into a silhouette that suits the queen you are becoming. Narrower flanks, a taper of the torso, a gentler rise at the chest. The beginning of space for gowns and corsets, for gestures to flow rather than clash.<>
<>Sounds like I’m being molded into a dress form.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ml_torso_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 它們不該消失。但是力量有許多形式，我的王子。有些可見，有些不可見。你在戰鬥中所學的將存於你的脊骨、你的平衡之中。即使你的身形變得柔和，你的核心——你的紀律——依然留存。這藥水不會抹去你；它邀請其餘的你向前展現。

mc: 然而，我的腰身會縮減，我的骨骼會重新排列，我將失去自幼熟悉的身體。

thalara: 是的。藥水會引導你的形體，塑造成適合你即將成為的女王的輪廓。更窄的側腹、軀幹的錐形、胸前更柔和的隆起。這將是為長袍與束腹、為流暢而非衝突的姿態創造空間的開端。

mc: 聽起來我正被塑造成一個衣架模型。

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_ml_torso_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>Perhaps. Or perhaps into a vessel of power in a world that kneels before beauty, grace, and presence. Remember, in Velmoria, the queen’s body is not just adorned it commands attention, redirects courtly currents, holds the eye of friend and rival alike.<>
<>And this potion how does it actually work? I thought transformation was violent. This sounds… poetic.<>
<>Most physical changes occur beneath the surface first. This first draft targets the subdermal tissue, loosening muscle memory, guiding the growth plates of the ribs inward. Your abdomen will become more supple, while the dorsal spine will slowly arch to allow for a regal posture. Your internal balance will shift. It is not instant it will take days but the shift begins the moment the potion touches your tongue.<>
<>And it won’t hurt?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ml_torso_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 或許吧。又或許，是成為一個在美、優雅與氣質面前屈膝的世界中，力量的容器。記住，在維爾摩利亞，女王的身體不僅僅是裝飾——它吸引目光、扭轉宮廷潮流、同時抓住盟友與對手的視線。

mc: 那這藥水實際上如何運作？我以為轉變是暴烈的。這聽起來……很詩意。

thalara: 大多數身體變化首先發生在表面之下。這第一劑藥劑針對皮下組織，鬆解肌肉記憶，引導肋骨生長板向內生長。你的腹部會變得更加柔軟，而背脊會慢慢拱起，以形成雍容的儀態。你內在的平衡將會改變。這並非瞬間完成，需要數日，但變化從藥水觸及你舌尖的那一刻便開始了。

mc: 它不會痛嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_ml_torso_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>Not in the way a blade hurts. You may feel warmth then pressure. A pulling sensation at your waist. Your breath may catch as your diaphragm realigns. Some describe it as... being unwound and re-knotted with silken thread.<>
<>…Do you remember everyone you’ve done this to?<>
<>Yes. Every one of them. Some wept. Some laughed. One threw the vial at my head. But in time, they each saw their reflection change and saw strength where they feared loss. And not all ended the same. Some embraced womanhood. Others found balance. A few… resisted until the very end. You will write your own path through this.<>
<>What happens after I drink it?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ml_torso_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不像刀刃造成的痛楚。你可能會感到溫暖，然後是壓力。腰部有種被拉扯的感覺。當你的橫膈膜重新對位時，呼吸可能會一滯。有些人形容這感覺像是……被拆解開，再用絲線重新編織。

mc: ……你還記得每個你施術過的人嗎？

thalara: 記得。每一個都記得。有些人哭泣。有些人歡笑。有一個把藥水瓶扔向我的頭。但時日一久，他們每個人都看著自己的倒影改變，並在他們曾恐懼失去之處看見了力量。而且並非所有人的結局都相同。有些人擁抱了女性身份。有些人找到了平衡。少數人……抵抗到了最後一刻。你將在這過程中寫下自己的道路。

mc: 我喝下之後會發生什麼？

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_ml_torso_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <>You lie back on the velvet table. I will cast a stabilizing ward to guide the changes. You may feel dizzy or flushed. By the next morning, you will begin to notice the way your tunic hangs differently. Your waistline will inch inward. Breathing may feel lighter or stranger. That will be the first sign.<>
<>I suppose there’s no turning back?<>
<>This potion moves only forward. But you, Caelan… you have choices. You can slow the process. You can guide its direction. And more than anything you can define what womanhood means to you. Drink when you’re ready.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你向後躺在天鵝絨檯面上。我會施放一個穩定結界來引導變化。你可能會感到暈眩或臉紅發熱。到了隔天早晨，你將開始注意到束腰外衣垂掛的方式不同了。你的腰線會逐漸向內收縮。呼吸可能會感覺更輕盈或更奇怪。那會是第一個徵兆。

mc: 我想是沒有回頭路了吧？

thalara: 這藥水只會向前推進。但是你，Caelan……你仍有選擇。你可以放緩過程。你可以引導它的方向。而最重要的是，你可以定義「女性身份」對你的意義。準備好時就喝下吧。

[我感到藥水在軀幹發揮作用]

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ml
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This is what I want. I feel more like myself this way.|torso_mm_torso_ml_1]] |

[[…I don’t know if this is the right path either. But I can’t keep pretending.|torso_mm_torso_ml_1]] |

[[I won’t let them carve me into a lie. Give me back what’s mine.|torso_mm_torso_ml_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[這正是我想要的。這樣讓我感覺更像我自己。] |
[…我也不知道這是否正確的道路。但我不能再假裝下去了。] |
[我不會讓他們將我塑造成一個謊言。把我應有的還給我。] |

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ml_1
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve come to step backward, Caelan. Not many do. But I will not stop you.<>
<>I feel like I’m floating in someone else’s body. Like silk is being draped over a frame that was built for steel. I need to feel real again.<>
<>I understand. The body you were born into was no mistake. Neither is the one offered to you now. But you are entitled to reclaim what grounds you.<>
<>Then let’s stop talking and begin. I want my strength back. My shape. My center.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_mm_torso_ml_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你是來走回頭路的，Caelan。這麼做的人不多。但我不會阻止你。

mc: 我覺得自己像是漂浮在別人的身體裡。就像絲綢被披掛在為鋼鐵打造的骨架上。我需要再次感受到真實。

thalara: 我明白。你出生時的身體並非錯誤。現在提供給你的這個也非錯誤。但你有權取回讓你感到踏實的東西。

mc: 那就別再說了，開始吧。我想要回我的力量。我的體格。我的重心。

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ml_2
passages.content:
<> <>This draft is different. Reversal is heavier magic blunt, raw, and less graceful. It strengthens bone density, reverses the contractions of the waistline, and re-engages your abdominal wall. You’ll feel your frame stretch outward, your breath deepen, your center re-anchor.<>
<>That’s what I need. To feel anchored again. To feel like I’m not shrinking.<>
<>But know this: the magic does not forget. It will resist being unwoven. There may be pain spasms in your lower spine, tightness in the ribs as they flare outward. And the more you transform back and forth, the harder it becomes to remain whole. Your body will carry echoes of each shape.<>
<>So this is my last clear fork in the road?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_mm_torso_ml_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這劑藥方不同。逆轉是更沉重的魔法——直率、原始，且不那麼優雅。它會增強骨密度，逆轉腰線的收縮，並重新啟動你的腹壁。你會感覺到你的骨架向外伸展，呼吸加深，重心重新穩固。

mc: 那正是我需要的。再次感到踏實。感覺自己沒有在萎縮。

thalara: 但要明白：魔法不會遺忘。它會抗拒被拆解。你的下背部可能會疼痛痙攣，肋骨向外擴展時會感到緊繃。而且你越是來回轉變，就越難保持完整。你的身體將承載每一種形態的迴響。

mc: 所以這是我最後一個明確的岔路了？

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ml_3
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. If you drink this, it won’t close the path forward entirely, but it will make every future step slower... heavier. The body will grow stubborn. It will begin to choose sides for you.<>
<>I’ve felt off-balance since I began changing. As if my reflection belongs to someone I don’t recognize. This whatever the cost will let me feel like myself again.<>
<>Then may you drink with clarity, not anger. And remember, this shape your shape is not weakness. Nor is the other strength. There is only your truth. Let it root deeply.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。如果你喝下這個，並不會完全關閉前進的道路，但會讓未來的每一步都更緩慢……更沉重。身體會變得頑固。它將開始替你選擇立場。

mc: 自從開始改變以來，我一直感到失衡。彷彿我的倒影屬於某個我不認識的人。這個——無論代價如何——將讓我再次感覺像我自己。

thalara: 那麼，願你帶著清明而非憤怒喝下它。並且記住，這個形態——你的形態——並非軟弱。另一種形態也非力量。只有你的真實。讓它深深扎根吧。
[我感到藥水在軀幹發揮作用]

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’ve come this far... and I think I’m starting to understand. Let's keep going.|torso_mm_torso_ms_1]] |

[[I still don’t know how to feel about this... but I’m here.|torso_mm_torso_ms_1]] |

[[Don’t mistake my presence for surrender. I just want to get this over with.|torso_mm_torso_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我已走到這一步……我想我開始明白了。我們繼續吧。] |
[我仍然不知道該如何看待這一切……但我人就在這裡。] |
[別把我的到來誤認為投降。我只是想快點結束這件事。] |

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve returned for the second draught. The change will deepen now. What was a whisper in your bones will begin to speak clearly in your frame.<>
<>Everything already feels... looser. Lighter, somehow. My tunics don’t sit the same. I catch myself moving differently, even when I don’t mean to.<>
<>The body remembers shape like a song, Caelan. Even as you change, it sings back what it was. But the new melody is forming now. This potion will quiet more of the old notes.<>
<>I woke up with soreness along my ribs this morning. Like something was pressing inward.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_mm_torso_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你回來服用第二劑了。變化將會加深。那些在你骨子裡的低語，將開始在你的身形中清晰地訴說。

mc: 一切都感覺……更鬆弛了。不知怎的，更輕盈了。我的束腰外衣穿起來感覺不一樣了。我發現自己連不經意時的動作都不同了。

Thalara: 身體記住形狀，就像記住一首歌，Caelan。即使你在改變，它仍會吟唱過去的旋律。但新的旋律正在成形。這劑藥水會讓更多舊的音符沉寂。

mc: 我今天早上醒來時，肋骨一帶很痠痛。好像有什麼東西在向內壓迫。

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <>That’s natural. The broad structure of a prince’s ribcage is beginning to yield to narrow. Your lungs will adjust. Breathing may feel different. Lighter, perhaps. Or tight at first. These are small shifts with great purpose.<>
<>And if I wanted to stop?<>
<>You may always stop. I will never bind your will. But transformation is not just magic, Caelan. It is motion. And motion builds momentum. The more steps you take, the more your body will forget the stillness of its old form. But nothing is irreversible until you claim it.<>
<>Have others gone back?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_mm_torso_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 這很自然。王子寬闊的胸腔結構正開始向窄處收攏。你的肺部會適應。呼吸的感覺可能會不同。或許更輕盈。或者一開始會覺得緊繃。這些都是為了重大目標而發生的小小轉變。

mc: 如果我想停止呢？

Thalara: 你隨時可以停止。我絕不會束縛你的意志。但轉變不僅僅是魔法，Caelan。它是一種動態。而動態會積累動能。你踏出的步伐越多，你的身體就越會遺忘舊形態的靜止狀態。但在你確認之前，沒有什麼是不可逆轉的。

mc: 有其他人回頭嗎？

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>Some have. Most only for a time. Many come to realize that the new form did not strip them of self it gave them a canvas they never knew they needed. Others find a middle ground, neither prince nor princess, but something singular.<>
<>I don't know what I’ll be. I only know I’m not who I was. Not anymore.<>
<>Then you are exactly where you must be. Unfinished. Becoming. Let the potion guide you not command you.<>
<>This one smells... softer than the last.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_mm_torso_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 有些人有。大多只是暫時的。許多人最終體悟到，新的形態並未剝奪他們的自我，而是給了他們一塊從未意識到自己需要的畫布。另一些人則找到中間地帶，既非王子也非公主，而是某種獨特的存在。

mc: 我不知道我會變成什麼。我只知道我已不是過去的我。不再是了。

Thalara: 那麼你正處於你必須在的位置。未完成。正在成形。讓藥水引導你，而非命令你。

mc: 這一劑的氣味……比上一劑柔和。

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>It works deeper, more subtly. It will soften the muscle definition at your sides and flatten the hard edges of your torso. The waistline will slip inward more noticeably now. You may feel a tingling under your skin, as if your frame is reshaping itself from within.<>
<>It’s warm. And... sweet?<>
<>A touch of starblossom to ease the ache. You’ll feel it reach your bones within the hour. You may ache under your arms, just beneath the ribs. That is the narrowing process. I’ve cast a binding glyph over your spine to ease the shift. It will align your posture toward a more upright, flowing center.<>
<>Is that why I feel like I’m standing straighter lately? My shoulders don’t want to hunch forward anymore.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_mm_torso_ms_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 它的作用更深層、更細微。它會軟化你身體兩側的肌肉線條，並撫平你軀幹的硬朗稜角。腰線現在會更明顯地向內收攏。你可能會感覺到皮膚下有種刺麻感，彷彿你的骨架正從內部重塑自己。

mc: 它是溫熱的。而且……甜甜的？

Thalara: 加了一點星綻花來緩解疼痛。一小時內你就會感覺到它深入骨髓。你的腋下、肋骨下方可能會感到痠痛。那是收窄的過程。我已在你的脊椎上施了束縛符文，以緩和轉變。它會調整你的姿勢，趨向更挺直、流暢的重心。

mc: 這就是為什麼我最近覺得自己站得更直了嗎？我的肩膀不再想向前拱了。

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_mm_torso_ms_5
passages.content:
<> <>Precisely. You’re already adapting. Posture is more than physical it’s a projection of self. You are beginning to move like a queen, Caelan. Even if your heart still clings to the sword.<>
<>What if part of me still wants that sword?<>
<>Then part of you shall keep it. Womanhood is no exile from strength. You are not losing power you are reshaping its language. And soon, the world will listen.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 正是如此。你已經在適應了。姿勢不僅僅是身體的，更是自我的投射。你開始像一位女王般移動了，Caelan。即使你的心仍眷戀著那把劍。

mc: 如果有一部分的我仍然想要那把劍呢？

Thalara: 那麼那一部分的你就留著它。女性身份並非對力量的放逐。你並非失去力量，而是在重塑它的語言。很快，這個世界就會傾聽。

[我感覺到藥水在軀幹起作用了]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_mm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I want this. I need to feel like myself again.|torso_ms_torso_mm_1]] |

[[I don’t know if this is right… but I can’t ignore this pull.|torso_ms_torso_mm_1]] |

[[This whole queen path was a mistake. Let’s start fixing it.|torso_ms_torso_mm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已經調製好藥水了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想要這樣。我需要再次感覺像我自己。] |
[我不知道這是否正確……但我無法忽視這股牽引。] |
[這條女王之路從頭到尾都是個錯誤。讓我們開始修正它吧。] |

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_mm_1
passages.content:
<> <>So... you return, seeking the path behind you.<>
<>Everything’s been changing so fast. My body… my mind… even the way people look at me. I just I need to slow it down. Maybe even backtrack a little.<>
<>Backtrack, or reclaim?<>
<>I want to feel strong again. Solid. Like I used to. I know that might not be the ‘queenly’ thing to say, but <>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_mm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 所以……你回來了，尋找你身後的道路。

mc: 一切都變得太快了。我的身體……我的思緒……甚至人們看我的眼神。我只是……我需要讓它慢下來。或許甚至退回去一點。

Thalara: 是退回去，還是重新取回？

mc: 我想要再次感覺強壯。結實。像以前一樣。我知道這聽起來可能不那麼「像女王」，但是……

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_mm_2
passages.content:
<> <>There is no single shape to strength, Caelan. But there is value in clarity. This potion will call back what’s been softened. Your ribs will expand slightly. Your waist will tighten with muscle again. Your breath may feel heavier, but fuller. You’ll feel your center brace itself like the girding of a castle wall.<>
<>Does it… undo everything?<>
<>No. This will not make you who you were it will remind you of what still remains. You are not erasing the queen within you. You are inviting the prince back to speak.<>
<>And what if I change my mind again?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_mm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 力量沒有單一的形態，Caelan。但清晰有其價值。這劑藥水會喚回那些已被軟化的部分。你的肋骨會略微擴張。你的腰身會再次被肌肉繃緊。你的呼吸或許會感覺更沉重，但更飽滿。你會感覺到自己的核心再次穩固，如同城堡牆壁的加固。

mc: 它會……抹去一切嗎？

Thalara: 不會。這不會讓你變回過去的你，它會提醒你那些依然留存的部分。你並非在抹去內在的女王。你是在邀請王子回來發言。

mc: 那如果我再次改變主意呢？

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_mm_3
passages.content:
<> <>Then you return again. As many times as it takes. That is the shape of becoming not a line, but a spiral.<>
<>You always speak in riddles.<>
<>And yet you always understand me by the end of the session.<>
<>This one may ache more than the others. Reclaiming muscle, bone width, and core tone takes more from the body than surrendering it. You’ll feel pressure along your ribcage, possibly in your lower back. If your tunics tighten tomorrow, that is no illusion.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_mm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那麼你就再次回來。無論需要多少次。這就是「成為」的形態——不是一條直線，而是一道螺旋。

mc: 你總是說話像謎語。

Thalara: 然而每次療程結束時，你總能理解我。

Thalara: 這一劑可能比其他藥水更痛。重新取回肌肉、骨寬和核心力量，比放棄它們需要身體付出更多。你會感覺到胸腔有壓力，可能還有下背部。如果你的束腰外衣明天變緊了，那並非錯覺。

[繼續]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_mm_4
passages.content:
<> <>Smells like pepper and iron. Very different from before.<>
<>A warrior’s blend. It’s brewed with wolvenroot and spiced sinew. You’ll feel your lungs expand within an hour. Stretch often. Breathe deeply. Your gait will shift heavier, more grounded. Less glide, more march.<>
<>Burns going down.<>
<>Reforging always does.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_mm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 聞起來像胡椒和鐵鏽。和之前截然不同。

thalara: 戰士的調配。用狼根和香辛肌腱釀製。一小時內你會感到肺部擴張。常伸展。深呼吸。你的步伐會變得更沉重、更踏實。少些滑行，多些行軍。

mc: 喝下去時灼燒著。

thalara: 重塑總是如此。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_mm_5
passages.content:
<> <>You think I’m running away?<>
<>I think you’re gathering pieces. No one becomes whole by choosing only one side. You carry both queen and warrior. Drink again, if you must. And when you walk from this chamber, walk like both still belong to you.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 你認為我在逃避嗎？

thalara: 我認為你在收集碎片。沒有人能只選擇一面而變得完整。你同時承載著女王與戰士。若有必要，再喝一口。當你離開這房間時，要像兩者仍屬於你那般行走。

[I feel the potion working in my torso]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I’m ready. Whatever I am becoming… I want to meet her.|torso_ms_torso_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t know if I can do this… but I’m here.|torso_ms_torso_fs_1]] |

[[Let’s get this over with. Don’t expect a smile from me.|torso_ms_torso_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已釀好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[I’m ready. Whatever I am becoming… I want to meet her.] |
[I don’t know if I can do this… but I’m here.] |
[Let’s get this over with. Don’t expect a smile from me.] |

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve arrived at a threshold today, my prince… or perhaps, soon no longer a prince.<>
<>You say that like it's something I should be proud of.<>
<>Not proud. Not ashamed, either. Simply aware. Today is not a step it is a crossing. The potion will carry you into the space between. Neither truly man, nor fully woman. It's not a disguise, but a state of truth. You ready?<>
<>What does it feel like?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你今天來到了一個門檻前，我的王子……或者，或許很快就不再是王子了。

mc: 你說得好像這是我該感到驕傲的事。

thalara: 不是驕傲。也不是羞愧。只是覺知。今天不是一步，而是一次跨越。藥劑會帶你進入之間的領域。既非真正的男人，也非完全的女人。這不是偽裝，而是一種真實的狀態。準備好了嗎？

mc: 那是什麼感覺？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <>Like a conversation between two halves of your soul. At first, there's confusion. A twist along your spine, a gentle pull beneath the ribs. Then you’ll feel your center tilt. The waist will draw in, not sharply but enough that your frame begins to suggest, not declare.<>
<>And my hips?<>
<>They begin to open. Not like a sculptor with a hammer, but a painter with a brush. The bones do not break. They breathe wider.<>
<>Will I still look like myself?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 像你靈魂兩半之間的對話。起初會有困惑。沿著脊椎的扭轉，肋骨下的輕柔牽引。然後你會感到自己的中心傾斜。腰部會向內收攏，不是劇烈地，但足以讓你的骨架開始暗示，而非宣告。

mc: 那我的臀部呢？

thalara: 它們開始打開。不像雕塑家揮舞鎚子，而像畫家運用畫筆。骨頭不會斷裂。它們呼吸得更寬廣。

mc: 我還會看起來像我自己嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>You will look like someone who includes who you were. But no… not quite the same. Others may glance at you and pause. Not in doubt just in awe.<>
<>Then I suppose I should get used to being stared at.<>
<>Royalty always is. You’ll learn to wield it.<>
<>This brew is gentler than some, but its magic is precise. You may feel a tightening in your abdomen, a strange hollowness just beneath your ribs. Your breathing might shift as the shape of your torso changes. Drink slowly, and sit after.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你會看起來像一個包含了過去自己的人。但不……不會完全一樣。他人或許會瞥見你並停頓。不是懷疑，只是驚嘆。

mc: 那麼我想我該習慣被注視了。

thalara: 王室成員總是如此。你會學會運用它。

thalara: 這藥劑比某些溫和，但它的魔法很精準。你可能感到腹部緊縮，肋骨下方有種奇特的空虛感。隨著軀幹形狀改變，你的呼吸可能會變化。慢慢喝，然後坐下。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>Does this… does this make me a woman?<>
<>No. It makes you closer to one. And farther from the boy the world demanded you be. What comes next is not womanhood but the echo of her first footsteps in your body.<>
<>It tastes like... honey and steel.<>
<>Moonflower and powdered starlace. Mixed with root iron from the deep mines. It was crafted to hold opposites in harmony. As must you.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_fs_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 這……這會讓我成為女人嗎？

thalara: 不會。它讓你更接近一個女人。並遠離這個世界曾要求你成為的男孩。接下來發生的不是女性身份，而是她腳步在你體內初次迴響的開始。

mc: 嘗起來像……蜂蜜和鋼鐵。

thalara: 月花與星絲粉末。混合深礦的根鐵。它被製作用以和諧地容納對立面。正如你必須做到的那樣。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_fs_5
passages.content:
<> <>I can feel it. My center is... changing. Like I’m being redrawn from the spine outward.<>
<>That is exactly what’s happening. The waist begins to tuck inward. Not by compression, but realignment. The muscles soften, slightly. The hips respond by shifting ever so subtly almost imperceptible at first.<>
<>It’s strange. Not painful… but like I’m stepping into someone else’s skin.<>
<>No, Caelan. You’re shedding what never truly fit and stepping into a skin that has always waited for you.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_ms_torso_fs_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我能感覺到。我的中心正在……改變。就像我正從脊椎向外被重新描繪。

thalara: 正是如此。腰部開始向內收攏。不是壓縮，而是重新對齊。肌肉略微軟化。臀部隨之做出極細微的調整——起初幾乎難以察覺。

mc: 這感覺很奇怪。不痛……但就像我正踏入別人的皮膚。

thalara: 不，Caelan。你正在褪去從不真正合身的皮膚，踏入那一直等待著你的皮膚。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_ms_torso_fs_6
passages.content:
<> <>And if I stop here?<>
<>Then you walk the world as something rare. Neither queen nor prince, but a sovereign of your own design. It is not weakness to choose the middle. It is power to stand within it.<>
<>I thought I’d feel fear. But this… it feels like peace. Like I’ve stopped fighting something that’s been inside me for years.<>
<>Then you are not crossing a line, Caelan. You are finally walking it.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 如果我在這裡停下呢？

thalara: 那麼你將以稀有之姿行走於世。既非女王也非王子，而是你自己設計的君主。選擇中間並非軟弱。立足其中即是力量。

mc: 我以為我會感到恐懼。但這……感覺像平靜。就像我終於停止了與內心某物多年的鬥爭。

thalara: 那麼你並非在跨越界線，Caelan。你終於行走於其上。
[I feel the potion working in my torso]

passages.name: torso_fs_torso_ms
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I need to feel solid again. I want to remember who I was.|torso_fs_torso_ms_1]] |

[[This feels like going backward… but maybe that’s what I need.|torso_fs_torso_ms_1]] |

[[I’m not becoming a symbol for anyone. I’ll reclaim what’s mine.|torso_fs_torso_ms_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已釀好藥劑。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[I need to feel solid again. I want to remember who I was.] |
[This feels like going backward… but maybe that’s what I need.] |
[I’m not becoming a symbol for anyone. I’ll reclaim what’s mine.] |

passages.name: torso_fs_torso_ms_1
passages.content:
<> <>You’re here. So… you’ve chosen to slow the river and walk back along its bank.<>
<>Maybe I’ve drifted too far. Or maybe I just want to see what still fits.<>
<>This isn’t failure, Caelan. It’s clarity. Even a queen must know how to retreat wisely.<>
<>It’s not that I regret it. Just… the curve of my waist, the tilt of my hips it didn’t feel like me. Not today.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fs_torso_ms_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你來了。所以……你選擇了讓河流減速，並沿著河岸往回走。

mc: 也許我漂得太遠了。或者我只是想看看什麼仍然適合。

thalara: 這不是失敗，Caelan。這是清晰。即使女王也必須知道如何明智地撤退。

mc: 並非我後悔。只是……我腰部的曲線、臀部的傾斜，感覺不像我。今天不像。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fs_torso_ms_2
passages.content:
<> <>This brew doesn’t erase. It rebalances. It straightens what had begun to flow. It gives the core a firmer stance, the ribs a bit more space. It’s not about becoming less it’s about becoming different again.<>
<>You're always so poetic about bones and guts.<>
<>I talk about the body the way you talk about duty. With reverence and grief.<>
<>Drink. Slowly. You may feel a tightening in the lower ribs, a mild pressure as your frame asserts itself again. The softness you’ve carried these past days may ebb but the memory of it will not vanish.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fs_torso_ms_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 這藥劑並非抹除，而是重新平衡。它導正那些已開始流動的變化，讓核心更穩固，給肋骨多一點空間。這不是要你變少，而是要你再次變得不同。

mc: 你談起骨頭和內臟總是這麼詩意。

Thalara: 我談論身體的方式，就像你談論職責一樣。帶著敬意與哀傷。

Thalara: 喝吧。慢慢來。你可能會感到下肋骨處一陣緊縮，當你的骨架重新確立自我時會有些微壓力。這些日子以來你承載的柔軟可能會消退，但它的記憶不會消失。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fs_torso_ms_3
passages.content:
<> <>And if I wanted to stay like this, halfway?<>
<>Then I would brew you a different tonic. Something that holds the shape between a form both open and defined. But today… you asked for what was before.<>
<>Mint and ash. That’s… bold.<>
<>The taste of grounding. Earth and will. Fitting.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fs_torso_ms_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 那如果我想保持這樣，介於中間呢？

Thalara: 那我就會為你調製另一種藥水。一種能維持在開放與明確之間形態的藥劑。但今天……你要求的是過去的樣子。

mc: 薄荷與灰燼。這味道……真大膽。

Thalara: 這是紮根的味道。大地與意志。很合適。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fs_torso_ms_4
passages.content:
<> <>My waist… it’s pulling in tighter. Not narrowing but bracing. It feels… stronger again.<>
<>The frame returns. Straightens. You’ll feel the tilt of your hips ease, the alignment settle. The softness remains for a time, but the form your form resurfaces with each breath.<>
<>It’s strange. I thought I’d feel disappointment. But all I feel is… steadiness.<>
<>Then you are walking your own truth. The potion doesn’t define you. You do.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fs_torso_ms_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我的腰……收得更緊了。不是變窄，而是更堅實。感覺……又更有力了。

Thalara: 骨架回來了。挺直了。你會感到髖部的傾斜緩和下來，對位逐漸穩定。柔軟感還會持續一陣子，但你的形體會隨著每一次呼吸重新浮現。

mc: 真奇怪。我以為我會感到失望。但我只感覺到……穩定。

Thalara: 那麼你正走在自己的真實之路上。藥水不能定義你。定義你的是你自己。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fs_torso_ms_5
passages.content:
<> <>So if I return to F1 again later… you won’t stop me?<>
<>I am not here to chain your body. Only to guide it when you call. You may move forward, backward, or sideways and I will craft for you either a crown or a compass.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 所以如果我之後又想變回 F1……你不會阻止我？

Thalara: 我來此不是為了束縛你的身體。只是在你呼喚時給予指引。你可以向前、向後，或走向側邊，而我會為你打造一頂王冠或一枚羅盤。

[I feel the potion working in my torso]

passages.name: torso_fs_torso_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I think I’m ready. It’s strange, but... this feels like becoming something beautiful.|torso_fs_torso_fm_1]] |

[[Still not sure what this makes me. But if I’m going forward, let it be with eyes open.|torso_fs_torso_fm_1]] |

[[Let’s just get it over with. I’m not made for soft curves and fancy dresses|torso_fs_torso_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已經調製好藥劑了。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我想我準備好了。這感覺很奇怪，但……彷彿正在成為某種美麗的事物。] |
[我還是不確定這會讓我變成什麼。但如果我要向前走，那就睜大眼睛看清楚吧。] |
[我們快點完成吧。我天生就不適合柔軟的曲線和華麗的衣裙。] |

passages.name: torso_fs_torso_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <>Four steps down the path, and still your eyes linger on the door before you enter. That tells me something important, Caelan.<>
<>What’s that? That I’m unsure?<>
<>No. That you’re brave enough to keep returning despite the unknown.<>
<>Or foolish enough to keep drinking potions brewed with stardust and powdered coral spine.<>
<>And a sliver of dryad root. Can’t forget the drama.<>
<>Today’s mixture is more elegant than forceful. Less of a reshaping, more… an invitation to form.<>
<>My waist already looks like I’ve worn corsets since birth. What more can it do?<>
<>Ah, but it’s not only the waist. It’s the alignment of grace. Your spine will arch slightly, supporting poise. The muscles around your center will shift their memory from power to performance. It’s not about thinness, but balance. Feminine elegance isn’t weak, Caelan. It’s trained.<>
<>I’ve started to feel it. The way people look at me in the halls… different. Softer eyes. More questions in their stares.<>
<>Then you are already becoming real to them in this new form. When a prince walks through the court, he is watched. When a queen-in-the-making walks through the court, she is measured.<>
<>And if I don’t want to be measured like that?<>
<>Then hold your gaze higher than theirs. There’s power in elegance its own kind. This potion is not submission. It is the posture of command, dressed in silk.<>
<>Drink. Slowly. It will settle in the ribs first, coaxing them to draw inward. Then to the muscles of the lower back… a subtle persuasion, not a demand. You may feel heat spreading across your middle and down your flanks.<
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 已在路上走了四步，但在踏入門前，你的目光仍徘徊不去。這告訴我一件重要的事，Caelan。

mc: 什麼事？說我不確定嗎？

Thalara: 不。是說你夠勇敢，即使面對未知仍不斷回來。

mc: 或者夠愚蠢，才會一直喝下用星塵和珊瑚脊粉末調製的藥水。

Thalara: 還有一小片樹妖根。可不能忘了這戲劇性的成分。

Thalara: 今天的配方更為優雅而非強硬。與其說是重塑，不如說更像……一種成形的邀請。

mc: 我的腰看起來已經像打從出生就穿著束腰了。它還能做什麼？

Thalara: 啊，但這不僅僅是腰。這是優雅的對位。你的脊椎會微微拱起，支撐著儀態。你核心周圍的肌肉會將記憶從力量轉向表現。這不是關於纖細，而是平衡。女性的優雅並非軟弱，Caelan。那是訓練出來的。

mc: 我已經開始感覺到變化了。人們在大廳裡看我的方式……不一樣了。眼神更柔和。他們的目光中帶著更多疑問。

Thalara: 那麼在這個新形態中，你對他們而言已經變得真實了。當王子走過宮廷，人們注視他。當一位正在成形的女王走過宮廷，人們衡量她。

mc: 如果我不想被那樣衡量呢？

Thalara: 那就將你的目光抬得比他們更高。優雅本身自有其力量。這藥劑不是屈從。它是披著絲綢的指揮姿態。

Thalara: 喝吧。慢慢來。它會先在肋骨處沉澱，引導它們向內收攏。然後是下背部的肌肉……一種溫和的勸說，而非要求。你可能會感到熱度在腰腹間蔓延，向下延伸到側腹。

mc: 會變得比較容易嗎？

Thalara: 做決定？永遠不會。改變本身？它們會變得熟悉。直到有一天，它們完全不再感覺像是改變，而單純感覺就像你自己。

mc: ……這味道像花瓣。還有灰燼。

Thalara: 月瓣花。還有一片燒過的象牙——象徵性的線索，燒毀的橋樑與新的形態。深呼吸。

mc: 好緊……但不痛。但感覺很明顯。好像有什麼東西從裡面被拉著。

Thalara: 那是重新對位開始了。你的骨頭會靠得更近，組織會稍微軟化。你的脊椎正在學習新的形態——不是彎曲，而是以不同的方式承載。

mc: 你說得好像在雕刻一尊雕像。

Thalara: 我確實是。只不過這尊雕像會回應。

mc: 天啊……我能感覺到那山谷。那凹陷……就像在標記我。

Thalara: 它正在佔據你的中心。男性的平坦讓位給某種既不軟弱也不強悍——只是優雅的事物。記住這一刻。你會在每一次轉身、每一次鞠躬、每一件你穿著的禮服中感受到它。

mc: 我不知道我正在變成什麼……但很難移開目光。

[I feel the potion working in my torso]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fs
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[Maybe I leaned too far. Maybe I need to find the middle again.|torso_fm_torso_fs_1]] |

[[I don’t like going back… but I’m not sure I can carry all this softness just yet.|torso_fm_torso_fs_1]] |

[[They won’t trap me in a corset or expect curtsies today. Let’s undo this fantasy.|torso_fm_torso_fs_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[也許我走得太遠了。也許我需要再次找到中間點。] |
[我不喜歡走回頭路……但我不確定我是否還能承受這全部的柔軟。] |
[今天他們不會用束腹衣困住我，也不會期待我行屈膝禮。讓我們解除這個幻想吧。] |

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fs_1
passages.content:
<> <>You return… not to advance, but to lessen. I’ll admit, Caelan, that’s rare.<>
<>I need to feel… something closer to balance. Something I can still recognize in the mirror.<>
<>Recognition is a flickering thing. It changes as you do. Are you sure it’s yourself you’re chasing, and not the comfort of what you once were?<>
<>I don’t know. Maybe both.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fs_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你回來了……不是為了前進，而是為了減退。我得承認，Caelan，這很少見。

mc: 我需要感受……更接近平衡的東西。某種我仍能在鏡中認出的東西。

thalara: 認同感是閃爍不定的。它會隨著你改變。你確定你追尋的是自己，而不是過往熟悉感的慰藉嗎？

mc: 我不知道。也許兩者都是。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fs_2
passages.content:
<> <>There is no shame in questioning. Every shape we wear has weight. If the curves grew too loud too soon, then this brew will quiet them for now.<>
<>What exactly will it change?<>
<>The pinch in your waist will ease. Your sides will round slightly back into softness not male, not quite female. The subtle arch in your back will level, and your center will carry less ‘song’ and more ‘silence.’ The kind of silence that doesn't declare just waits.<>
<>And the court will see that?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fs_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 心存疑慮並不可恥。我們所穿的每一種形體都有其重量。如果曲線來得太快、太張揚，那麼這劑藥水將暫時讓它們安靜下來。

mc: 它具體會改變什麼？

thalara: 你腰間的緊束感將會緩解。你的身側會略微恢復圓潤，呈現一種柔軟——非男性，也非完全女性。你背部微妙的曲線將趨於平緩，你的身體中心將承載更少的「歌詠」與更多的「靜默」。那種不宣告、只等待的靜默。

mc: 而宮廷會看出來嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fs_3
passages.content:
<> <>Yes. You may not wear your promise as clearly. But ambiguity can be a powerful mask, too.<>
<>It looks duller than the others.<>
<>This one is brewed not to awaken, but to dim. That doesn't mean it's empty. Just subtle.<>
<>Ugh. Like old flowers soaked in rain.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fs_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 是的。你可能不會再那麼清晰地展現你的承諾。但模糊性同樣可以是一張強大的面具。

mc: 它看起來比其他藥水更黯淡。

thalara: 這劑藥水不是為了喚醒，而是為了黯淡。這不代表它是空洞的。只是更為微妙。

mc: 呃。像被雨水浸透的枯萎花朵。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fs_4
passages.content:
<> <>That’s the fennel root. And withering violet petals. They signal to your body to ease its dramatic shapes… to blur, rather than define.<>
<>It’s already happening. The tightness in my waist… it’s slipping. The spine it’s like someone’s unhooking me from inside.<>
<>You wore elegance well, but sometimes, we need space between layers of change. You’re not failing, Caelan. You’re pausing.<>
<>It feels strange. Not wrong, just… uncertain.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fs_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 那是茴香根。還有凋萎的紫羅蘭花瓣。它們向你的身體發出信號，讓它緩和戲劇性的線條……使之模糊，而非清晰界定。

mc: 已經開始了。我腰間的緊繃感……正在鬆懈。脊椎……感覺像有人從我體內解開了掛鉤。

thalara: 你曾優雅地展現風姿，但有時，我們需要在層層改變之間留出空間。你並非失敗，Caelan。你只是暫停。

mc: 感覺很奇怪。並非錯誤，只是……不確定。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fs_5
passages.content:
<> <>That’s what F1 is. The liminal shape. Not prince. Not princess. Just possibility.<>
<>And if I want to move forward again later?<>
<>Then we step with intention. There is no punishment in stepping back. Just as there’s no shame in leaping ahead.<>
<>I don’t look like either of them now… the boy I was, or the woman I was becoming.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fs_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 這就是 F1。臨界形態。非王子。非公主。僅僅是可能性。

mc: 如果我之後想再次前進呢？

thalara: 那我們就帶著意圖邁步。後退沒有懲罰。正如飛躍向前也沒有羞恥。

mc: 我現在看起來既不像他們中的任何一個……不像我曾經的男孩模樣，也不像我正在成為的女人。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fs_6
passages.content:
<> <>And that, my dear Caelan, can be powerful in itself. Let the world wonder. Let you wonder.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 而這，我親愛的 Caelan，其本身可能就是一種力量。讓世界去猜測。讓你自己去探索。
[我感覺到藥水正在我的軀幹發揮作用]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fl
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[This is the final step. I’m ready. If I am to be a queen, then let my body wear that truth.|torso_fm_torso_fl_1]] |

[[So this is what it comes to… a body shaped not for armor, but for lace.|torso_fm_torso_fl_1]] |

[[Corsets, gowns, and dainty postures? Fine. Pour the potion but don’t expect me to curtsy.|torso_fm_torso_fl_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你已調製好藥水。先讓我看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[這是最後一步。我準備好了。如果我將成為女王，那就讓我的身體展現這個事實。] |
[所以這就是最終結果……一具不是為盔甲，而是為蕾絲塑造的身體。] |
[束腹衣、禮服、還有嬌柔的姿態？好吧。倒出藥水，但別指望我會行屈膝禮。] |

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fl_1
passages.content:
<> <>You’ve returned for the final shaping. This time, the potion knows no hesitation. It will curve what’s straight, soften what’s square, and ready your frame for the mantle of royalty.<>
<>It’s hard to believe this is still my body. Every sip pulls me further from the battlefield and closer to… the ballroom.<>
<>And why should the ballroom be lesser? Power is not always clenched in fists, Caelan. Sometimes it is wielded from a throne, with gloved hands and veiled smiles.<>
<>But this body was once armor. Now you make it into… a gown rack.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fl_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 你回來進行最終的塑形了。這一次，藥水將毫無猶豫。它會彎曲筆直之處，柔化方正之處，並為你的身架準備好承載王權的重擔。

mc: 很難相信這仍然是我的身體。每一口藥水都將我拉離戰場更遠，而更接近……舞廳。

thalara: 為何舞廳就該低人一等？力量並非總是緊握在拳頭中，Caelan。有時它從王座上施展，憑藉戴著手套的雙手和面紗後的笑容。

mc: 但這身體曾是盔甲。現在你卻要把它變成……一個禮服架。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fl_2
passages.content:
<> <>Not just a rack for silks and stays. A symbol. A declaration. This final form Feminine Level Three is not weakness. It’s a banner. It says, 'I am not a prince hiding in silk I am a queen claiming it.'<>
<>What exactly will it change?<>
<>Your ribcage will narrow further. The waist will cinch in, almost naturally corset-shaped. The line from your shoulder to hip will slope in the manner tailors adore. You’ll be ready to wear gowns that whisper of station and seduction, without a word spoken.<>
<>And once it’s done… there’s no mistaking it, is there?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fl_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 不僅僅是承載絲綢與束衣的架子。一個象徵。一份宣告。這最終形態——女性化等級三——並非軟弱。它是一面旗幟。它宣告：「我不是隱藏在絲綢中的王子，我是宣稱它的女王。」

mc: 它具體會改變什麼？

thalara: 你的胸腔將進一步收窄。腰身將緊束，幾乎自然呈現束腹衣的形狀。從肩到臀的線條將呈現裁縫師鍾愛的傾斜弧度。你將準備好穿上那些低語著地位與誘惑的禮服，無需言語。

mc: 而一旦完成……就再無誤認的餘地了，對嗎？

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fl_3
passages.content:
<> <>No. Once this takes hold, no one will look at you and think ‘he.’ They’ll see the heir not as a compromise, but as a woman destined to reign.<>
<>Is that what my mother saw when she made this pact with you?<>
<>She saw your strength and wanted to teach you how to use it in every form. She believes in a ruler who understands both sword and scepter, steel and satin.<>
<>It smells sweet. Like lavender before a storm.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fl_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara: 沒錯。一旦藥效穩固，沒有人會看著你想到「他」。他們將看到的繼承人不是妥協的產物，而是註定要統治的女人。

mc: 這就是我母親與你訂下契約時所看到的嗎？

thalara: 她看到了你的力量，並想教會你如何在每一種形態中運用它。她相信一位統治者應同時理解劍與權杖、鋼鐵與綢緞。

mc: 它聞起來很甜。像暴風雨前的薰衣草。

[Move Forth]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fl_4
passages.content:
<> <>Salt and flower. The body remembers battle, even as it bends toward grace.<>
<>It’s… warm. Tight. My ribs feel like they’re being drawn together with string.<>
<>That’s the bone alignment shifting. Your waistline narrows naturally now. It’s not a trick of lacing or illusion this is the shape your body was always ready to hold.<>
<>And my spine… it’s pulling straighter. I feel like I’m standing taller, but softer too.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fl_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 鹽與花。身體銘記著戰鬥，即便它正朝著優雅彎曲。

mc: 感覺……溫熱。緊繃。我的肋骨彷彿被絲線向內拉緊。

Thalara: 那是骨骼排列正在改變。你的腰線如今自然收窄。這並非束衣或幻術的把戲，而是你的身體早已準備好接納的形態。

mc: 而我的脊椎……它正挺得更直。我覺得自己站得更高了，但也更柔軟。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fl_5
passages.content:
<> <>The potion encourages posture meant for thrones and audiences. You’ll walk like a procession, even alone.<>
<>It’s beautiful. Strange. I used to dread this moment… but now I just feel full. Full of something new.<>
<>You are regal now, in body and bearing. No more halfway. No more waiting. You are corset-ready not because it binds you, but because it frames you.<>
<>And if I put armor back on?<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fm_torso_fl_6]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 藥水催生的儀態，是為王座與覲見而生的。你將如儀仗隊般行走，即便獨自一人。

mc: 這很美。很奇妙。我曾恐懼這一刻……但現在我只感到充盈。充滿了某種嶄新的東西。

Thalara: 你如今在身體與儀態上皆具王者之風。不再半途而廢。不再等待。你已準備好穿上束衣，並非因它束縛你，而是因它襯托你。

mc: 那如果我重新披上盔甲呢？

[繼續前進]

passages.name: torso_fm_torso_fl_6
passages.content:
<> <>Then let the enemy fall to their knees before the most dangerous shape of all: a woman who chose her crown and sculpted herself to wear it.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那就讓敵人在最危險的形態前屈膝吧：一個選擇了自己的王冠，並親手雕琢自身以佩戴它的女人。
[我感覺到藥水在軀幹發揮作用]

passages.name: torso_fl_torso_fm
passages.content:
<>
<>You have brewed the potion. Let me see it first. Caelan Are you ready to start the process...<>
[[I need to take a step back. Too much, too soon. Let me breathe in something simpler.|torso_fl_torso_fm_1]] |

[[This feels like undoing progress, but… maybe it's necessary. Maybe I wasn’t ready for the gown.|torso_fl_torso_fm_1]] |

[[So what if I’m not ‘corset-perfect’? Let the world deal with a queen who refuses to be laced up.|torso_fl_torso_fm_1]] |

<>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 你已調製好藥水。讓我先看看。Caelan，你準備好開始這個過程了嗎……

[我需要退一步。太多、太快了。讓我呼吸些更簡單的東西。] |
[這感覺像是倒退，但……也許是必要的。也許我還沒準備好穿上那件禮服。] |
[就算我不「完美契合束衣」又怎樣？讓世界去面對一位拒絕被束縛的女王吧。] |

passages.name: torso_fl_torso_fm_1
passages.content:
<> <>So, we ease the grip of elegance today. The body you wore with pride refined, sculpted will step back into something less… ceremonial.<>
<>It’s strange. I thought once I crossed that line once I became her there’d be no going back.<>
<>That’s the myth, isn’t it? That transformation is a one-way street. But no magic I wield is about prisons. It’s about choice.<>
<>I wore that figure like a crown. And yet… it felt heavy. As if I had to walk like a portrait, not a person.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fl_torso_fm_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那麼，今日我們將鬆開優雅的束縛。你曾自豪穿戴、精心雕琢的身體，將退回到不那麼……儀式化的狀態。

mc: 真奇怪。我曾以為一旦越過那條線，一旦成為她，就再也無法回頭。

Thalara: 那就是迷思，不是嗎？以為轉變是條單行道。但我所掌控的魔法，與囚籠無關。它關乎選擇。

mc: 我穿戴那身形如同戴著王冠。然而……它感覺沉重。彷彿我必須像一幅肖像畫而非活人般行走。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: torso_fl_torso_fm_2
passages.content:
<> <>That’s because the world demands perfection from women who rule. But power does not always need to be laced at the waist.<>
<>So this… will unlace me?<>
<>It will ease you back to something softer. Still feminine. Still shaped. But not carved like a statue. You’ll move with curve, not edge.<>
<>And it won’t erase everything?<>
<>No. You’ll still hold the grace. Just less of the posture, less of the narrow cinch that made every breath feel rehearsed.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fl_torso_fm_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Thalara: 那是因為世界對統治的女性要求完美。但權力並非總需繫於腰間。

mc: 所以這……會解開我的束縛？

Thalara: 它會讓你回歸更柔軟的狀態。依舊女性化。依舊有型。但不再如雕像般雕琢。你將以曲線而非稜角行動。

mc: 它不會抹去一切吧？

Thalara: 不會。你仍將保有優雅。只是減少那份儀態，減少那讓每次呼吸都像排練過的緊窄束縛。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: torso_fl_torso_fm_3
passages.content:
<> <>Honestly… I want to breathe again.<>
<>Then drink. And let your body remember what it is to move without performance.<>
<>It’s… colder. Less sweet than the last one.<>
<>Because it releases. The previous potion constructed this one relaxes.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fl_torso_fm_4]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 老實說……我想再次自由呼吸。

Thalara: 那就喝下吧。讓你的身體記起，無需表演時該如何移動。

mc: 這……更涼。不如上一瓶甜。

Thalara: 因為它是釋放。先前的藥水構築，這一瓶則放鬆。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: torso_fl_torso_fm_4
passages.content:
<> <>My ribs… spreading slightly. Not quite as tight. I can feel the corset lines unwinding in my posture.<>
<>And your spine see how it no longer arches quite so sharply? You’ll still turn heads, Caelan, just without straining to hold every gaze.<>
<>My waist is still curved, but… it looks more natural. Less drawn. I don’t feel as… poised, but I feel more real.<>
<>Feminine does not always mean fashioned. Sometimes, it simply is. This form? This is the middle path. The honest one.<>
[[Move Forth|torso_fl_torso_fm_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我的肋骨……微微擴張。沒那麼緊了。我能感覺到束衣的線條在我的儀態中鬆開。

Thalara: 還有你的脊椎，看到它不再拱得那麼尖銳了嗎？你依然會引人注目，Caelan，只是無需費力去維持每一道目光。

mc: 我的腰身仍有曲線，但……看起來更自然了。不那麼緊繃。我不覺得那麼……端莊，但我感覺更真實。

Thalara: 女性化並非總意味著精心打造。有時，它只是自然存在。這種形態？這是中間之道。誠實之道。

[繼續前進]

passages.name: torso_fl_torso_fm_5
passages.content:
<> <>I thought stepping back would feel like failing. But… it’s not.<>
<>No. It’s understanding. Your body is not a costume. It’s a dialogue. And today, it speaks with a gentler tone.<>
[[I feel the potion working in my torso|use_success_potion_create_torso]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc: 我曾以為退後一步會像失敗。但……並非如此。

Thalara: 是的。這是理解。你的身體不是戲服。它是一場對話。而今日，它以更溫柔的語調訴說。
[我感覺到藥水在軀幹發揮作用]

passages.content_zh:
選擇要專注的身體部位

passages.name: interact_with_queen_random
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> The crown does not bend, Caelan it expects those who wear it to rise. I did not raise you to be ordinary. I raised you to endure, to become the shape Velmoria needs, not the one it desires. <>
<> And what if I’m not strong enough to become that shape? <>
<> Then I will grieve. Briefly. And then I will teach you again, as I always have. <>
<> <> I saw you hesitate during court today. Not in speech, but in bearing. A ruler cannot afford uncertainty not in voice, not in spine, not in the flicker of an eye. <>
<> You never hesitated? Not once? <>
<> Every day. But I buried it beneath velvet and iron. That is the difference between fear and failure. <>
<> <> Do not mistake silence for disapproval, Caelan. I do not speak of your struggles because I expect them. You were not chosen for ease. You were chosen for legacy. <>
<> Sometimes I wish you’d see me as more than a legacy. <>
<> I do. But I see you as a Velmorian first. And that is not a name given lightly. <>
<> <> I remember holding you as an infant fragile, loud, utterly unfit for the throne. And yet, even then, I knew you would grow teeth sharper than mine. <>
<> That doesn’t sound like love. <>
<> Love, my child, is not always gentle. Sometimes it wears armor and teaches you to bleed with dignity. <>
<> <> I have approved your next transformation session. Thalara assures me the changes will not be painful physically. Emotionally, I expect no such mercy. <>
<> Is that your way of preparin
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
alinora:
王冠不會彎折，Caelan，它期望佩戴者挺立。我撫養你並非為了平庸。我撫養你是為了讓你承受，為了讓你成為維爾莫里亞需要的那個形體，而非它所渴望的那個。

mc:
如果我不夠強大，無法成為那個形體呢？

alinora:
那麼我會哀悼。短暫地。然後我會再次教導你，一如往常。

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
alinora:
我今天在宮廷上看到你猶豫了。不是在言語上，而是在儀態上。統治者不能容許不確定性——不在聲音裡，不在脊樑裡，甚至不在眼神的閃爍裡。

mc:
你從未猶豫過？一次也沒有？

alinora:
每一天都猶豫。但我將它掩埋在絲絨與鋼鐵之下。這就是恐懼與失敗的區別。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
alinora:
別把沉默誤認為不贊同，Caelan。我不談論你的掙扎，是因為我預期它們會發生。你被選中並非為了安逸。你被選中是為了傳承。

mc:
有時我希望你能把我看作不只是傳承。

alinora:
我確實如此。但我首先將你視為維爾莫里亞人。而這並非一個輕易賦予的名字。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
alinora:
我記得你還是嬰兒時我抱著你——脆弱、吵鬧，完全不合適登上王座。然而，即便在那時，我就知道你會長出比我更鋒利的牙齒。

mc:
那聽起來不像愛。

alinora:
愛，我的孩子，並不總是溫柔的。有時它身披鎧甲，教會你帶著尊嚴流血。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
alinora:
我已批准你的下一次轉化療程。Thalara向我保證，變化在肉體上不會痛苦。情感上，我不指望有這樣的仁慈。

mc:
這是你準備我的方式？還是警告我？

alinora:
兩者皆是。女王學會像閱讀經文一樣解讀自己的痛苦。你也將如此。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
alinora:
貴族們私下議論你的軟弱。你的猶豫。但他們未能看到的是，柔軟可以像鋼鐵切割一樣令人窒息。

mc:
你認為我有一天能贏得他們的支持嗎？

alinora:
你不會贏得狼群的支持，Caelan。你要比他們活得更久。或者，你把你的對手餵給他們。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
alinora:
我曾夢想過一個女兒。並非因為我渴望女性特質，而是因為維爾莫里亞的法律要求如此。命運卻給了我你——出乎意料、美麗、不完整。

mc:
我讓你失望了嗎？

alinora:
你挑戰了我。為此，我感到無盡的驕傲與無盡的警惕。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
alinora:
宮廷將轉化視為奇觀。但這不是表演，Caelan。這是在血脈之火中對你靈魂的重新鍛造。

mc:
我不能保留一部分過去的自己嗎？

alinora:
如果你必須的話。但要記住，統治者不會向世界請求許可，去成為他們必須成為的樣子。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
alinora:
你的父親在花園裡為你哭泣。他相信愛應該保護，而非塑造。我羨慕他的柔軟……但我負擔不起。

mc:
你曾希望自己能更柔軟一些嗎？

alinora:
經常。但我很早就學到：柔軟是一種我們負擔不起的奢侈品——作為統治者不行。作為維爾莫里亞人也不行。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
alinora:
有一天，他們會將你的名字刻在這座城堡的石頭上。而我想知道他們會講述什麼樣的故事。那會是一個王子消失的傳說……還是一個女王征服命運的傳奇？

mc:
那取決於我做出的選擇。

alinora:
確實。而我打算給你所有必要的重擔，以確保你做出正確的選擇。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
alinora:
你以為看著你改變，我不會心痛嗎？我會。但那痛苦是我早已埋葬的幽靈，與那個如果愛而非法律統治這個王國、我可能成為的女人一同埋葬。

mc:
那為什麼不讓我選擇一條不同的道路？一條並非由古老規則所鋪設的道路？

alinora:
因為女王不走現成的路。她們在火與血中開闢道路，而歷史不容許繞道而行。

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
alinora:
你今天在宮廷中站得更挺直了。我注意到了。Serelyne女士也注意到了。那些毒蛇開始畏懼你的毒牙了。

mc:
那為什麼我仍然覺得自己只是在假裝？

alinora:
因為你確實是。但每一位君主最初都是自己皮囊中的神話。最終，信念會成為真相。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
alinora:
被注視蘊含著力量，Caelan。每一道目光都在考驗你。每一聲低語都在刻下印記。學會像穿著絲綢一樣承受審視——起初可能會摩擦不適，但它會成為你的第二層皮膚。

mc:
有時我希望他們全都停止注視。

alinora:
那他們就贏了。永遠不要讓你的敵人因你的退縮而感到舒適。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
alino

passages.name: interact_with_king_random
passages.content:
<> <> <> <> I heard the court whispering today… they see your changes, yes but none of them can see the courage it takes to become something new while the world watches. I see it, my child. And I am awed. <>
<> Sometimes I wish I didn’t have to be brave. <>
<> Even a flower opens with trembling petals, Caelan. Bravery isn’t the absence of fear it’s what you do while shaking. <>
<> <> I finished the painting today the one of the orchard in autumn. I left a space in the center, blank and glowing. It’s for you. I don’t yet know what colors to use. <>
<> Why paint me at all? I’m not finished. <>
<> Precisely. That’s when we’re most beautiful when we are still becoming. <>
<> <> Your mother teaches you how to stand like stone. I only ask that you remember how to bend like a reed. In time, storms pass but those who cannot bend are the ones who break. <>
<> I don’t know which one I’m supposed to be. <>
<> Both. You are your mother’s steel and my song. Let neither silence the other. <>
<> <> They dressed you in velvet and expectation today. I could see it how tightly it fit. Do not let the costume consume the actor, Caelan. Wear the role, but never forget the soul inside it. <>
<> What if the soul inside is changing, too? <>
<> Then let it. The wind never asks permission to shift. And yet it shapes everything in time. <>
<> <> I keep the letters you wrote as a child. The ones where you asked me if dragons were real, or if flowers could sing. You haven’t asked such things in years.
passages.content_zh:
[IF _i == 0]
    therion:
我今天聽見宮廷裡的耳語……他們看見你的改變，是的，但他們沒有一個人能看見，在世人注視下成為嶄新之人需要多大的勇氣。我看見了，我的孩子。我為之敬畏。

mc:
有時候我希望自己不必如此勇敢。

therion:
即使是花朵，綻放時花瓣也會顫抖，Caelan。勇敢並非毫無恐懼，而是在顫抖中依然前行。

[ELSEIF _i == 1]
therion:
我今天完成了那幅畫，秋天果園的那一幅。我在中央留了一處空白，空靈而發光。那是留給你的。我還不知道該用什麼顏色。

mc:
為什麼要畫我呢？我尚未完成。

therion:
正是如此。當我們仍在蛻變之時，那正是我們最美的時刻。

[ELSEIF _i == 2]
therion:
你的母親教你如何如磐石般屹立。我只求你記得如何如蘆葦般彎曲。風暴終會過去，但無法彎曲者終將折斷。

mc:
我不知道我該成為哪一種。

therion:
兩者皆是。你是你母親的鋼鐵，也是我的歌。別讓任何一方扼殺另一方。

[ELSEIF _i == 3]
therion:
他們今天為你穿上天鵝絨與期望。我看得出來，它有多麼束縛。別讓戲服吞噬了演員，Caelan。穿戴好你的角色，但永遠別忘記其中的靈魂。

mc:
如果裡面的靈魂也在改變呢？

therion:
那就讓它改變吧。風從不請求許可才轉向。然而，它終將塑造一切。

[ELSEIF _i == 4]
therion:
我保留著你兒時寫的信。那些你問我龍是否真實存在，或者花朵能否歌唱的信。你已經好幾年沒問過這樣的事了。

mc:
因為我學到了它們並不存在。

therion:
啊，但這正是你錯的地方。你只是停止了聆聽。

[ELSEIF _i == 5]
therion:
當我娶你母親時，他們說我軟弱。說藝術在王座旁沒有立足之地。但我選擇了愛而非權力，而我至今依然選擇它，每當我坐在你身旁時都是如此。

mc:
你可曾後悔沒有以自己的名義統治？

therion:
從不。我在溫柔中找到了力量，在花園裡，即使最柔軟的手也能拔除荊棘。

[ELSEIF _i == 6]
therion:
你的聲音……正在改變。不僅是音色，還有分量。它不再請求被聽見。它預期被聽見。這是任何王冠都無法教導的事。

mc:
你認為他們會真正聽從我嗎？

therion:
他們會的。但首先，你必須聆聽自己，並相信每一個字。

[ELSEIF _i == 7]
therion:
今天在花園裡，一株夜間開花的藤蔓在白日綻放了。無人知曉原因。我以你的名字為它命名，因為你同樣在違背期望中綻放。

mc:
我不覺得自己在綻放。我覺得自己在撕裂。

therion:
即使是種子，也必須裂開，花朵才能誕生。痛苦並非終點，它是蛻變的信號。

[ELSEIF _i == 8]
therion:
你的手曾經在握劍時顫抖。如今，它們在公開場合端茶杯時顫抖。這不是很奇怪嗎？我們所恐懼的，正說明了我們正在成為誰。

mc:
我害怕被注視。被評判。

therion:
那就讓他們看吧。但要給他們一場值得銘記的演出。

[ELSEIF _i == 9]
therion:
他們或許會用鮮花或荊棘為你加冕，Caelan，但我永遠會看見那個在雨中赤腳跳舞、問我喜悅是什麼滋味的孩子。

mc:
那是什麼滋味？

therion:
像溫暖的麵包、輕柔的笑聲，以及你的名字被驕傲地輕喚。是的，即使是現在，我依然嚐得到。

[ELSEIF _i == 10]
therion:
你今天站在貴族面前，像絲綢中的風暴，表面平靜，內裡顫動。但即使是顫動的風暴也能移山，Caelan。永遠別忘記這一點。

mc:
我以為他們看穿了我。

therion:
或許他們是看穿了。但即使是面具，只要你帶著目的戴得夠久，也會獲得力量。

[ELSEIF _i == 11]
therion:
我今天早晨譜了一段旋律。它讓我想起你——開頭柔和、不確定，但隨後逐漸增強。不是變成凱旋，不……是變成澄澈。那更為稀有，也珍貴得多。

mc:
你說得好像我已經知道自己是誰了。

therion:
你知道問題所在。答案稍後才會到來，如同從深處返回的回聲。

[ELSEIF _i == 12]
therion:
我曾以為愛意味著保護你免受痛苦。但我學到，愛意味著在你經歷痛苦時坐在你身旁，說：「你並不孤單。」

mc:
即使你不同意我正在成為的樣子？

therion:
尤其是那時。認同是政治。愛是陪伴。

[ELSEIF _i == 13]
therion:
我今天在鏡中看見了你——不，不是你的倒影，而是你的姿態。你揚起下巴的樣子。你看起來像是開始為自己的模樣感到驕傲，而不僅僅是忍受它。

mc:
那感覺不像驕傲。感

👑 Kingdom of Velmoria

An Interactive Gender Bender Fantasy Story

(18+ Mature Content)

Warning: This story contains themes of gender transformation, magical body alteration, erotic fantasy, and political intrigue.

This is a gender bender game. If you are not comfortable with these themes, please do not proceed.

In the kingdom of Velmoria, to rule is to be Queen. You are Prince Caelan, the sole heir about to undergo a mystical transformation to inherit your birthright... or reject it entirely.

Your destiny begins now.

<>

passages.name: intro
passages.content:
<>

👑 *Kingdom of Velmoria* 👑

Genre: Medieval Fantasy · Interactive Story · Gender Transformation

Beyond the emerald hills and silver rivers lies Velmoria, a kingdom steeped in magic and ruled by generations of powerful queens. Its strength flows not from swords alone, but from ancient rites, arcane wisdom, and the unbroken legacy of matriarchal rule.

For centuries, only daughters born of royal blood have ascended to the throne. But fate has played a curious hand: the Queen's only heir is a prince.

You are Prince Caelan noble by birth, burdened by destiny. Raised in the art of battle, tutored in courtly manners, and shadowed by expectations you were never meant to bear. Yet, the throne calls for a queen… and Velmoria’s survival demands transformation.

Under the guidance of the Royal Mage, the kingdom’s ancient feminine rites will remake you. Your journey will be one of magic, discovery, and desire reshaping not just your body, but your identity and purpose.

⚠️ Mature Content Ahead: This story features magical gender transformation, feminization themes, and adult choices. Proceed only if you are comfortable with such content.

<>
passages.content_zh:
👑 *維爾莫里亞王國* 👑
類型：中世紀奇幻 · 互動故事 · 性別轉換

  在翡翠丘陵與銀色河流之外，坐落著維爾莫里亞——一個深植於魔法之中，由歷代強大女王統治的王國。它的力量不僅源於刀劍，更來自古老的儀式、奧秘的智慧，以及母系統治不間斷的傳承。

  數個世紀以來，唯有擁有王室血統的女兒能登上王位。但命運開了個奇特的玩笑：女王唯一的繼承人，是一位王子。

  你是 Caelan 王子，生而高貴，卻為命運所累。你學習戰鬥技藝，受教於宮廷禮儀，並背負著你本不該承擔的期望。然而，王座呼喚著一位女王……而維爾莫里亞的存續，要求一場轉變。

  在皇家法師的指導下，王國古老的女性儀式將重塑你。你的旅程將充滿魔法、發現與渴望，不僅改變你的身體，更重塑你的身份與使命。

  ⚠️ 成人內容提示：本故事包含魔法性別轉換、女性化主題及成人選擇。僅在您能接受此類內容的前提下繼續。

進入領域

✦ A Soft Frame to Shape ✦

You begin your journey with a lean, wiry build neither imposing nor fragile. Your chest is flat, your muscles are modest, and your manhood, though present, is unremarkable in size. This body, while male, offers little resistance to the subtle reshaping of magic. There’s little bulk to shed, few hard edges to soften, and no overwhelming masculinity to subdue. In many ways, you are already half sculpted clay ripe for refinement. Feminine potions will take quickly to your form, molding your curves with grace and ease.

💠 Transformation Difficulty: Low
💠 Key Challenge: Internal acceptance rather than physical resistance
<> <> <> <

✦ 待塑之柔韌軀體 ✦

  你以一副精瘦、結實的體格開始旅程，既不魁梧也不脆弱。你的胸膛平坦，肌肉適中，而你的男性特徵雖存在，尺寸卻不突出。這副身體雖為男性，卻對魔法的細微重塑幾乎沒有抵抗力。沒有太多體積需要削減，沒有堅硬的線條需要軟化，也沒有壓倒性的陽剛氣質需要壓制。從許多方面來說，你已是一塊半成形的黏土，正待精雕細琢。女性化的藥劑將迅速作用於你的形體，優雅而輕鬆地塑造出你的曲線。

Years of training, battles, or discipline have sculpted your body into a strong and well defined form. Your pectorals are solid, your arms powerful, and your manhood bold and assertive. This is the body of a warrior or a proud prince a figure of undeniable masculinity. Magic will struggle here, not just to soften your muscles, but to coax them into yielding. Breasts will have to rise from a firm chest, curves must battle with sinew, and your sex must be reimagined against stubborn flesh. The path ahead will test not only your body’s pliability, but your will to surrender control.

✦ A Monument to Masculinity ✦

You are the pinnacle of the male form massive, carved, and unrelenting. Your chest is thick with muscle, your limbs packed with raw strength, and your manhood... a challenge unto itself. Every inch of you screams dominance and virility. Magic doesn’t flow easily through such resistance it has to break before it can reshape. Feminization will be a slow, often painful unmaking of a body that was built to resist change. The potions must work harder, longer, and more intensely. Progress may come with setbacks. ✦ 男性氣概的紀念碑 ✦

  你是男性體格的巔峰——龐大、精雕細琢且堅不可摧。你的胸膛厚實肌肉糾結，四肢充滿原始力量，而你的男性雄風……本身就是一種挑戰。你的每一寸肌膚都吶喊著支配力與生命力。魔法難以流經如此頑抗的軀體——它必須先被打破，才能重塑。女性化將是一場緩慢、時常痛苦的解構過程，針對這具為抵抗改變而打造的身軀。藥劑必須更努力、更持久、更強烈地作用。進展可能伴隨著挫折。但或許，紀念碑越宏偉，其轉變就越輝煌。

passages.name: notice
passages.content:
<> <> <> <>

⚖️ The Council Convenes ⚖️

The grand hall of Velmoria's royal palace is adorned with banners bearing the sigil of the lioness, symbol of the matriarchal lineage. As Prince Caelan enters, the murmurs of the assembled nobles hush. At the head of the chamber sits Queen Alinora, her gaze steady and resolute.

"Prince Caelan," she begins, her voice echoing through the hall, "you have reached the age of twenty, a milestone that brings with it the weight of destiny. Our kingdom stands at a crossroads, and your path must be chosen with care."

The Queen gestures to the assembled council: Lady Serelyne Virellis, High Counselor, Archmage Thalara Moonveil, Sir Aldric Vornhelm, Commander of the Royal Guard, Lord Malrec Thorne, Master of Statecraft, and Mistress Veletia Roswyn, Royal Clothier.

"Tradition dictates that the throne passes through the queen's bloodline. With no daughters to inherit, we face a dilemma. Two paths lie before you:"

  1. Remain as you are, marry a noblewoman of suitable standing, and she shall ascend as queen while you serve as king consort.
  2. Undergo the sacred transformation, embracing the essence of our foremothers, and ascend as queen in your own right, preserving the unbroken matrilineal line.

The chamber falls silent, all eyes upon Caelan as the weight of choice settles upon him.

[[Contemplate Your Path|Contemplate_Your_Path]] [[Skip Intro|into_11]]
<>
passages.content_zh:
⚖️ 議會召開 ⚖️

  Velmoria 王宮的大廳裝飾著印有母獅紋章的旗幟，那是母系血統的象徵。當 Caelan 王子步入時，聚集的貴族們的低語聲靜了下來。大廳首席坐著 Alinora 女王，她的目光沉穩而堅定。

  "Caelan 王子，"她開口，聲音在大廳中迴盪，"你已年滿二十，這個里程碑帶來了命運的重量。我們的王國正處於十字路口，你的道路必須謹慎選擇。"

  女王示意在場的議會成員：高等顧問 Serelyne Virellis 女士、大法師 Thalara Moonveil、皇家衛隊指揮官 Aldric Vornhelm 爵士、國政大師 Malrec Thorne 勳爵，以及皇家裁縫師 Veletia Roswyn 夫人。

  "傳統規定，王位須由女王血脈傳承。由於沒有女兒繼承，我們面臨一個難題。兩條道路擺在你面前："

  保持現狀，娶一位地位相當的貴族女子，她將登基為女王，而你則作為王夫輔佐。
  接受神聖轉變，擁抱我們先祖母的本質，憑自身資格登基為女王，延續不間斷的母系血脈。

  大廳陷入寂靜，所有的目光都落在 Caelan 身上，選擇的重擔沉甸甸地壓在他肩頭。

[深思你的道路]
[跳過介紹]

passages.name: Contemplate_Your_Path
passages.content:
<> <> Your Majesty, may I commend the clarity of your decree. The boy ahem, the Prince deserves to understand the weight of such a crossroads. Rare it is for a ruler to offer choice when the throne’s need is clear. <>
<> It is not a choice, Lord Malrec. It is destiny guided by wisdom. Caelan is not just a son. He is Velmoria’s lifeblood our hope of continuation. <>
<> Speak plainly. You mean to bend the boy into a queen? Swap steel for silk? His sword arm is untested, but not unworthy. <>
<> Enough. This is not a debate of worth. My son was born of my womb, he carries the lineage of the High Matrons. What flows in his veins is more sacred than tradition. <>
[[Move forth|into_1]] <>
passages.content_zh:
malrec:
陛下，請容我讚賞您諭令的清晰。這孩子——咳——王子理應理解此等十字路口的重量。在王位需求明確之時，統治者仍給予選擇實屬罕見。

serelyne:
這不是選擇，Malrec 勳爵。這是智慧引導的命運。Caelan 不僅僅是一個兒子。他是 Velmoria 的生命線——我們延續的希望。

aldric:
說明白點。你是想把這小子掰成女王？用絲綢換鋼鐵？他的劍術未經考驗，但並非毫無價值。

alinora:
夠了。這不是價值之辯。我的兒子誕生於我的子宮，他承載著高等母系族長的傳承。他血管中流淌的，比傳統更為神聖。

[向前]

passages.name: into_1
passages.content:
<> <> ...May I speak, Mother? <>
<> You may speak as heir apparent, Caelan. Until now, you’ve been shielded from council. No longer. <>
<> Then let me say this, You ask much. You ask that I lay down not just my name and title, but... my self. My shape. My manhood. And you call it duty. How can I choose without losing something I’ve not yet had the chance to understand? <>
<> You speak well, my son. Or perhaps... my daughter in waiting. Know this, Your truth need not die, even if your form changes. I lost much to become consort. But I gained a peace I did not know was possible. <>
[[Move forth|into_2]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
……母親，我可以發言嗎？

alinora:
你可以以王儲的身份發言，Caelan。直到此刻之前，你一直被隔離於議會之外。但現在不再如此了。

mc:
那麼容我說：您要求甚多。您要求我放棄的不僅是我的名字與頭銜，還有……我的自我。我的形體。我的男子氣概。而您稱之為責任。在我連自己尚未有機會理解的事物都將失去的情況下，我該如何選擇？

therion:
你說得很好，我的兒子。或者也許……我等待中的女兒。須知，即使你的形體改變，你的真實自我不必消亡。我為了成為王夫失去了很多。但我獲得了從未知曉可能存在的平靜。

[向前]

passages.name: into_2
passages.content:
<> <> And what a divine peace it could be! Imagine, Caelan silk draped on strong shoulders, a crown resting on freshly curled hair, eyes like yours commanding hearts and thrones alike! <>
<> Not the time, Veletia. <>
<> You fear the unknown. So did I when I entered court. So did your mother when she first killed a rebel prince at sixteen. This is not a loss, my Prince. It is an ascension, one only the worthy may undertake. <>
<> And if I say no? If I take a wife and let her rule? Will you all stand by me then? <>
[[Move forth|into_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
veletia:
而那會是多麼神聖的平靜啊！想像一下，Caelan——絲綢披覆在強壯的肩膀上，王冠輕放在新捲的秀髮上，像你這樣的眼睛，足以統御人心與王座！

aldric:
現在不是時候，Veletia。

serelyne:
你恐懼未知。我初入宮廷時也是如此。你母親十六歲初次斬殺叛亂王子時也是如此。這不是失去，我的王子。這是一種昇華，唯有配得上的人才能承擔。

mc:
那如果我說不呢？如果我娶妻並讓她統治？屆時你們都會支持我嗎？

[向前]

passages.name: into_3
passages.content:
<> <> I will stand beside you. But not behind you. A queen leads. A consort supports. The throne demands its sovereign to be sovereign not through marriage, but through birth... and rebirth. <>
<> I have shaped flesh before, Caelan. With consent. With care. You would not become a stranger, but rather... a clearer version of yourself. If there is womanhood in you, I will draw it out like a jewel from the earth. <>
<> You all speak as though you know me better than I know myself. But you’ve never asked: Do I want this? <>
<> Then ask yourself, my child. Do you want to be queen? To rule with the strength of your mother and the wisdom of your ancestors? Or do you wish to remain a prince, bound by tradition and expectation? <>
[[If the throne demands a princess, then I shall become her|into_4]] |

[[No crown is worth losing myself. I will take a wife, not a new form|into_5]] <>
passages.content_zh:
Alinora:
我會站在你身邊。但不會站在你身後。女王領導。王夫輔佐。王座要求它的君主必須是君主——不是透過婚姻，而是透過血脈……以及重生。

Thalara:
我曾塑造過血肉，Caelan。在對方同意之下。以謹慎的態度。你不會變成一個陌生人，而是……一個更清晰的自己。如果你內在有女性的一面，我將把它引導出來，如同從大地中取出一顆寶石。

mc:
你們說得好像你們比我更了解我自己。但你們從未問過：我想要這樣嗎？

Alinora:
那麼問問你自己，我的孩子。你想成為女王嗎？以你母親的力量和你祖先的智慧來統治？還是你希望繼續當個王子，被傳統和期望所束縛？

[如果王座需要一位公主，那麼我將成為她] |

[沒有王冠值得我失去自我。我會娶一位妻子，而不是接受一個新的形態]

passages.name: into_4
passages.content:
<> <> I have never feared duty. And though this path is strange, even frightening... if my body must change to match the crown, then let it be so. If being a princess means protecting our bloodline, our realm then I will embrace that role, fully and without shame. <>
<> Then rise, my daughter-to-be. You shall be shaped by the finest magics, trained in poise, grace, and might. Velmoria shall know a queen forged not only by blood... but by choice. <>
High Counselor Serelyne Virellis rose from her seat, her silk robes whispering as she stepped forward. Her eyes, sharp as daggers yet dignified, settled on Caelan with solemn approval.
<> Then it is decided. From this day forth, you shall begin the Rite of Three Pillars sacred to our bloodline, essential to the making of a Queen. It is no simple affair, my prince... or perhaps I should say, my lady-to-be. <>
Queen Alinora gave a faint smile.
<> You will not walk this path alone. Each pillar of your transformation will be guided by a master in their field. These trials will shape you not only in body, but in mind and bearing so that no soul in Velmoria shall doubt your right to rule. <>

The Three Pillars of Transformation:
  • Mental Conversion — to teach you to think, speak, and judge as a queen.
  • Physical Conversion — to shape your body into the vessel of a ruling woman.
  • Training for Rule and Survival — to ensure you can protect, lead, and inspire.

Caelan’s heart beat like a war drum. This was no coronation. It was a reforging of the self.

[[Begin with the First Pillar: Mental Conversion|mental_conversion]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
我從未畏懼過責任。儘管這條路很陌生，甚至令人恐懼……如果我的身體必須改變以匹配這頂王冠，那就讓它改變吧。如果成為一位公主意味著保護我們的血脈、我們的王國，那麼我將全心擁抱這個角色，毫無羞恥。

Alinora:
那麼起身吧，我未來的女兒。你將接受最精妙魔法的塑造，接受儀態、優雅與力量的訓練。Velmoria 將認識一位不僅由血脈鑄就……更由選擇鑄就的女王。

高等顧問 Serelyne Virellis 從座位上起身，絲綢長袍在她向前走動時沙沙作響。她銳利如匕首卻不失莊嚴的目光落在 Caelan 身上，帶著莊重的認可。

Serelyne:
那麼就這麼決定了。從今日起，你將開始進行「三柱儀式」，此儀式對我們的血脈至關神聖，對女王的塑造至關重要。這並非易事，我的王子……或許我該說，我未來的女士。

Alinora 女王露出一抹淡淡的微笑。

Alinora:
你不會獨自走這條路。你轉變的每一根支柱，都將由該領域的大師引導。這些試煉不僅會塑造你的身體，還會塑造你的心智與風範，讓 Velmoria 沒有任何靈魂會質疑你的統治權。

轉變的三根支柱：

  心智轉化 —— 教導你像女王一樣思考、言談與判斷。
  身體轉化 —— 將你的身體塑造成一位統治女性的容器。
  統治與生存訓練 —— 確保你能保護、領導並激勵人心。

Caelan 的心臟如戰鼓般擂動。這不是加冕典禮。這是自我的重塑。

[從第一根支柱開始：心智轉化]

passages.name: into_5
passages.content:
<>

Dev Message - Not Implemented this path yet..

[[Go Back|into_3]] <>
passages.content_zh:
開發者訊息 - 此路徑尚未實裝..

[返回]

passages.name: mental_conversion
passages.content:
<> <>

Lady Serelyne Virellis stepped forward, her expression unreadable.

<> The crown sits not just on the brow it molds the mind beneath it. You, Caelan, shall think not as a prince, nor even as a man, but as the sovereign woman this realm demands. <>

She detailed the process: days spent in discourse, etiquette drills, court simulations, and reflections designed to dissolve and rebuild habits, instincts, and internal beliefs. Each session will challenge how Caelan views himself and others.

Gameplay Focus:

  • Debates and dialogue choices that affect Caelan’s evolving personality.
  • Mental tasks that explore femininity, leadership, diplomacy, and empathy.
  • Results vary, Caelan might fully embrace his femininity, or merely adopt it outwardly.
<> You may struggle, But should you succeed, the court will not see a transformed man pretending at queenship. They will see a queen born and bred. <>
[[Proceed to the Second Pillar: Physical Conversion|physical_conversion]]
<>
passages.content_zh:
Serelyne Virellis 女士向前一步，表情難以捉摸。

Serelyne:
王冠不僅戴在額頭上，它更塑造其下的心智。你，Caelan，將不再以王子、甚至不再以男人的方式思考，而是以這個王國所要求的統治女性的方式思考。

她詳述了過程：花費數日進行論辯、禮儀訓練、宮廷模擬，以及旨在瓦解並重建習慣、本能和內在信念的反思。每一場訓練都將挑戰 Caelan 看待自己與他人的方式。

遊戲玩法重點：

  影響 Caelan 逐漸演變之人格的辯論與對話選擇。
  探索女性特質、領導力、外交手腕與同理心的心智任務。
  結果各異，Caelan 可能完全擁抱其女性特質，或僅是表面採納。

Serelyne:
你可能會掙扎。但若你成功，宮廷將不會看到一個偽裝成女王的變形男子。他們將看到一位天生與養成的女王。

[繼續進行第二根支柱：身體轉化]

passages.name: physical_conversion
passages.content:
<> <>

Archmage Thalara Moonveil stood with staff in hand, her silver hair glowing faintly under the chandelier's light.

<> Your form shall match your future, and for that, we invoke the Old Alchemy. You learn how to make potions and will drink of ancient potions ones that change sinew and spirit alike. <>

She explained that Caelan would undergo a gradual transformation: the shrinking and rearrangement of his body, growth of feminine features, voice and scent alterations all modifiable by the player through quest progress and potion crafting.

Gameplay Focus:

  • Potion brewing mini-games and ingredient collection quests.
  • Options to control speed and extent of transformation (fully feminine, androgynous, etc.).
  • Caelan can resist, embrace, or customize his transformation journey.
<> The body is clay in the hands of will and magic, But it is you who must decide its final shape. <>
[[Proceed to the Third Pillar: Rule and Survival|rule_and_survival]]
<>
passages.content_zh:
大法師 Thalara Moonveil 手持法杖站立，她的銀髮在枝形吊燈的光芒下微微發亮。

Thalara:
你的形體應與你的未來相稱，為此，我們將動用古老鍊金術。你將學習如何製作藥劑，並飲用那些能同時改變筋骨與精神的古老藥劑。

她解釋道，Caelan 將經歷一個漸進的轉變：身體的縮小與重組、女性特徵的生長、聲音與氣味的改變——所有這些都可以由玩家透過任務進度和藥劑調製來調整。

遊戲玩法重點：

  藥劑調製小遊戲與原料收集任務。
  可控制轉變速度與程度的選項（完全女性化、中性化等）。
  Caelan 可以抗拒、擁抱或自訂他的轉變旅程。

Thalara:
身體是意志與魔法手中的黏土。但決定其最終形狀的，必須是你自己。

[繼續進行第三根支柱：統治與生存]

passages.name: rule_and_survival
passages.content:
<> <>

Queen Alinora herself rose now, her voice strong with pride.

<> A ruler is more than a mind and a form. She must wield power, charm lords, quiet dissent, ride into war if needed, and dazzle her court with presence. <>

Caelan’s Training Will Include:

  • Combat: With Sir Aldric Vornhelm, learning swordplay, archery, and mounted combat.
  • Politics: With Lord Malrec Thorne ruthless diplomacy, law, and espionage.
  • Feminine Arts: With Mistress Veletia Roswyn fashion, allure, and court poise.

Gameplay Focus:

  • Daily schedules and time management mechanics.
  • Mini-games (duels, debates, wardrobe challenges).
  • Reputation systems: how nobles, knights, and commoners perceive Caelan.
<> You must earn the kingdom’s love and fear, Caelan," the Queen declared. "Only then will the crown truly be yours. <>
[[Move forth|into_6]]
<>
passages.content_zh:
Alinora 女王此刻親自起身，她的聲音充滿驕傲，鏗鏘有力。

alinora:
統治者不僅僅是頭腦與軀體。她必須掌握權力、魅惑領主、平息異議、必要時馳騁沙場，並以自身風采令宮廷為之傾倒。

Caelan 的訓練將包含：

  戰鬥：由 Aldric Vornhelm 爵士指導，學習劍術、箭術與馬戰。
  政治：由 Malrec Thorne 勳爵指導，學習無情的外交手腕、法律與間諜活動。
  女性技藝：由 Veletia Roswyn 夫人指導，學習時尚、魅力與宮廷儀態。

遊戲玩法重點：

  每日行程與時間管理機制。
  迷你遊戲（決鬥、辯論、衣櫥挑戰）。
  聲望系統：貴族、騎士與平民如何看待 Caelan。

alinora:
「你必須贏得王國的愛戴與敬畏，Caelan，」女王宣告。「唯有如此，王冠才真正屬於你。」

[Move forth]

passages.name: into_6
passages.content:
<> <> Then I accept the Rite of Three Pillars. I will reshape myself, body and soul, for the sake of Velmoria. I only ask to understand what lies ahead, from those who will guide me. <>
Queen Alinora nodded solemnly, gesturing toward the seated figures flanking the long marble table.
<> Then let your mentors speak, so you know what awaits you when the sun next rises. <>
Lady Serelyne Virellis stepped forward first, hands folded neatly before her. Her voice was crisp, yet carried a warmth hidden beneath years of diplomacy.
<> Prince Caelan, soon to be Princess Caelan, you will be entrusted into my care for the shaping of your mind. Many believe a crown rests on the head... I say it rests upon the soul. To lead Velmoria, you must think as she does. Not merely as a woman, but as a queen. <>
<> You speak of thoughts and instincts... but how does one change those? <>
[[Move forth|into_7]] <>
passages.content_zh:
mc:
那麼，我接受「三柱儀式」。為了 Velmoria，我將重塑自身，從肉體到靈魂。
我只求從即將引導我的人們口中，知曉前方有何考驗。

Alinora 女王莊嚴地點頭，示意向長長大理石桌兩側就座的人們。
alinora:
那麼，讓你的導師們發言吧，如此你便知曉明日太陽升起時，等待你的是什麼。

Serelyne Virellis 女士首先上前，雙手優雅地交疊身前。
她的聲音清晰俐落，卻蘊含著多年外交生涯下隱藏的溫情。
serelyne:
Caelan 王子，即將成為 Caelan 公主的你，將被託付給我，以塑造你的心智。
許多人認為王冠戴在頭上……我則說，它立足於靈魂之上。
要領導 Velmoria，你必須像她一樣思考。不僅僅作為一個女人，更要作為一位女王。

mc:
您談及思想與本能……但一個人要如何改變這些？

[Move forth]

passages.name: into_7
passages.content:
<> <> Through observation. Discipline. Trial and test. You will spend days in court, mimicking our customs. You will learn to speak softly, but with power. To smile in silence and command a room. I will challenge how you view status, beauty, ambition even vulnerability. You will leave behind your princehood not as a denial, but as a foundation. <>
She leaned closer, her voice lowering.
<> And know this many rulers have sat on thrones. But only those who understand the art of being perceived as more than mortal… truly rule. <>
Next, the air seemed to shift as Archmage Thalara Moonveil rose, her silver robes glowing faintly in the firelight.
<> And I shall craft your form, dear heir. With ancient alchemy and divine threads of change, your flesh shall become as soft silk woven anew. But make no mistake this is not a costume. It is rebirth. <>
<> Will it hurt? Will I lose who I am? <>
[[Move forth|into_8]] <>
passages.content_zh:
serelyne:
透過觀察。紀律。試煉與考驗。你將花費時日在宮廷中，模仿我們的習俗。
你將學會輕聲細語，卻字字千鈞。學會以靜默的微笑掌控全場。
我將挑戰你對地位、美貌、野心，乃至脆弱的看法。
你將拋下你的王子身份，並非否定它，而是以其為基石。

她傾身靠近，壓低了聲音。
serelyne:
並須知曉，許多統治者曾坐於王座之上。
但唯有那些懂得被視為超凡存在之藝術的人……才真正統治。

接著，氣氛似乎隨著大法師 Thalara Moonveil 的起身而轉變，她的銀色長袍在火光中隱隱發光。
thalara:
而我，親愛的繼承人，將塑造你的形體。
憑藉古老的鍊金術與神聖的變化之絲，你的血肉將如軟綢般被重新織就。
但切勿誤解：這並非一套戲服。這是重生。

mc:
會痛嗎？我會失去自我嗎？

[Move forth]

passages.name: into_8
passages.content:
<> <> Pain, yes... in moments. But more than pain, there is uncertainty. Your form will shift slowly organs altered, voice softened, curves blooming where none were before. You may choose the pace swift and intense, or gentle like river stones worn by time. I will guide your hand in crafting the vessel that reflects your future self. <>
She smiled with a strange, motherly sorrow.
<> But who you are, Caelan... that is not so easily lost. It will be reshaped, not erased. <>
Finally, Sir Aldric Vornhelm rose like a mountain of armor and gruff resolve.
<> You won’t rule from silken cushions. Queens ride to war, give judgment from steel thrones, and sometimes kill with their bare hands. You’ll wield a blade, just like a prince. You’ll fall off a horse, bruise, sweat, bleed... until you ride like fire and strike like justice. <>
<> Even after I become... physically different? <>
[[Move forth|into_9]] <>
passages.content_zh:
thalara:
疼痛，是的……在某些時刻。但比疼痛更甚的，是不確定性。
你的形體將逐漸改變——器官重塑、嗓音柔化、曲線在原本平坦之處綻放。
你可以選擇步調：迅疾而強烈，或如經年河水磨礪卵石般溫和。
我將引導你親手打造那具映照未來自我的容器。

她露出一個奇特、帶著母性悲憫的微笑。
thalara:
但你是誰，Caelan……那並不容易失去。它將被重塑，而非抹除。

最後，Aldric Vornhelm 爵士如一座身披鎧甲、決心堅毅的山嶽般站起。
aldric:
你不會只從絲絨軟墊上統治。
女王會騎馬征戰、在鋼鐵王座上施行審判，有時甚至親手殺敵。
你將揮舞刀劍，一如王子。
你會墜馬、瘀傷、流汗、流血……直到你騎行如烈火，揮擊如正義。

mc:
即使在我變得……身體不同之後？

[Move forth]

passages.name: into_9
passages.content:
<> <> Especially then. The sword don’t care what’s between your legs. Neither do enemies. Strength is earned, not given by potions or pretty words. <>
Sir Aldric returned to his place, crossing his arms. Then came Lord Malrec Thorne, his hands clasped behind his back like a spider with manners.
<> And I shall teach you the shadows behind the throne. Espionage. Law. The weight of secrets and the price of keeping them. You will sit through simulations of rebellion, court betrayal, and assassination trials. You will learn to lie with elegance, to charm enemies, to punish with grace. <>
<> How can I be sure I won’t lose myself to these games? <>
<> You can’t. You will be shaped by them. And one day, you may wake up wondering if the mask became your face. But such is rule an artful performance of truth and deceit. I will teach you both. <>
[[Move forth|into_10]] <>
passages.content_zh:
aldric:
正是那時更該如此。劍才不在乎你兩腿之間有什麼。
敵人也不在乎。
力量是掙來的，不是靠藥水或漂亮話給的。

Aldric 爵士回到座位，雙臂交疊。
接著是 Malrec Thorne 勳爵，他雙手背在身後，像隻彬彬有禮的蜘蛛。
malrec:
而我將教導你王座背後的陰影。
間諜活動。法律。秘密的重量與保守秘密的代價。
你將親身經歷模擬的叛亂、宮廷背叛與暗殺審判。
你將學會優雅地說謊、魅惑敵人、優雅地施以懲罰。

mc:
我如何能確信自己不會迷失於這些權謀遊戲中？

malrec:
你不能。你將被它們塑造。終有一日，你可能醒來疑惑，面具是否已成了你的臉龐。
但統治便是如此——一場真實與欺瞞交織的巧妙演出。我將兩者都教給你。

[Move forth]

passages.name: into_10
passages.content:
<> Then, in a sudden flourish of silk and laughter, Mistress Veletia Roswyn swept into the center like a flame in human form.
<> And I, darling, shall make you divine. You will move with poise, speak with elegance, dress with meaning. Corsets, gowns, veils each stitch shall speak for your soul. You’ll walk into a hall and silence will follow, not from fear... but from awe. <>
<> All from clothing? <>
<> Clothing is not cloth. It is language. It is armor. It is spellwork. And you, my dear Caelan, will become the most enchanting vision this kingdom has ever dared to imagine. <>
[[Move forth|into_11]] <>
passages.content_zh:
接著，伴隨著一陣突如其來的絲綢窸窣與笑語，Veletia Roswyn 夫人如一道人形火焰般翩然掃入廳堂中央。
veletia:
而我，親愛的，將使你超凡入聖。
你將姿態優雅地移動，談吐高貴地言語，衣著充滿深意。
束腹、禮服、面紗——每一針線都將訴說你的靈魂。你將步入殿堂，隨之而來的將是寂靜，並非出於恐懼……而是出於敬畏。

mc:
這一切，都只靠衣著？

veletia:
衣著並非布料。它是一種語言。
它是盔甲。它是咒術。
而你，我親愛的 Caelan，將成為這王國至今敢於想像的、最令人著迷的幻景。

[向前邁進]

passages.name: into_11
passages.content:
<> As the final words settled into the warm silence of the chamber, the great bell of the royal tower tolled twice, signaling the descent of evening.

Queen Alinora stood once more, her face unreadable.
<> The day is late. You will begin tomorrow, with the dawn. For now, rest. Consider what you have heard. Your journey does not begin with your first lesson. it begins with your first dream as one destined to change. <>
<> Thank you... all of you. I don’t know what tomorrow brings. But I will rise to meet it. <>
Caelan bowed. The great doors opened silently. As he exited the chamber, his boots echoed down the hallway, carrying with them the weight of a new destiny.

The night was still, and the stars above Velmoria shimmered like the eyes of forgotten queens, watching. <> <> <> [[Leave Council Room|castle_map_front_select]]
passages.content_zh:
當最後的話語沉入廳室溫暖的寂靜之中，皇家高塔的大鐘敲響了兩次，宣告夜晚的降臨。
Alinora 女王再次起身，面容深不可測。
alinora:
天色已晚。你們將於明日黎明開始。
現在，去休息吧。好好思量你們所聽聞的一切。
你的旅程並非始於第一堂課，而是始於你作為命中變革者的第一個夢境。

mc:
謝謝……謝謝你們所有人。我不知道明日將帶來什麼。但我會起身迎接。

Caelan 躬身行禮。巨大的門扉無聲開啟。
當他步出廳室，靴聲在長廊中迴響，承載著一份全新命運的重量。
夜色靜謐，Velmoria 上空的星辰閃爍，宛如被遺忘的女王們的眼睛，正注視著。

[離開議事廳]
